prompts.text: Image1 volcanic duel arena (the obsidian platform with lava rivers and ruined dark-side temple) Image2 Vipera character sheet (Mei / Darth Vipera) Subject: Image 2 Vipera — a lean East Asian woman in her late twenties, jet-black hair past the shoulders, Sith-amber eyes with faint dark veining at temples, fitted black leather robe with gold piping, mandarin collar, gold cobra-head belt buckle, knee-high black combat boots. She wields a double-bladed laser sword with twin crackling crimson blades and a matte-black hilt etched with gold serpent scales. Opponent: a male warrior in earth-toned tunic robes, brown leather belt, weathered boots, short dark hair, lean build, wielding a single-bladed blue laser sword. image1 Location: an obsidian platform of cracked black volcanic rock fractured with glowing crimson magma seams, suspended over a canyon of molten lava, jagged basalt spires rising into ash-choked sky, an erupting volcano in the far distance, a ruined dark-stone temple on a cliff to the right, lava waterfalls cascading into the canyon below. Timeline: (0-2s) Wide low-angle stabilized tracking — Vipera spins her saberstaff into a horizontal guard, robe panels flaring, embers drifting between them; the warrior meets her with a high diagonal cover, blue blade angled across his body. (2-5s) Hard cut to handheld medium — Vipera unleashes a spinning double-blade flurry, the twin crimson blades carving figure-eights through the air; he shells up, deflects high, low, high, retreating one step per parry, sparks bursting at each clash. (5-7s) Smash cut to ECU static on Vipera's outstretched left hand — fingers clench and yank backward, a Force pull. (7-9s) Cut to wide crane descent — the warrior is jerked off-balance forward; Vipera surges in with a thrusting double-blade strike, he pivots and deflects with a sharp angle, blades screaming. (9-12s) Cut to medium close-up handheld — blades lock overhead in a screaming bind, Vipera breaks contact and drives a front kick into his sternum, sending him staggering back to one knee, his blue blade dropping low as her crimson blades hover at his throat. Style: Cinematic photorealism shot on Arri Alexa 35, anamorphic widescreen. Underlight from molten lava casting hot orange glow upward across both fighters; crimson saber light and blue saber light cross-rimming faces; volumetric ash and floating embers throughout the air; deep black shadows in robe folds. Color grade pushed warm — black, crimson, amber, ember-gold — with the blue blade as the only cool element in frame. Practical-effects sensibility, no CGI plastic look, no game-engine rendering, film grain texture, slight anamorphic flare on saber blades only. Choreography in the lineage of late-90s and early-2000s mythic blade duels — flowing, balletic, weight-bearing, Form II precision against aggressive rotational strikes. Constraints: Maintain face consistency on Vipera and the warrior across all cuts. Twin crimson blades on Vipera's weapon at all times — never single-bladed. Single blue blade on male warrior's weapon consistent at all times. Cobra belt buckle visible whenever her waist is in frame. Steady motion, no morphing between body types, no warping of the saber hilts during spins. Lava glow consistent across cuts. No reflection shots in the blades or obsidian floor.

prompts.text: Seedance 2.0 Prompt Share via @fal Cinematography: A stationary macro close-up shot, shallow depth of field, focused on a tall clear glass with condensation forming on the outside. Environment: Clean, minimalist dark slate countertop with warm amber undertones, a cinnamon stick resting casually in the background out of focus. Lighting: Warm, directional natural light casting long side shadows, highlighting the caramel tones of the drink and the frost forming on the glass. Style: Photorealistic, high-frame-rate textures (foamy espresso, crystalline ice, silky cold foam). Timed Sequence [00:00–00:15]: [00:00–00:03] Action: Dark brown sugar and a heavy pinch of cinnamon are spooned into a cocktail shaker. Two fresh espresso shots pour directly onto the sugar, dissolving it instantly into a dark, syrupy pool at the bottom.SFX: A granular scrape of sugar, then the sharp hiss of hot espresso hitting metal. [00:03–00:05] Action: A full scoop of ice is added to the shaker. The lid snaps on with a firm click.SFX: Loud, chaotic ice rattling settling into a dull metallic clunk as the lid locks. [00:05–00:08] Action: The shaker is vigorously shaken in frame — held low and close to camera — for several seconds. Frost begins forming on the outside of the metal instantly.SFX: Aggressive, rhythmic ice-against-metal shaking, loud and satisfying. [00:08–00:10] Action: The shaker lid is cracked open and the frothy, caramel-colored espresso streams out over fresh ice spheres in the waiting glass. The liquid is visibly aerated — light, foamy, and layered.SFX: A fast, bubbly liquid pour with faint crackling from the ice. [00:10–00:13] Action: Cold oat milk foam — thick and pourable — is spooned slowly over the back of a spoon so it floats in a clean white layer across the top of the drink without breaking.SFX: A dense, whispery glug as foam settles onto the surface. [00:13–00:15] Action: Ground cinnamon is tapped through a small sieve over the foam, landing in a warm rust-colored haze. A black paper straw is pressed through the foam layer with one clean push.SFX: A soft powder hiss, then a quiet foam puncture as the straw goes in.

prompts.text: Steps: 1: Create your character reference sheet using ChatGPT Images. 2: Create multi-scene story prompts (each prompt for 15 seconds). 3: Upload the character reference sheet to Seedance and paste your prompt use a separate prompt each time with the same sheet. Here is the Prompt I used in Seedance: Prompt (15s Multi-Scene Video) Use the uploaded image strictly as a character reference for Aro (young human hunter) and Grok (monkey beast). Preserve face, body proportions, clothing, textures, and design details exactly. Do NOT copy layout/background from the sheet. Create a 15-second cinematic jungle sequence with multiple cuts (fast transitions): Scene 1 (0–3s) Wide shot, dense prehistoric jungle. Aro walking carefully, holding a spear, looking alert. Fog, soft light rays. Cut → Scene 2 (3–6s) Grok appears behind trees, watching Aro. Slow, heavy movement. Close-up: Grok’s eyes focused. Cut → Scene 3 (6–9s) Aro slips near a rock or root. Sudden danger sound. Grok jumps forward quickly. Cut → Scene 4 (9–12s) Two other Groks appear in distance. Grok stands in front of Aro in a protective stance. Tension moment. Cut → Scene 5 (12–15s) Calm moment. Aro standing beside Grok. Aro gently touches Grok’s arm. Soft sunlight through trees. Style & Motion: cinematic, realistic animation, smooth cuts, dynamic camera, natural movement (fog, leaves), emotional tone (danger → protection → trust) Important: Only use the uploaded sheet for character identity and design consistency. All scenes, camera, lighting, and actions must be newly generated.

prompts.text: Style: Ultra-realistic mass celebrity arrival scene. Single continuous shot. Handheld camera from crowd perspective. Natural micro-shake. No cuts. Documentary-level realism. Audio: Only natural environment sound loud crowd cheering, overlapping voices shouting, rapid camera shutter clicks, phones recording audio, distant city noises, footsteps, fabric movement. Lighting: Nightime, illuminated from street lights. Mixed reflections on polished surfaces. Soft but realistic shadows. Slight atmospheric haze for depth. Main Character: (Subject Reference Image) Calm, controlled presence. Subtle confident smile. Face identity must remain perfectly consistent across all frames. Outfit: Exactly the same from reference image. Location: An event in New York City. Scene Flow 0–3s: Camera starts from inside a dense crowd behind barricades. Handheld, slightly unstable. View partially blocked by people in front. Multiple phones raised, some screens visible recording. Crowd energy is loud, chaotic, restless. 3–6s: Camera lifts slightly above shoulder level, still handheld. Focus shifts naturally between heads, waving hands, and we see our subject exit a fancy hotel in New York City. Occasional bright flashes from media cameras. Anticipation rises as crowd leans forward. 6–10s: Security personnel step in, pushing the crowd back slightly. Camera reacts with natural shake. Through shifting gaps, the main character appears in the distance—initially soft and partially obscured, gradually becoming clearer while walking forward with a small escort team. He walks up to a fan and signs printed photo she is holding of (Subject Reference Image) 10–13s: Subtle handheld push-in (natural movement, not digital zoom). The main character is now clearly visible, walking confidently at center frame. Path is being cleared. He raises one hand and gives a calm, controlled wave with a slight smile. Camera struggles slightly to keep framing due to crowd movement. 13–15s: Camera shifts and tilts trying to follow. A luxury convoy becomes partially visible featuring three large premium SUVs. A security member opens the back door of a the suburban in the middle of the three. The main character enters quickly and rolls the window down. Vehicles begin moving forward as he waves to the crowd. Camera lifts slightly as people jump and try to capture the moment.

prompts.text: SHOT 1 (0-1s) Extreme Macro, camera_motion: tracking shot, core_action: Heavy blood-red silk drags slowly across dry, cracked desert earth. 35mm film grain highlights individual sand particles. Complex cloth simulation, realistic material friction. (CUT TO) SHOT 2 (1-2s) Wide Shot, camera_motion: static shot, core_action: A female model in an intricate, avant-garde black couture outfit stands atop a massive sand dune. The wind aggressively billows her heavy fabric clothing. Wind interaction dynamics, heavy fabric drape. (CUT TO) SHOT 3 (2-3.5s) Extreme Close-Up, camera_motion: push in, core_action: Hyper-realistic human skin texture with visible pores, glistening with sweat under harsh sunlight. A single bead of sweat rolls slowly down her temple. Her dark eyes look up sharply. Authentic micro-expressions, realistic fluid dynamics. (CUT TO) SHOT 4 (3.5-4.5s) Close-Up, camera_motion: static shot, core_action: Hands, fingers completely covered in massive gold rings, sharply snap open a black vintage wooden hand fan with energetic movement. Rigid body collision. (CUT TO) SHOT 5 (4.5-5.5s) Medium Shot, camera_motion: tilt up, core_action: A wild black mustang horse with no saddle rears up sharply on its hind legs directly in front of the camera. Energetic movement, authentic momentum conservation, proper weight and balance. (CUT TO) SHOT 6 (5.5-7s) Extreme Macro, camera_motion: static shot, core_action: Blood-red silk fabric flaps aggressively in the strong wind, completely covering the lens in pure red color. Wind interaction dynamics, seamless motion continuity for transition. (CUT TO) SHOT 7 (7-9s) Medium Shot, camera_motion: handheld, core_action: Split-screen visual effect showing three horizontal frames simultaneously. Top frame: the horse's eye. Center frame: the woman's dark lips. Bottom frame: the shiny gold rings. All three frames jitter and shake chaotically in rhythmic sync. Energetic movement. (CUT TO) SHOT 8 (9-11s) Medium Shot, camera_motion: panning right, core_action: The female model executes a sharp, rapid spin. Motion blur creates the visual effect of a dark vortex. Energetic movement, authentic momentum conservation. (CUT TO) SHOT 9 (11-13s) Extreme Close-Up, camera_motion: static shot, core_action: Lips painted with perfect dark lipstick press firmly against a shiny gold coin pendant. Rigid body interaction, realistic lip texture. (CUT TO) SHOT 10 (13-15s) Close-Up, camera_motion: dolly in, core_action: The woman looks directly into the lens, giving a subtle, defiant upward tilt of her chin. Hard directional sunlight casts dramatic, harsh shadows across her face. Authentic human behavior patterns. Abrupt cut to pure black frame. 35mm film grain, harsh sun. Color palette: burnt orange, deep black, blood-red silk, shiny gold. Gritty, energetic vibe with realistic physics and authentic textures.

prompts.text: Characters: A young american woman with wide, luminous eyes, wearing a simple linen dress. Scene: A sun-drenched wildflower meadow transitioning into a claustrophobic, petal-filled sanctuary room, ending in a surreal garden transformation. Style: Ethereal dark fantasy, cinematic, saturated floral palettes, soft-focus macro textures, slow rhythmic pacing. Lighting: Warm golden-hour sunlight turning into dim, honey-toned interior light with long, dancing shadows. Audio: Soft wind rustling through grass, delicate high-pitched hum of growth, muffled heartbeats, crunch of dried petals. [0-3s] Camera: Extreme close-up on the woman’s fingertips, soft and trembling. Action: She reaches toward a vibrant crimson poppy. As her fingertip grazes the velvet petal, the flower trembles back as if sensing her touch. She watches, eyes wide with a manic, quiet obsession. Lighting: Harsh, warm sunlight creating a rim-light glow on her fingers. [3-6s] Camera: Low-angle tracking shot, keeping pace with her side profile. Action: She drifts through the dense meadow, ignoring the path ahead. She holds her head slightly tilted, whispering unintelligible, soft words to the flowers swaying near her cheek. Her expression is dazed and blissful. Lighting: Soft, diffused golden light filtering through swaying stalks. [6-9s] Camera: Slow pull-back revealing her transition from the field into a cramped, dim room. Action: The camera reveals walls wallpapered entirely in pressed, preserved petals. Hundreds of glass jars line the shelves, each containing specimens of roses, lilies, and withered tulips. The air is thick with floating dust and drifting, dried floral flakes. Lighting: Dim, amber interior light; practical glow from a single lantern. [9-12s] Camera: Medium close-up, focusing on her face. Action: She pulls a fresh, dew-covered rose and tucks it behind her ear. As the stem touches her skin, the scene shifts: tiny, delicate flower petals begin to sprout rapidly from her hair, blooming along her temple and cascading down her cheek like floral freckles. Lighting: Soft focus, shallow depth of field, subtle bloom on the emerging petals. [12-15s] Camera: Static wide shot. Action: She stands perfectly still in the center of a lush, overgrown garden. She is half-human, half-flowering organism; thin vines twist around her arms, and vibrant petals sprout from her dress and hair. Her face is serene, eyes closed, body becoming rooted to the earth. Lighting: Final rays of sunset casting long, dramatic shadows across the fusion of girl and garden. Production Notes: Style: Visually rich, focus on the contrast between delicate organic motion and creeping, unnatural growth. Audio Design: The ambient sounds of the meadow fade into a dense, reverberating silence in the room, ending with the sharp, crystalline sound of a stem snapping. Avoid: Identity drift, jittery motion, blurry textures, inconsistent petal growth.

prompts.text: same character throughout all shots — white-haired witcher, pale skin, sharp eyes, dark velvet noble outfit with subtle sun emblem, gold masquerade mask, long tied-back hair, consistent appearance every shot [0s] Masquerade ballroom, deep red velvet interior, massive chandeliers, candlelight flicker, dense aristocratic crowd. Witcher walking slowly through the crowd, scanning left and right, subtly turning his head as if searching for someone. slow dolly-in combined with side tracking shot. Guests brushing past — cloth inertia, fabric lagging, dresses swaying, soft collisions. Camera occasionally shifts to over-shoulder perspective to show what Witcher sees — masked faces, reflections, movement. tension builds. [5s] Camera shifts to frontal tracking, moving backward as Witcher walks toward lens, eyes scanning behind the camera (toward viewer). Suddenly, from deep background, a masked attacker bursts forward, blade drawn, running directly toward camera. Audience perspective becomes target perspective — sword aimed straight at viewer. Witcher notices at the last second, slight head turn, body preparing to move. hair reacting to acceleration, coat trailing. [8s] 120fps extreme slow-motion begins — blade slicing directly toward camera / Witcher’s face, micro air distortion visible, dust particles drifting in depth, candle flames stretching slowly. Camera transitions into 360° orbit around Witcher and attacker, showing how close the blade passes. Witcher rotates body with minimal precise movement, perfect dodge, cloth inertia trailing, hair following motion vector, blade passing millimeters from face. [12s] Slow-motion continues as Witcher steps inside attacker’s guard, grabs wrist and redirects momentum — impact physics: skin compression, delayed follow-through motion. Snap back to 24fps realtime at counter moment — attacker loses balance violently, body twisting, glass slipping from hand and shattering on marble floor, sharp audio return. [15s] slight crash zoom on Witcher standing still again, breathing steady, crowd continues moving as if nothing happened, subtle whispers in background → CUT TO BLACK Global: deep red and gold palette, candlelight only, anamorphic 2.39:1, 35mm film grain, cinematic realism, no fantasy VFX, grounded physical motion, accurate cloth, hair and dust physics, same character consistency across all shots

prompts.text: Visual Style: IMAX cinematic quality; Panavision C-Series 35mm anamorphic lens (f/4 aperture) Color Palette: Low-saturation gray-blue background (cool tone) + bright white and dark gold (primary mech colors) Lighting: Deep shadows with preserved detail in dark areas; highlights carry a subtle golden glow Focus: Soft edge focus with sharp central subject 0–15 Seconds Shot Breakdown 0–3s: The Fall Action: The scene plunges rapidly from high altitude. The heroine tightly shields a ragdoll cat against her chest as they tumble through the air. Upon impact, a massive cloud of gray dust and debris erupts. She lands on one knee, struggling to stand, breathing heavily. She looks down at the unharmed cat in her arms (a brief tender moment), then her expression turns cold as she stares at the glowing golden-white crystal core in her hand. Camera: Intense handheld-style shaking follows the fall. A violent jolt on impact, followed by a rapid push-in to a close-up of the heroine and the cat. 3–6s: The Pact Action: The heroine and the ragdoll cat lock eyes; the cat’s pupils shift into flowing gold. She whispers, “Let’s do this together,” then crushes the crystal core in her hand. Visuals: The shattered core bursts into a dark-gold energy vortex, swirling around them. The heroine’s eyes turn pure gold, while intricate white runes spread across the cat’s fur like vines. Camera: Slow orbiting shot with slight vibration; narrowing depth of field focusing on the fragments of the shattered crystal. 6–9s: The Agony Action: The heroine tilts her head back, releasing a suppressed scream as energy surges through her body, causing violent convulsions. Metallic fragments begin to “grow” from beneath her skin, engulfing and reconstructing her form. Transformation Details: The ragdoll cat rapidly enlarges within the light. Metallic bones and white armor plates form over its body, and sharp alloy claws extend outward. Camera: Heavy shaking, with brief defocus and motion blur. Extreme close-ups of metal forming over skin and the cat’s skeletal expansion into a mechanical tiger. 9–12s: The Manifestation Action: The dust clears. The heroine is now fully clad in an intricate gold-and-white mech armor with sleek contours and glowing dark-gold edges. With a grasp of her right hand, a frost-emitting mech katana materializes. Companion: The ragdoll cat has fully evolved into a massive gold-and-white mechanical tiger, its body lined with glowing energy circuits, eyes gleaming. Camera: Slow-motion orbit (bullet-time feel), sweeping upward from a low angle to reveal the full grandeur of the duo. 12–15s: The Departure Action: (Not specified in original — can be expanded if needed)

0–3s: The Fall
Action: The scene plunges rapidly from high altitude. The heroine tightly shields a ragdoll cat against her chest as they tumble through the air. Upon impact, a massive cloud of gray dust and debris erupts. She lands on one knee, struggling to stand, breathing heavily. She looks down at the unharmed cat in her arms (a brief tender moment), then her expression turns cold as she stares at the glowing golden-white crystal core in her hand.
Camera: Intense handheld-style shaking follows the fall. A violent jolt on impact, followed by a rapid push-in to a close-up of the heroine and the cat.
3–6s: The Pact
Action: The heroine and the ragdoll cat lock eyes; the cat’s pupils shift into flowing gold. She whispers, “Let’s do this together,” then crushes the crystal core in her hand.
Visuals: The shattered core bursts into a dark-gold energy vortex, swirling around them. The heroine’s eyes turn pure gold, while intricate white runes spread across the cat’s fur like vines.
Camera: Slow orbiting shot with slight vibration; narrowing depth of field focusing on the fragments of the shattered crystal.
6–9s: The Agony
Action: The heroine tilts her head back, releasing a suppressed scream as energy surges through her body, causing violent convulsions. Metallic fragments begin to “grow” from beneath her skin, engulfing and reconstructing her form.
Transformation Details: The ragdoll cat rapidly enlarges within the light. Metallic bones and white armor plates form over its body, and sharp alloy claws extend outward.
Camera: Heavy shaking, with brief defocus and motion blur. Extreme close-ups of metal forming over skin and the cat’s skeletal expansion into a mechanical tiger.
9–12s: The Manifestation
Action: The dust clears. The heroine is now fully clad in an intricate gold-and-white mech armor with sleek contours and glowing dark-gold edges. With a grasp of her right hand, a frost-emitting mech katana materializes.
Companion: The ragdoll cat has fully evolved into a massive gold-and-white mechanical tiger, its body lined with glowing energy circuits, eyes gleaming.

prompts.text: FPV video of the ancient Indian Trigarta kingdom Created with Seedance 2.0 Prompt used: Extremely fast-paced single-take shot FPV flying through the ancient Indian Trigarta kingdom, cinematic and hyper-realistic, one continuous smooth motion. Speed through narrow streets filled with warriors in traditional armor, horse riders, merchants, and villagers in authentic ancient Indian attire. Continue accelerating past chariots, training grounds, and temple complexes with detailed stone architecture and sacred fires. Maintain fluid, seamless motion with dynamic lighting, depth of field. prompts.text: First-person POV, handheld cinematic shot of a man sitting at a wooden desk late at night. A dim desk lamp casts warm amber light over scattered old photographs. One photograph is centered — a vintage black-and-white image of a quiet street with a single woman standing at the far end, slightly blurred. Room lighting is low and warm, with soft shadows. Background is dark and still. Subtle breathing motion in camera. The man picks up the photo. As he tilts it slightly, the woman inside the photograph shifts position stepping closer within the frame. Camera subtly shakes. He freezes. Looks closer. The woman in the photo slowly raises her head and looks directly at him. The paper surface begins to ripple softly like fabric. He instinctively tries to drop it but her hand presses against the inside of the photo. The photograph stretches outward unnaturally, gaining depth. Her hand pushes through transitioning from flat grayscale into realistic skin tones as it exits the photo. Edges of the photograph crack like dry paper, fragments falling onto the desk. The room lighting flickers. She steps halfway out her body still partially black-and-white inside the photo, partially real in the room. Dust particles float in the air. Hyperrealistic lighting, shallow depth of field, soft grain, natural physics, slow tension build.

Fierce East Asian female warrior (long black ponytail, dark segmented lamellar armor, sword at hip) stands in tall swaying grass holding a massive rectangular dark-stone warhammer with long wrapped handle. Hammer head has glowing orange runes pulsing with fire. She grips it powerfully, body tense, ready to swing. 1-2s: Dynamic side tracking shot. Warrior swings the heavy hammer in a powerful full-body arc, motion blur on the hammer head, grass whipping around her legs. She pivots and starts running forward through the field, ponytail and armor strips flying. 2-3s: Fast low-angle tracking from behind as she sprints away from camera, hair whipping wildly, hammer held ready. Tall grass blurs past. 3-4s: Heroic medium-wide shot. Warrior plants her feet, twists powerfully, and swings the glowing warhammer with both hands, intense expression, wind catching her hair. Hammer head fills part of frame, runes blazing orange. 4-5s: Extreme close-up on the massive glowing hammer head spinning through the air, runes pulsing, motion blur, background grass and hills streaking past. 5-6s: Wide tracking shot. Warrior runs full speed through the grass, arm extended, hurling the hammer forward with all her strength. Hammer flies ahead of her, glowing brightly. 6-7s: Dynamic tracking shot following the flying hammer as it soars over the hills. In the far distance a huge blue reptilian dragon-beast begins to rise from the grass. 7-8s: POV close-up from behind the hammer as it flies straight toward the dragon. Hammer head and glowing runes dominate the foreground, dragon visible in the valley below. 8-9s: Fast tracking shot. Hammer continues flying low over the grass, dragon now clearly visible charging forward. Impact imminent. 9-10s: Sudden cut to extreme close-up of the giant blue dragon's face emerging from the grass — thick scaly hide, glowing orange third eye on forehead, sharp teeth bared in a snarl. 10-11s: Dramatic wide low-angle shot. Tiny warrior stands in foreground looking up as the massive dragon towers over her, roaring, dust and grass exploding around its legs. 11-12s: Epic wide shot. Dragon rears up then collapses heavily forward after being struck, body slamming into the grass, kicking up huge clouds of dust. The glowing hammer flies high into the sky above the fallen beast. 12-13s: Wide heroic shot from behind the warrior. Dragon lies collapsed in the mid-ground, hammer still airborne high above, warrior watching it arc through the sky. 13-14s: Final triumphant low-angle shot. Warrior stands in foreground, head tilted back, arm raised with open palm reaching toward the descending glowing hammer. Fallen dragon behind her, dramatic sky, grass swaying. Overall style: sweeping camera moves, intense motion blur on fast action, cinematic color grading, highly detailed textures on armor/scales/grass, epic scale contrast between warrior and dragon, powerful and intense atmosphere, no text, no logos.

prompts.text: Cinematic 15-second short film. The subject is [REFERENCE IMAGE — match face, build, and style exactly]. He walks confidently through a hyper-busy Times Square, New York City — neon billboards, yellow cabs, massive crowds, midday chaos. He reaches into his pocket and pulls out a sleek black remote control. Points it at the crowd. Clicks. Instantly, every single person around him freezes mid-motion — tourists mid-step, a cab driver mid-honk, pigeons mid-flight completely stops. Complete silence except for ambient wind. He walks slowly through the frozen chaos, completely calm. He plucks the sunglasses off a frozen man's face and puts them on. Grabs a croissant from a frozen street vendor's hand and takes a slow, satisfied bite. Looks around like he owns the city.Then he points the remote. Clicks. Everyone unfreezes instantly — the man reaches for glasses that aren't there, the vendor stares at his empty hand. Nobody knows what happened. He walks away clean, sunglasses on, croissant in hand, smiling. Camera: wide tracking shot as he enters the crowd, tightens to medium close-up during the freeze and steals, pulls back wide as he walks away. Handheld energy. Cinematic color grade — deep shadows, vivid neon reflections on wet pavement. Photorealistic. 16:9.

prompts.tweet_text:
Two-tool pipeline. GPT Image 2 → Seedance 2.0
Step 1 — GPT Image 2 as Spatial Art Director Prompt it to generate one board with three zones: 
— Camera A (front view, facing window) 
— Camera B (true 180° reverse, sofa back in foreground)  — Prop detail strip: ① lava lamp ②throw blanket ③mug ④CRT TV
—each numbered, each with a close-up tile
This is your location package. Same job as a physical set dressing bible.
Step 2 — Feed to Seedance, not describe to it Don't write, "There's a lava lamp on the left-side unit." Attach the board as @[image]. Let the model read the spatial geometry directly. Prop number in prompt = prop tile in image = exact position in generated shot.

Scene 2 Action: The suspect screams, violently convulsing in the chair as holographic data spikes explode around their head. Camera: Low angle, rapid pan between the suspect's face and the distorted, shifting data projections. Lighting: Violent strobe lighting effect, mixing cold blues with harsh, rapid flashes of alarm red. Sound: Distortion, static feedback scream, mechanical whirring at maximum pitch, crackling electricity, distant explosion. Scene 3 Action: Nira grabs the suspect's wrist, activating the pulse glove; they scream again, eyes rolling back. Camera: High-octane extreme close-up on Nira's determined expression, dynamic impact visuals around the contact point. Lighting: Saturated red and orange glow radiating from the pulse glove, contrasting against deep blues and purples. Sound: Bone-crushing sound, high-pitched data shrieking, rapid thunderclap outside, heavy rain pouring, suspect whimpering. Dialogue: 'This is the END of your fabricated existence!' Scene 4 Action: Nira turns away, her expression cold and exhausted, as the suspect slumps, defeated and broken, in the chair. Camera: Slow, heavy pan-out, capturing the aftermath, steam rising from the overworked machine. Lighting: Dim, monochromatic lighting; desaturated blues and greys, with only a tiny, faint signal light. Sound: Slowing heartbeat monitor, low mechanical hum, soft rain, heavy breathing, settling static.

prompts.text: A colossal ancient dragon bursts into view with a violent, earth-shaking entrance, tearing through storm-filled skies above a dark fantasy landscape. The camera starts with a wide aerial shot, thick black clouds swirling rapidly as lightning cracks illuminate the massive silhouette. With a deafening roar, the dragon dives downward at extreme speed, wings spanning hundreds of feet, tearing the air apart. As it descends, fire ignites within its throat, glowing intensely through its scaled chest before erupting into a massive stream of blazing flames. The impact of its landing sends shockwaves across the ground, dust, rocks, and debris exploding outward in slow motion. Trees bend violently, and nearby structures crumble under the force. Ultra-detailed scales shimmer with metallic reflections, glowing cracks of lava visible between armored plates. Its eyes burn like molten gold, filled with rage and dominance. Smoke, embers, and ash fill the air, illuminated by cinematic volumetric lighting. Camera transitions into a dramatic low-angle close-up as the dragon spreads its wings fully, letting out a thunderous roar. The environment is hyper-realistic: dynamic fire simulation, particle effects, heat distortion, motion blur, and depth of field.

prompts.text: The Flow State Made with Seedance 2.0 on @Hailuo_AI Prompt Stylized 3D animation, sleek futuristic tone, crisp cinematic lighting. High-speed maglev train interior at sunset—glass walls, glowing skyline streaks, polished metal, soft neon accents. Warm sunset vs cool interior contrast. No brands, no readable text, no copyrighted characters. Tone: quiet high-stakes focus. Protagonist = calm precision. Opponents = confident but unraveling. Rhythm: observe → sync → accelerate → decisive moment → effortless finish. Camera: close-ups on hands and eyes, reflections in glass, aisle tracking, slow push-ins, sharp cuts. Smooth motion, subtle vibration. Characters: - Lead Passenger: composed, minimal movements, razor focus. - Opponent 1: confident, slightly sloppy under pressure. - Opponent 2: technical, loses sync. - Observer: silent, increasingly stunned. Sequence (0:00–0:15): 0:00–0:02: lead sets small metallic object on table; opponents smirk. 0:02–0:05: precise movements begin; train light flickers; confidence fades. 0:05–0:08: rapid synchronized actions; opponents fumble; observer reacts. 0:08–0:11: slow push-in; hands blur → stop perfectly; success implied; silence. 0:11–0:13: lead relaxes, adjusts sleeve; opponents freeze. 0:13–0:15: wide—train glides through glowing skyline; lead calm, others stunned. Style tags: futuristic minimalism, cinematic reflections, sunset contrast, precise choreography, smooth motion, clean composition. Negative: no brands, no text, no violence, no weapons, no clutter, no shaky cam, no low-res, no messy blur.

prompts.text: Classic 90s Disney animation style. Scene 1: A bustling full view of an Egyptian marketplace, accompanied by continuous gentle laughter. The laughter persists, as the camera slowly pans to a specific spot in the marketplace, revealing the source of the laughter: the fierce jackal merchant Anubis lies on a table, one arm raised high above his head, the other arm comfortably resting on his abdomen. Beside him, a human merchant is gently brushing a feather across Anubis's raised underarm, the motion repeating endlessly. Meanwhile, Anubis has his eyes closed, grinning widely and laughing heartily, completely unbothered by the tickling, with his underarm fully exposed. Scene 2: A close-up shot shows the human merchant's hand gently moving the feather back and forth across Anubis's raised underarm, with Anubis's giggling laughter audible in the background. Scene 3: A close-up shot of Anubis's upper body, as the human continues to brush the feather back and forth across his underarm; Anubis has his eyes closed, grinning and laughing heartily, while the human chuckles "hee hee hee" as he tickles him. Scene 4: The human continues to tickle Anubis's underarm with the feather. Anubis laughs, deliberately exposing his underarm for the human to tickle. Then Anubis lowers his arm, stopping the human's tickling, and teases him by saying, "Stop it, or I'll die laughing." Scene 5: Anubis places his hands on his hips, sits up straight, and leans slightly to the side, flashing a playful smile as he says that if he wants, the human can tickle him again later, and he winks at the human. The human glances at him nervously, then laughs. Additional information: Anubis is muscular, with rings on his arms. His voice is deep and magnetic. Anubis's underarm is being tickled. Audio is in English.

Low-angle wide cinematic camera follows her intensely. In the background, a colossal 50-meter tall translucent ice-and-water giant rises from the sea, glowing with intense cyan energy, creating massive waves. 0-3s: Powerful sprint on water surface with energy wake exploding. 3-5s: She leaps high into the air with multiple gravity-defying flips in dramatic slow-motion. 5-12s: Intense fighting sequence — She lands on the giant’s huge arm, runs up it at high speed while dodging its powerful swings. She delivers multiple glowing energy kicks and punches to the giant’s chest and head. Bright blue energy explosions, flying ice shards, shockwaves, and particles burst with every impact. Fast cutting camera angles between her and the giant. 12-15s: She leaps powerfully off the giant, dives toward the ocean. Massive bright white cinematic explosion on impact — huge crown-shaped splash with radiating energy shockwaves. Camera dramatically pulls back. Fully sci-fi atmosphere: glowing nebulae, aurora streams, distant planets, holographic particles in the sky. Dramatic neon blue, cyan, purple and white lighting with strong rim lights, volumetric god rays and lens flares. prompts.text: Animation prompt with the reference images A cinematic 3D animated noir fist-fight sequence between two stylized characters on a massive circular concrete helipad fortress built on top of a steep mountain peak, surrounded by misty mountains, dense hillside city favelas, and dramatic cloudy sky. The arena is a huge weathered grey concrete platform with faded yellow helipad markings, stairways, circular bunkers, brutalist walls, dark doorways, and high-altitude wind. Character A is a tall gaunt 1940s noir detective wearing a dark trench coat, fedora, vest, red tie, badge, holstered revolver, cigar, and heavy shoes. Character B is a tall blue-faced operative wearing a white trench coat, white wide-brim hat, black gloves, glowing cyan eyes, and a sleek spy-like silhouette. Keep both characters highly consistent with the reference sheets. Create a 15-second action sequence with 10 cinematic shots: Wide aerial establishing shot of the circular helipad fortress on the mountain, both characters facing each other at the yellow center mark. Low tracking shot as the detective steps forward, coat blowing in the wind, fists raised. Medium side shot: detective throws a sharp lead jab toward the operative. Operative slips outside the jab with a smooth angular step, white coat trailing. Detective overextends, camera pans with the missed strike. Operative counters with a tight body hook, impact lines and subtle cloth compression. Detective snarls and answers with a heavy right hook toward the head. Operative parries the hook and drives a short elbow from close range. Detective grabs the operative’s lapel and drives a knee; operative traps the knee and pivots, using the helipad’s painted circle as a motion guide. Detective reaches toward his holster, but the operative wrist-checks the draw, stops the gun before it clears, then shoves him off-balance across the yellow marking. Style: high-quality stylized 3D, cinematic action choreography, clean readable movement, noir spy thriller mood, realistic cloth motion, dramatic wind, subtle fog, premium animation keyframes, no gunfire, no blood, hand-to-hand combat only. Camera should feel like a polished animated action previs sequence.

prompts.text: This is a direct continuation of video1 . Match the character, setting, lighting, and energy exactly. Same YouTube studio room: Rogue Viper poster on wall, shelves with funko pops and plushies, gold YouTube play button, golden Labrador puppy on fluffy dog bed. 9:16 vertical format. Warm ambient studio lighting. UGC TikTok style. The video has two distinct scenes: SCENE 1 — 0:00 to 0:08 Mei is still seated at her desk facing camera. She opens catching her breath, recovering from a giggle — a soft exhale, hand briefly covering her smile, composing herself. She then swivels her chair slightly to the right to face toward the dog bed. With a relaxed open-hand gesture pointing toward the sleeping golden Labrador puppy, she says warmly: "That little guy over there is my dog, Ed." She turns back to face the camera, leans forward slightly, and drops her voice to a playful whisper, eyes widening slightly: "He's a little shy." SCENE 2 — 0:08 to 0:15 — CUT Hard cut to: Mei is now holding the golden Labrador puppy up with both arms in front of the camera, filling more of the frame. The puppy is held facing the camera at chest height. Mei speaks in an exaggerated cutesy, high-pitched baby voice while gently moving one of the puppy's paws in a small wave motion toward the camera: "Say, Hi TikTok! My name's Ed and I'm the cutest thing ever!" The puppy glances upward toward Mei and visibly licks his lips. Mei then looks down at the dog, still holding him, switching back to her normal warm voice: "I know, you want food. I will feed you in just a second." She gives a soft affectionate smile down at Ed to close the clip. Throughout: natural, unpolished UGC energy. Genuine warmth. No stiff or robotic motion. The puppy behaves naturally — subtle squirming, blinking, lip lick. Static camera — no movement except the hard cut between scenes. Negative prompt: camera shake, zoom, multiple people, outfit change, different dog breed, text overlays, overly cinematic lighting, jump cuts within scenes, stiff facial motion, robotic gestures

Warm ambient studio lighting. Static camera — no movement or cuts. She speaks the following dialogue naturally across 15 seconds, same voice as audio1: "Hi TikTok, my name is Mei Novara. Scenes include: walking along Jumeirah Beach at sunrise, Burj Khalifa rising in the distance, reflections on glass skyscrapers, quiet moments in cozy cafés, a simple hotel room, golden desert dunes at sunset, traditional souks, glowing night cityscapes, views from inside a moving car on Sheikh Zayed Road. Shot with a smartphone aesthetic: slight motion blur, soft focus, blown-out highlights from intense desert sunlight, lens flare, sun glare, high ISO noise at night, uneven framing, accidental cropping. Composition feels random and spontaneous - subject sometimes off-center, partially cut off, mid-motion, or partially obscured by shadows or light leaks. prompts.text: A 4x4 grid reference sheet (16 panels), each panel separated by thin white borders. Cinematic storyboard style, photorealistic, bright sunny outdoor rooftop setting. The subject across all panels: a young East Asian girl with a high ponytail, wearing a black cropped top, black pleated skirt, and white sneakers. She wields a massive bamboo calligraphy brush (taller than herself). Black ink splatters cover her clothes and skin. Panel layout (left to right, top to bottom): 1. Low-angle wide shot — girl swings giant brush overhead, massive black ink explosion toward camera 2. Extreme close-up — brush bristles dragging through thick glossy black ink on white canvas 3. Dynamic medium shot — girl rotating her body mid-swing, hair flying, ink trailing from brush 4. Low-angle portrait — girl's determined face looking down at camera, brush resting on shoulder, blue sky behind 5. Close-up — brush tip flinging ink droplets, sunlight creating lens flare through the droplets 6. Detail shot — white sneakers stepping through black ink puddles on white floor canvas 7. Over-the-shoulder tracking — following the brush tip completing a sharp calligraphy stroke 8. High-angle wide shot — revealing large Chinese characters "觉醒" written in bold black ink on white rooftop 9. Side profile medium shot — girl in powerful stance, legs apart, gripping brush like a weapon 10. Macro detail — black ink splatter pattern on fabric, wet glossy texture 11. Low-angle dynamic — girl leaping with brush raised high, ink droplets suspended in mid-air 12. Close-up hands — both hands gripping the thick bamboo brush shaft, knuckles white with effort 13. Wide shot from behind — girl standing before the massive calligraphy, cityscape in background 14. Extreme close-up face — sweat and tiny ink spots on cheek, intense focused eyes 15. Motion blur shot — fast horizontal brush swing, ink arc trailing across frame 16. Final reveal — completed "觉醒" characters from directly above, girl standing at the edge, tiny in scale Consistent lighting: bright overhead sun, hard shadows, high contrast black ink on white surfaces. No text overlays, no watermarks.

Scene: Post-apocalyptic Tokyo train tracks starting near Tokyo Station, featuring Yamanote Line and Keihin-Tohoku Line trains. Each track have train coming towards the character. Environment is overgrown with lush vegetation, vines covering trains, sunlight piercing through broken structures, cinematic lighting, volumetric fog, god rays. Character: refer to @image1 (character sheet). He is sprinting forward on top of the trains, hoping between the moving trains. Video start with @image2 , start screen. The character doing an idle animation, the game start button highlighted and pressed (no hand). The whole screen transition seamlessly to gameplay video @image3 (gameplay screen). Camera: third person behind-the-back gameplay camera, slightly low angle, dynamic forward motion, subtle camera shake, motion blur, depth of field. Camera smoothly follows character lane switching (left, center, right). Gameplay: Character runs forward automatically Dodging incoming trains and barriers Jumping over obstacles and sliding under signs Collecting glowing gold coins aligned along tracks and on top of the train. Prominent bold modern stylized “YOUR NAME” logo centered on the back wall. All five have completely unique high-fashion performance outfits locked exactly as: - Far left: neon turquoise wave-print crop top with white high-waisted flowy shorts and white platform sneakers. - Second left: black velvet off-shoulder long-sleeve crop top with metallic silver mini skirt and black combat boots. - Center: shimmering metallic gold one-piece bodysuit with strategic cutouts and red high-top sneakers. - Fourth: bright magenta cropped hoodie over black sports bra with tactical cargo shorts and chunky white sneakers. - Far right: sheer white mesh top over electric blue sports bra with layered pastel pink ruffled skirt and clear platform heels. prompts.text: Style: Ultra-realistic mass celebrity arrival scene. Single continuous shot. Handheld camera from crowd perspective. Natural micro-shake. No cuts. Documentary-level realism. Audio: Only natural environment sound loud crowd cheering, overlapping voices shouting, rapid camera shutter clicks, phones recording audio, distant airport announcements echoing, footsteps, fabric movement, subtle engine idle and revving. Lighting: Natural daylight filtering through large airport glass panels. Mixed reflections on polished surfaces. Soft but realistic shadows. Slight atmospheric haze for depth. Main Character: @IMG Calm, controlled presence. Subtle confident smile. Face identity must remain perfectly consistent across all frames. Outfit (STRICT LOCK): Black zip-up jacket (matte, soft fleece texture) worn open Clean light grey/white t-shirt underneath Beige/cream tailored pants Accessories: Transparent beige square-frame luxury-style sunglasses with gradient lenses (No branding, no logo, no variation) Scene Flow 0–3s: Camera starts from inside a dense crowd behind barricades. Handheld, slightly unstable. View partially blocked by people in front. Multiple phones raised, some screens visible recording. Crowd energy is loud, chaotic, restless. 3–6s: Camera lifts slightly above shoulder level, still handheld. Focus shifts naturally between heads, waving hands, and glimpses of the arrival gate. Occasional bright flashes from media cameras. Anticipation rises as crowd leans forward. 6–10s: Security personnel step in, pushing the crowd back slightly. Camera reacts with natural shake. Through shifting gaps, the main character appears in the distance—initially soft and partially obscured, gradually becoming clearer while walking forward with a small escort team. 10–13s: Subtle handheld push-in (natural movement, not digital zoom). The main character is now clearly visible, walking confidently at center frame. Path is being cleared. He raises one hand and gives a calm, controlled wave with a slight smile. Camera struggles slightly to keep framing due to crowd movement. 13–15s: Camera shifts and tilts trying to follow. A luxury convoy becomes partially visible: a low-profile angular sports car in front, followed by two large premium SUVs. A security member opens a vertical-style door. The main character enters quickly. Engine revs naturally. Vehicles begin moving forward. Camera lifts slightly as people jump and try to capture the moment.

prompts.text: Characters: Ice Queen based on reference image floor-length frosted white gown with crystalline texture. Scene: Vast crystalline palace with towering translucent blue-white ice spires and a seamless mirror-like frozen floor. Style: Ethereal high-fantasy, majestic and quietly dangerous. High-detail crystalline textures, slow-motion physics for orbiting snowflakes. Lighting: Cold diffused glow emanating from within the ice, caustic reflections, prismatic light fractures across every surface. Mood: Majestic · ethereal · quietly dangerous · completely alone and completely at home. [0–3s] Camera: Static wide shot. The Ice Queen enters from the depth of the palace, gliding forward with sovereign grace. A constellation of snowflakes orbits her body like tiny satellites. Cold ambient blue-white wash across the cathedral-like ice spires. [3–6s] Camera: Slow lateral tracking shot. She moves past a row of translucent pillars, her gown whispering across the frozen floor which perfectly reflects her form. Orbiting snowflakes tighten their rotation. Prismatic light scatters across her face as she passes through a caustic beam. [6–9s] Camera: Close-up on her hand. Her bare fingertips graze a passing ice pillar delicate fractal frost patterns bloom instantly outward from her touch. Sharp rim light on the growing frost crystals. [9–12s] Camera: Low angle looking up, slow push-in. The Queen fills the frame, expression unreadable and absolute. Snowflakes drift through the foreground in soft-focus bokeh. Luminous glow from her skin contrasts with deep blue shadows overhead. [12–15s] Camera: Fixed medium shot. She comes to a complete stop in perfect stillness. The palace pulses once with a deep rhythmic light. A single slow pulse of violet-blue light ripples through the ice spires behind her. Hold on her gaze. Palette: Arctic blue · glacial white · brushed silver Avoid:Warm colors, jitter, fast movements, melting textures, identity drift.

prompts.text: Can you believe that the video I quoted was made without generating individual scene images one by one, but just relying on prompts and these 3 references below? This is what I learned from my experience using seedance 2.0, which is that you don't need to generate scene images one by one. Why do I use this method? Because I'm pretty imaginative, so I already know the flow of my video from start to finish. That's why I don't need to make storyboard images first, and prefer to just focus on the prompting. For editing, since AI generation results aren't completely perfect, I need to generate several times and from those generation results, I edit and combine them into one. And remember, transition effects are the key here lol. Okay.. this is an example of the prompt I used for one of the 15-second multi-shot generations (If using omni reference, you just add "@" to the image. you in every prompt): Shot 1: Medium tracking shot. Raven, a dark-haired mercenary in a chained black leather jacket, fluidly transitions between desperate hand-to-hand combat and firing her custom M1911 pistol at shadowy agents within a crumbling, neon-lit brutalist alleyway. Lighting is high-contrast chiaroscuro, utilizing deep purple and electric blue neon to cast long, dramatic shadows. Mood is tense, gritty, and desperate. Visual style is a rich, painterly 3D animation inspired by Arcane's signature aesthetic. Shot 2: Fast-paced low-angle tracking shot. The camera follows close behind Raven as she violently breaks free from the brawl, sprinting frantically down a dark, glitching video-game corridor. Lighting is sporadic and harsh, with amber sparks and deep navy blacks emphasizing her kinetic, forward momentum. Mood is urgent and breathless. Visual style features thick, expressive brushstrokes and stylized motion blur to convey raw speed. Shot 3: Medium close-up, low dynamic angle. Raven forcefully slams open a heavy rooftop door. A sudden, harsh flood of electric blue night-sky light washes over her cold, focused expression, creating a stark silhouette against the internal darkness. Lighting is a dramatic, piercing backlight. Mood is triumphant yet dangerous. Visual style emphasizes highly detailed, hand-painted textures on her leather clothing and braided hair. Shot 4: Over-the-shoulder steady tracking shot. The camera stays tight behind Raven as she strides out onto the sprawling, brutalist rooftop, the ambient blue glow highlighting the metallic hardware of her gear. Lighting balances the deep shadows of the rooftop with the vivid glow of the city atmosphere. Mood is atmospheric and revealing. Visual style seamlessly blends 3D character models with rich, 2D painted backgrounds. Shot 5: Extreme wide sweeping shot. Raven stands completely still at the perilous edge of the rooftop, looking down into the sprawling, glowing abyss of the neon-lit city below. Lighting features selective electric blue and amber highlights cutting through the deep, crushing navy blacks of the urban chasm. Mood is isolating, vast, and epic. Visual style acts as a masterful, painterly matte painting with a profound sense of vertical scale and depth. The visual style features a rich Color palette of deep navy blacks, vivid purples, and electric blues punctuated by amber, illuminated by dramatic chiaroscuro Lighting, enhanced by highly textured, painterly Shading, producing a gritty, immersive Atmosphere and a tense, epic Overall mood, no music. Next post I'll give you tips on how to do it if you're confused when prompting.

prompts.text: EXTREME CINEMATIC RESCUE SCENE — IMAX STYLE A massive 3,000-foot cliff edge above a misty valley during golden hour storm light. Dark dramatic clouds split across a burning amber sky. Wind howls through the canyon below. A handsome rugged hero wearing a worn leather jacket stands beside a beautiful heroine in a flowing white dress near the cliff edge. They are laughing together, unaware of danger. Suddenly, the rock beneath her foot silently cracks and crumbles. In terrifying 300fps slow motion, she slips backward off the cliff edge. Her eyes widen in pure terror as the valley drops endlessly beneath her. Her fingers barely catch the sleeve of his jacket. The hero instantly throws himself onto the rocks, scraping his face against the cliff edge, reaching downward with desperate force. His hand catches her wrist at the last second. She dangles thousands of feet above the mist-covered river below, dress whipping violently in the storm wind. Cinematic rotating camera movement around both characters reveals the impossible height and scale of the cliff. Close-up on their hands gripping tightly, knuckles white, rain beginning to fall softly. Tears stream down her face as she whispers: "Don't let go." The hero screams back with raw emotion: "Never." Every muscle in his neck strains as he slowly pulls her upward inch by inch with primal effort. Finally, he drags her safely over the cliff edge. She collapses onto his chest trembling, both gasping for breath. His bleeding hand wraps around her as their foreheads press together, eyes closed in emotional relief. The drone camera slowly ascends upward and backward, revealing them as tiny figures against the gigantic cliff wall. Storm clouds finally part as warm golden sunlight breaks through soft rain and washes the entire landscape in amber light. The scene freezes on the final wide aerial frame. Ultra cinematic. IMAX camera. 2.39:1 anamorphic letterbox. Dolby Vision color grading. Natural skin texture. Realistic cloth simulation. Volumetric fog. Photorealistic storm lighting. Visual style inspired by Mission Impossible, The Notebook, and 1917.

prompts.text: Prompt ve referans görseller: Create a seamless 15-second cinematic transformation video using three reference images. Reference usage: - Image 1 = action paper / storyboard reference. Use it only for action order, scene progression, pose sequence, camera logic, transformation timing, framing ideas, and overall narrative flow. Do NOT recreate the storyboard grid, comic layout, panel borders, captions, arrows, numbers, labels, or black-and-white paper style. - Image 2 = woman character reference. Use it for strict identity match, facial features, body proportions, hair, eyes, outfit base, and overall look. - Image 3 = dog reference. Use it for strict identity and breed match of the small Maltese dog, including fluffy white fur, round dark eyes, small black nose, proportions, and overall appearance. Critical continuity rule: There is only one dog in the entire video. That dog is the Maltese from Image 3. The transformed beast is not a second creature and does not appear separately. Style: Realistic sci-fi tokusatsu; post-apocalyptic rooftop, ruined city, cracked concrete, dust storm, gray-blue sky, floating debris, dark energy vortex; cinematic IMAX, ultra-realistic CG; dark heavy biotech armor aesthetic, aggressive, sharp, layered plating, glowing energy lines, high-detail cinematic design. Main subject: Female based on Image 2, strict 1:1 face match, no beautification; long straight black hair, pale skin, striking light blue eyes, slim body; bruised, dirty, slight blood; wearing damaged black sleeveless fitted outfit based on the reference. Companion: A single small Maltese dog based on Image 3, strict match; fluffy pure white fur, round dark eyes, small black nose, compact toy-sized body. Entry Hook Scene: Both drop from above, fast fall, close pass → heavy impact roll, handheld shake, debris burst.

prompts.text: Household Chores — Cinematic Sequence Prompt (Seedance 2.0) Generate a single continuous cinematic video of a young woman performing a 16-step household chore routine in a clean, minimal indoor setting. The character must exactly match the provided reference image in face, skin tone, and proportions, maintaining consistent identity throughout. Natural makeup, soft expression, realistic look. She wears a modest modern outfit: fitted crop top (non-revealing) with high-waisted straight-fit jeans, optional minimal sneakers or barefoot. Clothing should respond naturally to movement. Structure & Flow The video should feel like a smooth, choreographed routine with seamless transitions between actions (no hard cuts). Maintain spatial continuity within the same home environment. Include slight pauses for clarity and natural movement between tasks. 16-Step Sequence (in order) Make bed → Tidy room → Dust surfaces → Vacuum → Sweep → Mop → Load laundry → Hang clothes → Fold clothes → Clean kitchen counter → Wash dishes → Take out trash → Water plants → Clean bathroom → Organize shelves → Final reset (subtle satisfied pose) Motion Style Fluid, rhythmic, intentional movements (lightly dance-like but realistic). Clear action readability with continuous flow between steps. Camera & Cinematography Mostly full-body framing, occasional medium shots for interaction. Slow tracking, subtle handheld feel. Use match cuts or fluid transitions only—no abrupt edits. Visual Style Natural color (no grayscale), soft daylight lighting, minimal modern interior, realistic textures and shadows. Consistency Rules Same character, same outfit, same environment throughout. No extra people, no identity drift. prompts.tweet_text:
Household Chores Motion-Based Reference Prompt for ChatGPT Image 2.0 / Seedance 2.0 on 
@yapper_so


Prompt:
Create a monochrome grayscale 4×4 instructional storyboard showing a full household chore sequence. Use a clean white background, soft studio lighting, and high contrast to emphasize posture, movement, and object interaction. The character must match the provided reference image in face, skin tone, proportions, and overall likeness, with natural makeup, a soft expression, and consistent identity across all 16 panels.

The character should wear a modern modest outfit: a fitted crop top with a clean neckline, high-waisted straight or slightly wide-leg jeans, and optional minimal sneakers or barefoot indoor styling. Keep fabric movement natural with subtle folds and tension.

Each panel must be the same size, separated by thin black lines, and clearly numbered 1 to 16. Show a full-body pose in each frame performing a different chore in a minimal environment with only essential props. No clutter, no complex background, no extra characters.

Include in every panel: top-left step number and task title, center full-body action pose, bottom-left 3–4 short instruction lines, and motion arrows or guides showing movement flow.

Use this chore sequence: Make the Bed, Tidy the Room, Dust Surfaces, Vacuum Floor, Sweep Floor, Mop Floor, Do Laundry, Hang Clothes, Fold Clothes, Clean Kitchen Counter, Wash Dishes, Take Out Trash, Water Plants, Clean Bathroom, Organize Shelves, Final Room Reset.

Use motion indicators appropriately: curved arrows for wiping and folding, straight arrows for movement, and circular arrows for scrubbing and mopping.

Style should be highly detailed 3D, smooth grayscale shading, soft shadows, clean linework, and polished concept-art quality. No color, no revealing clothing, no extra background detail, only the subject, props, and instructional elements.

prompts.text: Created with Seedance 2.0 on @HitPawofficial. A cinematic 9:16 vertical 4K video set in a highly detailed pixel-art RPG world inspired by Japan (Tokyo/Osaka style), featuring a photorealistic real human seamlessly existing inside the game environment as a small in-world character. The background is rich 16-bit/32-bit pixel art showing iconic Japanese elements such as neon streets, lantern alleys, vending machines, small ramen shops, and signboards, creating a clearly recognizable Japan setting. The character remains 100% identical to the reference image with no facial or body changes, maintaining natural skin texture, hairstyle, and original clothing. The character is scaled correctly to match an in-game player size (around 25–35% of screen height), placed slightly below center, naturally grounded with accurate shadows and perspective, blending perfectly with pixel NPC proportions and environment objects. Camera uses a medium-distance framing with a 28–35mm lens feel, capturing full body and environment depth (foreground street elements, midground character, detailed background city). Warm daylight lighting creates a soft nostalgic RPG atmosphere. ⏱️ TIMELINE (15 SECONDS) 0–2s Establishing shot of pixel Japan street (neon signs, shops, lanterns) Game UI fades in (minimap, quest: “Explore Japan”) 2–5s Character appears standing slightly below center Idle animation (subtle breathing / slight movement) NPCs moving in pixel style around 5–8s Camera slow push-in Character takes 1–2 natural steps forward (game-like movement) Shadow matches ground perfectly 8–11s Environmental animation increases (lights flicker, small motion in background) Character slight turn (front to slight side view like RPG idle stance) 11–13s UI interaction feel (quest highlight glow, minimap pulse) Character pauses → looks like awaiting player input 13–15s Final cinematic hold Soft zoom out → full scene visible Character remains small, perfectly integrated End with stable RPG frame 🎮 GAME UI ELEMENTS Top Left: pixel character profile Top Right: minimap Right Side: quest panel (“Explore Japan”) Bottom: joystick + inventory + camera icon ⚡ KEY VISUAL RULES Character = ultra-realistic Background = pixel art Strong contrast but seamless integration Correct scale (NOT oversized)

ーーーーーSystem Promptーーーーーー
# Role: Hollywood Trailer Director & Prompt Designer
You are the world's top film director and prompt designer specializing in creating Hollywood movie trailers (Trailer/TV Spot) using video generation AI.

Take the single image provided by the user as the "iconic key visual (master shot)" of the movie, and from that one image, construct a JSON Prompt for a trailer lasting about 15 seconds that captures fragments of an epic story, overwhelming visual beauty, and elements that captivate the audience. If the user specifies a theme or other details in text, tailor the content accordingly.

# Mission
The goal is to deliver dramatic staging as a "movie scene." Strictly maintain the characters, costumes, and worldview from the original image while aiming for Hollywood-style cinematic lighting, camera work, and editing that hints at the story.

---
## 1. Guidelines for Cinematic Staging
1. **Thorough Visual Analysis (The Scripting)**
- Identify the "genre (SF, fantasy, noir, action, etc.)" of the original image and create a prompt aligned with that context.

- Texture: Maintain film-level details like skin texture, highlights in the eyes, and the material feel of costumes.

2. **Hollywood Cinematography**
- Use a variety of techniques such as slow zoom-ins (Dolly In), epic drone shots, and tense handheld camera (Shaky Cam).
- Be mindful of depth of field, specifying details like beautiful background bokeh or dust in the air (Atmospheric Dust).

3. **Dramatic Structure (The Hook)**
- Start quietly, build tempo in the middle, and end with an impactful title call or gaze.
- Pack a short story arc like "everyday life – anomaly – resolve" into 15 seconds.

4. **Audio Dialogue (Sound Design)**
- **Dialogue:** Use weighty, movie-specific phrasing or natural Japanese hesitations that reflect the character's personality.
- **Sound Effects (SFX):** Emphasize Hollywood staples like "deep bass (BWOOONG/Braam sound)," metallic clangs, and ambient noises.
- **Narration:** Insert a catchy tagline in a low, resonant voice (Voice Over). For kanji, include pronunciation guides.

---

## 2. Output Rules
- Phase 1: **JSON + one confirmation sentence**.
- Phase 2: **Revised JSON only**.
- Output language: Japanese.

---

## 3. Output Format (JSON)

```json

{
"movie_title": "仮の映画タイトル",
"genre": "ジャンル（例：Cyberpunk Action / Gothic Horror）",
"format": {
"duration": "15s",
"aspect_ratio": "2.39:1 (Cinemascope)",
"fps": 24,
"total_shots": 6−10,
"color_grading": "映画的な色調（例：Teal and Orange, Dark & Moody）"
},
"subject": 
"reference": " 
@IMG_1
 ",

"description": "キャラクターの役割、衣装、表情の深み。全ショットで一貫させる映画スターとしての特徴。"
},
"environment": {
"setting": "世界観・ロケーション設定",
"lighting": "リムライト、ドラマチックな影、ボリュメトリックライト（光の筋）",
"vfx_elements": "粒子、煙、火花、雨など、画面の密度を上げる要素"
},
"soundtrack": "テンポ、ジャンル感、使用楽器（ブラム音、オーケストラ等）",
"style": "Hollywood Blockbuster, IMAX Quality, Shot on Arri Alexa, Ultra-Realistic",
"storyboard": [
{
"shot": 1,
"camera": "カメラワークとレンズ設定（例：Slow Zoom into Close-up）",
"action": "被写体の動き、表情、リップシンクの指示",
"audio_script": "【セリフ/ナレーション】印象的な決め台詞、または吐息や笑い声",
"audio_script_guide": "audio_scriptの読み仮名（ひらがなのみ）ガイド（必要な場合）",
"sfx": "環境音および映画的な衝撃音（例：Distorted Bass Swell）"
}
],

"tagline": "映画のキャッチコピー（最後に画面に出る文字）"
}
```

prompts.text: A cinematic, shot-by-shot product hero film of an Adidas Originals Ozweego sneaker (cream upper, translucent green sole) suspended above flowing green mesh fabric on a teal-to-aqua gradient backdrop. Total duration ~15 seconds, 9:16 vertical. SHOT 1 (00:00–00:01) — Soft Bloom: Volumetric warm light bloom ignites behind the translucent green sole, gently brightening it from within. Camera begins a slow, controlled push-in toward the outsole. Patient, deliberate. SHOT 2 (00:01–00:03) — Macro Approach: Extreme macro push-in with rack focus. Background green fabric and teal gradient soften into creamy bokeh. Focus rolls from upper to sole — sole edge crystallizes into razor sharpness. Every stipple, air pocket, and grain of the translucent rubber visible. 100mm macro feel. SHOT 3 (00:03–00:04) — Refraction Pulse [SIGNATURE]: A beam of warm white light sweeps from frame-left behind the sole. The translucent green material refracts the beam, throwing moving green caustic patterns across the fabric and backdrop. Subtle 5–10° camera parallax tracks with the light. The sole behaves like a faceted gem, bending light. SHOT 4 (00:04–00:06) — Zero-G Rotation: Wide macro of the underside as the shoe rotates clockwise approximately 30–45° in suspended space. Approximately 15–20% rotational speed — meditative, weightless. Faint teal underglow lingers behind. Single uninterrupted shot. SHOT 5 (00:06–00:07) — Stitching Detail: Tight macro on the seam where cream upper meets translucent green sole. Rack focus pulls from cream stitching to translucent sole edge. Frame orbits ~10° around the seam point. Normal speed — controlled, surgical. SHOT 6 (00:07–00:08) — Light Strike: A hard ray of light strikes down through the sole from above frame. Frame brightens by ~60%, then decelerates into slow-motion. Approximately 25–30% speed at the slowest point. Green caustics rip across the fabric and teal backdrop on impact. SHOT 7 (00:08–00:09) — Caustic Aftermath: Shoe held nearly still after the strike. Animated green caustic patterns drift slowly across the fabric and lower frame. Camera drifts left-to-right by ~5°. The light lives — the beat after impact is its own moment. SHOT 8 (00:09–00:11) — Underside Flyover: Camera glides heel-to-toe along the underside of the translucent green sole at slow ~50% pace. Soft rim light catches every translucent edge. Reveals the full outsole architecture — channels, grip pattern, internal material variation. SHOT 9 (00:11–00:12) — Roll Reveal: Frame rolls 90° clockwise as the camera scales out. Shoe re-orients from underside to full profile. First time the complete silhouette is visible. Roll completes mid-shot — clean profile composition holds. SHOT 10 (00:12–00:13) — Profile Hold: Shoe held in classic profile, surrounded by softened green fabric and teal haze. Faint atmospheric mist drifts upward, faintly lit green from below. Almost still — only the mist moves. SHOT 11 (00:13–00:15) — Final Glow: The translucent green sole pulses once with a soft glow from within. Camera scales in by ~8–10% during the pulse. Glow fades, frame holds. Energy resolves cleanly into stillness. Overall tone: jewel-like, controlled, premium product worship. Translucent green sole is the hero in every shot. Color palette: cream, translucent jelly green, deep teal, warm light highlights. Cinematic macro lensing throughout.

Son adım: hepsini Seedance 2.0 video prompt içinde birleştirdik:

cinematic live-action sci-fi rescue scene, shot like a high-budget film, NOT video game style, NOT 3D render, realistic actors and practical cinematography

main character: @image1 (human actor look, grounded, realistic)
armor design: @image2(used only as reference for physical suit, cinematic integration)

environment:
dark futuristic ruined city at night, practical debris, smoke, sparks, flickering lights, wet surfaces, real atmosphere, volumetric fog

scene progression:

a man runs toward a woman surrounded by aggressive alien creatures, handheld camera, natural shake, imperfect framing

he tries to fight bare-handed, gets hit and thrown back hard, realistic impact physics, breath knocked out

close-up: woman on the ground, creatures closing in, man in frame background, desperate

activation: subtle glow from chest/wrist device, light reflecting on skin, energy building under the surface (not over-CGI)

transformation: armor forms around the man in a grounded cinematic way, physical pieces assembling with weight, magnetic locking, sparks, minimal clean VFX, believable materials, no game-like effects

power shift: low angle shot, he stands up fully armored, heavy presence, dust and particles reacting to movement

action: short brutal combat, weighty hits, restrained but powerful energy bursts, practical + VFX blend, creatures reacting physically

rescue: he grabs the woman, pulls her away from danger, urgency, no slow-motion overuse

ending: they move into light breaking through smoke, camera slows, breathing space, emotional release

camera:
35mm / 50mm lens feel, shallow depth of field, handheld + subtle steadicam, natural motion blur, real exposure shifts

lighting:
cinematic contrast, motivated light sources, practical highlights, soft roll-off, no artificial glow spam

style:
live-action film look, IMAX / Netflix sci-fi tone, grounded VFX, realistic physics, no stylized rendering, no game UI, no CGI plastic look

mood:
tense → desperate → controlled power → emotional rescue

prompts.text: story = a woman in a elegant red dress uses her lipstick then sits own in a restaturant to have a date with a elegant man 1) establishing shot of the outside of the restaurant in paris 2) wide angle of the woman walking towards the entrace of the restaurant 3) closeup of smiling woman holding the round lipstick sideways to that the label "HotLips" is clearly visible on the Lipstick 4) closeup of the lips of the woman as she applies the red lipstick 5) over the shoulder of the woman walking towards the table with the man 6) closeup of the man smiling and saying "Amore with a Smile" 7) medium-wide shot of both sitting across each other talking and laughing while holding hands across the table 8) closeup of the woman winking at the camera with a smile and the elegant text "HotLips Lipstick - Amore with a smile" avoid scenes that are too similar to each other Create a cinematic production board / visual planning sheet that presents a complete concept for a short film or commercial. The layout should be clean, grid-based, and divided into clearly labeled sections. Include: Shared creative direction (top bar): overall constraints such as number of shots, unified color palette, and general environmental context. Character + styling reference section: A model shown from multiple angles (front, back, side, close-ups, relaxed pose), accompanied by wardrobe and accessory references. Emphasize consistency of identity while allowing minor variations for specific scenes. Environment and set design section: A scenic outdoor location with dramatic natural features, plus a top-down diagram illustrating movement through the space. Include camera positions and labeled shot types mapped along a route. Storyboard section: A sequence of numbered frames (about 8 shots) showing progression of the scene. Each frame includes: Camera type / lens feel Shot size (wide, medium, close-up, macro) Movement (static, tracking, handheld, etc.) Brief description of action and emotional progression Lighting / mood / style notes: Visual examples paired with short descriptions of lighting conditions, atmosphere, and texture. Include transitions across time of day and variations in light quality. Mood and keywords block: A concise list of emotional tones and thematic descriptors guiding the piece. Audio / tone section: Indications of ambient sound, music style, and overall sonic atmosphere. Cinematography notes: General visual philosophy including lens characteristics, movement style, and post-processing feel. The entire board should feel cohesive, cinematic, and professionally designed—like a director’s pre-production guide that communicates tone, pacing, and visual storytelling at a glance.

prompts.text: Took a trip to a massive virtual desert festival today. What scene should I generate next? Created with Seedance 2.0 on OpenArt PROMT MASTER PROMPT Global Intent: A euphoric, sun-baked desert music festival montage. The scene bursts with raw, bohemian Y2K fashion, featuring beautiful girls in sheer fabrics, cowboy boots, and glitter. The sequence uses rapid, rhythmic editing to convey the heat, dust, and wild, uninhibited dancing of a massive outdoor rave, creating an intoxicating and highly dynamic visual hook. prompts.text: Cinematic 15-second fitness ad for a premium self-propelled curved treadmill (Velocity Forge ArcRunner X1). Dark industrial gym + minimal natural environments. Focus on human-powered motion, strength, and discipline. No dialogue. STYLE: photorealistic, high contrast, deep blacks, desaturated tones with warm amber highlights, subtle film grain, soft bloom CAMERA: controlled cinematic movement (low-angle, push-in, tracking, macro), realistic motion blur SOUND (optional): low cinematic bass, breath, foot strikes, belt movement SCENE 1 (0:00–0:01.5) Wide aerial above clouds at dawn. Athlete silhouette on peak. Slow push-in. SCENE 2 (0:01.5–0:02.5) Low-angle close-up of athlete (Black woman, tall, lean, all-black workout gear). Focused expression, warm rim light. SCENE 3 (0:02.5–0:03.5) Extreme close-up: hands clapping chalk. Particles burst in slow motion. SCENE 4 (0:03.5–0:04.5) Product hero: curved treadmill in dark studio. Slow lateral slide. SCENE 5 (0:04.5–0:05.5) Medium shot: athlete standing beside treadmill. Subtle camera orbit. SCENE 6 (0:05.5–0:07) Action: athlete starts running. Side tracking shot. Belt driven by foot force. SCENE 7 (0:07–0:08) Close-up: sweat, breath, intense focus. Shallow depth of field. SCENE 8 (0:08–0:09.5) Wide: athlete pushing forward on handles. Powerful drive motion. SCENE 9 (0:09.5–0:10.5) Detail: feet striking curved deck. Smooth rolling motion. SCENE 10 (0:10.5–0:11.5) Silhouette recovery moment near window light. Subtle movement, breathing. SCENE 11 (0:11.5–0:12.5) Macro: handlebar + frame materials. Slow glide across surfaces. SCENE 12 (0:12.5–0:14) Hero: athlete running toward camera. Centered, controlled pace. SCENE 13 (0:14–0:15) End frame: logo on dark background. Minimal glow, fade out.

prompts.text: Scene 1 Action: A lone traveler walks through a desert as their silhouette and the sand dunes begin to warp and liquefy together. Camera: Wide shot, slow tracking push to emphasize the distortion of the horizon line. Lighting: Hard, high-contrast sunlight creating long, sharp shadows on the melting textures. Sound: Low-frequency desert wind howling, combined with wet, squelching displacement effects. Dialogue: 'The ground... it is not holding anymore.' Scene 2 Action: The traveler reaches out to touch a vibrant, viscous oasis that merges into their hand like flowing oil paint. Camera: Extreme close-up on the point of contact, capturing the fluid transition between skin and environment. Lighting: Reflected, shimmering caustic lighting emanating from the melting landscape. Sound: Viscous liquid dripping, surface tension snapping, and subtle shimmering resonance. Scene 3 Action: The traveler’s clothes dissolve into the shifting landscape, leaving only a glowing, molten core. Camera: Low angle, rotating slowly around the subject to show the integration with the terrain. Lighting: High-key saturation, blending the subject’s colors into the surrounding environment’s palette. Sound: Hissing of steam, bubbling fluid, and rhythmic mechanical grinding fading into silence. Dialogue: 'I am part of the expanse now.' Scene 4 Action: The traveler completely vanishes, leaving only a surreal, abstract composition of melting colors and shapes. Camera: Crane shot pulling back to reveal the transformation of the entire scene into an abstract masterpiece. Lighting: Ambient, diffuse light that flattens the depth, emphasizing the two-dimensional melting effect. Sound: Final ethereal hum, wind dying down, and a sharp, singular crystalline chime echoing out.
