prompts.text: Prompt 1: GPT Image 2 Template Create a 16:9 horizontal cinematic casting board showing 4 different actor candidates for the same role. Style: [INSERT VISUAL STYLE] Examples: CGI AAA video game cinematic, photorealistic, anime, stylized 3D Role brief: [INSERT ROLE DESCRIPTION] Describe the type of lead or character the user is casting for. World / genre: [INSERT WORLD OR GENRE] Examples: spy-action thriller, fantasy RPG, sci-fi adventure, crime drama Wardrobe: [INSERT WARDROBE DESCRIPTION] Describe the clothing or outfit direction all 4 actors should share. Tone: [INSERT TONE] Examples: sleek, dangerous, adventurous, grounded, moody, confident Visual direction: [INSERT VISUAL RENDERING NOTES] Describe the rendering quality, material detail, realism level, facial detail, costume detail, and overall look. Cinematic look: [INSERT CINEMATIC STYLE] Examples: blockbuster trailer aesthetic, prestige drama look, AAA game cinematic look Camera framing: [INSERT FRAMING] Examples: 3/4 body, full body, waist-up Camera angle: [INSERT CAMERA ANGLE] Examples: eye-level, slight low angle, slight 3/4 angle Lens: [INSERT LENS] Examples: 50mm cinematic lens, 85mm portrait lens Depth of field: [INSERT DEPTH OF FIELD] Examples: shallow, shallow but controlled Lighting: [INSERT LIGHTING SETUP] Describe the lighting style. Background: [INSERT BACKGROUND DESCRIPTION] Describe the background environment or backdrop. Colour treatment: [INSERT COLOUR TREATMENT] Describe the grading or colour tone. Layout: Arrange the 4 actor candidates in a 16:9 horizontal composition with 4 evenly spaced vertical panels across the frame, one actor per panel from left to right. Character variation: Each candidate should feel like a different casting choice for the same role. Vary facial structure, age feel, hairstyle, expression, posture, and energy, but keep them grounded in the same world, wardrobe logic, and tonal universe. Important: - Same role - Same world - Same wardrobe logic - Same visual style - Different actor interpretations - No duplicated faces - No text - No labels - No watermark The final image should feel like a premium cinematic casting board for [INSERT PROJECT TYPE]. Examples: a film, a game, an animated short, a cinematic trailer

Get the vibe right → everything else follows.

Here’s the prompt 👇

Create a high-end cinematic luxury poster illustrating the transformation of motion into form.
Top section (seamless progression, no borders):
A horizontal sequence of 5 stages showing a moonwalk-inspired movement evolving into a diamond sculpture.
A performer inspired by Michael Jackson in side view performing a smooth moonwalk, elegant silhouette, black suit and fedora, subtle ground smoke, cinematic lighting
The figure dissolves into golden light trails and particles, motion energy flowing backward
Pure abstract flowing energy lines (gold and white), fluid and dynamic, no human form
Energy crystallizing into a faceted humanoid structure, diamond fragments forming
A fully formed crystal sculpture capturing the exact moonwalk pose, sharp facets, reflective material
Smooth transition across all stages, no panel separation.

Typography (top left):
FROM MOTION TO FORM
Subtitle: INSPIRED BY THE MOONWALK
Modern luxury sans-serif, subtle gold tone

Bottom section:
Ultra photorealistic studio render of the final diamond trophy
Object:
A crystal sculpture shaped from the moonwalk pose, dynamic leaning posture, elegant curves
Material:
Transparent diamond with high refraction, internal reflections, subtle rainbow caustics
Dramatic cinematic lighting, strong top spotlight, warm golden rim light, high contrast

Dark luxury background fading into black, floating golden particles
Glossy black reflective base with mirror reflection

Flowing silk fabric in background, soft highlights, luxury feel
Branding (bottom left):
MOONWALK DIAMOND TROPHY
Tagline: ICONIC MOTION. SCULPTED IN LIGHT.
Ultra realistic, luxury advertising, cinematic, high detail, premium finish

prompts.text: Seedance 2.0 Video Prompt, K-Pop Dance Sequence (16 Steps, Korean Street) [PROJECT TYPE] Cinematic K-pop dance video (instruction-to-performance translation) [CORE REQUIREMENT, STRICT] The video must faithfully follow the exact 16-step choreography shown in the reference sheet, in the same order, with accurate poses and transitions. No steps added, removed, or rearranged. [CHARACTER] Korean female dancer (K-pop idol aesthetic) Slim, athletic build Same consistent face and proportions throughout Expressive, confident stage presence Natural, fluid but sharp K-pop movement quality [WARDROBE, K-POP STYLE] Fitted crop top Loose high-waisted jeans Sneakers Modern idol styling (clean, trendy) Fabric reacts naturally to movement (denim weight, subtle folds) [LOCATION / ENVIRONMENT] Empty aesthetic Korean street (Seoul-inspired) Clean urban design: narrow street, minimal signage, soft architecture No people, no vehicles Slight cinematic depth (buildings, street lights, textures) Lighting: Soft daylight or golden hour (ideal for K-pop vibe) Balanced highlights + gentle shadows [16-STEP CHOREOGRAPHY, LOCKED SEQUENCE] Starting Pose Step Touch Right Step Touch Left Hip Sway Combo Body Roll Down Back Step Sweep Quarter Turn Pivot Hair Flip & Pose Side Step Drag Cross Behind Unwind Body Wave Up Hip Circle Step Lock Step Arm Sweep Pose Chest Pop & Hit Final Pose (hold 2–3 sec) [CAMERA DIRECTION] Full-body framing at all times Start: centered wide shot Smooth tracking + subtle dolly movement Slight angle variation (front → 3/4 → side for spins) No prompts.tweet_text:
Seedance 2.0 Video Prompt, K-Pop Dance Sequence (16 Steps, Korean Street)

[PROJECT TYPE]
Cinematic K-pop dance video (instruction-to-performance translation)

[CORE REQUIREMENT, STRICT]
The video must faithfully follow the exact 16-step choreography shown in the reference sheet, in the same order, with accurate poses and transitions.
No steps added, removed, or rearranged.

[CHARACTER]
Korean female dancer (K-pop idol aesthetic)
Slim, athletic build
Same consistent face and proportions throughout
Expressive, confident stage presence
Natural, fluid but sharp K-pop movement quality

[WARDROBE, K-POP STYLE]
Fitted crop top
Loose high-waisted jeans
Sneakers
Modern idol styling (clean, trendy)
Fabric reacts naturally to movement (denim weight, subtle folds)

[LOCATION / ENVIRONMENT]
Empty aesthetic Korean street (Seoul-inspired)
Clean urban design: narrow street, minimal signage, soft architecture
No people, no vehicles
Slight cinematic depth (buildings, street lights, textures)
Lighting:
Soft daylight or golden hour (ideal for K-pop vibe)
Balanced highlights + gentle shadows

[16-STEP CHOREOGRAPHY, LOCKED SEQUENCE]
Starting Pose
Step Touch Right
Step Touch Left
Hip Sway Combo
Body Roll Down
Back Step Sweep
Quarter Turn Pivot
Hair Flip & Pose
Side Step Drag
Cross Behind Unwind
Body Wave Up
Hip Circle
Step Lock Step
Arm Sweep Pose
Chest Pop & Hit
Final Pose (hold 2–3 sec)

[CAMERA DIRECTION]
Full-body framing at all times
Start: centered wide shot
Smooth tracking + subtle dolly movement
Slight angle variation (front → 3/4 → side for spins)
No fast cuts — continuous flow
Camera movement complements choreography, not distracts

[MOVEMENT STYLE, IMPORTANT]
Authentic K-pop choreography feel
Mix of:
Sharp hits (chest pop, accents)
Smooth transitions (body waves, turns)
Clean isolations (hips, chest, arms)
Controlled spins, balanced footwork
No jitter, no unnatural speed

[TIMING]
Each step: ~2–3 seconds
Total duration: ~35–50 seconds
Seamless transitions between steps

[MUSIC DIRECTION, VERY IMPORTANT]
Genre: K-pop / K-pop instrumental / dance-pop
Tempo: 100–115 BPM
Style:
Clean beat drops
Punchy percussion
Light synth melodies
Modern idol choreography vibe
Sync Notes:
Step transitions hit beats
Step 8 (Hair Flip) hits a musical accent
Step 15 (Chest Pop) synced with a strong beat hit
Final pose lands on a clean musical ending

[VISUAL STYLE]
Photorealistic
Slightly stylized K-pop MV tone
Soft cinematic grading
Clean, polished, high-end look

[OUTPUT SETTINGS]
4K resolution
24–30 FPS
High motion clarity
No distortion, no artifacts

[RESTRICTIONS]
No extra dancers
No background crowd
No outfit changes
No deviation from choreography
No camera cuts that break continuity

prompts.text: Visual Style: Vibrant 3D animation, exaggerated squash-and-stretch physics, and cinematic lighting. Time Scene Description Camera Movement 0-3s A tiny, sophisticated Hamster in a high-tech harness lowers from a ceiling vent toward a giant chocolate chip cookie on a kitchen island. Crane Shot: Smoothly descends from the ceiling, following the hamster’s POV as the "target" gets closer. 3-6s Just as his paws touch the cookie, a shadow looms. A sleepy Ginger Cat enters the frame, yawning wide right next to him. Low-Angle Pan: Rapidly circles 180° around the hamster to reveal the massive cat towering in the background. 6-9s The hamster panics, grabs the cookie (which is twice his size), and sprints. He uses a silver spoon as a catapult to launch into the air. Tracking Shot: A fast side-scrolling "profile" shot, keeping pace with the hamster's frantic running. 9-12s Mid-air, the hamster opens a tiny paraglider made of a cocktail napkin. He soars over the cat’s head while the cat swipes blindly. Dynamic Follow: The camera "glides" behind the hamster’s shoulder, dipping and diving through the air. 12-15s The hamster sticks a superhero landing back inside the dark vent. He takes a huge, satisfying bite as the vent cover slams shut. Push-In to Zoom: A rapid zoom into the hamster’s face for the "crunch," followed by a quick "iris-out" black screen.

prompts.text: [Cinematography]: Dynamic tracking shot moving alongside the vehicle at a low angle, transitioning into a shaky, handheld camera movement to emphasize impact and scale during the transformation. Shot on IMAX digital cameras with anamorphic lenses, high shutter speed to capture mechanical intricacies, water droplets on the lens, shallow depth of field focusing on the shifting metal. [Subject]: Initially a weathered, emerald-green vintage school bus with rusted wheel wells. It morphs into a colossal, industrial T-Rex mecha composed of twisted chassis metal, bus tires functioning as limb joints, and the front grille splitting to form a jagged, metallic maw. [Action]: The bus speeds down the wet asphalt, splashing puddles. Suddenly, hydraulic pistons engage; the roof splits, the wheels rotate inward to become legs, and the body reconfigures vertically. The newly formed mecha stomps the ground, cracking the pavement, and unleashes a torrent of fire from its mouth while its headlights-turned-eyes flare bright red. [Context]: A winding, rain-slicked road cutting through a dense, foggy coniferous forest. Tall pine trees line the path, shrouded in mist. The atmosphere is stormy, with heavy rain pouring down, reflecting the transformation in the wet road surface. [Style & Ambiance]: High-octane sci-fi action aesthetic, reminiscent of Michael Bay films. Gritty, realistic CGI textures with metallic sheen and rust details. Lighting is dramatic and moody, dominated by cool blue tones of the rainy twilight, contrasted sharply by the warm orange glow of the mecha's fire breath and glowing eyes.

prompts.text: A cinematic commercial for a refreshing soft drink. A young adult walks through a hot, sunlit city street at midday, visibly tired and sweating. The environment is vibrant but hazy with heat. Close-up shots show sunlight reflecting off glass buildings, slow-motion dust particles in the air, and people fanning themselves. The character stops at a small street kiosk and grabs a chilled bottle of sparkling soft drink from an ice-filled cooler. The bottle is covered in condensation, with droplets slowly dripping down. Extreme close-up of the cap twisting open with a crisp fizz sound, bubbles rising in slow motion. As the character takes a sip, the scene transforms instantly: colors become more saturated, lighting softens, and a cool breeze flows through the street. The environment shifts into a refreshing, lively atmosphere with subtle motion in trees and people appearing energized. Cut to macro shots of carbonation bubbles, liquid splashing, and ice cubes tumbling in crystal-clear detail. Final shot: the character smiles, refreshed, holding the drink against a bright, clean background. Text overlay: "Refresh Your Moment." Style: ultra-realistic, cinematic lighting, shallow depth of field, high detail, 4K, smooth slow motion, vibrant color grading, professional commercial style.

prompts.text: 10s cinematic sequence Camera Style: 50mm lens, shallow depth of field, slow controlled push-in with subtle handheld stability Lighting: dusk transitioning into low indoor light, warm tones fading into cooler dim shadows Environment: quiet suburban home interior, small room with window and mirror, faint wind moving curtains Scene & Motion Direction: 0–2s: Wide interior shot. Girl sits near window drawing quietly, soft dusk light entering room, shadows long and gentle, environment calm and still. 2–4s: Close-up her hand drawing slows slightly, ambient sound fades, window reflection shows slight delay in movement compared to her actions. 4–6s: She pauses and looks toward mirror, camera slowly pushes in. Lighting dims subtly, corners of room deepen in shadow, curtains move lightly with wind. 6–8s: Mid shot she stands and walks toward mirror with slow, deliberate steps. Reflection shows subtle mismatch in posture and timing, hinting at distortion without exaggeration. 8–10s: Close-up on mirror her reflection appears slightly altered in shape and gaze, not fully human but only suggested through shadow and silhouette. Ending Action: She remains still facing mirror as room becomes silent, only faint curtain movement visible. Key Realism Notes: No sudden transformation or jump scares, changes must be gradual and barely perceptible, lighting transitions smooth and natural, reflections slightly delayed not exaggerated, atmosphere built through silence and subtle visual shifts.

prompts.text: 2 images: Prompt: 1 Create a cinematic hero image of a gourmet cheeseburger on a dark stone surface. Details: glossy brioche bun, melted cheese, crisp lettuce, tomato, grilled patty, sauce, sesame seeds, realistic texture, appetizing steam. Lighting: warm side light, shallow depth of field, premium food commercial style. No text, no logos, no watermark. Prompt 2: Create a 9-cell hybrid keyframe-to-transition storyboard sheet for a 15-second gourmet burger ad. S1: empty dark stone surface with warm spotlight. T1: ingredients slide into frame with quick motion streaks. S2: burger ingredients stacked in mid-action, bun above patty. T2: slow-motion drop of top bun, sauce glistens. S3: finished burger lands perfectly, tiny bounce. T3: camera pushes into macro cheese melt and steam. S4: close-up bite moment, juicy texture revealed. T4: whip-pan back to final hero angle with steam trails. S5: final hero shot of complete burger on dark stone surface. Use large S cells and smaller T cells. Show motion using arrows, ghosted ingredient positions, steam, sauce trails, and camera push-in icons. Style: premium food commercial, warm lighting, rich texture, appetizing, cinematic. Minimal labels only. No logos, no watermark. Here is my Seedance 2.0 prompt. Just an experiment: Use @ image_1 as the exact burger identity and food quality reference. Use @ image_2 as the hybrid keyframe-to-transition storyboard. Create one polished 15-second premium burger commercial. Read the board in order: S1 → T1 → S2 → T2 → S3 → T3 → S4 → T4 → S5. The S cells are the main anchor shots. The T cells are transition instructions between shots. Timing: 0–2s: S1, empty dark stone surface with warm cinematic light. 2–4s: T1, ingredients slide into frame with fast appetizing motion trails. 4–6s: S2, burger assembles in stacked layers. 6–8s: T2, top bun drops down in slow motion with sauce and cheese dripping. 8–10s: S3, completed burger lands as steam rises. 10–12s: T3, macro push-in on melted cheese, grilled patty, steam, and glossy texture. 12–13.5s: S4, extreme appetizing texture reveal. 13.5–15s: T4 into S5, fast smooth transition to final whole burger hero shot. Preserve the burger identity from @ image_1: glossy sesame bun, melted cheddar, grilled patty, lettuce, tomato, onion, sauce, steam, dark stone surface, warm side light. The arrows, labels, numbers, and icons in the storyboard are instructions only. Do not render any arrows, labels, icons, text, or storyboard graphics in the final video. Make the video feel like a premium food commercial, not a slideshow. Use macro lens, shallow depth of field, slow motion, steam, sauce drips, glossy highlights, and satisfying assembly motion. Do not add extra ingredients. Do not change the burger. Do not show hands unless clearly needed. Do not show logos or text.

prompts.text: master_instruction: "A high resolution 4x4 grid image showing a 16 panel sequence of a female dancer performing a traditional minimalist dance. Liminal Moorish Minimalist aesthetic. High contrast chiaroscuro, pure pitch black backgrounds, single stark white directional light. Desaturated earthy tones with matte terracotta and burnished gold accents." row_1_the_grounding: description: "The first four panels establish the rhythm." panel_1: "Close up of bare feet sliding onto a sharply lit geometric tile floor out of total darkness." panel_2: "Full body shot, standing perfectly straight, heavy charcoal robes draping heavily like a solid pillar." panel_3: "Waist up shot, her hands slowly rising, fingers sharply extended in a traditional pose, completely engulfed in shadow except for a sliver of light on her gold bracelets." panel_4: "Head and shoulders shot. Her hands snap together to form a rigid, symmetrical triangle frame directly in front of her Mashrabiya mask." row_2_the_architecture: description: "The next four panels focus on sharp, upper body isolations matching the tech house percussion." panel_5: "Full body shot. She lunges deeply into a stark ray of light, one arm extended straight out, the other bent at a perfect 90 degree angle." panel_6: "Close up on the torso. The heavy fabric is pulled taut, revealing a stark, diagonal line of shadow cutting across her form." panel_7: "Wide shot. She mirrors the shape of an unseen Moorish arch, her body contorted into a rigid, geometric silhouette against the dark." panel_8: "Medium shot. Sudden stillness. Both arms crossed tightly over her chest, the matte gold accents gleaming in the harsh spotlight." row_3_the_momentum: description: "Panels 9 through 12 capture the hypnotic, repetitive spinning inspired by Sufi whirling, syncing with the rising synth pads." panel_9: "Full body shot. She begins to turn, the heavy charcoal fabric lifting slightly off the ground, creating a distinct bell shape." panel_10: "A slightly blurred action shot. She is spinning rapidly, her robes flaring out into a perfect, massive dark cone that dominates the frame." panel_11: "Overhead angle. Looking down at the spinning dancer, the geometric tiles below her creating a dizzying contrast with her pure black, circular silhouette." panel_12: "Low angle shot. The single light source catches the very edge of the spinning fabric, creating a sharp crescent of illuminated texture against the absolute black background." row_4_the_collapse: description: "The final four panels show the drop and the return to absolute stillness." panel_13: "Full body shot. The spin abruptly stops. The heavy fabric wraps violently around her momentum, freezing in a chaotic but sculptural arrangement of deep folds." panel_14: "Medium shot. She drops into a low, grounded crouch, pulling the robes tightly around her to form a pure black geometric monolith resting on the illuminated floor." panel_15: "Extreme close up of her masked face, tilted downwards. Only the intricate lattice of the mask and a single gold earring are visible in a tiny sliver of light." panel_16: "Wide shot. The spotlight begins to fade. The dancer is nothing more than a dark, ambiguous mountain of fabric, merging seamlessly back into the crushing pitch black of the surrounding void."

Only the intricate lattice of the mask and a single gold earring are visible in a tiny sliver of light." panel_16: "Wide shot. The spotlight begins to fade. The dancer is nothing more than a dark, ambiguous mountain of fabric, merging seamlessly back into the crushing pitch black of the surrounding void."

prompts.tweet_text:
8. Gemini 
@GeminiApp


Back to Gemini, I asked for the dance style:
Based on all the information we have, describe a style of dancing in detail that would fit this song, put it all in a prompt for a 4x4 grid image, with each part being explained in detail.

Now, the fun begins! Here's one of the dance prompts:

characters:
  - name: "The Dancer"
    role: "Main Character"
    description: "A mysterious and poised figure, embodying the hypnotic rhythm through minimalist, traditional movement."
    appearance: "Draped in heavy, layered charcoal and black minimalist cut robes. She wears a geometric Mashrabiya inspired mask and simplified, unadorned gold and terracotta geometric jewelry."

dance_style:
  name: "Geometric Tenebrism Groove"
  rhythm_and_footwork: "Deeply grounded in the heavy 4/4 tech house kick drum. Her bare feet slide and step with deliberate weight on the stone tiles, maintaining a low, pulsing center of gravity that resonates through her heavy garments."
  upper_body_and_arms: "Characterized by sharp, architectural isolations. Her arms create precise right angles and geometric frames around her masked face, echoing the minimalist Moorish arches. The movements are a distilled, rigid, and highly controlled interpretation of traditional Arabic hand and wrist articulations."
  fabric_manipulation: "She uses the heavy charcoal fabric as an extension of the music's driving bassline. Sweeping, calculated throws of the cloth create massive silhouettes of pure black that temporarily swallow the light, followed by sudden, statue like stillness on the downbeat."
  overall_vibe: "A meditative, ritualistic trance. There is no erratic movement or joyous expression, only a solemn, powerful devotion to the deep, repetitive resonance of the music, perfectly syncing with the flashing shadows."

image_prompt:
  master_instruction: "A high resolution 4x4 grid image showing a 16 panel sequence of a female dancer performing a traditional minimalist dance. Liminal Moorish Minimalist aesthetic. High contrast chiaroscuro, pure pitch black backgrounds, single stark white directional light. Desaturated earthy tones with matte terracotta and burnished gold accents."

  row_1_the_grounding:
    description: "The first four panels establish the rhythm."
    panel_1: "Close up of bare feet sliding onto a sharply lit geometric tile floor out of total darkness."
    panel_2: "Full body shot, standing perfectly straight, heavy charcoal robes draping heavily like a solid pillar."
    panel_3: "Waist up shot, her hands slowly rising, fingers sharply extended in a traditional pose, completely engulfed in shadow except for a sliver of light on her gold bracelets."
    panel_4: "Head and shoulders shot. Her hands snap together to form a rigid, symmetrical triangle frame directly in front of her Mashrabiya mask."

  row_2_the_architecture:
    description: "The next four panels focus on sharp, upper body isolations matching the tech house percussion."
    panel_5: "Full body shot. She lunges deeply into a stark ray of light, one arm extended straight out, the other bent at a perfect 90 degree angle."
    panel_6: "Close up on the torso. The heavy fabric is pulled taut, revealing a stark, diagonal line of shadow cutting across her form."
    panel_7: "Wide shot. She mirrors the shape of an unseen Moorish arch, her body contorted into a rigid, geometric silhouette against the dark."
    panel_8: "Medium shot. Sudden stillness. Both arms crossed tightly over her chest, the matte gold accents gleaming in the harsh spotlight."

  row_3_the_momentum:
    description: "Panels 9 through 12 capture the hypnotic, repetitive spinning inspired by Sufi whirling, syncing with the rising synth pads."
    panel_9: "Full body shot. She begins to turn, the heavy charcoal fabric lifting slightly off the ground, creating a distinct bell shape."
    panel_10: "A slightly blurred action shot. She is spinning rapidly, her robes flaring out into a perfect, massive dark cone that dominates the frame."
    panel_11: "Overhead angle. Looking down at the spinning dancer, the geometric tiles below her creating a dizzying contrast with her pure black, circular silhouette."
    panel_12: "Low angle shot. The single light source catches the very edge of the spinning fabric, creating a sharp crescent of illuminated texture against the absolute black background."

  row_4_the_collapse:
    description: "The final four panels show the drop and the return to absolute stillness."
    panel_13: "Full body shot. The spin abruptly stops. The heavy fabric wraps violently around her momentum, freezing in a chaotic but sculptural arrangement of deep folds."
    panel_14: "Medium shot. She drops into a low, grounded crouch, pulling the robes tightly around her to form a pure black geometric monolith resting on the illuminated floor."
    panel_15: "Extreme close up of her masked face, tilted downwards. Only the intricate lattice of the mask and a single gold earring are visible in a tiny sliver of light."
    panel_16: "Wide shot. The spotlight begins to fade. The dancer is nothing more than a dark, ambiguous mountain of fabric, merging seamlessly back into the crushing pitch black of the surrounding void."

prompts.text: : Ultra-realistic cinematic 15-second video, 4K, soft natural lighting, shallow depth of field, slow camera movement, emotional storytelling, warm color grading. Scene 1 (0–3s) A young girl sits beside a softly lit window, painting on a canvas. Golden sunlight gently illuminates her face and workspace. Camera slowly pushes in as she adds delicate brush strokes with focus. Scene 2 (3–7s) Close-up: she squeezes a paint tube — nothing comes out. She tries another... also empty. Subtle change in expression from calm focus to quiet concern. Cut to her eyes, reflecting realization. Scene 3 (7–11s) She leans back slightly, looking at the canvas. Camera slowly pans across the painting — a visible unfinished section lacking color. Lighting softens, shadows slightly deepen to enhance mood. Scene 4 (11–15s) She gently places the brush down. Over-the-shoulder shot of the incomplete artwork. She gazes at it thoughtfully — calm, paused, not defeated. Warm light lingers

prompts.text: Create a clean, bright skincare commercial storyboard in a 16:9 layout with 9 panels. Use soft natural lighting, minimal aesthetic, and a fresh, airy mood with white and pastel tones. No text or subtitles anywhere. Show a clear story flow: she starts at her desk looking slightly tired or concerned, then a close-up of her face showing dry or dull skin. Keep everything elegant, minimal, and visually soothing with no branding text.

prompts.text: Classic retro cartoon style. Scene One: A bustling Egyptian marketplace transitions into a large tent. The tent is isolated from the outside world. A muscular jackal merchant Anubis, wearing armbands, with his sleeves rolled up bare, is tied to a table, his wrists and ankles shackled, his arms forcibly raised overhead, unable to move a muscle. Two bird-like pirates, a captain and a henchman, stand beside him. The captain orders Anubis to lead the way to the ancient treasure. Scene Two: Anubis scoffs with a dismissive "Hmph," turns his head away, closes his eyes, and says nothing. Scene Three: The captain grins wickedly and pulls out a feather. Anubis notices, growing somewhat worried, shakes his head slightly, and says, "Please, not the feather." Scene Four: The bird-like captain extends the feather toward Anubis's armpit, and Anubis says again with worry, "Anything but that!" Scene 5: A close-up shot shows the captain tickling Anubis's armpit with the feather, accompanied by comical sound effects. At the same time, we hear Anubis's reluctant laughter. Scene 6: A close-up shot focuses on Anubis's upper body; his eyes squeezed shut, he grins widely with muffled laughter as the feather continues to slide up and down his armpit. Scene 7: The captain keeps tickling Anubis's armpit with the feather; Anubis giggles, trying to shift his upper body, but the handcuffs hold him fast, and the feather persists in teasing his armpit. Scene 8: The captain continues tickling Anubis's armpit with the feather; Anubis laughs and finally says, "Stop! I'll tell you, just stop tickling!" Then he bursts into laughter again. Anubis's voice is deep.

prompts.text: Create one coherent 15-second biblical epic sequence with strong continuity across all 9 storyboard panels, using @Image 1 as the visual reference for shot order, framing, mood, and progression. [CINEMATIC SETUP] High-budget live-action sequence of Moses opening the Red Sea. The tone is dramatic, emotional, powerful, and awe-inspiring. [CHARACTER] Moses is an older Middle Eastern man with long dark hair with slight gray streaks, a full beard, weathered face, intense eyes, wearing earthy brown and beige desert robes and holding a wooden staff. Keep the same face, hair, beard, robes, and staff in every shot. [ENVIRONMENT] The Red Sea at dusk, dark stormy sky, violent wind, crashing waves, wet rocks, mist, deep shadows, heavy clouds, divine atmosphere. Ancient biblical setting only. [CAMERA / VISUAL LOOK] Epic IMAX-style large-format look, subtle fine film grain, high dynamic range, realistic water physics, volumetric divine light, natural textures, premium live-action realism, massive scale. [AUDIO DIRECTION] Epic orchestral biblical score with deep percussion, low male choir, rising strings, distant horns, and a majestic crescendo. SFX must be realistic and synced to each shot. [SHOT TIMELINE] SHOT 1 / PANEL 1 — 0.0s - 2.0s Aerial push-in, high angle, over the crowd toward Moses standing before the Red Sea. SFX: wind gusts, distant thunder, crowd murmurs, crashing waves, robes fluttering. SHOT 2 / PANEL 2 — 2.0s - 3.8s Low-angle rear tracking shot as Moses walks toward the sea with staff in hand. SFX: footsteps on wet rock, wind through fabric, staff taps, sea spray, waves. SHOT 3 / PANEL 3 — 3.8s - 5.0s Slow push-in close-up on Moses’ face, intense, emotional, and full of faith. SFX: focused wind, cloth movement, distant thunder, breath. SHOT 4 / PANEL 4 — 5.0s - 6.0s Handheld macro push-in on Moses’ hand gripping the wooden staff, subtle divine energy building. SFX: hand tightening on wood, wood creak, faint divine hum, mystical shimmer. SHOT 5 / PANEL 5 — 6.0s - 7.8s Low heroic crane-up as Moses raises the staff to the sky, robes whipping, clouds opening. SFX: wind surge, robe flapping, thunder crack, divine swell, low boom. SHOT 6 / PANEL 6 — 7.8s - 10.5s Frontal dolly-out as the Red Sea begins to split, huge walls of water rising apart. SFX: massive water rupture, roaring displacement, deep impacts, wave movement, debris, divine shockwave. SHOT 7 / PANEL 7 — 10.5s - 12.8s Symmetrical forward dolly through the opened path between towering walls of water. SFX: roaring water walls, mist spray, echoing water movement, deep rumble, subtle footsteps. SHOT 8 / PANEL 8 — 12.8s - 14.0s Low-angle tracking shot inside the corridor, moving behind and beside Moses as he leads forward. SFX: wet footsteps, robes moving, roaring water, distant crowd movement, reverberant mist ambience. SHOT 9 / PANEL 9 — 14.0s - 15.0s Final slow pull-back from behind Moses facing the fully opened Red Sea, divine light breaking through the clouds. SFX: deep water roar, soft thunder tail, sweeping wind, final divine shimmer.

prompts.text: Scene 1: The Blueprint (0-3s) A tiny, resourceful ant named Barnaby stands on a kitchen counter, wearing a miniature high-tech visor. A blueprint of a donut is projected in front of him. A single, colossal rainbow sprinkle rests beside him. Scene 2: The Approach (3-6s) Barnaby cautiously approaches the sprinkle. The camera zooms in dramatically, emphasizing the ant’s small size against the bright, textured surface of the confectionery. Scene 3: The Heavy Lifting (6-9s) He attempts to lift the sprinkle. Barnaby strains, his antennae vibrating. He leverages his tiny strength, but the sprinkle remains frustratingly rooted to the counter. Scene 4: The Innovation (9-12s) Suddenly, a tiny, segmented robotic leg extends from Barnaby’s backpack. He uses the device to effortlessly pry the sprinkle loose, a digital cheer icon appearing above his visor. Scene 5: The Sweet Success (12-15s) The robotic leg helps Barnaby carry the massive sprinkle on his back. He marches off screen, humming a tiny tune, the colorful prize a gleaming testament to his victory.

prompts.text: A cinematic, anime-inspired romantic sequence set in a neon-lit city at night during light snowfall. The scene unfolds as a sequence of emotionally connected moments between a young couple dressed in elegant evening attire (black suit and purple dress), holding a golden rose-shaped award. Visual structure: storyboard-style progression with smooth transitions between scenes, as if each panel comes to life. Scene flow and animation: Opening: the couple stands under glowing city lights, soft snow falling; the girl looks down shyly while holding a golden trophy, the man smiles gently. Walking scene: they stroll side by side through a bustling street with colorful neon signs reflecting on wet pavement; subtle hand and eye movements, natural chemistry. Close-up: the man gently brushes snow from the girl’s hair, their faces close; soft eye contact, emotional tension builds. Award moment: the golden rose trophy glows subtly in their hands, light reflecting on their faces. Quiet riverside scene: they stand facing each other, wind lightly moving clothing and hair, ambient reflections on water. Intimate moment: the man cups her face; micro-expressions and slow breathing emphasized. Climax: a soft, slow-motion kiss under falling snow, neon lights blurred into bokeh in the background. Ending: fade to black with elegant title text (“JOHN”) and a poetic tagline. Camera & motion: Slow cinematic cuts with gentle zoom-ins and pans Shallow depth of field for close-ups Occasional slow motion for emotional beats Lighting & atmosphere: Neon city glow (pinks, blues, purples) Warm highlights on skin tones Snow particles drifting softly Wet ground reflections and light bloom Style: High-detail anime realism Film-like color grading Soft grain and glow effects Emotional, romantic tone Animation specs: 10–15 second sequence or loopable segments Smooth transitions between scenes 24fps cinematic feel

Seedance 2.0 Video Prompt:

 “A Day in Motion” (16-Step Story Sequence)
[PROJECT TYPE]
Cinematic lifestyle sequence (continuous narrative, 16 connected moments)
[CHARACTER]
Single female character based on the reference image
Consistent facial features, hair, and proportions across all scenes
Natural expressions (sleepy → focused → relaxed)
Realistic human movement (no AI stiffness)
[WARDROBE — STRICT CONTINUITY]
Home scenes:
Modest loungewear (long top + loose pants OR long skirt)
Fully covered (no cleavage, no short clothing)
Office commute & work scenes:
Elegant, modest outfit
Long skirt (mid-calf to ankle length, no slit above knee)
Fully covered top (high neckline, sleeves)
Flat shoes or sneakers
Outfit remains consistent throughout commute + office
Important:
Clothing must never reveal above knees at any point
[LOCATIONS / ENVIRONMENT FLOW]
Bedroom (morning light)
Bathroom / mirror area
Kitchen
Building entrance / street
Train station
Inside train
Office exterior
Office interior
Return commute (train)
Evening street
Home interior (night)
All environments should feel realistic, slightly cinematic, European urban tone
🔢 [16-SEQUENCE STORY FLOW — STRICT ORDER]
Wake Up — lying in bed, soft morning light, opens eyes
Sit Up & Stretch — relaxed, waking energy
Mirror Prep — brushing hair / light grooming
Getting Dressed — adjusting modest outfit
Kitchen Moment — making coffee / quick breakfast
Leaving Home — walking out, locking door
Walking Street — calm European street, purposeful walk
Train Station Arrival — waiting on platform
Boarding Train — stepping in smoothly
Train Ride — standing or seated, looking outside window
Office Arrival — entering building
At Desk Working — focused, typing / laptop
End of Workday — packing bag, slight relief
Train Ride Back — evening light, calmer mood
Walking Home — relaxed pace, sunset/evening tone
Back Home / Wind Down — sitting or resting, closing moment
[CAMERA DIRECTION]
Cinematic, smooth transitions between scenes
Mix of medium and full-body shots
Gentle tracking and natural movement
No fast cuts — scenes should flow seamlessly
Maintain character clarity at all times
[MOVEMENT STYLE]
Natural daily motion (subtle, realistic)
No exaggerated gestures
Smooth pacing, grounded actions
Emotion evolves through the day
[LIGHTING PROGRESSION]
Morning: soft, warm natural light
Day: neutral bright tones
Evening: golden hour → soft dusk
Night: dim, cozy indoor lighting
[MUSIC DIRECTION]
Genre: Chill lo-fi / soft electronic / ambient pop
Tempo: 70–95 BPM
Mood progression:
Calm → focused → slightly energetic → relaxed
Subtle beat for transitions
[VISUAL STYLE]
Photorealistic
Soft cinematic grading
Slightly muted, elegant tones
Clean compositions, no clutter
[TIMING]
Each step: ~2–3 seconds
Total: ~40–60 seconds
[OUTPUT SETTINGS]
4K resolution
24–30 FPS
High realism, no distortion

prompts.text: Prompt for Seedance 2.0 👇 Step 1: Drop your selfie into GPT Image 2: Photorealistic full-body shot of a person reclined on a wooden beach lounger by the sea. They wear a wide-brimmed black sun hat and oversized dark sunglasses, casual summer outfit. They hold a tall iced coffee, a faint soft smile, completely relaxed. Unbothered. Behind them, far across the horizon, a massive nuclear mushroom cloud rises into the sky — glowing orange at the base, billowing grey smoke, dominating the entire background. Distant but huge. Warm golden-hour light, faint orange glow from the explosion catching the hat brim. Shot on 35mm lens, natural skin texture, slight grain, candid feel, shallow depth of field. Use the attached photo as the face reference — face shape, eye shape, nose, lips, hair color. Step 2: Animate the picture with Seedance 2.0: The person from the Image 1 slowly lifts the iced coffee, takes a sip through the straw, lowers it, and gives a faint soft smile toward the camera. A gentle ocean breeze moves her/his hair. In the background, the mushroom cloud billows upward, smoke rolling and rising slowly, glowing at the base. Camera: locked-off, very slight slow push-in.

prompts.text: [SUBJECT]: character from provided reference sheet [GRID_LAYOUT]: 5x5 [BG_COLOR]: solid custom background color Create a [GRID_LAYOUT] borderless grid. Each panel is an independent shot of the same [SUBJECT]. Use subject as the only reference. Maintain strict identity consistency (face, hair, proportions, outfit). CAMERA + POSE VARIATION: - mix of full body, medium shot, close-up, extreme close-up, macro detail shots - front, 3/4, side profile, back view - aggressive perspective variety: low angle (foot-level upshots), high angle, tilted angles, over-shoulder - strong fashion photography language: ground-level hero shots, upward dominance shots, compressed telephoto, wide lens distortion - varied focal lengths (24mm, 50mm, 85mm, macro) - bold composition: off-center framing, crop cuts, negative space, partial body framing - strong pose variation in wider shots (no repeats) - random distribution of shots and angles (no pattern) DETAIL SHOTS: - eyes, lips, skin texture, hands, accessories, fabric tension - micro details with sharp focus and shallow depth of field - tactile realism: pores, wrinkles, fabric grain, metal reflections POSE STYLE: - high-end fashion editorial, magazine-level direction - seductive, charismatic, dominant presence regardless of age or type - confident, unapologetic body language - asymmetry, contrapposto, weight shifts - interaction with camera: leaning into lens, looking down/up, over-shoulder tension - expressive hands, intentional gestures, controlled attitude CHARACTER PRESENCE: - MUST feel striking, magnetic, visually powerful - MUST read as stylish, charismatic and attractive in an editorial sense - avoid awkward, passive or neutral posing - no lifeless standing, every frame has intent and attitude VISUAL RULES: - clean solid [BG_COLOR] background in all panels - consistent lighting and color tone across grid - studio-quality lighting, soft but directional - no text, no UI, no watermark - no panel gaps Goal: bold, high-fashion editorial grid with strong perspective, seductive presence and photographer-driven composition

prompts.tweet_text:
Gpt Image 2 Prompt:

[SUBJECT]: character from provided reference sheet
[GRID_LAYOUT]: 5x5
[BG_COLOR]: solid custom background color

Create a [GRID_LAYOUT] borderless grid.
Each panel is an independent shot of the same [SUBJECT].
Use subject as the only reference. Maintain strict identity consistency (face, hair, proportions, outfit).

CAMERA + POSE VARIATION:
- mix of full body, medium shot, close-up, extreme close-up, macro detail shots
- front, 3/4, side profile, back view
- aggressive perspective variety: low angle (foot-level upshots), high angle, tilted angles, over-shoulder
- strong fashion photography language: ground-level hero shots, upward dominance shots, compressed telephoto, wide lens distortion
- varied focal lengths (24mm, 50mm, 85mm, macro)
- bold composition: off-center framing, crop cuts, negative space, partial body framing
- strong pose variation in wider shots (no repeats)
- random distribution of shots and angles (no pattern)

DETAIL SHOTS:
- eyes, lips, skin texture, hands, accessories, fabric tension
- micro details with sharp focus and shallow depth of field
- tactile realism: pores, wrinkles, fabric grain, metal reflections

POSE STYLE:
- high-end fashion editorial, magazine-level direction
- seductive, charismatic, dominant presence regardless of age or type
- confident, unapologetic body language
- asymmetry, contrapposto, weight shifts
- interaction with camera: leaning into lens, looking down/up, over-shoulder tension
- expressive hands, intentional gestures, controlled attitude

CHARACTER PRESENCE:
- MUST feel striking, magnetic, visually powerful
- MUST read as stylish, charismatic and attractive in an editorial sense
- avoid awkward, passive or neutral posing
- no lifeless standing, every frame has intent and attitude

VISUAL RULES:
- clean solid [BG_COLOR] background in all panels
- consistent lighting and color tone across grid
- studio-quality lighting, soft but directional
- no text, no UI, no watermark
- no panel gaps

Goal: bold, high-fashion editorial grid with strong perspective, seductive presence and photographer-driven composition

prompts.text: Anamorphic 2.39:1, ARRI Alexa 65 look. Lesnie/Wagner visual language — desaturated steel-blue palette, volumetric moonlight, atmospheric haze, painterly chiaroscuro. Camera: Single continuous FPV drone shot, no cuts. Smooth, deliberate cinematic glide. Beat 1 — Approach (0–5s): Aerial drone descends through storm clouds toward a battle-scarred ancient citadel at night. Colossal wooden Trojan Horse looms in silhouette against a bruised, cloud-torn sky — eighty feet of blackened oak bound in oxidized bronze, rain-slick and steaming. Cold silver moonlight shafts. Drone glides past sleeping Trojan sentries on the battlements, embers from a dying victory pyre drifting across frame. Distant thunder. Beat 2 — Ascent (5–9s): Camera spirals upward along the horse's massive neck, passing carved war-runes and Athena's sigil branded into timber. Rain beads roll down the grain. Drone reaches the carved head and pivots to face the wooden jaw, cracked slightly ajar. A single shaft of moonlight cuts across the opening. Wind moans low through hollow timber. Beat 3 — Threshold (9–11s): Drone glides through the horse's open mouth. Total darkness swallows the lens for one held heartbeat. Faint sounds bleed through: creak of leather, whetstone on bronze, muttered prayer in ancient Greek. Beat 4 — Interior Reveal (11–15s): Camera emerges into the cavernous belly, lit only by a single shielded oil lamp swaying from a beam. Twenty Achaean warriors crouch along the timber ribs — Odysseus at center, finger pressed to his lips. Bronze hoplite helms with horsehair crests. Lambda-emblazoned shields. Iron xiphos blades drawn across knees. Faces streaked with soot, eyes glinting with cold resolve. One warrior kisses an amulet of Ares. Lamp flickers across faces — Caravaggio chiaroscuro. Final frame holds on Odysseus's eyes, hard and unreadable. Lighting: Cold moonlight exterior, warm flickering oil-lamp interior. High contrast. Volumetric god-rays through cloud breaks and timber gaps. Color: Desaturated cyan-blue shadows, crushed blacks, amber firelight highlights. Teal-and-bronze palette. Sound: Low sub-bass drone, distant thunder, wind through wood, rope creak, single distant horn note, held breath, leather and metal whispers. Mood: Ominous, sacred — the silence before annihilation. The calm of men who know they will not see another sunrise the same way. Negative: No modern elements, no CGI sheen, no cartoonish proportions, no daylight, no cuts, no shaky cam, no artificial lens flares.

prompts.author: @ErikasBanaitis
prompts.tweet_text:
GPT Image 2 + Seedance 2.0
PROMPT = Create a 15-second vertical short video in 9:16 format, continuing the same visual world: Abraham Lincoln in 1861 inside a modern TikTok livestream. The image combines old-photo grain, faded sepia textures, Civil War-era interiors, and highly saturated livestream overlays.
Character identity must be strictly bound to the Lincoln character reference image. Keep the same facial structure, beard, stovepipe hat, black suit, age, and overall presidential presence exactly consistent. Do not replace him with another person, do not make him younger, and do not drift away from the reference identity.
The office environment and visual atmosphere should reference the environment image: a dim Civil War-era office, weathered wall textures, a large old war map, a wooden desk, scattered papers, and historical props. Keep the environment grounded in 1861 while allowing modern livestream comments and graphic overlays to invade the frame.
The reference audio should influence rhythm, pacing, and sound design only. The final result should feel like epic historical ambience mixed with modern trap-driven livestream energy.

prompts.text: Single continuous camera flying fast and low following a white owl through a vast magical fantasy forest — never stopping, never cutting, gliding smoothly at high speed through a peaceful but awe-inspiring environment. Owl launches off a moss-covered ancient tree branch overlooking a breathtaking landscape of giant mushrooms and cascading waterfalls below, diving gracefully into the heart of the glowing forest. Massive towering mushrooms with red and white caps rise like natural pillars, soft bioluminescent plants glowing between them, golden sunlight piercing through thick misty air. Camera weaves fluidly between enormous mushroom stems and hanging vines — water droplets falling in slow arcs from leaves, the owl’s wings cutting softly through mist. Crystal clear streams wind through the forest floor, reflecting light like glass. Camera banks gently following the owl as it glides upward along a massive waterfall — water crashing down in slow powerful motion, mist particles filling the air, sunlight creating soft rainbow refractions. The owl skims low over a lush mossy ground — tiny glowing insects scatter, soft wind bending grass and plants, everything alive and breathing. Camera rises again, passing through narrow gaps between towering mushrooms, their textured surfaces detailed and wet, natural imperfections visible, hyper realistic. Floating spores drift through the air like dust in sunlight. Camera accelerates slightly — moving through a dense section of the forest where roots twist and form natural arches, shafts of warm light breaking through canopy above. The owl glides effortlessly, wings barely moving, absolute control and calm. Ahead — a wide open clearing reveals a hidden valley: multiple waterfalls cascading into a glowing lake, giant mushrooms surrounding it like a natural cathedral. Camera slows subtly as it follows the owl soaring upward into open air, revealing the full scale of this peaceful world. FINAL MOMENT — the owl spreads its wings wide in golden light, hovering briefly in slow motion as particles shimmer in the air — camera pulls back revealing the entire fantasy forest landscape in cinematic scale. Anamorphic 2.39:1, soft golden sunlight, volumetric fog, realistic textures, ultra detailed natural surfaces, water physics highly realistic, cinematic sony fx6 look, 35mm and 85mm lens blend, shallow depth of field, subtle film grain, warm color grading with natural greens and golds, peaceful epic fantasy atmosphere

prompts.text: Step 1: Generate the storyboard image with GPT Image 2 using the prompt below Create a single cinematic storyboard image containing 8 panels, arranged in a 4-column horizontal grid layout across the canvas. Panels are evenly distributed in 4 columns, forming a balanced multi-row composition. Use generous white space between panels and around the entire layout, creating a calm, refined editorial presentation. Minimalist editorial design, white background, precise alignment, consistent spacing, strong grid system. Subtle divider lines, ultra-thin, low-contrast, neutral tone, strictly aligned to the grid. Each panel is presented as a clean modular card with a clear hierarchy: image frame on top, minimal text block below. Refined modern sans-serif typography, light to regular weight, tight typographic control, consistent scale rhythm. Visual consistency across all panels: a white flying dragon and a short blond-haired young male wearing a loose flowing white robe riding on its back. A glowing spherical object remains consistent in appearance. Style: live-action cinematic realism, human actor proportions, natural skin detail, physically accurate lighting, real-world materials, high-end film still quality, ultra high resolution, sharp focus. Cinematic sequence: Scene 01 Shot type Wide shot, low-angle tracking Narrative Dragon skims rapidly above ground toward vast geometric ruins, rider standing steadily, bright daylight Scene 02 Shot type Wide shot, side view Narrative Dragon enters ruin airspace, stone structures begin sinking and shifting, geometry reconfigures Scene 03 Shot type Medium shot, tracking Narrative Dragon navigates through moving structures forming a spatial maze, rider leans forward, focused Scene 04 Shot type Push-in shot, centered composition Narrative Massive floating ring appears at center, glowing sphere suspended inside, focal point established Scene 05 Shot type Wide-angle, low-angle tracking, high speed Narrative Dragon dives through narrow moving gaps, massive structures pass extremely close, intense speed and compression Scene 06 Shot type Close-up, centered composition Narrative Rider reaches forward to grasp glowing sphere, golden light illuminating face and arm Scene 07 Shot type Wide shot, upward motion Narrative Dragon ascends sharply as ruins collapse below, structures sinking and closing, dust fills air Scene 08 Shot type Wide shot, high-angle view Narrative Dragon exits above collapsed ruins, open sky, clear silhouette of rider and dragon, resolution moment

prompts.text: I'm not really conscious of the reflection showing up like this... Cut 3 (7 seconds to 10 seconds): Camera Angle: Over-the-shoulder shot. Composition capturing the view outside the window from over the woman's right shoulder. Special Effects/Camera Movement: Apply an optical effect (light leak) to the edge of the screen where the real-life trees outside the window sway in the wind, with the amount of sunlight filtering through the leaves and the bokeh dynamically changing. The camera slowly pans to the right at a speed of 2 degrees per second. Ending: The woman looks away again, gazes out the window while exhaling deeply, and comes to a complete stop in a fully relaxed posture. Fade out while leaving a lingering sense of a chill atmosphere.
prompts.display_text: The camera slowly pans to the right at a speed of 2 degrees per second. Ending: The woman looks away again, gazes out the window while exhaling deeply, and comes to a complete stop in a fully relaxed posture. Fade out while leaving a lingering sense of a chill atmosphere.

prompts.text: STYLE Handheld + aerial camera blend Soft motion blur (only during fast transitions) Teal–orange cinematic grade Cool tones during dragon moments, warm tones at emotional peak ⏱ TIMELINE (15s) 0–2s (HOOK) Close-up on woman standing at a cliff Wind moving through hair A giant shadow passes over her → she slowly turns Low rumble builds tension 2–5s (CONNECTION) Dragon lands behind her with heavy presence It lowers its head slowly She hesitates, then touches its face Wind + dust particles react subtly Quiet emotional moment (no aggression) 5–8s (TAKEOFF) She climbs onto its back Dragon launches powerfully into the sky Camera follows upward, slight rotation Clouds rush past, strong sense of speed 8–12s (FLIGHT SEQUENCE) Fast but controlled cuts: Flying through clouds Passing mountain peaks Close-up of wings moving Her expression shifting to awe Wide aerial shot showing scale 12–15s (FINAL MOMENT) Above the clouds in golden light Dragon slows and stabilizes She stands confidently on its back Wide cinematic shot → calm, powerful ending

prompts.text: Shot 1 (00:00–00:02) – WS, Rainy Night, Forward Tracking A narrow, ancient village alley drenched in relentless rain. Water streams down slanted rooftops and floods uneven stone pathways, reflecting flickering lantern light. A young girl runs barefoot through the المياه, her soaked dress clinging to her as she struggles to keep balance. Behind her, shadowy figures move unnaturally—distorted, stretching and glitching with each lightning flash as they close in. VFX: Heavy rain simulation, reflective wet surfaces, lightning illuminating distorted shadows. SFX: Thunder cracks, rapid splashing footsteps, howling wind. Shot 2 (00:02–00:04) – CU, Panic Fall, Slight Handheld Shake She suddenly slips and crashes onto the wet stone. Water splashes outward. Close on her face—rain mixes with tears, her breath sharp and uneven. Her trembling hands push against the ground as she tries to move back, eyes locked on the approaching darkness. VFX: Detailed splash simulation, motion blur, lens water droplets. SFX: Intensifying heartbeat, heavy breathing, rain striking surfaces. Shot 3 (00:04–00:06) – LS, Violent Ground Eruption The ground beneath the shadows fractures violently. Stone explodes upward in a powerful shockwave, sending debris and المياه into the air. A massive dragon bursts from below—its body dark and armored, faint glowing veins pulsing beneath its scales. It rises between the girl and the shadows, instantly scattering them into fragments of darkness. VFX: Ground destruction, flying debris, glowing cracks, volumetric dust. SFX: Deep impact boom, layered dragon roar with sub-bass rumble. Shot 4 (00:06–00:08) – CU, Emotional Realization, Slow Push-In The girl freezes, looking up. Her fear begins to fade. Lightning briefly illuminates the dragon’s face—its glowing eye calm, focused. The reflection of that eye fills hers. The rain appears to slow slightly in this moment. VFX: Eye reflection detail, subtle slow-motion rain, soft glow from dragon’s eye. SFX: Thunder fades into low ambient tone, rain softens. Shot 5 (00:08–00:11) – MS, Gentle Interaction, Static Frame The dragon slowly lowers its massive head toward her, movements controlled and careful. It gently nudges her shoulder. Water droplets slide across its scales, glowing faintly as they fall. She hesitates, then slowly lifts her hand toward it, tension leaving her body. VFX: Subtle bioluminescent pulses under scales, detailed water interaction. SFX: Deep calm breathing, soft ambient hum. Shot 6 (00:11–00:13) – LS, Protective Wing Expansion The dragon spreads its विशाल wings wide, forming a protective barrier around her. Rain violently hits the outer surface of the wings, but inside the space becomes still—dry, warm, and silent. The contrast between chaos outside and calm inside is immediate and striking. VFX: Rain deflection on wings, cold blue tones outside vs warm glow inside. SFX: Wind muffled, rain hitting wing surface, low protective resonance. Shot 7 (00:13–00:15) – CU, Emotional Close, Soft Fade She places her hand gently against the dragon’s face. At the moment of contact, a warm golden light spreads outward, gradually replacing the cold storm tones. The rain visually and audibly fades. Her expression softens completely—fear replaced by trust. The dragon slowly closes its eye. The scene fades into darkness with a lingering glow between them. VFX: Warm light bloom, gradual rain fade-out, soft vignette fade. SFX: Ambient tone dissolving into silence, final soft breath.

Rain violently hits the outer surface of the wings, but inside the space becomes still—dry, warm, and silent. The contrast between chaos outside and calm inside is immediate and striking. VFX: Rain deflection on wings, cold blue tones outside vs warm glow inside. SFX: Wind muffled, rain hitting wing surface, low protective resonance. Shot 7 (00:13–00:15) – CU, Emotional Close, Soft Fade She places her hand gently against the dragon’s face. At the moment of contact, a warm golden light spreads outward, gradually replacing the cold storm tones. The rain visually and audibly fades. Her expression softens completely—fear replaced by trust. The dragon slowly closes its eye. The scene fades into darkness with a lingering glow between them. VFX: Warm light bloom, gradual rain fade-out, soft vignette fade. SFX: Ambient tone dissolving into silence, final soft breath.

Prompt: Shot 1 (00:00–00:02) – WS, Rainy Night, Forward Tracking
A narrow, ancient village alley drenched in relentless rain. Water streams down slanted rooftops and floods uneven stone pathways, reflecting flickering lantern light.
A young girl runs barefoot through the المياه, her soaked dress clinging to her as she struggles to keep balance. Behind her, shadowy figures move unnaturally—distorted, stretching and glitching with each lightning flash as they close in.
VFX: Heavy rain simulation, reflective wet surfaces, lightning illuminating distorted shadows.
SFX: Thunder cracks, rapid splashing footsteps, howling wind.
Shot 2 (00:02–00:04) – CU, Panic Fall, Slight Handheld Shake

Close on her face—rain mixes with tears, her breath sharp and uneven. Her trembling hands push against the ground as she tries to move back, eyes locked on the approaching darkness.
VFX: Detailed splash simulation, motion blur, lens water droplets.

Shot 3 (00:04–00:06) – LS, Violent Ground Eruption
The ground beneath the shadows fractures violently. Stone explodes upward in a powerful shockwave, sending debris and المياه into the air.
A massive dragon bursts from below—its body dark and armored, faint glowing veins pulsing beneath its scales. It rises between the girl and the shadows, instantly scattering them into fragments of darkness.
VFX: Ground destruction, flying debris, glowing cracks, volumetric dust.

prompts.text: 第四步:Claude 辅助写 Seedance 2 超详细提示词 这是他实际用于视频的完整prompt(已包含时间轴、镜头、UI动画、音效、环境切换等所有细节),直接复制就能用! INK INDUSTRIES : GAME TRAILER CHARACTERYoung athletic male, dark curly hair, shirtless, full chest and back tattoos, gold hoop earring, cigarette in mouth, black cybernetic prosthetic arms with cyan LED nodes at joints. Black shorts with white stripe, white socks, beige chunky sneakers. Seated cross-legged on white void floor. CINEMATIC SETUPOpens on clean white void environment with minimal game UI. Camera high angle looking down at character. Hyper-realistic CGI rendering, clean white background transitioning to dense cyberpunk favela environment. SEQUENCE [0s–15s] [0s–2s] High angle shot looking down. Character seated on white floor, looking up at camera with cigarette smoke rising. Game menu UI on left: START NEW GAME, CONTINUE highlighted, SETTINGS, EXIT GAME. Player profile top right showing INK_NOMAD LVL 23. A cursor clicks CONTINUE. The button pulses. Subtle bass hit. [2s–4s] Smooth zoom-in toward his left arm. UI panels slide in from left LEFT ARM EQUIPMENT panel appears. Selection highlights PHANTOM GRIP, then slides to CHRONOS CLAW. His left hand mechanically reconfigures fingers split apart, new claw-like digits lock into place, cyan LEDs pulse brighter. Stats bars animate on right panel. Servo click sounds. [4s–7s] Camera orbits smoothly around to his right side. New UI slides in ARMAMENT CUSTOMIZATION grid showing HAND, FOREARM, ELBOW, UPPER ARM components. Selection cycles through parts rapidly. His right arm disassembles section by section forearm plates detach, new plating slides on, elbow joint swaps, hand reconfigures with exposed wiring and pistons visible mid-swap. Each component locks with a mechanical snap. Tech Points counter ticks up. [7s–8.5s] Camera pulls back to medium shot. CONFIRM CONFIG button pulses. Click. All UI panels collapse inward. Character uncrosses legs, shifts position, now sitting relaxed, one knee up, cybernetic hand bringing cigarette to mouth. Smoke curls. [8.5s–10s] LOADING bar appears at bottom. Fills rapidly 0 to 100%. White environment begins darkening shadows creep in from edges, warm golden light bleeds through. The white void dissolves like fog burning off. Character starts standing up in one fluid motion. [10s–15s] Full environment loads around him as he rises to his feet. Dense cyberpunk favela materializes, neon signs flickering on, wet streets reflecting light, crowds populating, motorcycles, tangled power lines, stacked buildings climbing toward futuristic skyscrapers in the distance. Camera settles into third-person view behind him, showing his full tattooed back. HUD elements fade in, minimap top left, health bar, ammo counter bottom right. Quest marker appears. He takes a step forward into the street, puddle splashing under his shoe. Golden hour light cuts through the alley. Ambient city noise floods in, chatter, distant music, neon buzz. STYLEHyper-realistic CGI. White void sections: clean, minimal, studio-lit. Gameplay section: dense Cyberpunk 2077 / Assassin's Creed open-world density, golden hour lighting, wet reflections, volumetric haze. Seamless transition from sterile UI to living world. No cuts, one continuous camera move. SOUNDUI sections: clean digital clicks, mechanical servo sounds, subtle electronic hum. Loading transition: rising bass drone. Gameplay reveal: full ambient soundscape floods in city noise, distant bass music, footstep splashes. 后期:用 DaVinci Resolve 剪辑 + Topaz 提升画质和帧率

prompts.text: From string tension to harmonic squeal made with Seedance 2.0 The following video demonstrates the output generated from one prompt applied to various characters. ⇣ PROMPT ⇣ **Cinematic Truth Source & Setup** Professional music podcast video production, shot on Sony FX6 cinema camera in 4K DCI, anamorphic lenses with natural breathing and subtle flare, controlled studio lighting using ARRI Skypanels and practical LED backlights, clean broadcast color science with warm highlights and rich mid-tones exactly like high-end Netflix music documentaries. Realistic 24fps motion, light film grain, zero stylization. ** Image Reference & Legend** No external image reference supplied. Original generation locked to user character tagged @character on frame 0. Exact black electric guitar (Stratocaster style with whammy bar) must remain 100% consistent in shape, color, and wear. Back wall behind character locked with large professional podcast branding text “StudioName" in bold modern sans-serif font, subtly backlit with soft neon glow. No deviation allowed on character identity @character , guitar model/design/colors, or background text. ** Timeline (Second-by-Second)** 0-3s: Medium close-up handheld camera on guitarist seated in modern podcast studio, microphone visible stage left. Left hand frets high note on 3rd string while right hand picks aggressively; camera slowly pushes in toward guitar neck. Pinch harmonic executed at 2.2s — thumb edge lightly touches string node creating exact “nguik” squealing overtone with natural string vibration and slight whammy bar dive. Back wall clearly shows large “StudioName” podcast name text. Studio monitors in background show faint reflection of hands. 3-7s: Cut to tighter ECU on right hand performing rapid pinch-harmonic technique; strings visibly bend and ring with realistic metallic sustain and micro-vibrato. Left hand shifts positions smoothly, forearm muscles tensing naturally. Camera dollies left in slow arc revealing podcast microphone and back wall “StudioName” branding. 7-11s: Camera pulls back to medium shot as guitarist sustains final high-pitched “nguik” harmonic, letting it feedback naturally through amp. Head nods slightly in time. Background podcast setup with “StudioName” wall text stays in soft focus. 11-15s: Final wide push-in as guitarist releases note, right hand lifts off strings cleanly, left hand relaxes on fretboard. Guitarist glances toward camera with professional nod. Full back wall “StudioName” podcast branding remains visible. Natural string decay and light body movement throughout. ** Style, Quality Boosters & Negative Prompts** Ultra-realistic guitar physics with accurate string tension, pinch-harmonic squeal, and natural sustain; perfect finger synchronization and skin texture; natural motion blur on picking hand; professional color grading with high dynamic range and subtle lens breathing. Strict negatives: no extra limbs, no deformed fingers or hands, no rubbery or floaty movements, no face drift, no floating objects, no cartoonish impacts, no beauty filters, no text errors on wall branding, no unstable camera, no unnatural lighting shifts, no audio desync.

prompts.text: Scene 1 Action: A scavenger in scuffed, utilitarian EVA gear pushes through a jagged bulkhead into the silent, debris-choked hold. Camera: Handheld kinetic style, tight on the scavenger’s shoulder to capture the claustrophobic scale of the ruins. Lighting: Cool, desaturated ambient light, starkly broken by the erratic, flickering beam of a shoulder-mounted LED. Sound: Muffled mechanical breathing through a respirator, dry crunch of calcified debris under heavy, magnetized boots. Dialogue: 'Signal is peaking. Whatever's in here... it’s still active.' Scene 2 Action: The air pressure shifts violently, sucking loose ash upward into a localized, swirling vortex in the center of space. Camera: Wide shot, steady tracking, emphasizing the vast emptiness of the ruined station against the small scavenger. Lighting: Dramatic backlighting from the swirling ash, casting long, distorted shadows that dance across the rusted bulkheads. Sound: Deep, resonant low-end hum that causes the camera to shake, layering in the sound of metal groaning under pressure. Scene 3 Action: Vharuun descends from the rafters, his robes trailing mist as he drifts perfectly still on the floating monolith. Camera: Rack focus from the scavenger’s shocked expression to the steady, calm gaze of Vharuun hovering in the gloom. Lighting: Soft, eerie bioluminescence emanating from the censer orb, bathing Vharuun in a ghostly, monochromatic pallor. Sound: Distant, fading echoes of a thousand voices whispering in unison, overlaid with the chime of metal on stone. Dialogue: 'I am the final witness to your collapse.' Scene 4 Action: Vharuun lifts the censer orb, and the scavenger instinctively retreats, weapon held at a trembling low-ready stance. Camera: Shallow depth of field, profile shot capturing the tension between the futuristic gear and ancient necromancy. Lighting: Sharp, high-contrast lighting highlighting the texture of the scavenger’s suit versus the smooth, matte void. Sound: Sharp, electrical crackle of energy discharging from the monolith, followed by an abrupt, absolute silence.

prompts.text: Storyboard — colored. The troll is walking alone in the mountains, through snow and wind. He gets back home to his cave, all exhausted. The troll spots a tiny flower in a beam of light on a ridge outside the cave. GPT 2 prompt:

Storyboard — colored.

The troll is walking alone in the mountains, through snow and wind.

He gets back home to his cave, all exhausted.

The troll spots a tiny flower in a beam of light on a ridge outside the cave.

Add a shot where focus is on the flower, then focus shifts to the troll and he says "what is this?" in a deep troll voice.

He goes in really close and sniffs. He smiles and picks up the little flower, including the dirt around it.

Ensure shots are cinematic and have great composition. We don't need the troll in every shot.

Include text and instructions.

No music. No text.

prompts.tweet_text:
What if workouts were generated like this?

Built a dumbbell routine as a motion sheet with GPT Image 2

Then turned it into a video with Seedance 2.0

I tested 4 exercises in 15s, it works, but 2–3 exercises would probably give the best output. 

Motion sheet:
Monochrome grayscale technical illustration, biomechanically accurate fitness instruction sheet, clean 3D anatomical character, scientific diagram aesthetic, minimalistic, no artistic exaggeration

2x4 grid layout (8 panels total), perfectly aligned cells, equal spacing, thin black borders, numbered from 1 to 8

Neutral athletic human body (gender-neutral), proportional anatomy, consistent character across all panels

Dumbbell workout sequence (key positions only):
1. Dumbbell curl (start position)
2. Dumbbell curl (top contraction)
3. Shoulder press (start at shoulder level)
4. Shoulder press (overhead lockout)
5. Dumbbell lateral raise (arms down)
6. Lateral raise (arms at shoulder height)
7. Dumbbell squat (standing start)
8. Squat (bottom position)

Top-left: bold number + exercise name (English)
Center: full-body pose (clear joint positions)
Bottom-left: short technical explanation (2–3 lines, correct form cues)
Overlay: directional arrows showing movement path (up/down/arc)

Correct joint alignment, neutral spine, proper elbow and knee positioning, realistic weight distribution, no exaggerated motion

Highly detailed grayscale shading, soft studio lighting, subtle shadows, clean linework, medical / sports science diagram quality

Pure white background

No colors, no background environment, no extra elements, no stylization, no blur

prompts.text: Seedance 2.0 Prompt; A single continuous cinematic video of a young woman performing a sequence of household chores in a clean, minimal indoor environment, following a structured 16-step progression. The character’s face and identity must match the provided reference image exactly, maintaining consistent facial features, skin tone, and proportions throughout the entire video. Natural makeup, soft expression, realistic appearance. She is wearing a modest, modern casual outfit: a fitted crop top (not revealing, clean neckline) paired with high-waisted straight-fit jeans, minimal sneakers or barefoot indoor styling. Clothing should move naturally with body motion. VIDEO STRUCTURE The video should feel like a smooth, choreographed routine, where each action transitions seamlessly into the next — almost like a lifestyle choreography rather than random cuts. Follow this exact 16-step sequence in order: Making the bed (smoothing sheets, arranging pillows) Picking up items and tidying the room Dusting surfaces with a cloth Vacuuming the floor Sweeping with a broom Mopping the floor Loading laundry into washing machine Hanging clothes neatly Folding clothes Cleaning kitchen counter Washing dishes in sink Taking out trash Watering plants Cleaning bathroom sink/mirror Organizing shelves Final room reset (placing items neatly, subtle satisfied pose) MOTION STYLE Smooth, rhythmic transitions between tasks (almost dance-like but realistic) Natural body movement with clear intent for each chore Subtle continuity between actions (e.g., walking between spaces instead of hard cuts) Slight pauses at key actions for clarity CAMERA & CINEMATOGRAPHY Full-body framing for most shots Occasional medium shots for interaction (washing dishes, folding clothes) Slow tracking and subtle handheld feel No abrupt cuts — use match cuts or fluid transitions Maintain consistent spatial logic (same home environment) VISUAL STYLE Clean, soft lighting (natural daylight feel) Minimal, aesthetic interior (neutral tones, modern home) Realistic textures and shadows No grayscale — full natural color video CONSISTENCY RULES Same character throughout (no face change, no duplication issues) Same outfit across entire video Same environment continuity No extra people OUTPUT STYLE Duration: ~25–40 seconds Smooth, polished, lifestyle-commercial quality Feels like a choreographed productivity routine / aesthetic home vlog

prompts.tweet_text:
Household chores created using a movement sheet as reference to animate the entire scene using ChatGPT Image 2.0 and Seedance 2.0 on 
@yapper_so
 

GPT Image 2 Prompt;
[VISUAL STYLE]
Monochrome grayscale composition featuring a highly detailed 3D-rendered female character. Designed like a professional instructional guide with a technical, diagram-inspired layout. Clean white background, soft studio lighting, and strong contrast to highlight posture, actions, and object interaction.
[GRID LAYOUT]
Structured 4×4 panel grid (16 frames total), evenly spaced with thin black divider lines. Each panel is identical in size and clearly numbered from 1 to 16, showing a continuous sequence of household activities.
[CHARACTER]
Use the provided reference image for the face and overall likeness.
Same facial features, skin tone, and proportions
Natural makeup, soft expression
Consistent identity across all 16 panels
Realistic proportions and clean hairstyle (loose or tied back)
[WARDROBE]
Modern, modest casual outfit:
Fitted crop top (not revealing, clean neckline, practical for movement)
High-waisted straight or slightly wide-leg jeans (full length, neat fit)
Optional minimal sneakers or barefoot indoor styling
Fabric should react naturally to movement (subtle folds and tension)
[SCENE APPROACH]
Minimal, clean environment per panel — only essential props related to the chore.
No clutter, no complex backgrounds — focus stays on the subject and action.
[PANEL STRUCTURE – EACH FRAME]
Top-left: Step number + task title (e.g., “Step 4 – Vacuum Floor”)
Center: Full-body pose performing the chore
Bottom-left: 3–4 concise instruction lines
Overlay: Motion arrows and directional guides showing action flow
[CHORE SEQUENCE EXAMPLES]
Make the Bed
Tidy Up Room
Dust Surfaces
Vacuum Floor
Sweep Floor
Mop Floor
Do Laundry
Hang Clothes
Fold Clothes
Clean Kitchen Counter
Wash Dishes
Take Out Trash
Water Plants
Clean Bathroom
Organize Shelves
Final Room Reset
[MOTION INDICATORS]
Curved arrows → fluid actions (wiping, folding)
Straight arrows → directional movement
Circular arrows → repetitive motions (scrubbing, mopping)
[RENDER QUALITY]
High-detail sculpted 3D style with smooth grayscale shading, soft shadows, and clean linework. Polished, concept-art level finish with clarity in every pose and object interaction.
[RESTRICTIONS]
No color, no unnecessary background detail, no extra characters, no revealing clothing, no clutter — only the subject, props, and instructional elements.

prompts.text: Create a 15-second horror-action multi-shot video of a giant CGI mouse cursor arrow invading a modern city at night. The cursor behaves like a terrifying monster, destroying streets, lifting cars, throwing debris, pulling people upward, and causing mass panic. The visual identity of the cursor should feel iconic and playful in shape, but terrifying in behavior, with subtle arcade-like and voxel-like energy, blending surreal digital chaos with disaster-movie intensity. The entire sequence must feel like real smartphone footage captured by terrified bystanders. Use handheld phone camera realism, violent shake, autofocus breathing, rolling shutter, HDR mobile look, harsh street lighting, neon reflections, rain-slick roads, atmospheric smoke, emergency lights, screaming crowds, fear, chaos, and horror. Shot 1, 0-2s, fast opening flash cuts, normal busy city street at night, pedestrians, traffic, urban neon reflections, then sudden glitching lights, alarm-like flickers, people stop and look up in fear. Shot 2, 2-4s, whip pan upward, reveal a giant glowing mouse cursor arrow between skyscrapers, towering like a city-scale creature, blocky-digital menace, casting huge shadows, terrifying presence, people scream and start running. Shot 3, 4-6.5s, chaotic low-angle street shot, the cursor slams into the road, cracks asphalt, flips cars, launches debris, people run in panic, some fall, others flee, intense horror energy. Shot 4, 6.5-9s, multiple rapid flash cuts from different phone angles, the cursor drags across the street as if selecting reality itself, cars get lifted, street signs bend, a few people are pulled upward, billboards distort, city systems collapse. Shot 5, 9-12s, aerial and street-level mixed cuts, total destruction, smoke, sparks, sirens, flashing lights, the cursor swipes through the city like a monster attack, massive panic, crowd screaming, horror disaster climax. Shot 6, 12-15s, final climax and ending, the cursor rises violently out of the world as if exiting the simulation, carrying debris and chaos with it, then vanishes, leaving a devastated street, abandoned cars, smoke, distant screams, and one final shaky phone shot of survivors in shock. Style: terrifying, cinematic, disaster horror, fast flash cuts, multi-angle coverage, immersive fear, realistic CGI integrated into real footage, smartphone realism, cold blue night tones, cyan neon, magenta glitch accents, white streetlights, red emergency lights, smoke, dust, destruction, panic.
