prompts.text: Bro, I've finally found a stable way to generate character videos for Seedance 2 No need to rack your brain writing prompts—just have ChatGPT expand on the template below directly Goal: Based on the reference character (@ [REFERENCE]), generate a high-fidelity movie segment with a strong "character entrance" vibe. Requirements: Every second of footage must serve a "narrative purpose"—it can't just be visually pretty Cinematography should enhance character development, not show off technique The character must have "presence weight" Please handle implicitly: Storyboard design (shot composition) Actor blocking Lighting motivation Emotional pacing control Final effect reference: Like a character in a movie whose first appearance makes the audience remember them forever For example, applying the template above yields a prompt like this: Use the provided character sheet as the sole reference (@ [image1]), generate a cinematic character intro video. Structure suggestion: From details → identity → presence → full reveal. Bring the character to life: When speaking, naturally interact with the environment and props, make small natural gestures, show subtle micro-expressions, with performative eyes and body language. Keep camera work to gentle push-ins, subtle follows, faint handheld feel; maintain cinematic-level lighting consistency. prompts.text: @ Image1 is the lead character - maintain identical facial features, proportions, and identity throughout. He is wearing round clear glasses, a black hoodie and brown cargo pants. Create a 15-second ultra-photorealistic cinematic time-freeze sequence with an ARRI Alexa Mini look, 50mm lens, natural daylight, strong shadows, shallow depth of field, and subtle film grain. The scene opens on a busy city sidewalk in full motion, captured in a front-facing steadicam shot tracking backward as he walks calmly toward camera through a natural flow of pedestrians while pigeons cross the bright sky above; without breaking stride, he casually raises his hand and snaps his fingers. Instantly, a bright spherical shockwave erupts from his hand, with visible air distortion and refracted light, expanding rapidly across the environment, freezing dust and debris mid-air, locking pedestrians in place mid-motion, and suspending pigeons mid-flight as reflections ripple across surrounding glass buildings before everything falls into complete stillness and silence, with fine particles hanging in the sunlight. The camera continues gliding backward as he walks through the frozen world, his footsteps the only sound, subtly observing his surroundings before approaching a frozen woman with striking red hair in a flowing green dress, her hair suspended mid-motion as she holds a takeaway coffee. He steps in, briefly studies the moment, removes the cup from her hand, takes a síp, then carefully places it back exactly as it was. He then turns his attention to the camera, raises his hand again, and snaps his fingers, releasing a more powerful shockwave that rapidly spreads outward, reversing the effect as motion instantly resumés - pedestrians continue walking, pigeons scatter into flight, the woman carries on unaware still holding her coffee, and debris drops naturally to the ground as full city sound returns. He pauses for a brief moment, then continues walking forward, gradually blending into the crowd while the camera keeps tracking backward, maintaining distance as he disappears into the flow, ending in a smooth fade out. Sound design follows the sequence: city ambience, sharp snap, deep expanding shockwave rumble, complete silence, isolated footsteps, subtle ambient echo, sip, second snap, stronger reverse shockwave, city noise returning, brief pause, then footsteps continuing.

Scene Setting: Cozy retro Hong Kong-style bedroom scene, 1980s film texture, golden wrought-iron double bed, pink bedsheets with yellow throw pillows, mint green low cabinet in the background, with a white vase holding fresh flowers, photo frames, books on the cabinet, old-fashioned cathode-ray tube TV, retro patterned curtains, light green walls hung with decorative paintings. Character: Female Homeowner Image 1 Attire Image 2 Facial features refined and clearly visible, eyes unobstructed (elegantly made up). British Shorthair cat (mischievous, with a hint of "scheming") Storyboard Design Shot 1 (0-2s) Frame: Female homeowner seriously applying lipstick in front of the mirror Shot Type: Medium close-up (mirror + face) Details: Slow-motion lip pursing, emphasizing "elegance" Sound Effect: Gentle background music Shot 2 (2-4s) Frame: Cat suddenly jumps onto the vanity, squeezing into the frame Shot Type: Medium shot Action: Cat tilts head, staring at the lipstick Dialogue (cat voiceover): "Master, I want to try your lipstick~" Shot 3 (4-6s) Frame: Female homeowner helplessly hands over just a tiny bit of the lipstick Shot Type: Close-up (hand + lipstick) Dialogue (female homeowner): "Just a little bit, okay? prompts.text: A cinematic 3x3 storyboard grid showing a dramatic action sequence inside a modern convenience store at night. The style is dark, moody, high-end film stills, realistic lighting, slight teal-green color grading, shallow depth of field, motion blur in action shots. Each of the 9 panels should be separated by thin black borders, forming a clean storyboard layout. VERY IMPORTANT: Each panel has small white text in the top-left corner showing: Shot number (SHOT 1–9) Camera type (e.g. ARRI Alexa Mini LF) Lens (e.g. 35mm, 50mm, 85mm) Subtle cinematic subtitles in English at the bottom of each frame describing the action Maintain consistent character appearance: a young athletic Asian woman, energetic and physically strong, toned body, lively yet intense expression, wearing a pink spaghetti-strap sports top and a pink sporty mini skirt, with practical athletic styling suited for fast movement ⸻ Scene breakdown (must follow composition closely): SHOT 1 – Medium shot, 35mm A young athletic woman standing in a convenience store aisle, casually looking at a snack package. She wears a pink spaghetti-strap sports top and a pink sporty mini skirt. Fluorescent lighting, calm atmosphere. SHOT 2 – Wide shot, 24mm Store doors burst open violently. A large group of heavily armed tactical soldiers rush in. SHOT 3 – Over-the-shoulder shot, 50mm From behind the woman, facing a line of soldiers aiming rifles directly at her. SHOT 4 – Extreme close-up, 85mm The woman’s eyes sharpen with focus, showing intense determination and explosive energy. Background slightly blurred. Subtle tension builds. SHOT 5 – Motion blur tracking shot, 35mm The woman suddenly dashes forward at superhuman speed. Her pink athletic outfit flows dynamically with the motion. Soldiers appear blurred. SHOT 6 – Wide action shot, 28mm She strikes multiple soldiers mid-air, dynamic combat pose, powerful athletic movement, debris flying. SHOT 7 – Low angle shot, 35mm Close combat: the woman overpowering soldiers on the ground, fast brutal movements, showcasing strength, agility, and control. SHOT 8 – Wide aftermath shot, 24mm All soldiers are down. The woman stands in the center of the store, surrounded by fallen bodies, breathing steadily, calm and dominant. SHOT 9 – Medium wide shot, 35mm The woman stands calmly in the destroyed store, untouched. Shelves messy, silence after chaos. Her pink sports outfit contrasts sharply with the dark cinematic environment. ⸻ Style keywords: cinematic, film stills, ultra realistic, dramatic lighting, teal color grade, shallow depth of field, motion blur, high detail, 8k, storyboard layout, grid composition, professional filmmaking, ARRI Alexa look

⸻

SHOT 1 – Medium shot, 35mm
A young athletic woman standing in a convenience store aisle, casually looking at a snack package. She wears a pink spaghetti-strap sports top and a pink sporty mini skirt. Fluorescent lighting, calm atmosphere.

SHOT 2 – Wide shot, 24mm
Store doors burst open violently. A large group of heavily armed tactical soldiers rush in.

SHOT 3 – Over-the-shoulder shot, 50mm
From behind the woman, facing a line of soldiers aiming rifles directly at her.

SHOT 4 – Extreme close-up, 85mm
The woman’s eyes sharpen with focus, showing intense determination and explosive energy. Background slightly blurred. Subtle tension builds.

SHOT 5 – Motion blur tracking shot, 35mm
The woman suddenly dashes forward at superhuman speed. Her pink athletic outfit flows dynamically with the motion. Soldiers appear blurred.

SHOT 6 – Wide action shot, 28mm
She strikes multiple soldiers mid-air, dynamic combat pose, powerful athletic movement, debris flying.

SHOT 7 – Low angle shot, 35mm
Close combat: the woman overpowering soldiers on the ground, fast brutal movements, showcasing strength, agility, and control.

SHOT 8 – Wide aftermath shot, 24mm
All soldiers are down. The woman stands in the center of the store, surrounded by fallen bodies, breathing steadily, calm and dominant.

SHOT 9 – Medium wide shot, 35mm
The woman stands calmly in the destroyed store, untouched. Shelves messy, silence after chaos. Her pink sports outfit contrasts sharply with the dark cinematic environment.

⸻

prompts.text: Hyper-realistic cinematic shot of a crowded train station during heavy rainfall at night. Water pours from the station roof in continuous streams, splashing onto wet reflective tiles that mirror flickering station lights. Commuters move in blurred motion with umbrellas and soaked clothing, creating a dense, emotional atmosphere of rush and noise. In the foreground, a young man stands still, holding a train ticket in his hand, his posture tense and uncertain. Across the platform, a young woman stands under dim yellow station lighting, completely still, staring at him in silence. Their eye contact holds without words, separated by train tracks filled with rushing water and reflections. The camera slowly pushes in toward both of them, isolating their connection despite the crowd. A train approaches, its headlights growing brighter, wind and sound intensifying. As it arrives, it passes directly between them, fully blocking their view with motion blur, metal, and light streaks. For a few seconds, everything disappears behind the moving train. When it clears, the platform feels subtly changed. Only one of them remains visible on the opposite side. The other is gone. The crowd continues as normal, but the emotional weight of emptiness lingers. Cinematic lighting, shallow depth of field, ultra-realistic rain physics, reflective surfaces, slow dramatic camera movement, 8K realism, no text, no logos, no subtitles.

prompts.text: Create a dramatic and epic aerial fight scene between a lone warrior riding a massive black dragon and a colossal fire monster in the stormy sky at golden hour sunset. 2-second hook: Start with an extreme wide aerial shot. The warrior on the dragon's back charges directly toward camera at high speed through dark storm clouds. Suddenly, the giant fire monster bursts out from behind a cloud with a deafening roar, its body engulfed in flames. The camera violently whips around as the dragon and fire monster nearly collide mid-air, creating a massive burst of fire and wind. Main sequence: - Epic aerial battle high above a mountain range at sunset. Dramatic golden-orange and deep purple sky with storm clouds. - The black dragon is enormous, powerful, with glowing red eyes and huge beating wings that create visible wind trails and embers. - The warrior is a fierce, armored fighter standing on the dragon's back, dual-wielding glowing swords. - The fire monster is colossal, serpentine, with molten rock skin, giant flaming wings, and a mouth that constantly spews streams of liquid fire. Camera work: Dynamic, cinematic aerial shots — sweeping drone-like tracking shots, orbiting around the fight, vertigo dives, fast whip-pans, low-angle shots looking up at the monsters, and extreme wide shots showing the scale of the battle. Key moments: - Dragon and fire monster clash mid-air, wings colliding, creating a massive explosion of fire and sparks. - Warrior leaps from the dragon's back, attacks the fire monster's head in slow-motion while the dragon breathes black fire from below. - Fire monster roars and unleashes a huge stream of flames. Dragon and warrior dodge dramatically through the fire. - Close-up shots of the warrior's determined face, dragon scales reflecting fire light, and the monster's burning eyes. - Final climax: Warrior channels energy into his swords and delivers a powerful downward strike into the fire monster's back as the dragon dives with him. Lighting: Dramatic golden hour sunset lighting mixed with intense fire glows. Volumetric god rays through storm clouds. Fire illuminates the undersides of clouds and characters. Atmosphere: Epic, intense, cinematic. Flying embers, burning debris falling from the sky, strong wind effects, dramatic cloud movement. Technical specs: - Duration: 12-15 seconds - Resolution: 4K - Frame rate: 24fps (cinematic) - Aspect ratio: 16:9 - Style: Highly cinematic, epic fantasy action, dramatic lighting, intense scale and movement Make it extremely dynamic, visually spectacular, and emotionally intense.

Seedance 2.0 Prompt : Create a dramatic and epic aerial fight scene between a lone warrior riding a massive black dragon and a colossal fire monster in the stormy sky at golden hour sunset.

2-second hook: Start with an extreme wide aerial shot. The warrior on the dragon's back charges directly toward camera at high speed through dark storm clouds. Suddenly, the giant fire monster bursts out from behind a cloud with a deafening roar, its body engulfed in flames. The camera violently whips around as the dragon and fire monster nearly collide mid-air, creating a massive burst of fire and wind.

Main sequence:
- Epic aerial battle high above a mountain range at sunset. Dramatic golden-orange and deep purple sky with storm clouds.
- The black dragon is enormous, powerful, with glowing red eyes and huge beating wings that create visible wind trails and embers.
- The warrior is a fierce, armored fighter standing on the dragon's back, dual-wielding glowing swords.
- The fire monster is colossal, serpentine, with molten rock skin, giant flaming wings, and a mouth that constantly spews streams of liquid fire.

Camera work: Dynamic, cinematic aerial shots — sweeping drone-like tracking shots, orbiting around the fight, vertigo dives, fast whip-pans, low-angle shots looking up at the monsters, and extreme wide shots showing the scale of the battle.

Key moments:
- Dragon and fire monster clash mid-air, wings colliding, creating a massive explosion of fire and sparks.
- Warrior leaps from the dragon's back, attacks the fire monster's head in slow-motion while the dragon breathes black fire from below.
- Fire monster roars and unleashes a huge stream of flames. Dragon and warrior dodge dramatically through the fire.
- Close-up shots of the warrior's determined face, dragon scales reflecting fire light, and the monster's burning eyes.
- Final climax: Warrior channels energy into his swords and delivers a powerful downward strike into the fire monster's back as the dragon dives with him.

Lighting: Dramatic golden hour sunset lighting mixed with intense fire glows. Volumetric god rays through storm clouds. Fire illuminates the undersides of clouds and characters.

Atmosphere: Epic, intense, cinematic. Flying embers, burning debris falling from the sky, strong wind effects, dramatic cloud movement.

Technical specs:
- Duration: 12-15 seconds
- Resolution: 4K
- Frame rate: 24fps (cinematic)
- Aspect ratio: 16:9
- Style: Highly cinematic, epic fantasy action, dramatic lighting, intense scale and movement

Make it extremely dynamic, visually spectacular, and emotionally intense.

prompts.text: HappyHorse 1.0 / Kling 3.0 / Seedance 2.0 テスト 同じ画像&プロンプトで検証 Prompt👇 An epic fantasy battlefield. The air is thick with heavy smoke and dust. The ground is covered in dark red vegetation and scorched earth, while distant flames flicker faintly. The camera slowly pushes forward from a low ground-level angle, moving through charred grass and glowing embers. In the foreground stands a girl in a kimono, her posture firm and unwavering. Beside her, a young child clings close behind, peeking out timidly. Both face away from the camera, their clothing and hair gently swaying in the breeze. The camera continues its slow advance and gradually tilts upward. The smoke is pierced by shafts of volumetric light. A Tengu approaches them, slowly bending down, bringing its face close to the camera. Its details come into focus—rough, stone-like skin, weathered cracks, a massive nose, and heavy prayer beads—radiating an overwhelming, ancient, godlike presence. Light breaks through the clouds above, creating a strong rim light. The child instinctively tightens their grip on the girl’s kimono. Finally, the camera slowly rises into a low-angle upward shot, fully revealing the Tengu’s विशाल form. Smoke swirls, ash drifts through the air, and the scene holds at the moment of maximum tension and oppressive presence. HappyHorse 1.0 の現状: ▪️720pと1080pに対応。最長15秒。 ▪️画像→動画/テキスト→動画に対応。 ▪️参照生成にも対応しており、最大9枚まで参考画像を指定可能。 ▪️画像のアップロード上限は10MB。 ▪️価格は15秒・1080pで約2ドル前後。 HappyHorse 1.0、早期アクセスの機会をいただき@AlibabaGroup さんありがとうございます。

prompts.text: The Cyber Courier Made with Seedance 2.0 on @yapper_so Prompt A high-energy 15-second tracking shot follows a futuristic courier sprinting across the rooftops of a neon-lit cyberpunk мегacity during a rainstorm. 0–4s: The camera chases closely from behind as the courier dashes across slick rooftops, neon signs reflecting off puddles. Rain streaks past the lens, and their glowing jacket leaves a faint light trail. They leap over gaps between buildings, boots splashing on impact. 4–8s: The angle drops low and shifts to the side, capturing their speed and agility as they slide under holographic billboards and vault over ventilation units. Lightning briefly illuminates the skyline, revealing towering skyscrapers layered into the distance. 8–12s: They sprint toward the edge of a skyscraper and launch outward, deploying a compact energy-glider mid-air. The camera pulls wide as they soar between buildings, silhouetted against a massive holographic advertisement flickering in the rain. 12–15s: They retract the glider and land in a controlled roll on a lower rooftop, water splashing outward. Without breaking stride, they continue running as the camera stabilizes and follows them deeper into the glowing urban maze.

The Cyber Courier 

Made with Seedance 2.0 on 
@yapper_so
 

Prompt

A high-energy 15-second tracking shot follows a futuristic courier sprinting across the rooftops of a neon-lit cyberpunk мегacity during a rainstorm.

0–4s:
The camera chases closely from behind as the courier dashes across slick rooftops, neon signs reflecting off puddles. Rain streaks past the lens, and their glowing jacket leaves a faint light trail. They leap over gaps between buildings, boots splashing on impact.
4–8s:
The angle drops low and shifts to the side, capturing their speed and agility as they slide under holographic billboards and vault over ventilation units. Lightning briefly illuminates the skyline, revealing towering skyscrapers layered into the distance.

8–12s:
They sprint toward the edge of a skyscraper and launch outward, deploying a compact energy-glider mid-air. The camera pulls wide as they soar between buildings, silhouetted against a massive holographic advertisement flickering in the rain.
12–15s:
They retract the glider and land in a controlled roll on a lower rooftop, water splashing outward. Without breaking stride, they continue running as the camera stabilizes and follows them deeper into the glowing urban maze.

prompts.text: Ruined war arena, dark smoke-filled sky. Cinematic quality, 2.35:1 widescreen, shallow depth of field. Contrast of dark tones vs. brilliant orange-red fire magic light. Only immersive diegetic sound effects. 0-3s: Extreme low angle shot looking up. A female Mage in @image1 , in an ancient tattered jubah, stands firmly on rubble. She drops into a powerful, low fighting stance (kuda-kuda). Her hands are held low, fingers rapidly weaving and tracing complex runes in a frantic, intricate spell-meraba (chanting and forming runes) pattern before she merentangkan hands forward. Tiny initial sparks form around his weaving fingers. Sound: Deep humming of spell creation, scuffling feet on debris, sharp wind gusts. 3-6s: Medium-low angle shot. The Mage, now with her hands thrust forward and outward, erupts with layered, concentric magic circles that spin rapidly around her forearms and wrists, illuminating her intense, focused expression. The brilliant orange-red light contrasts with his dark jubah. Sound: Power surge sound, faster energy humming, his sharp exhale. 6-9s: Wide shot. A colossal naga roars in the distance. Dozens of huge, complex magic circles form a vast, intricate Area of Effect (AoE) grid around the naga on the ground and in the air, containing it. The naga is trapped and struggling. Sound: Deafening dragon roar, low-frequency hum of the AoE active, ground fracturing. 9-12s: Dynamic multi-shot. Fast cuts (0.5s). Sequence: Close-up on the Mage’s fierce eyes amidst the energy bloom; close-up on her mouth as she shouts “EXPLOSION!” with conviction; multi-angle cuts of the naga struggling against the intensifying magic. Orbital camera spins around the Mage and the AoE. Sound: Echoed “EXPLOSION!”, sudden silence, heavy magical distortion. 12-15s: Wide Shot / Extreme Long Shot. Dynamic orbital camera movement rapidly spins around the entire scene. The AoE detonates. A colossal pillar of pure fire and energy vaporizes the naga and surrounding environment.

prompts.text: 15-second continuous single-shot action sequence. No cuts. No scene transitions. Cinematic stylized 3D animation, painterly lighting, expressive character design, detailed textures, strong color contrast (warm vs cold), volumetric light, cinematic 35mm lens, subtle depth of field, high-end animated film quality Color palette contrast: Character A → warm tones (orange, gold, dust) Character B → cold tones (cyan, magenta, neon glow) Scene: Industrial bridge suspended over a deep urban drop. Pipes leaking vapor. Flickering lights. Night atmosphere with heavy haze. 0–3s — tension build Camera slowly pushes forward between both characters. Character A: close-range fighter with heavy powered gauntlets, grounded stance. Character B: agile, unpredictable, holding a compact hextech firearm with glowing components. Silence. Only distant machinery. 3–6s — ignition Character B fires first — fast, erratic shots. Camera whips sideways as Character A blocks with gauntlets — sparks and energy bursts. Immediate forward rush from Character A. 6–10s — chaos choreography Close combat + ranged interplay. Character A uses weight and direct strikes — punches feel heavy and impactful. Character B dodges with acrobatic movement, sliding along railings, firing mid-motion. Camera circles tightly, alternating focus between both styles. Each impact has clear anticipation → contact → follow-through. 10–13s — escalation Character B leaps backward, charging weapon — unstable energy build. Character A charges forward simultaneously, gauntlets glowing brighter. Environment reacting: steam bursts, metal rattling. 13–15s — final frame Mid-air collision moment. Punch vs energy blast. Light fills frame. Cut to silhouette of both figures frozen in impact. Freeze.

prompts.text: Prompt 1 Cinematic, photorealistic, tense and suspenseful atmosphere. No background music, only sound effects throughout. 0–1s: Side tracking shot — a white scooter referencing image2's design races down a wide urban highway. A man in an orange t-shirt and black cap rides the scooter, weaving between stopped cars. People are running out of their cars in panic. Sound effects: engine roaring, tires screeching, distant screams. 1–3s: Camera quickly shifts to behind the rider. In the far distance, a colossal rock-and-mud monster referencing image4's appearance is rampaging, smashing vehicles with its massive fists. Debris flies everywhere. Sound effects: thunderous impacts, metal crushing, ground shaking. 3–7s: Follow shot from behind — the scooter speeds toward the monster. As the rider gets close, he pulls a hard slide, the scooter skids sideways with sparks flying, stopping right in front of the towering monster's feet. Dust cloud erupts. Sound effects: tire screech, gravel scraping, rumbling footsteps of the monster. 7–12s: The rider dismounts and stands facing the scooter. He punches the scooter's body with one fist. Instantly the scooter explodes apart — panels, wheels, frame sections — all pieces fly upward and toward the man. Each piece magnetically attaches to his body, forming a full mecha armor suit referencing image3's design. Transformation completes with a final helmet lock. Sound effects: metallic clanking, electromagnetic hum, hydraulic locks engaging, a power-up surge sound. 12–15s: The mecha suit stands tall, camera slowly orbits from side to behind the suit. Over the mecha's shoulder, we see the massive rock monster roaring, fists raised. The two face each other. Camera holds on this standoff. Sound effects: heavy mechanical breathing, monster's deep guttural roar, wind howling.

prompts.text: Use the provided character sheet @[image1] as reference. Create a cinematic character introduction video. Open with the character looking into camera and speaking naturally, introducing herself in her own words. Do not treat the sheet as a single image. Use its elements as separate shots. Structure: detail → identity → presence → full reveal Make the character active: she moves, reacts, interacts with her environment and prop while talking short, natural gestures, small shifts, purposeful motion Show acting range: subtle emotional shifts while speaking (confidence, hesitation, curiosity, intensity) express through micro-expressions, eyes, tone, and body language Include: face close-ups, outfit/material details, prop usage, expressive performance moments Keep everything grounded and realistic. Camera: controlled, minimal movement (soft push-ins, light tracking, subtle handheld) Lighting: cinematic and consistent End on a confident mid or full shot, character fully established.

prompts.text: Create a 15 second cinematic video inspired by a 1980s aesthetic, following a young woman through her day. She wears authentic 1980s outfits like oversized denim jackets, high-waisted jeans, loose shirts, vintage sneakers, scrunchies, and bold accessories. Add a bike ride shot with wind in her hair and golden sunlight. Move into evening where she laughs with friends under a warm sunset, capturing natural candid joy. End with a calm night scene by a window with city lights and soft neon glow, reflecting a peaceful mood. prompts.text: Seedance 2.0 Prompt Share: Blockbuster 3D game cinematic NHL playoff opener. A colossal armored French-Canadian knight titan battles a Lightning Storm God titan inside a frozen hockey arena. [0:00-0:03] Camera rises from beneath the ice surface, pushing up through cracking frozen glass into the arena. Blizzard swirls. The Montreal Voyageur Knight titan stands at center ice — crimson and blue armor gleaming, fur cape whipping in arctic wind, enchanted ice hockey stick gripped in both hands. Camera orbits its massive frame as frost breath pours from the visor. The CH logo on its chest pulses with blue light. It slams the stick on the ice — a shockwave cracks the entire rink surface in a radial pattern. The crowd roars. [0:03-0:06] A massive lightning bolt strikes the opposite end of the rink. Camera whip-pans to reveal the Tampa Lightning Storm God materializing from pure electricity — its body barely contained plasma, crackling white-blue arcs jumping between its limbs. It raises its lightning staff and fires a concentrated beam across the ice. Camera tracks the beam at ice-level as it scorches a molten trail across the frozen surface. The knight raises its shield — the beam deflects upward, shattering the arena scoreboard in a shower of sparks and glass. [0:06-0:09] The knight charges across the cracked ice — camera at low angle, lateral tracking, ice chips spraying from every heavy footstep. The Storm God teleports in a flash of lightning to meet it. They clash — enchanted stick vs lightning staff — the collision creates an electromagnetic pulse that blows out every arena light. Camera captures the moment in strobe-lit darkness, each flash freezing a frame of combat. Sparks and ice crystals fill the air. The knight spins and delivers a devastating cross-check — the Storm God fractures into a thousand lightning bolts that scatter across the arena walls. [0:09-0:12] The scattered lightning bolts reassemble behind the knight. Camera follows from above in a crane shot as the Storm God reforms — bigger, angrier, pure electrical fury. It grabs the knight and launches both upward through the arena roof into the stormy sky. Camera follows the vertical ascent — arena shrinking below, clouds swirling around them. They trade blows mid-air above the city skyline, each impact creating thunder that echoes across the frozen landscape. [0:12-0:15] Both titans plummet back down through the shattered arena roof, crashing onto center ice in a cataclysmic impact. Camera captures the landing from ice-level — shockwave radiating outward, boards splintering, glass shattering. Slow-motion pull back through settling ice dust and electrical discharge. "MONTREAL VS TAMPA" typography materializes from ice crystals and lightning arcs. NHL chrome shield logo slams into frame. Stanley Cup Playoffs. Arena lights flicker back on revealing both titans standing, ready for more. Unreal Engine 5 meets Mortal Kombat arena cinematography. Icy blue-white atmosphere with crimson red and electric blue as only saturated elements. Heavy camera shake on every impact, speed ramping, anamorphic flares reflecting off ice. Avoid static camera, avoid weightless movement. Sound: ice cracking, heavy metallic footsteps on ice, lightning crackling and thunder, crowd roaring, glass shattering, massive bass impacts, arena horn blaring, epic orchestral score with war drums building to brass crescendo. No dialogue.

prompts.text: Create a 15-second vertical 9:16 ultra-cinematic cyberpunk short about a photoreal tiny hamster courier in a rain-soaked neon megacity. Style: high-end sci-fi noir, practical neon reflections, wet pavement, volumetric steam, shallow depth of field, anamorphic lens flares, premium creature realism. 0–2s: Extreme macro close-up. A hamster’s tiny paw taps a glowing micro-scooter throttle; its whiskers catch pink-blue neon light. Sudden rack focus reveals the hamster wearing a miniature transparent raincoat and chrome delivery goggles. Tiny electric buzz, rain droplets, soft paw taps. 2–5s: Low-angle tracking shot beside the hamster as it speeds through a crowded cyberpunk noodle alley, weaving between giant human shoes, ramen steam, holographic symbols, and puddle reflections. Camera moves fast but stays smooth, adorable scale contrast, cinematic motion blur. 5–9s: Hero orbit shot. The hamster launches off a chopstick ramp, floating in slow motion across a glowing puddle while a delivery capsule spins on its back. Neon signs smear into abstract color streaks; no readable text. Tiny squeak, scooter whirr, rain impact. 9–12s: Close-up reaction. The hamster lands perfectly on a vending-machine ledge, shakes rain from its fur, then proudly pushes the capsule forward with both paws. The capsule opens with a soft blue glow. 12–15s: Final loop beat. Inside the capsule is one glowing sunflower seed. The hamster looks into camera, grabs it, and the frame whip-pans back to the same paw-on-throttle macro from the opening, creating a seamless replay loop. Maintain hamster scale, natural fur physics, expressive but realistic animal movement, no cartoon distortion.

prompts.text: Pure adrenaline, cinematic urban speed unleashed Created with seedance 2.0 on @yapper_so A high-intensity, ultra-realistic cinematic sequence of a fearless young woman roller skating at high speed through a crowded street in New York City during golden hour. Warm sunlight reflects off glass buildings and asphalt, casting long shadows and creating a glowing urban atmosphere.The camera tracks tightly alongside her in smooth, dynamic motion as she weaves through dense pedestrian traffic with precise control. Street vendors, food carts, cyclists, and passing taxis fill the environment, all reacting naturally as she speeds past. Fabric, hair, and loose objects respond to wind and motion, adding realism.She skillfully dodges obstacles—sliding past a bicycle, hopping over a low barrier, and carving sharply between people. When someone suddenly blocks her path, she forcefully pushes past to maintain momentum, without breaking flow. Every movement feels grounded, fast, and physically believable.Close-up inserts capture wheels scraping the pavement, sparks from brief friction, and her focused expression—breathing controlled, eyes locked forward. Motion blur is present but readable, emphasizing speed without losing clarity.Ambient city soundscape builds immersion: distant horns, chatter, footsteps, wheels rolling, wind rushing. prompts.text: Stylized 3D animated short, bright colors, soft cinematic lighting, playful and heartwarming tone (~15s). Consistent characters: BOLT, sleek silver robot with glowing blue LED eyes, antenna, chest display; JAX, scruffy 10-year-old boy, messy dark hair, green hoodie. Scene flow: Living room, warm afternoon. JAX eats cereal watching TV while BOLT scans and says it’s “42% soggy.” JAX rolls eyes. A puppy scene makes JAX tear up; BOLT scans and asks if he needs repair. JAX laughs: “That’s crying.” BOLT’s chest shows “Emotion Module Installing.” Eyes flicker. He attempts a smile—awkward and scary. JAX reacts. JAX gives him a puppy plush; BOLT’s chest lights up with a heart. Close-up: BOLT’s eyes turn warm amber, a metallic tear forms. “I am leaking.” JAX hugs him. Final wide shot: both watching TV together, BOLT holding plush, heart glowing. “Can we watch it again?” Warm sunset fade. Audio: light orchestral, robotic hums, soft piano. Style: smooth animation, expressive lighting, cinematic, emotional-comedy.

prompts.text: A cinematic full-body shot of a stylish young man standing confidently on a quiet urban street at golden hour, captured from a slightly low angle to emphasize presence and attitude, wearing a sleek black cap casting a subtle shadow over his face, paired with dark sunglasses reflecting the warm city lights, a fitted black t-shirt hugging his frame with a thin silver necklace catching soft highlights, relaxed black shorts falling just above the knee, and clean black-and-white sneakers contrasted by crisp white socks, his wrist adorned with a premium classic watch that glints subtly in the sunlight, his posture calm yet assertive with one hand casually in his pocket, the other slightly adjusting his glasses, surrounded by softly blurred buildings and warm cinematic bokeh, shot on an anamorphic lens with shallow depth of field, dramatic contrast between light and shadow, color graded with warm amber highlights and deep cool blacks to evoke a modern, stylish, and confident urban mood. Video prompt : MULTI-SHOT CINEMATIC SEQUENCE-LONDON CITY, DAYTIME, BUSY URBAN ATMOSPHERE. Opening shot-extreme close-up from inside a bag, dark enclosed frame with soft fabric edges, zipper slowly opens revealing warm daylight flooding in. The man leans in, sunlight haloing his silhouette. a subtle confident smile forms. Soft city noise filters in. He gently closes the bag, darkness returns. Cut to-medium close-up, eye-level. He lifts the bag, now visible in full. Golden daylight reflects off nearby brick buildings. He adjusts his sunglasses with a calm, composed expression. Smooth transition to tracking shot-low angle following his legs as he walks along a cobblestone London street. Cars pass, pedestrians blur in motion. The bag swings naturally at his side. Cut to wide shot-he approaches a classic red London bus. Camera cranes slightly upward as he steps on. Ambient city sounds, distant chatter, engine rumble. Interior handheld shot-subtle camera shake as the bus moves. He stands holding a rail, looking out the window. Sunlight flickers across his face as buildings pass. Cut to exterior-medium shot as he steps off the bus. Camera pans with himashe merges into the busy sidewalk. Cut to close-up inside a classic red phone booth. He dials, reflective glass catching passing figures. His expression focused, slightly tense. Ambient muffled city noise. Cut to wide park shot he sits on a bench under soft daylight. Leaves rustle in the wind. He checks his watch, time passing implied by subtle lighting shift and people moving in background. Cut to tracking side shot he walks past a grand London bank building. Camera glides parallel, emphasizing architecture and scale. His pace steady, purposeful. Cut to handheld running shot-he sprints through a narrow alleyway. Camera follows closely behind, slight shake, urgency building. Footsteps echo, light flickers between walls. Cut to wide waterfront shot-calm contrast. River reflecting daylight, skyline in background. He approaches another figure waiting. Cut to medium two-shot-they face each other briefly, silent acknowledgment. He hands over the bag. prompts.display_text: CINEMATIC SEQUENCE-LONDON CITY, DAYTIME, BUSY URBAN ATMOSPHERE. Opening shot-extreme close-up from inside a bag, dark enclosed frame with soft fabric edges, zipper slowly opens revealing warm daylight flooding in. The man leans in, sunlight haloing his silhouette. a subtle confident smile forms. Soft city noise filters in. He gently closes the bag, darkness returns. Cut to-medium close-up, eye-level. He lifts the bag, now visible in full. Golden daylight reflects off nearby brick buildings. He adjusts his sunglasses with a calm, composed expression. Smooth transition to tracking shot-low angle following his legs as he walks along a cobblestone London street. Cars pass, pedestrians blur in motion. The bag swings naturally at his side. Cut to wide shot-he approaches a classic red London bus. Camera cranes slightly upward as he steps on. Ambient city sounds, distant chatter, engine rumble. Interior handheld shot-subtle camera shake as the bus moves. He stands holding a rail, looking out the window. Sunlight flickers across his face as buildings pass. Cut to exterior-medium shot as he steps off the bus. Camera pans with himashe merges into the busy sidewalk. Cut to close-up inside a classic red phone booth. He dials, reflective glass catching passing figures. His expression focused, slightly tense. Ambient muffled city noise. Cut to wide park shot he sits on a bench under soft daylight. Leaves rustle in the wind. He checks his watch, time passing implied by subtle lighting shift and people moving in background. Cut to tracking side shot he walks past a grand London bank building. Camera glides parallel, emphasizing architecture and scale. His pace steady, purposeful. Cut to handheld running shot-he sprints through a narrow alleyway. Camera follows closely behind, slight shake, urgency building. Footsteps echo, light flickers between walls. Cut to wide waterfront shot-calm contrast. River reflecting daylight, skyline in background. He approaches another figure waiting. Cut to medium two-shot-they face each other briefly, silent acknowledgment. He hands over the bag. Smooth, deliberate motion, Final shot-close-up on hands as they clasp and perform a firm, confident handshake transitioning into a casual fist bump. Camera slowly pulis back revealing the city waterfront behind them, wind lightly moving their clothing.

prompts.text: 01 - Disaster film realism, one-take. The camera begins above a coastal container port in a night typhoon, gantry cranes swaying over black water, then dives toward a dock worker running across stacked cargo lanes under screaming wind. The camera follows inches behind as he weaves between sliding containers, ducks beneath a swinging crane cable, climbs a rain-slick stair tower, and crosses a narrow maintenance bridge high above the floodwater. A ship breaks loose from its moorings below, smashing into the dock and sending a shockwave through the structure. He jumps to a control platform just as a collapsing crane crashes into the stacks behind him. Sodium lights, rain sheets, spray bursts, steel impacts, one continuous shot, no cuts. 02- Disaster film realism, one-take. The camera begins above a rain-lashed steel railway bridge spanning a swollen canyon river, then dives toward a maintenance worker running along the roof of a stalled passenger train. The camera follows him as he sprints over slippery carriages, leaps a widening gap between cars, grabs an emergency ladder, and drops into a shattered service gangway inside the train. Water punches through broken windows as the bridge begins to twist. He climbs back out onto the front engine platform and jumps to the stone embankment just as the rear section of the bridge collapses, dragging half the train into the torrent below. Grey rain, steel flex, river spray, violent thunder, one continuous shot, no cuts. 03- Disaster film realism, one-take. The camera starts above a mountain town at dusk as a wildfire front races over the ridgeline, then plunges toward a firefighter running through a narrow hillside street choked with burning embers. The camera tracks close behind as he kicks open a gate, vaults over a fallen power line, pulls a child’s bicycle from his path, and squeezes through an alley while flames curl over rooftops on both sides. He bursts into a terraced backyard as a propane tank erupts behind him, then slides down a dusty slope toward an evacuation bus just as the firestorm consumes the street he came from. Orange-black smoke, ash storm, heat shimmer, ember trails, one continuous shot, no cuts. 04-Disaster film realism, one-take. The camera begins high above a frozen research station on a cracking ice shelf under whiteout blizzard conditions, then dives toward a lone engineer sprinting between radar towers as the ice splits open beneath him. The camera follows tightly behind as he jumps over widening fissures, ducks under whipping cables, slides across an ice-glazed catwalk, and dives through a half-closing bulkhead door. Behind him, an entire laboratory module shears away and drops into black freezing water. He emerges onto the outer deck just as a wall of ice collapses and the station begins to tilt toward the sea. Blue-white storm light, spindrift, hard wind, heavy structural groans, one continuous shot, no cuts.

prompts.text: Go to http:// yapper.so/dashboard Choose Seedance 2.0 from the video models Upload your reference image Set the duration and aspect ratio Then use the prompt below FORMAT: 15 seconds / 145 BPM / 15 beat-synced shots SUBJECT: @[image1] Ultra-realistic Indian classroom street fight. Single continuous shot, no cuts. Raw handheld mobile footage with natural micro-jitters, slight rolling shutter, no stabilization. Documentary realism. Audio: No music. Only raw ambient sound - footsteps, desk friction, cloth movement, punches, fan hum, breathing, distant classroom noise. Lighting: Mixed warm + cool cinematic tones. Practical classroom lighting. Moving ceiling fan shadows. Visible dust particles in light shafts. MAIN CHARACTER (STRICT IDENTITY LOCK): Indian male (17-18), cold emotionless face matching reference image exactly. Black straight side-swept hair, brown almond eyes, sharp jawline, natural Indian skin tone, slim face. OUTFIT LOCK (NO CHANGE): Black school blazer, white shirt, black tie, black http:// pants.No hoodie/layers. Slightly fitted blazer, loose tie. Must remain identical throughout. OPPONENT RULES: All opponents have unique faces. No resemblance to protagonist. ACTION: 0-2s: Protagonist grabs Opponent A from behind one-hand head slam onto desk. Books/pencils burst outward. Desk drags with friction. A collapses limp. 2-5s: Grabs Opponent B punch to abdomen B folds immediate head slam into desk. Head pressed briefly to tiles. Camera stabilizes briefly. B falls face-down. Heavy breathing, visible sweat. 5-6s: Blazer shifts slightly, shirt + tie visible (tie displaced). C & D enter from back, split and flank. Only footsteps, fan hum.6-8s: Chaotic fight. D attacks with rapid punches. Protagonist stumbles slightly. C grabs blazer, pulls back. Knee to abdomen. Body bends forward. Heavy breathing. Fan shadows moving. 8-10s: Headbutt to D D staggers. Protagonist grabs C collar efficiently. 10-125 (BOARD IMPACT): Protagonist drives C backward into green chalkboard. Back hits first, head snaps slightly. Chalk dust bursts outward, fully visible in warm light. Chalk tray rattles, pieces fall. Micro slow-motion (0.2-0.3s) at impact back to real-time. C loses tension, slides down leaving chalk smears, collapses. Dust drifts. 12-13s: D charges protagonist sidesteps rotational punch to cheekbone. Sweat arcs mid-air. D crashes into desks. Massive collapse, books scatter. D motionless, hand drops.

prompts.text: Photorealistic cinematic short film, dynamic movie style action, bright summer daylight, realistic physics, high-speed motion, seamless scale transitions. 0:00 – 0:02 – EXT. PARK – DAY – TREE BRANCH A Japanese schoolgirl crouches on a thick tree branch in a public park, wearing a school uniform, focused and fearless. She launches forward without hesitation. The camera dives with her in a fast, dramatic motion. 0:02 – 0:04 – FREE FALL TO PICNIC TABLE She drops rapidly toward a picnic table below. The instant she impacts the table surface, her scale suddenly snaps smaller — now she is the size of a soda can. The tabletop becomes a giant landscape filled with oversized sandwiches, fruit, chips, drinks, and napkins. Without stopping, she immediately sprints forward between the food items at high speed. 0:04 – 0:06 – TABLE SURFACE – CONTINUOUS A bee rockets past her like a speeding vehicle. She leaps onto its back in one fluid move, landing in a forward-facing riding position. Another scale snap happens mid-motion — now she is the same size as the bee. 0:06 – 0:09 – BEE FLIGHT – HIGH SPEED The bee flies aggressively across the park. She clings tightly to its back as they weave at extreme speed through the legs of walking people. Shoes slam onto the ground around them like giant moving obstacles. Strong wind blasts her hair and clothes backward. 0:09 – 0:11 – SLOW MOTION – WATER BALLOON CHAOS Still riding the bee, she flies through a group of kids in the middle of a water-balloon fight. Everything shifts into slow motion — exploding water balloons, suspended droplets sparkling in sunlight, her expression intense and exhilarated. 0:11 – 0:12.5 – NORMAL SPEED – CHEERLEADER PASS Back to real speed. The bee shoots cleanly through the legs of a row of cheerleaders standing side by side, their uniforms and pom-poms creating a tunnel-like visual rhythm. 0:12.5 – 0:13.5 – JUMP AND CATCH She jumps off the bee. Instantly, her scale snaps back to normal human size while falling. A male student catches her securely in his open arms. They are both now normal size. 0:13.5 – 0:15 – END BEAT She hugs the male student, then turns and gives a playful wink directly to the camera. He looks surprised but happy. Freeze-frame energy.

Seedance 2.0 Prompt: Photorealistic cinematic short film, dynamic movie style action, bright summer daylight, realistic physics, high-speed motion, seamless scale transitions.

0:00 – 0:02 – EXT. PARK – DAY – TREE BRANCH
A Japanese schoolgirl crouches on a thick tree branch in a public park, wearing a school uniform, focused and fearless. She launches forward without hesitation. The camera dives with her in a fast, dramatic motion.
0:02 – 0:04 – FREE FALL TO PICNIC TABLE
She drops rapidly toward a picnic table below. The instant she impacts the table surface, her scale suddenly snaps smaller — now she is the size of a soda can. The tabletop becomes a giant landscape filled with oversized sandwiches, fruit, chips, drinks, and napkins. Without stopping, she immediately sprints forward between the food items at high speed.

0:04 – 0:06 – TABLE SURFACE – CONTINUOUS
A bee rockets past her like a speeding vehicle. She leaps onto its back in one fluid move, landing in a forward-facing riding position. Another scale snap happens mid-motion — now she is the same size as the bee.
0:06 – 0:09 – BEE FLIGHT – HIGH SPEED
The bee flies aggressively across the park. She clings tightly to its back as they weave at extreme speed through the legs of walking people. Shoes slam onto the ground around them like giant moving obstacles. Strong wind blasts her hair and clothes backward.

0:09 – 0:11 – SLOW MOTION – WATER BALLOON CHAOS
Still riding the bee, she flies through a group of kids in the middle of a water-balloon fight. Everything shifts into slow motion — exploding water balloons, suspended droplets sparkling in sunlight, her expression intense and exhilarated.
0:11 – 0:12.5 – NORMAL SPEED – CHEERLEADER PASS
Back to real speed. The bee shoots cleanly through the legs of a row of cheerleaders standing side by side, their uniforms and pom-poms creating a tunnel-like visual rhythm.

0:12.5 – 0:13.5 – JUMP AND CATCH
She jumps off the bee. Instantly, her scale snaps back to normal human size while falling. A male student catches her securely in his open arms. They are both now normal size.
0:13.5 – 0:15 – END BEAT
She hugs the male student, then turns and gives a playful wink directly to the camera. He looks surprised but happy. Freeze-frame energy.

prompts.text: Seedance 2.0 on @yapper_so Prompt A cinematic, continuous rightward panning tracking shot depicting the journey of life from birth to old age through seamless transitions. The camera slides smoothly past walls, doors, and curtains to reveal different stages of life in chronological order. It begins in a hospital room with a crying newborn baby on a medical cart, passing through a blue curtain into a bright preschool classroom where a toddler plays. The camera continues panning right into a sunny schoolyard with kids running with backpacks, then seamlessly glides through a wall into a teenager's bedroom where a boy jumps on his bed. The pan continues onto a leafy college campus with a young man walking with a backpack, then immediately transitions into a bustling city crosswalk in Times Square. Moving right, the scene shifts to an elegant wedding reception with a couple dancing amidst falling confetti, then to a green park where a middle-aged father watches children play. The camera passes through a house wall into a cozy living room where a man gently helps an elderly woman sit down. The final scene rests on the elderly woman sitting peacefully in an armchair, smiling softly as warm golden hour sunset light streams through the window.

Layout: 12 images arranged in a loose, imperfect collage grid, slightly tilted and misaligned like a scrapbook. No text, no watermark. Note: Its weird because sometimes theres an error. Sometimes no animation. Seedance 2.0 prompt: Convert each frame of @image1 into video and connect them. An emotional vlog-style animation video. Natural hand shake. A young Japanese woman. Emotional BGM.

prompts.text: [CINEMATIC SETUP] Film Style: Photorealistic near-future documentary, 35mm anamorphic, rich film grain. Lens: 16mm ultra-wide aerial establishing; transitions to 100mm telephoto compression on structural detail. Color Grade: Warm crushed amber dominant; deep teal-black shadows in pit interior; lifted dust haze over red terrain. Lighting: Harsh direct midday sun raking across excavated rock faces; volumetric amber dust plume rising from processing towers. Camera Behavior: Slow continuous aerial drift from extreme wide, descending and pushing toward a single industrial smokestack; no cuts. Audio: Deep low-frequency mechanical hum, distant conveyor belt clatter, wind dragging across red rock, faint diesel exhaust pulse. 0-4s: Extreme wide aerial. The full mining complex sprawls below — concentric excavation rings, red oxide roads spiraling inward, processing towers clustered at center. Camera drifts forward slowly at altitude. Amber dust haze diffuses sunlight across the entire basin. 4-9s: Camera descends and pushes in. The tallest processing tower fills frame progressively. A white smoke plume billows from the stack apex, catching amber backlight, curling and dispersing upward. Camera locks onto the stack's corroded upper section. 9-13s: 100mm compression. Tight on the smokestack's riveted metal crown — rust striations, heat shimmer rising from the lip, a slow pulse of dense smoke ejecting rhythmically. No other motion except the plume and faint shimmer. 13-15s: Camera holds. A second fainter plume ignites from an adjacent vent below frame. Two smoke columns drift upward in parallel, twisting slowly in the hot crosswind. [STYLE & QUALITY BOOSTERS] Photorealistic 8K, ultra-detailed rust and oxide textures, realistic atmospheric dust physics, stable aerial motion, cinematic motion blur, HDR, no artifacts.

prompts.text: **Environment:** A massive open grassland beneath a rotating supercell thunderstorm. Dark cloud walls spiral across the sky while continuous lightning flashes illuminate the rolling plains. Rain sweeps sideways through violent wind gusts. **Action:** 15.0s sequence. A giant wolf composed of living lightning sprints across the storm-soaked terrain, electricity branching from its paws with every stride. A colossal thunderbird descends from the clouds, wings generating powerful shockwaves. They collide across the storm plain as the wolf leaps into the air while lightning arcs between both creatures. Velocity Ramp choreography: the moment the wolf’s electrified claws strike the thunderbird slows dramatically, revealing branching lightning fractals before snapping back as both creatures explode apart in a burst of electrical energy. **Camera:** Handheld tracking shot racing through rain-soaked grass, occasionally catching lightning reflections in flooded ground before tilting upward toward the airborne clash. **Style & Constraints:** Volumetric rain simulation, photorealistic lightning arcs, cinematic storm lighting, ray-traced reflections on wet surfaces, 8K resolution. prompts.text: FOG RAVINE AMBUSH — 15s Dark Forest Thriller FORMAT: 15s / 6 SHOTS / no dialogue STYLE: dark forest thriller, wet moss, pale fog, grounded creature realism, tense stealth camera Shot 01 (0:00–0:02) Low tracking shot behind a lone hunter moving slowly through a narrow forest ravine, damp leaves underfoot, rifle held low, pale fog hanging between tall black trees. Shot 02 (0:02–0:04) Tight medium shot from the side as the hunter pauses and listens, breath visible in the cold air, fingers tightening around the weapon, distant branches creaking above. Shot 03 (0:04–0:06) POV push through hanging moss and twisted branches, the fog parts just enough to reveal deep claw marks on a tree trunk and a half-eaten carcass on the ground. Shot 04 (0:06–0:09) Overhead angle from the ravine wall as the hunter steps forward and the camera catches movement in the fog behind him: a massive shaggy creature pacing low, barely visible except for shoulders and glowing eyes. Shot 05 (0:09–0:12) Sudden side-impact shot, the creature bursts out of the fog and slams into the hunter from frame left, mud and wet leaves exploding upward, the weapon spinning away. Shot 06 (0:12–0:15) Wide chaotic pullback through the fog as the hunter is dragged across the ravine floor while the giant furry beast disappears back into the mist, leaving only thrashing branches and muffled growls.

prompts.text: Prompt / Komut A warmly lit Ottoman-era bookshop interior with ornate wooden shelves reaching toward vaulted ceilings, dusty sunbeams streaming through latticed mashrabiya windows casting geometric patterns across aged leather-bound manuscripts and rolled parchments. An elderly bookseller in a deep burgundy kaftan and white turban carefully arranges volumes on a low wooden table, his weathered hands moving with practiced reverence. Shot 1 — Wide establishing shot from a high angle looking down into the cozy shop, revealing the intimate scale and rich textures of the space. Soft golden afternoon light. The bookseller moves slowly between shelves, organizing his collection. Gentle dust motes float through the sunbeams. Shot 2 — Medium tracking shot at eye level, following the bookseller as he walks along a shelf-lined corridor, running his fingers along leather spines. The camera glides smoothly beside him, revealing glimpses of illuminated manuscripts and copper oil lamps. Warm amber and teal color

prompts.text: Seedance 2.0 prompt share: Blockbuster 3D game cinematic. A colossal cannon golem titan battles a dark magpie knight titan in and around a massive football stadium at night during a thunderstorm. [0:00-0:03] Establishing aerial drone shot of the stadium in a lightning storm. Camera pushes down through the clouds toward the pitch. A massive bronze cannon golem stands on the left side of the field — ancient bronze armor steaming in the rain, its cannon arm glowing white-hot, charging. Emirates Stadium architecture visible behind it. Camera orbits slowly around the golem as bronze gears turn and steam vents hiss. It aims its cannon arm upward and fires a massive artillery shell into the sky — the muzzle flash illuminates the entire stadium for a split second. [0:03-0:06] The shell explodes mid-air — and from the explosion the Magpie Dark Knight descends, black and white steel armor gleaming with rain, massive dark feathered wings spread wide. It grips a crackling lightning sword. Camera tracks its descent in a dramatic slow-motion follow shot. It lands on the opposite side of the pitch with earth-shattering force — the ground craters, turf explodes outward, sprinkler pipes burst. Lightning strikes behind it as it rises to full height. [0:06-0:09] Both titans charge at each other across the pitch. Camera at ground level, lateral tracking shot between them as they converge. The golem fires rapid cannon blasts — each one tearing up the field. The knight deflects with its sword, each deflection creating a lightning shockwave. They meet at the center circle — the cannon arm clashes against the lightning sword in a devastating lock. Camera spirals upward around the impact point as energy radiates outward. [0:09-0:12] Close-up combat sequence with dynamic camera. The knight slashes — the golem blocks with its bronze shield arm, sparks flying. The golem retaliates with a point-blank cannon blast to the knight's chest — the knight slides backward 50 meters, digging trenches in the pitch. Camera follows in a crash-zoom. The knight spreads its dark wings and launches forward at impossible speed — sword-first through the smoke. [0:12-0:15] Both titans lock weapons overhead in a final clash — camera captures the moment from below in an epic low-angle shot. The combined energy creates a vertical beam of bronze fire and white lightning that pierces the storm clouds. Camera pulls back to a majestic wide shot — the stadium framing both titans, the energy beam splitting the sky. "ARSENAL VS NEWCASTLE" forges itself in molten bronze and crackling lightning. Premier League golden shield materializes. Thunder rolls. Dark Souls meets Elden Ring boss cinematography. Rain-soaked battlefield, dramatic lightning illumination, heavy motion blur on fast strikes, speed ramping from slow-mo to real-time on impacts. Bronze warm tones vs cold steel monochrome. Avoid static camera, avoid clean movements — every shot has weight, grit, and physical consequence. Sound: cannon fire booming, lightning sword crackling, metallic clashing, rain hammering, thunder rolling, ground breaking, crowd roaring distantly, epic war drums building to full orchestral crescendo with brass fanfare on the final reveal.

prompts.text: Seedance 2.0 Prompt share: Blockbuster 3D game cinematic. A colossal werewolf beast titan battles a cockerel knight titan in and around a massive football stadium during a stormy golden-hour eclipse. [0:00-0:03] Camera starts tight on golden wolf eyes in pure darkness. They ignite. Camera rapidly pulls back to reveal the massive Wolf Beast titan — dark fur bristling, gold armor pulsing with energy, fangs bared. It stands in the center of the stadium, hunched forward in a primal attack stance. It throws its head back and howls — the sound echoes across the arena, shattering glass in the press boxes. Golden energy shockwave radiates from the howl. Molineux stadium structure visible behind. Camera shakes from the sonic force. [0:03-0:06] Camera whip-pans 180 degrees to the Cockerel Knight striding through the stadium entrance gate — navy armor gleaming with blue lightning, silver crest magnificent, lance crackling with energy, shield raised. Camera tracks alongside as it walks with regal, measured power. It plants its lance into the ground — a wave of blue energy ripples across the pitch toward the wolf. Camera follows the energy wave at ground level until it hits the wolf's feet. [0:06-0:09] The Wolf Beast charges on all fours — camera at wolf-eye level, FPV chase shot, ground tearing beneath massive claws. The knight braces and launches forward with its lance. They collide — the wolf catches the lance in its jaws, the knight drives forward. Camera orbits rapidly around the grapple. The wolf snaps the lance, claws slash across the knight's shield sending it flying. The knight counters with a lightning-charged gauntlet uppercut. Camera captures the impact in slow motion — shockwave distorting rain droplets. [0:09-0:12] Aerial combat shot — the wolf leaps impossibly high, gold axe raised overhead. Camera follows from below in a dramatic upward crane. The knight spreads its wings and meets it mid-air. They trade three devastating blows mid-flight — each one creating a shockwave visible from the stadium below. Camera cuts between close-up impact shots and wide stadium shots showing the scale. On the third blow, both are blasted apart. [0:12-0:15] Both titans land on opposite sides of the pitch, crouching, breathing heavily, staring each other down. Camera executes a slow dramatic push-in between them — both filling the frame edges. Steam rises from the destroyed pitch. Rain falls. Then both roar simultaneously — the combined sound creates a golden and blue energy sphere at center field that expands into the "WOLVES VS SPURS" typography. Premier League golden shield materializes. Final epic wide shot — both titans silhouetted against a stormy sky split between gold and navy blue. Monster Hunter meets Shadow of the Colossus cinematography. Primal savage energy vs disciplined knightly precision. Golden warm tones vs cold navy steel blue. Speed ramping on every major impact, handheld shake during combat, smooth crane shots for establishing scale. Every movement has bestial weight and medieval consequence. Sound: primal wolf howl, metallic lance impacts, claws scraping armor, thunder rumbling, rain hammering, crowd chanting like a war choir, deep taiko drums accelerating through combat, massive orchestral brass and choir crescendo on final reveal.

prompts.text: A 12-photo collage of a young Indonesian couple on a chaotic honeymoon across 12 different countries. Locations are clear, realistic, and iconic: Borobudur temple Indonesia, Shibuya Tokyo at night, Eiffel Tower Paris, Colosseum Rome, Venice canals, Santorini Greece, Egyptian pyramids, Moroccan night market, Swiss Alps lake, Times Square New York, Bangkok street nightlife, and Arabian desert dunes. The couple looks messy but deeply in love laughing, arguing, kissing, running, dancing, exhausted, playful chaos. Hair slightly messy, imperfect outfits, spontaneous cool poses, sometimes awkward, sometimes intimate. Moments include: street food bites, getting lost, riding random transport, chaotic nightlife, quiet emotional pauses, playful teasing, tired but happy expressions. Style: cinematic but imperfect, handheld smartphone photography, slight motion blur, shaky hands, accidental framing, overexposed highlights, uneven lighting, soft grain, 35mm film look, nostalgic faded tones, documentary style. The collage layout looks like a contact sheet of lost honeymoon memories chaotic, wild, intimate, emotional, and beautiful. "

prompts.text: Luxury Cream Cinematic Ad (Female Model – Reference Matched) A cinematic, high-end luxury skincare advertisement featuring a young woman whose face closely matches the provided reference image — accurate facial structure, skin tone, hairstyle, and expression consistency across all frames. She stands in a softly lit, premium indoor setting (minimalist luxury room with warm natural light filtering through sheer curtains). The atmosphere feels calm, refined, and elegant. She is wearing a tasteful red outfit — a modest yet attractive dress consisting of a skirt extending just below her knees and a half-sleeve top, made of soft, flowing fabric. The styling is minimal and sophisticated, with subtle makeup and natural hair movement. Scene Flow & Shots 1. Wide Shot (Establishing) The woman stands gracefully near a window, gentle sunlight illuminating her silhouette. Curtains flow slightly, adding softness and motion. 2. Medium Shot (Introduction of Product) She slowly raises a luxury skincare cream jar in her hands. The jar is sleek, glossy, and premium-looking (glass container with metallic accents). She looks at it with a soft, confident smile. 3. Close-Up (Product Focus) Detailed macro shot of her hands holding the cream. Soft reflections, visible texture, and premium finish emphasized. Condensation or glow effect can be added subtly for luxury appeal. 4. Beauty Shot (Emotional Connect) Camera shifts to her face — she looks into the camera with a calm, elegant expression. Slight head tilt, natural blinking, soft smile. 5. Interaction Shot She gently opens the jar, lightly dabs a small amount of cream, and applies it gracefully (e.g., on her cheek or hand), maintaining poise and elegance. 6. Hero Shot (Final Frame) She holds the product near her face, perfectly framed. Background softly blurred. Subtle glow lighting enhances skin and product. Style & Technical Direction * Ultra-realistic, cinematic quality * Soft warm lighting, luxury aesthetic * Shallow depth of field, creamy bokeh * Smooth camera motion (slow pans, slight push-ins) * 4K, high detail, ad-grade output * Consistent character identity across all shots * No text overlays unless minimal brand-style typography

Prompt: Luxury Cream Cinematic Ad (Female Model – Reference Matched)

A cinematic, high-end luxury skincare advertisement featuring a young woman whose face closely matches the provided reference image — accurate facial structure, skin tone, hairstyle, and expression consistency across all frames.

She stands in a softly lit, premium indoor setting (minimalist luxury room with warm natural light filtering through sheer curtains). The atmosphere feels calm, refined, and elegant.

She is wearing a tasteful red outfit — a modest yet attractive dress consisting of a skirt extending just below her knees and a half-sleeve top, made of soft, flowing fabric. The styling is minimal and sophisticated, with subtle makeup and natural hair movement.

 Scene Flow & Shots

1. Wide Shot (Establishing)
The woman stands gracefully near a window, gentle sunlight illuminating her silhouette. Curtains flow slightly, adding softness and motion.

2. Medium Shot (Introduction of Product)
She slowly raises a luxury skincare cream jar in her hands. The jar is sleek, glossy, and premium-looking (glass container with metallic accents). She looks at it with a soft, confident smile.

3. Close-Up (Product Focus)
Detailed macro shot of her hands holding the cream. Soft reflections, visible texture, and premium finish emphasized. Condensation or glow effect can be added subtly for luxury appeal.

4. Beauty Shot (Emotional Connect)
Camera shifts to her face — she looks into the camera with a calm, elegant expression. Slight head tilt, natural blinking, soft smile.

5. Interaction Shot
She gently opens the jar, lightly dabs a small amount of cream, and applies it gracefully (e.g., on her cheek or hand), maintaining poise and elegance.

6. Hero Shot (Final Frame)
She holds the product near her face, perfectly framed. Background softly blurred. Subtle glow lighting enhances skin and product.

 Style & Technical Direction

* Ultra-realistic, cinematic quality
* Soft warm lighting, luxury aesthetic
* Shallow depth of field, creamy bokeh
* Smooth camera motion (slow pans, slight push-ins)
* 4K, high detail, ad-grade output
* Consistent character identity across all shots
* No text overlays unless minimal brand-style typography

prompts.text: Subject: First-person player POV, with two gloved hands visible in frame, operating and adjusting a wingsuit-style flight rig attached to the body. Style: Live-action cinematic realism with sharp, clear details, high-speed motion that remains readable, physically accurate movement, and naturally controlled camera inertia. Environment: A vast sky environment with a large reflective water surface below, surrounded by cliffs and floating structures, with flying dragons in the distance. A medieval stone castle on the ground serves as the final waypoint. Natural daylight, clear air, high visibility, realistic water reflections, and believable spatial scale. Mood: A high-speed, high-tension flight experience. Overall immersive, realistic, intense, but always clear and readable. Timeline: 0:00 - 0:03 Start in first-person POV from high altitude. The castle waypoint is visible far ahead and shown on the mini-map. The player dives rapidly toward the water. Speed increases quickly, altitude drops fast, and the speed bar gradually fills. The water surface expands rapidly in view, increasing pressure and tension. SFX: strong wind rush 0:03 - 0:05 At the last moment before reaching the water, the player pulls up sharply, creating strong camera inertia compression. The player skims just above the water without touching it. Speed decreases, altitude rises, and the speed bar shortens accordingly. Water reflections sweep quickly beneath the frame. SFX: wind shift, surface rush 0:05 - 0:08 Transition into stable forward flight. Movement is smooth with slight natural head motion. The player precisely flies past cliffs and low structures. Overall motion remains controlled and fluid. SFX: steady airflow 0:08 - 0:11 A massive flying dragon charges directly toward the player at high speed. The player attempts to evade but gets clipped. The impact triggers a spin, with sky and ground flipping around the frame. SFX: dragon roar, air blast, turbulent wind 0:11 - 0:13 The spin slows and control is gradually regained. The horizon stabilizes. The player re-aligns toward the castle waypoint. Distance decreases rapidly. SFX: wind calming 0:13 - 0:15 The player descends near the castle and reaches the waypoint, distance reaching zero. A soft landing brings the motion to a complete stop. After landing, the player removes the wingsuit from the body and lowers it out of view. The camera remains steady at ground level facing the castle. SFX: landing impact, gear removal, wind fading

prompts.text: Ultra-realistic cinematic video, 4K–8K resolution, 24fps, epic fantasy war style. Wide-angle lens (24–35mm) for establishing shots and telephoto close-ups for combat intensity. Highly detailed VFX, physically accurate motion, realistic fire, smoke, wind, and magical energy simulation. Dramatic volumetric lighting and atmospheric depth. Scene setup: A massive ancient battlefield spread across shattered mountains and burning plains during a violent storm. The sky is dark with heavy storm clouds, constant lightning flashes, drifting ash, and turbulent wind. The environment is extremely detailed with scorched الأرض, broken stone structures, and faint glowing magical remnants on the ground. Action sequence: 0–3 seconds: Aerial battlefield reveal The camera opens with a wide cinematic aerial shot of a colossal dragon army dominating the storm-filled sky. The lead dragon is enormous with molten lava-like scales, glowing cracks across its body, and massive wings that generate hurricane-force winds with every movement. Lightning strikes around its body as it roars, shaking the atmosphere. 3–6 seconds: Human army formation Cut to ground level. A disciplined human warrior army stands in tight battle formations across the battlefield. Armored commanders lead the forces with glowing magical weapons and energy-infused shields. The ground trembles as dragon shadows pass overhead. Wind pressure and debris intensify as the battle approaches. 6–8 seconds: Full-scale clash begins The molten dragon dives toward the battlefield, unleashing streams of fire and lightning. Human commanders activate magical defenses and coordinated counterattacks. Explosions of fire, dust clouds, and magical shockwaves collide in the air and across the ground. The camera alternates between fast ground impact shots and sweeping aerial chaos. 8–10 seconds: Cinematic climax and freeze A slow-motion wide cinematic shot shows the battlefield engulfed in fire, lightning, and magical energy. The molten dragon hovers above with wings fully extended, dominating the sky. Below, human warriors stand firm behind glowing shields amid rising dust and embers. The scene freezes into an epic war tableau before fading out. Camera movement: Wide aerial establishing shot → smooth descending tracking shot → ground-level dynamic combat perspective → rapid cut to dragon dive sequence → slow-motion final wide cinematic freeze. Lighting: Dark storm lighting with intense lightning flashes. Orange-red fire glow from dragon breath. Cool blue and white magical energy from human forces. Strong volumetric fog, smoke layers, and cinematic contrast between fire and storm light. Environment details: Ultra-detailed dragon scales with molten glowing fissures, realistic wing physics generating wind shockwaves, human armor reflecting fire and lightning, particle-based fire, smoke, and ash simulation, dust turbulence reacting to movement, large-scale battlefield destruction effects. Voice-over (deep cinematic narration): “The skies burned with ancient fury.” “Dragons ruled the storm above.” “But beneath them stood humanity.” “Unyielding in the face of destruction.”

prompts.text: Seedance 2.0 text to video prompt REVERSED WATERFALL CHASE — 15-second continuous cinematic masterpiece 15 seconds, 16:9, no dialogue, one continuous high-speed chase through a monumental cliff city carved into wet stone. Sunset haze, warm sandstone, cool cyan engine glow, reflective rock, waterfall mist, 35mm realism. 0:00-0:02: Bird’s-eye aerial dive from high above the cliff city toward a tiny cyan speeder racing along a razor-thin ledge road. Waterfalls flow upward past the camera, mist rising into the sky. 0:02-0:04: Camera locks to the speeder side profile, then slingshots ahead and whips back toward the rear thrusters. Heat haze bends the air, grit tears off the ledge and floats upward. 0:04-0:07: A carved balcony collapses above; stone debris falls upward and sideways in broken gravity. The rider wall-hugs under a falling arch, sparks scraping the canyon wall. 0:07-0:10: The path narrows through hanging laundry, open windows, carved bridges, and upward-running water channels. Camera threads through the same gaps in one fluid motion. 0:10-0:13: Speeder exits the city throat onto an exposed outer bend. A reversed waterfall crosses the road like a vertical glass curtain, spray streaking across the lens. 0:13-0:15: Camera blasts outward into a wide reveal of a boundless valley where hundreds of waterfalls climb into the sunset, mist turning rainbow as the speeder becomes a tiny cyan streak. Locks: continuous chase energy, stable speeder design, no dialogue, no subtitles, no logos, no character close-up, no slow motion.

prompts.text: [0–4s] The woman descends gracefully into the ocean, arms extended, body streamlined. From the deep blue shadows on the right, the massive blue dolphin emerges slowly gliding with controlled , its tail moving in powerful, smooth arcs. Lighting: Bright volumetric sunrays cascade downward, illuminating her silhouette and revealing the dolphin’s form gradually. [4–8s] The camera aligns parallel to both as they swim side-by-side in perfect harmony. The woman gently extends her right hand, her fingers softly brushing the dolphin’s smooth, cool skin. Their movement is synchronized, calm, and unhurried—showcasing trust and connection. Lighting: Dappled sunlight ripples across the dolphin’s back and her shoulders, creating elegant, shifting patterns. [8–12s] The woman tucks slightly and performs a slow, fluid underwater spin. The blue dolphin responds playfully, curving its massive body into a graceful synchronized arc, almost mirroring her motion. Tiny air bubbles trail behind her, drifting upward naturally. Lighting: Caustic light patterns shift dynamically as both rotate through beams of sunlight, enhancing depth and motion. [12–15s] The woman and the dolphin stabilize and glide forward side-by-side into the vast ocean. Their figures gradually become smaller as they move toward the glowing blue horizon, dissolving into the serene abyss. Lighting: Strong backlighting from the open blue void creates cinematic silhouettes, with soft fading into darkness.

prompts.text: 0-3s: Wide anime-style establishing shot. A dark landscape under a massive glowing full moon. A grim reaper stands centered, cloaked in black with long flowing fabric. Wind moves the cloak gently. Ambient sound: low wind, distant echo. 3-6s: Camera slowly pushes in. Shadows begin to gather around the reaper’s feet, creeping like smoke. The reaper grips its scythe and begins to lift it. Subtle metallic sound as the weapon moves. 6-10s: Mid shot. The scythe is raised fully. Dark energy pulses outward in waves, distorting the air. The cloak whips more violently. Camera slightly orbits to create dynamic motion. Background sound builds with deep bass and whispering tones. 10-13s: Close-up shot under the hood. Two glowing eyes ignite in the darkness. Sudden burst of shadow particles expands outward. Camera shakes slightly for impact. 13-15s: Energy explosion peaks. Shadows flood the screen, engulfing everything. Audio hits a deep cinematic boom. Fade to black. Made in @runwayml 1080 P
