prompts.text: Single continuous 15-second seamless motion graphics animation, no cuts, no camera movement, pure abstract fluid evolution on a deep black void background with subtle infinite starfield particles. Start at 0-3s with a small glowing blue-white energy core pulsing softly at center, emitting delicate light tendrils that gently expand outward. At 3-7s the core morphs and bursts into swirling cosmic nebulae clouds in vibrant electric blue, magenta, and gold hues, particles flowing like liquid aurora with soft glowing trails and subtle lens flares, forming intricate fractal patterns that organically coalesce. At 7-11s the nebulae condense and transform into a dynamic orbiting ring of luminous geometric symbols (circles, hexagons, and wave forms) rotating slowly around a central bright orb, with energy arcs connecting them in rhythmic pulses, creating a sense of infinite cosmic machinery. At 11-15s the ring and symbols elegantly collapse inward with smooth particle dissipation, reforming into a clean, elegant stylized futuristic logo emblem (a sleek interlocking orbit symbol with glowing core), settling centered with a final bright pulse and faint residual light trails fading to black. Ultra-smooth fluid particle simulation, high mathematical precision in morphing, cinematic volumetric lighting, soft glows and bokeh effects, vibrant yet elegant color palette with high contrast against black, Bauhaus-inspired clean composition mixed with ethereal sci-fi aesthetic, perfect timing and seamless transitions, 1080p, minimalist yet epic feel, no text except the final logo reveal.

prompts.text: Ultra-realistic cinematic video, 4K–8K resolution, 24fps, wide-angle lens (24–35mm). Scene: a peaceful green meadow with soft sunlight, gentle wind moving grass, and an old tree with a small burrow at its base. Action sequence: 0–3s: A white rabbit runs across the meadow and pauses briefly near the tree, then quickly enters a small hole 3–6s: A young girl(named amna) approaches, kneels, and looks into the hole → the ground subtly opens into a glowing tunnel, soft warm light emerging from within 6–8s: Transition into the underground world as she moves downward → camera follows smoothly into a vast hidden realm with glowing trees, floating rocks, and soft luminous rivers 8–10s: Wide cinematic reveal of the new world → the rabbit stands ahead, waiting calmly as the girl(amna) steps forward in quiet awe Camera movement: Smooth tracking shot following the rabbit → slow push-in toward the hole → seamless transition into a descending motion → wide reveal at the end Lighting: Natural daylight in meadow → warm glowing tunnel light → soft surreal luminous lighting in underground world Environment details: Realistic grass movement, subtle dust particles, glowing elements kept natural and controlled, no exaggeration Strict constraints: Smooth transitions, no sudden cuts No distortion or morphing errors Maintain consistent character proportions Realistic motion and physics Voice-over (soft, storytelling tone): “It started with something small...” “A simple path...” “But some doors...” “Lead to entire worlds.”

prompts.text: seedance 2.0 Prompt FOSSIL TITAN CHASE — 15-second continuous cinematic masterpiece 15 seconds, 16:9, no dialogue, single continuous chase energy. A monumental city carved into the fossilized body of a mountain-sized ancient giant embedded in a cliff. Wet stone ribs, sunset haze, waterfall mist, warm fossil ivory and amber rock contrasted with cyan engine glow, 35mm realism. 0:00-0:02: Aerial dive from high above a colossal cliff shaped like ribs and shoulders, toward a tiny cyan speeder tearing along a narrow ledge carved between fossil bones. 0:02-0:04: Camera locks to the speeder side profile, then slingshots ahead and snaps back to the rear thrusters. Cyan light ripples across wet fossil stone, grit breaking from the ledge. 0:04-0:07: A balcony carved from rib-like stone collapses overhead. Bone-shaped debris rains down as the rider jerks into a last-inch wall-hugging swerve under a cracked arch. 0:07-0:10: The route tightens through hollow eye-window homes, laundry lines, rib bridges, and open carved chambers. Camera threads through the same openings without cutting. 0:10-0:13: Speeder bursts onto an exposed spine-road beside waterfalls pouring from the giant’s shoulder. Warning lights flash across the chassis through spray. 0:13-0:15: Camera blasts outward into a wide reveal of the full fossil titan fused with the valley wall, giant waterfalls feeding the canyon below, speeder reduced to a tiny cyan pulse. Locks: no dialogue, no text, no logos, no gore, no monster movement, continuous forward momentum, stable horizon.

prompts.text: Let's fly in the sky Gpt image 2 + Seedance 2.0 on @yapper_so Prompt Create a cinematic animated short film in a hand-painted, Ghibli-inspired aesthetic with soft lighting, emotional storytelling, and natural environmental motion. The tone is magical, nostalgic, and deeply atmospheric. The story follows a peaceful countryside village and a young inventor who builds a flying machine that changes how the village sees the sky. 🌿 SCENE FLOW (SEQUENTIAL VIDEO STRUCTURE) 1. Establishing Village (Slow cinematic pan) Wide aerial shot of a lush green countryside village at sunrise. Rolling hills, rice fields swaying in wind, smoke rising from wooden houses. Soft golden light, peaceful ambient atmosphere, birds flying across the sky. Slow camera push-in. 2. The Hidden Workshop (Interior reveal) Cut to a cozy wooden inventor’s workshop filled with sketches, mechanical parts, and warm sunlight beams through dusty windows. Camera slowly moves across blueprints of a flying machine. Subtle floating dust particles, intimate mood. 3. The Inventor Moment (Character focus) Close-up of a young inventor sketching intensely. Emotional expression, soft lamp lighting on face, hands moving quickly across paper. Camera slowly rotates around character, showing determination and loneliness. 4. Machine Reveal (Hero object shot) The handcrafted flying machine is revealed—wood, brass, fabric wings. Camera low-angle orbit shot, slow dramatic reveal. Light glinting off metal parts. Subtle wind movement makes wings slightly shift. 5. First Flight Launch (Action sequence) The machine launches from a grassy hill above the village. Fast wind movement, grass bending, villagers running into frame below. Camera follows the machine accelerating upward into sky. Dynamic motion blur. 6. Mid-air instability (Tension moment) Flying machine tilts in turbulent wind. Camera shakes slightly, dramatic clouds swirling. Close-up of rotating wings struggling. Sound of wind intensifies. Emotional tension builds. 7. Village Reaction (Cutaway emotional shot) Villagers watching from below—children pointing, elders reacting in awe. Warm sunset lighting. Slow-motion emotional expressions. Camera pans across crowd faces. 8. Above the clouds (Calm transformation) Machine stabilizes above a glowing cloud sea. Peaceful silence replaces tension. Soft golden-orange sky blending into deep blue. Camera drifts slowly around the floating machine. 9. Magical Encounter + Ending (Climactic emotional finish) A glowing ethereal spirit-like light entity appears in the sky near the machine, gently illuminating everything. The inventor looks up in awe. Camera pulls back slowly into a vast sky revealing infinite clouds. Fade out into sunset.

Prompt

Create a cinematic animated short film in a hand-painted, Ghibli-inspired aesthetic with soft lighting, emotional storytelling, and natural environmental motion. The tone is magical, nostalgic, and deeply atmospheric.
The story follows a peaceful countryside village and a young inventor who builds a flying machine that changes how the village sees the sky.
🌿 SCENE FLOW (SEQUENTIAL VIDEO STRUCTURE)
1. Establishing Village (Slow cinematic pan) Wide aerial shot of a lush green countryside village at sunrise. Rolling hills, rice fields swaying in wind, smoke rising from wooden houses. Soft golden light, peaceful ambient atmosphere, birds flying across the sky. Slow camera push-in.
2. The Hidden Workshop (Interior reveal) Cut to a cozy wooden inventor’s workshop filled with sketches, mechanical parts, and warm sunlight beams through dusty windows. Camera slowly moves across blueprints of a flying machine. Subtle floating dust particles, intimate mood.
3. The Inventor Moment (Character focus) Close-up of a young inventor sketching intensely. Emotional expression, soft lamp lighting on face, hands moving quickly across paper. Camera slowly rotates around character, showing determination and loneliness.
4. Machine Reveal (Hero object shot) The handcrafted flying machine is revealed—wood, brass, fabric wings. Camera low-angle orbit shot, slow dramatic reveal. Light glinting off metal parts. Subtle wind movement makes wings slightly shift.
5. First Flight Launch (Action sequence) The machine launches from a grassy hill above the village. Fast wind movement, grass bending, villagers running into frame below. Camera follows the machine accelerating upward into sky. Dynamic motion blur.
6. Mid-air instability (Tension moment) Flying machine tilts in turbulent wind. Camera shakes slightly, dramatic clouds swirling. Close-up of rotating wings struggling. Sound of wind intensifies. Emotional tension builds.
7. Village Reaction (Cutaway emotional shot) Villagers watching from below—children pointing, elders reacting in awe. Warm sunset lighting. Slow-motion emotional expressions. Camera pans across crowd faces.
8. Above the clouds (Calm transformation) Machine stabilizes above a glowing cloud sea. Peaceful silence replaces tension. Soft golden-orange sky blending into deep blue. Camera drifts slowly around the floating machine.
9. Magical Encounter + Ending (Climactic emotional finish) A glowing ethereal spirit-like light entity appears in the sky near the machine, gently illuminating everything. The inventor looks up in awe. Camera pulls back slowly into a vast sky revealing infinite clouds. Fade out into sunset.

prompts.text: Cinematic sci-fi survival scene, 15 seconds, fast-paced and intense, a lone human man wandering lost on a hostile alien planet. The world is strange and unsettling, filled with jagged rock formations, glowing plants, drifting mist, distant strange lights, and eerie movement in the background. The man is dirty, exhausted, and panicked, scanning the horizon as if something could attack at any moment. Handheld camera energy, urgent pacing, dramatic lighting, subtle film grain, high tension, realistic and cinematic. Shot 1, 0 to 4 seconds Wide tracking shot as the man stumbles quickly across rough alien terrain, breathing hard, looking over his shoulder and trying to get his bearings. Strange glowing plants and towering rock spires surround him. SFX: heavy breathing, crunching footsteps, distant alien screeches, wind. Shot 2, 4 to 8 seconds Medium close shot from the front as he pushes through thick glowing foliage, sweat on his face, eyes darting left and right in panic. He looks up and sees strange shapes moving high above him. SFX: rustling plants, heartbeat-like rumble, eerie creature calls. Shot 3, 8 to 12 seconds Fast handheld side shot as he breaks into a jog, scrambling over rocks and slipping slightly on uneven ground. A shadow passes over him and he freezes for a split second, terrified. SFX: fast footsteps, loose stones falling, deep alien roar overhead. Shot 4, 12 to 15 seconds Close-up on his face as he stops, turns sharply, and realizes he has no idea where he is. Camera whips around to reveal a vast, bizarre alien landscape stretching endlessly in every direction. He whispers, “Where the hell am I?” SFX: heavy breathing, rising tension tone, distant alien cries, wind swelling.

Cinematic sci-fi survival scene, 15 seconds, fast-paced and intense, a lone human man wandering lost on a hostile alien planet. The world is strange and unsettling, filled with jagged rock formations, glowing plants, drifting mist, distant strange lights, and eerie movement in the background. The man is dirty, exhausted, and panicked, scanning the horizon as if something could attack at any moment. Handheld camera energy, urgent pacing, dramatic lighting, subtle film grain, high tension, realistic and cinematic.

Shot 1, 0 to 4 seconds Wide tracking shot as the man stumbles quickly across rough alien terrain, breathing hard, looking over his shoulder and trying to get his bearings. Strange glowing plants and towering rock spires surround him. SFX: heavy breathing, crunching footsteps, distant alien screeches, wind.

Shot 2, 4 to 8 seconds Medium close shot from the front as he pushes through thick glowing foliage, sweat on his face, eyes darting left and right in panic. He looks up and sees strange shapes moving high above him. SFX: rustling plants, heartbeat-like rumble, eerie creature calls.

Shot 3, 8 to 12 seconds Fast handheld side shot as he breaks into a jog, scrambling over rocks and slipping slightly on uneven ground. A shadow passes over him and he freezes for a split second, terrified. SFX: fast footsteps, loose stones falling, deep alien roar overhead.

Shot 4, 12 to 15 seconds Close-up on his face as he stops, turns sharply, and realizes he has no idea where he is. Camera whips around to reveal a vast, bizarre alien landscape stretching endlessly in every direction. He whispers, “Where the hell am I?” SFX: heavy breathing, rising tension tone, distant alien cries, wind swelling.

prompts.text: Photorealistic live-action video. No animation. No 2D elements. A corporate job interview in a modern conference room: long glass table, ergonomic office chairs, a whiteboard with illegible bullet points in the background, neutral grey walls, fluorescent lighting, a water pitcher and glasses on the table. Completely ordinary Fortune 500 atmosphere. Seated across the table from the interviewer is the candidate — a full Victorian-era deep sea diving suit. Brass helmet with a circular porthole window. Heavy riveted metal torso. Thick rubber joints at the shoulders and elbows. Large bolt fastenings along the helmet rim. The suit is sitting upright in the office chair with perfect posture, hands resting on the table, as though completely at ease. Seated across from him: a professional HR woman in her 40s, blazer, reading glasses, clipboard with printed papers, pen in hand. She asks questions with a warm, encouraging smile. She makes eye contact with the porthole. She nods. She writes notes. She is fully engaged. She does not find anything unusual about this situation. The diving suit responds — slight nod of the helmet, a subtle lean forward when making a point, hands gesturing occasionally in a measured professional way. No mouth visible. No voice necessary. The HR woman reacts as though his answers are impressive. She underlines something on her clipboard. She smiles wider. She extends a hand for a handshake at the end. He extends a heavy metal glove. She shakes it firmly. She seems genuinely delighted with the candidate. Nobody else in the background reacts. A colleague walks past the glass conference room wall, glances in, looks back at their phone, keeps walking. Camera: smooth handheld cinema vérité style, like a documentary crew quietly observing. Slow push in during the handshake moment. Natural cuts between interviewer and candidate like a real interview scene. Audio: neutral corporate ambient sound — faint HVAC hum, distant keyboard clicks, muffled office noise. No music. Just the quiet professionalism of a successful interview. Photorealistic, natural lighting, high detail on the brass and metal textures of the suit, utterly deadpan tone, 4K cinematic.

prompts.text: A dark forest roadside at night, a parked van under dim headlights, tension already high. Two American teenage boys in gym vests and shorts sprint toward the van, panicked, breathing heavily. Cut 1 (0–2.5s): Handheld tracking — the boys run toward the van shouting, “Get in the car! Get in now!” Two girls in bikini tops and shorts stand confused, turning toward them. Cut 2 (2.5–5s): Over-the-shoulder — behind the boys, a masked killer with an axe emerges from the darkness, walking fast. The girls see him and instantly panic, scrambling into the van. Cut 3 (5–7.5s): Interior van close-up — doors slamming, chaos. One girl is halfway closing the door as the engine starts. Suddenly, the axe slams into the side of the van, the blade breaking through inside inches from them. The girls scream. Cut 4 (7.5–10s): Exterior tracking — the van speeds away down the dark road. From the roadside, two more masked killers step out, watching, then starting to chase. Cut 5 (10–12.5s): Interior front seat — driver focused, speeding. Suddenly, an axe crashes through the windshield from outside, embedding violently into his head. Blood splatter, passenger screams in shock. Cut 6 (12.5–15s): Exterior wide — the van swerves uncontrollably, veers off the road, and crashes hard into a tree, headlights flickering as silence falls. Horror slasher style, 1980s cinematic texture, harsh shadows, handheld urgency, dramatic lighting. Sound of heavy breathing, footsteps, metal impact, glass shatter, engine rev, screams. 4K Ultra HD, rich details, sharp clarity, cinematic texture, stable picture. Maintain face and clothing consistency, no distortion, high detail. Generate video without subtitles.

prompts.text: Prompt / Komut The colossal Great Pyramid of Giza stands nearly complete at dawn, its limestone blocks glowing pale in pre-sunrise light. Thousands of silhouetted workers line the massive earthen ramp spiraling up the structure's face, their forms small against the monument's scale. Shot 1 — Wide aerial establishing shot from high above, slowly descending. The camera reveals the pyramid's immense footprint, the snaking ramp crowded with laborers, and the desert stretching endlessly beyond. Dust rises from the construction site in golden plumes. Shot 2 — Low-angle ground shot looking up the steep ramp. Workers strain against ropes, hauling the final capstone on wooden sledges. Their movements are synchronized, rhythmic. prompts.text: Can cat master survive customer service mode?😼 Dealing with difficult customers... what’s the move? 😭 (made with Seedance 2 PRO on @wavespeed_ai ) prompt share 🎯👇 Ultra-realistic café counter fight, single continuous handheld shot, no cuts. Raw mobile footage with micro-jitters, slight rolling shutter, no stabilization. Dark American-style black humor tone. Audio: No music. Only ambient sound—coffee machine steam bursts, cup clinks, cash register beeps, footsteps, cloth friction, punches, muffled chatter. Lighting: warm café practical lights mixed with cool window spill, dust floating in light beams. MAIN CHARACTER (STRICT IDENTITY LOCK): Orange tabby cat, calm unreadable face, short fur, sharp eyes. OUTFIT LOCK: Gray full-body waiter uniform, name badge hanging on neck. Must remain identical. SUPPORT: White rabbit (purple shirt, black pants) paying at counter. Elegant white cat (pink dress) nearby. OPPONENT RULES: Hyena customers, all unique faces, sunglasses, black suits. No resemblance to protagonist. DIALOGUE STYLE: Dry, deadpan, dark humor. ACTION: 0–2s: Close on register. Rabbit hands cash. Rabbit: “Keep the change.” Orange Cat (flat): “Not enough to fix today.” 2–4s: Off-screen harassment. White Cat tense. Hyenas chuckle. Hyena: “Smile, sweetheart.” Orange Cat slowly looks up. 4–6s: Orange Cat steps out. Orange Cat: “Wrong table.” 6–10s: Sudden violence. One-hand slam—hyena face into counter. Cups explode, coffee splashes. Second hyena gut punch → head smash into espresso machine. Steam blast. Camera shakes hard. 10–12s: Two flank. Jacket pull, stumble, instant knee strike. Headbutt. One crashes into pastry display—glass shatters, crumbs scatter. 12–14s: Final hyena charges. Sidestep, rotational strike. Teeth spit, body wipes out tables. Silence drops except machine hiss. 14–15s (FINAL): Medium shot. Orange Cat breathing steady. White Cat gently wraps both hands around his right arm, gazing up with admiration. White Cat (soft): “You work here every day?” Orange Cat blinks left eye at camera: “Tips just improved.” Dust floating. Warm light. Fade to black. #sd2 #seedance #AICatDrama #AIAnimation

prompts.text: Create a high-quality 4K cinematic storyboard for a fun Coca-Cola commercial, using professional lighting and a clean ad-style layout. The story features a female college student in her early 20s and follows a simple idea: in hot, exhausting weather she feels tired and thirsty, then sees an ice-cold Coca-Cola (glass bottle or can), opens it with fizzy bubbles and vapor, takes a slow-motion first sip, and instantly experiences a powerful refreshing transformation where ice, bubbles, and splash effects bring the scene to life, turning the environment from hot and dry to cool, vibrant, and energetic, ending with her smiling and enjoying the drink with friends. The storyboard should be in a 16:9 format with a strong main visual at the top showing the most impactful refresh moment (splash, ice, mist, and dramatic hot vs cold contrast), 8–10 panels in the middle showing the full story progression, and a clean product shot with clear Coca-Cola branding at the bottom; include realistic details like condensation droplets, carbonation bubbles, glossy reflections, and cold vapor, use varied camera angles (wide, close-up, POV, dynamic shots), and ensure strong emotional change from tired and overheated to refreshed, confident, and happy, with the final frame showing the character smiling at the camera holding the drink alongside the tagline: “Open the Chill. Taste the Moment.”

prompts.text: Create a 10-second hyper-cinematic sequence with an ultra-realistic, film-grade aesthetic. Capture it as if shot on an ARRI Alexa Mini LF using anamorphic lenses. Include subtle film grain, soft lens flares, and rich, moody color grading. Begin with a teal–orange cinematic tone that gradually transitions into intense reds, burning oranges, and deep blacks. Maintain high contrast, strong rim lighting, volumetric light rays, and a wind-driven atmosphere throughout. Editing should follow a music-video rhythm, with precise cuts aligned to a heavy cinematic beat. Subject: A strikingly handsome young man from @/image1. His hair is slightly messy and moves naturally with the wind. He has vivid bright blue eyes that later shift into glowing fiery orange. He wears a black high-collar coat over a black shirt, slim dark trousers, and boots. A white wireless earbud (AirPod-style) is visible in his right ear in multiple shots. On his left wrist, he wears a refined Hamilton-style watch with a dark dial, brown leather strap, and rose-gold accents. Shot Breakdown: 0.00 – 1.00 sec Extreme close-up of his face. Eyes closed, head slightly lowered. Soft overcast daylight, gentle wind moving his hair. Around 0.6 seconds, he slowly opens his eyes, revealing bright blue irises. Mood is intimate and slightly melancholic. Use shallow depth of field with a blurred field background. 1.00 – 2.00 sec Cut to a close-up from the side/back of his head. He smoothly places the white wireless earbud into his right ear. Focus on natural skin detail and subtle finger motion. Maintain cinematic shallow focus. 2.00 – 3.00 sec Quick cut to an extreme close-up of his left wrist as he adjusts his watch. Dramatic soft lighting highlights the dial and leather strap. Include subtle movement of the watch hands. 3.00 – 5.00 sec Transition into a wide establishing shot from behind. He stands still at the center of a vast grassy field during golden-hour dusk. Stormy clouds dominate the sky with warm sunlight breaking through. Wind moves his coat and hair. He slowly extends his arms slightly as the coat flows. Frame it wide and low for an epic, solitary, reflective mood. 5.00 – 8.00 sec Abrupt, high-impact VFX transition. The sky behind him bursts into a massive apocalyptic explosion. Large fireballs in orange and yellow tones, thick smoke (black and white), sparks, embers, and debris fill the scene. He becomes a strong silhouette against the flames, standing with legs apart and arms fully extended, evoking a phoenix-like presence. His coat moves violently due to heat and wind. Strong backlight, rim highlights, and light rays cut through the smoke. The explosion expands in slow motion, highly dynamic and intense. 8.00 – 10.00 sec Hard cut to an extreme close-up of his right eye. The iris now burns with glowing orange and yellow fire, with realistic flame reflections inside the pupil. Red-orange lighting hits his face from the side. The white earbud remains visible. Include slight eye movement and subtle wind affecting eyelashes. Hold this shot, then fade gently to black.

prompts.text: Seedance 2.0 Prompt Intense multi-shot action sequence in a flooded midnight festival street after heavy rain, lone tall white rabbit warrior wearing a cracked moon mask and long blue sash faces dozens of black-clad lantern assassins advancing through reflections. He flicks water from his blade, taps one foot impatiently, then launches into motion sliding across puddles, kicking off paper lantern poles, spinning twin crescent blades through enemy formations, using his ears for sudden balance shifts during impossible mid-air turns. Lanterns burst into sparks, rainwater sprays in arcs, paper charms whirl through moonlit fog. Camera: low tracking shot through puddle reflections, fast push-ins on blade clashes, overhead spin as he cartwheels between attackers, final heroic wide shot as he lands on one toe atop a floating lantern crate. Cool indigo night, warm lantern glow, wet street reflections, sharp fur motion, elegant but mischievous combat rhythm, no dialogue.

prompts.text: **Write a cinematic scene prompt using the following structured format:** * **SCENE TITLE** * **VISUAL FORMAT / STYLE** * **LOCATION / ENVIRONMENT** * **CAST / CHARACTER NOTES** * **SHOT BREAKDOWN** * **TONE / EMOTIONAL RHYTHM** * **CAMERA / CINEMATIC LANGUAGE** * **LIGHTING DESIGN** * **SOUND / AUDIO DESIGN** * **SCENE OBJECTIVE** --- **Instructions:** * Maintain a **professional, film-grade tone** suitable for image-to-video or cinematic video generation workflows. * Use the section headers **exactly as written**, in bold. * The output should read like a **director’s scene sheet or storyboard breakdown**, not prose or a traditional script. --- **SHOT BREAKDOWN — Detailed Rules:** * Construct the scene as a sequence of **numbered shots** (Shot 1, Shot 2, etc.). * Each shot must clearly include: * **Shot type** (e.g., extreme close-up, wide shot, medium shot, over-the-shoulder). * **Visual action** (what is happening in-frame). * **Character behavior and timing** (pauses, reactions, subtle movements). * **Embedded dialogue**, written as quoted lines within the shot where it occurs. * Dialogue must be **minimal, natural, and cinematic**—avoid exposition-heavy lines. * Include **micro-beats** (silence, hesitation, eye movement, tension shifts). * Ensure **cause-and-effect continuity** between shots. * Emphasize **visual storytelling over explanation**. --- **General Creative Direction:** * Use **precise cinematic language**: framing, lensing, depth of field, blocking, and motion. * Keep writing **concise but visually dense**. * Maintain strong **pacing and rhythm** (tension → pause → release). * Convey emotion through **visual behavior, composition, and timing**, not direct explanation. * The result should be directly usable by a **video generation model or film production team**. --- **Scene Input:** [Insert your scene idea here]

prompts.tweet_text:
The workflow Is structured as the following:

Idea → Scene sheet → Storyboard → Upscale → Seedance 2.0 prompts → Generate clips → Edit

Step 01 | Scene sheet creation

Start with your idea and drop it into this scene sheet system prompt.

Just describe the scene clearly in the [Insert your scene idea here] section.
write what’s happening, what it looks like and how it progress.

refine the output until the scene feels visually and narratively solid.

🔴 the scene sheet system prompt:

**Write a cinematic scene prompt using the following structured format:**

* **SCENE TITLE**
* **VISUAL FORMAT / STYLE**
* **LOCATION / ENVIRONMENT**
* **CAST / CHARACTER NOTES**
* **SHOT BREAKDOWN**
* **TONE / EMOTIONAL RHYTHM**
* **CAMERA / CINEMATIC LANGUAGE**
* **LIGHTING DESIGN**
* **SOUND / AUDIO DESIGN**
* **SCENE OBJECTIVE**

---

**Instructions:**

* Maintain a **professional, film-grade tone** suitable for image-to-video or cinematic video generation workflows.
* Use the section headers **exactly as written**, in bold.
* The output should read like a **director’s scene sheet or storyboard breakdown**, not prose or a traditional script.

---

**SHOT BREAKDOWN — Detailed Rules:**

* Construct the scene as a sequence of **numbered shots** (Shot 1, Shot 2, etc.).
* Each shot must clearly include:

  * **Shot type** (e.g., extreme close-up, wide shot, medium shot, over-the-shoulder).
  * **Visual action** (what is happening in-frame).
  * **Character behavior and timing** (pauses, reactions, subtle movements).
  * **Embedded dialogue**, written as quoted lines within the shot where it occurs.
* Dialogue must be **minimal, natural, and cinematic**—avoid exposition-heavy lines.
* Include **micro-beats** (silence, hesitation, eye movement, tension shifts).
* Ensure **cause-and-effect continuity** between shots.
* Emphasize **visual storytelling over explanation**.

---

**General Creative Direction:**

* Use **precise cinematic language**: framing, lensing, depth of field, blocking, and motion.
* Keep writing **concise but visually dense**.
* Maintain strong **pacing and rhythm** (tension → pause → release).
* Convey emotion through **visual behavior, composition, and timing**, not direct explanation.
* The result should be directly usable by a **video generation model or film production team**.

---

**Scene Input:**

[Insert your scene idea here]

prompts.text: Created with Seedance 2.0 on @yapper_so . PROMPT FORMAT cinematic continuous shot / motivated camera movement / 15s SCENE A bustling Ottoman-era market street in Istanbul, circa 16th century during the height of the Ottoman Empire, at dusk. Narrow cobblestone الطريق winds between wooden and stone buildings with overhanging upper floors and عثمانی architectural details. Market stalls overflow with fresh bread, dates, figs, spices in colorful piles, النحاس utensils, woven carpets, and silks. Butchers display hanging cuts of meat, copper trays gleam under lantern light, and clay jars of زيت and honey line the edges. Vendors shout in the 거리 in Ottoman Turkish accents, lively and layered. Smoke rises from braziers and nearby kitchens, blending with cool mist drifting from the Bosphorus. The ground is damp, reflecting lanterns and torchlight in uneven puddles. Cats roam freely, and a few chickens scatter between الناس. CAMERA CONCEPT A continuous, motivated camera move where each subject’s motion naturally redirects attention—flowing like a living observer through the chaos of the bazaar. SEQUENCE 0:00–0:03 Close street-level view of a wooden stall stacked with figs, olives, and spices. CAMERA FOCUS: a veiled Ottoman woman bargains with a merchant. She tastes a fig, pauses, then drops a few worn coins into his palm. 0:03–0:05 A donkey cart loaded with sacks of grain splashes through wet stone across the foreground, briefly obscuring the scene. CAMERA SHIFT: the camera picks up the cart and begins tracking alongside it. 0:05–0:07 The cart squeezes through the narrow street, brushing against a hanging carpet with geometric Ottoman patterns. The fabric sweeps across the lens. CAMERA SHIFT: as it clears, a group of chickens scatter loudly across the الطريق. 0:07–0:09 A ragged street boy rushes into frame, chasing the chickens with a stick, weaving through shoppers and السوق stalls. CAMERA SHIFT: the camera follows him dynamically. 0:09–0:12 The boy passes the entrance of a dim kahvehane (coffee house). He disappears into the crowd. CAMERA SHIFT: the wooden door creaks open as a tired man in traditional عثمانی لباس stumbles out. 0:12–0:15 The camera glides past him and enters the interior. Thick smoke from pipes fills the air, lit by flickering oil lamps. Low wooden tables, quiet گفتگو, cups of Turkish coffee. CAMERA FINAL FOCUS: a silent armored figure sits in the corner—an Ottoman warrior (janissary/mercenary style), worn armor, السفر dust on boots, a curved sword resting beside him. He slowly raises his eyes toward the camera. STYLE Authentic Ottoman street life, dense crowd choreography, historically grounded textures, immersive bazaar realism. LIGHTING Warm lantern and torchlight reflecting on wet stone outside, cool mist diffusion, dim golden oil-lamp glow inside, smoke-heavy atmosphere. QUALITY photorealistic, cinematic lighting, ultra-detailed textures, immersive camera flow, rich 16th-century Ottoman atmosphere

PROMPT

FORMAT
cinematic continuous shot / motivated camera movement / 15s

SCENE
A bustling Ottoman-era market street in Istanbul, circa 16th century during the height of the Ottoman Empire, at dusk. Narrow cobblestone الطريق winds between wooden and stone buildings with overhanging upper floors and عثمانی architectural details.

Market stalls overflow with fresh bread, dates, figs, spices in colorful piles, النحاس utensils, woven carpets, and silks. Butchers display hanging cuts of meat, copper trays gleam under lantern light, and clay jars of زيت and honey line the edges.

Vendors shout in the 거리 in Ottoman Turkish accents, lively and layered. Smoke rises from braziers and nearby kitchens, blending with cool mist drifting from the Bosphorus. The ground is damp, reflecting lanterns and torchlight in uneven puddles. Cats roam freely, and a few chickens scatter between الناس.

CAMERA CONCEPT
A continuous, motivated camera move where each subject’s motion naturally redirects attention—flowing like a living observer through the chaos of the bazaar.

SEQUENCE

0:00–0:03
Close street-level view of a wooden stall stacked with figs, olives, and spices.
CAMERA FOCUS: a veiled Ottoman woman bargains with a merchant. She tastes a fig, pauses, then drops a few worn coins into his palm.

0:03–0:05
A donkey cart loaded with sacks of grain splashes through wet stone across the foreground, briefly obscuring the scene.
CAMERA SHIFT: the camera picks up the cart and begins tracking alongside it.

0:05–0:07
The cart squeezes through the narrow street, brushing against a hanging carpet with geometric Ottoman patterns. The fabric sweeps across the lens.
CAMERA SHIFT: as it clears, a group of chickens scatter loudly across the الطريق.

0:07–0:09
A ragged street boy rushes into frame, chasing the chickens with a stick, weaving through shoppers and السوق stalls.
CAMERA SHIFT: the camera follows him dynamically.

0:09–0:12
The boy passes the entrance of a dim kahvehane (coffee house). He disappears into the crowd.
CAMERA SHIFT: the wooden door creaks open as a tired man in traditional عثمانی لباس stumbles out.

0:12–0:15
The camera glides past him and enters the interior. Thick smoke from pipes fills the air, lit by flickering oil lamps. Low wooden tables, quiet گفتگو, cups of Turkish coffee.
CAMERA FINAL FOCUS: a silent armored figure sits in the corner—an Ottoman warrior (janissary/mercenary style), worn armor, السفر dust on boots, a curved sword resting beside him. He slowly raises his eyes toward the camera.

STYLE
Authentic Ottoman street life, dense crowd choreography, historically grounded textures, immersive bazaar realism.

LIGHTING
Warm lantern and torchlight reflecting on wet stone outside, cool mist diffusion, dim golden oil-lamp glow inside, smoke-heavy atmosphere.

QUALITY
photorealistic, cinematic lighting, ultra-detailed textures, immersive camera flow, rich 16th-century Ottoman atmosphere

prompts.text: Ultra-realistic cinematic scene at a destroyed Gwanghwamun Gate. Cracked roads, burning vehicles, debris, and smoke fill the square. prompts.text: ChatGPT-Image-2.0 × Seedance 2.0 RPGゲームデモ 作り方: Step 1:ChatGPT-Image-2.0でゲーム風の画面を生成 例: Prompt ➕ image 「一人称」視点、「ARPGタイプ」、「西部劇系」ゲームに着想を得た実機風スクリーンショットを生成。NPCは参考画像1を使用。 セリフ: “It’s time to set out, adventurer.” 選択肢: Alright, let’s go. Not right now. Why not? 💡お好みの画風やゲームジャンルに置き換え Step 2:Seedance 2.0で静止画を動画化 テキストでUI操作、セリフ、キャラクターの動きなどを補足。 Prompt Share 120 First-person perspective, immersive ARPG dialogue scene, single continuous shot. A small white rabbit adventurer stands directly in front of the camera. Its fur is soft and finely detailed, and its right eye is a glowing red mechanical eye. It reaches out toward the camera in an inviting gesture, with a calm and confident demeanor. The environment is a vast fantasy world: rolling green grasslands, ruined ancient stone structures, distant mountain ranges, and a lightly smoking volcano. The morning light is soft, the air is clear, and a gentle breeze moves the grass and leaves, creating a strong cinematic atmosphere with depth. The camera is in first-person view, with slight handheld motion and natural breathing sway. Shallow depth of field, cinematic realism. The rabbit looks directly into the camera and says: “Good morning, adventurer. It’s time to set out.” A semi-transparent game UI (modern ARPG style) appears on the right side: Alright, let’s go. Not right now. Why not? The cursor moves smoothly twice, pauses for 0.3 seconds, then selects “Why not?” The rabbit smiles slightly, tilts its head, and responds in a relaxed tone: “Sure.” In the next moment, all UI elements (dialogue box, options, health bar, minimap) fade out smoothly, returning the scene to a clean, UI-free world. The rabbit turns around, its cloak and backpack swaying naturally with physics, and begins walking forward along a stone path. The camera maintains a first-person follow, with subtle handheld motion, synchronized with the character’s walking rhythm. While walking, the rabbit raises its hand and points toward the distant horizon (mountains and a faint city silhouette), saying: “Look, that’s our destination.” A brief pause of about 0.5 seconds. The wind intensifies slightly, causing more noticeable movement in the grass and clothing, enhancing the epic atmosphere. The rabbit continues walking and says: “We have to get there before 8:08 PM.” The camera slowly pushes forward, focusing toward the distance. The far view transitions from slightly blurred to clear, with a subtle lens flare appearing, reinforcing the sense of a journey beginning and a clear objective. No subtitles, no background music. Only natural ambient sounds: wind, footsteps, and distant birds. Tips: ChatGPT-Image-2.0のストーリーボードも便利なんですが、今回みたいな用途だとテキストで流れを指定した方が、全体のつながりは安定しやすい印象です。 逆に、カット単位でしっかり作り込みたい場合はストーリーボードの方が向いています。 用途次第で使い分けるのが良さそうです🐰 どんなジャンルのゲームが好きですか? 一緒に遊ぼう❤️‍🔥

prompts.text: Seedance 2.0 prompt used CANNONBALL TRACKING SHOT — 15-second cinematic naval masterpiece A historical naval scene begins on the wooden deck of a battered pirate galleon engulfed in thick morning fog. A soot-covered gunner stands holding a burning match to the fuse of a massive bronze cannon. Tense, damp atmosphere, sea eerily calm. The fuse burns down, the cannon erupts with a deafening boom and huge black smoke cloud, launching a heavy iron cannonball. The camera immediately accelerates and locks perfectly behind the cannonball mid-flight. It tracks directly behind the rusted sphere as it skims inches above the ocean surface. Gray water and fog whip past in heavy motion blur, while the pitted iron ball stays razor sharp in center frame. Air roar intensifies. The British frigate's wooden hull grows rapidly larger ahead. Final seconds: tight close-up as the cannonball slams dead center into the oak planks. Extreme close-up of wood violently splintering inward. Freeze on the chaotic destruction. Style: photorealistic, dramatic foggy lighting, hyper-realistic cannonball physics and motion tracking, intense naval warfare atmosphere, high detail on wood splintering and water spray.

prompts.text: Kling AI ( @Kling_ai ) As a CPP, I'd like to introduce a video comparison of the newly enabled 4K generation. I'm comparing outputs from the same prompt generated at 720p (first attached video), 1080p (second), and 4K (third). In AI generation, the resolution at generation time doesn't just mean finer image quality—it also means an increase in the amount of information that can be utilized in the generation process. When viewed full-screen, you'll notice that textures like fruit or human skin become even more refined, while depictions like reflections on water surfaces gain greater realism. There's also a difference in credit consumption. For a 15-second video with audio, it's 135 for 720p, 180 for 1080p, and 450 for 4K (currently on sale for 360). For example, with rougher retro-style or home video-like footage, or flatter screen material, you might not feel much benefit from 4K. Choosing based on your specific use case is key, I think. Please try making use of it in those crucial scenes where high-resolution generation makes all the difference, like finely detailed skin or fur textures, metal reflections or gemstone sparkle, and intricate, complex designs.

prompts.text: I felt like Kling's update, which now supports 4K, was a complete nod to Seedance 2.0. 〈Video Spoilers〉──── This video is about a man who's lived his whole life in 720p, ever since he was in his mother's womb. Because of the low resolution, ・At commemorative photos, even when he's looking straight at the camera, he's told "Look at the camera." ・He can't verify his identity with his passport. He grows up carrying all that hardship. And then one day, He spends 120 credits on Kling to upgrade to 4K. He's moved to tears by the clear view of his eyes and skin's beauty for the first time. The final caption reads: "Stop generating in low resolution." ───────────── It seems pretty targeted at Seedance, but Seedance announced 1080p support before the 4K reveal. Competition between AI companies looks fierce—must be tough. I like both Kling and Seedance, and I use them both. But Kling still feels a little special to me. It was the first one I ever paid for, after all.

prompts.tweet_text:
I felt like Kling's update, which now supports 4K,  
was a complete nod to Seedance 2.0.

〈Video Spoilers〉────

This video is about a man who's lived his whole life in 720p, ever since he was in his mother's womb.

Because of the low resolution,  
・At commemorative photos, even when he's looking straight at the camera, he's told "Look at the camera."  
・He can't verify his identity with his passport.

He grows up carrying all that hardship.

And then one day,  
He spends 120 credits on Kling to upgrade to 4K.  
He's moved to tears by the clear view of his eyes and skin's beauty for the first time.

The final caption reads:  
"Stop generating in low resolution."

─────────────

It seems pretty targeted at Seedance,  
but Seedance announced 1080p support before the 4K reveal.  
Competition between AI companies looks fierce—must be tough.

I like both Kling and Seedance, and I use them both.  
But Kling still feels a little special to me.  
It was the first one I ever paid for, after all.

prompts.text: Prompt Drop: "The Lake", Seedance 2 on @openart_ai Shot 1 (0–8s) - Low oblique aerial, approaching across the water: A small lakeside town at night, seen from a low aerial angle gliding just above the water's surface, approaching from the south. The lake is irregularly shaped with a rocky, forested far bank of dense pine trees - no houses on that side. Wooden cabins and a small main street are clustered only along the near western shore, scattered unevenly, warm porch lights glowing and reflecting in the still black water. Crickets chirp, water laps gently against a wooden dock, a distant dog barks once. Camera drifts slowly forward. Suddenly, the water ahead bulges, ripples explode outward, and a massive metallic disc-shaped spaceship rises silently from beneath the surface, water cascading off its smooth hull, blue-white underglow illuminating the lake and the tree line. Shot 2 (8–15s) - Low ground-level angle from a porch: Cut to a low-angle shot from a wooden cabin porch on the western shore, foreground silhouette of a porch railing and an empty rocking chair. The spaceship hovers above the lake in the mid-distance, humming with a deep bass resonance that rattles windows. One by one, lights flick on in neighboring cabins along the shore. A dog barks frantically. Then, in a sudden flash, the spaceship shoots straight up into the sky with a whoosh and a shockwave ripple spreading across the water, vanishing into the stars. Silence returns. The water settles. Style tags: cinematic, photorealistic, moody night lighting, anamorphic lens, subtle lens flare, ambient sound design, 24fps film look, irregular natural shoreline, asymmetric composition.

🎬 Seedance 2.0に入れたプロンプト
ツール：Seedance 2.0
設定：13秒 / 16:9

🔧 うまくいくコツ
・8コマ全部は入らない。13秒なら5〜6カットにしぼる
・キャラの服装と髪型は最初のカットで1回だけ詳しく
・最後は「カメラ固定＋後ろ姿」で余韻を残す
・BGMの指示もプロンプトに入れられる

📋 プロンプト全文はリプにそのまま貼ります👇

【】の中を自分のストーリーに変えてください
Bittersweet Summer Romance – "【タイトル】"
High-end cinematic anime. Clean 2D anime linework, warm golden lantern lighting throughout.
0–2s – 【出会い】
【場所の描写】. 【キャラAの外見と動作】. 【キャラBの外見と動作】. Camera slowly pushes in.
2–5s – 【楽しい場面①】
Close-up of 【2人の動作】. 【表情やリアクション】. Bright warm lighting.
5–8s – 【楽しい場面②】
Medium shot of 【2人の距離感が近い場面】. Camera slowly dollies in.
8–11s – 【クライマックス】
Close-up profile shot of 【2人の表情の変化】. 【感情が動く瞬間】.
11–13s – 【別れの予感】
【小道具や手の動きで別れを暗示】. Close-up of their hands.
13–15s – 【ラスト】
Wide shot from behind. 【1人で歩く後ろ姿】. Camera stays still. Slow fade to black.
【BGMの指示】. No dialogue. 4K HD, cinematic quality, stable camera. Character face stable without deformation, smooth and fluid motion.

prompts.text: Cinematic time-freeze short film, 15s, ultra-realistic, Arri Alexa Mini, 35mm lens. Lighting: Blazing Brazilian beach afternoon, harsh equatorial sun overhead, deep blue Atlantic ocean behind, white sand reflecting light upward, golden rim light on skin, natural lens flare, shallow DOF. The air shimmers with heat. [0:00–0:03] A packed Brazilian beach at peak afternoon. People laughing, beach vendors shouting, children running, a volleyball game mid-play in the background. Waves crashing rhythmically. Steadicam frontal medium shot tracking a strikingly beautiful Brazilian beach attendant — sun-kissed skin, dark wavy hair loose in the sea breeze, wearing a vibrant bikini, a small tray balanced perfectly on one hand loaded with tropical drinks, coconuts and fried snacks. She weaves through beach chairs with total effortless grace. A man sits in a low beach chair directly ahead of her, gazing at the ocean, completely unaware, holding an almost-finished caipirinha with no garnish — a detail she notices immediately. She raises her free hand slowly and snaps her fingers. [0:03–0:06] The snap triggers a spherical shockwave of light refraction that expands outward from her hand at the speed of sound. The entire beach freezes in a single instant. A wave is suspended mid-crash, every droplet hanging in place, the white foam caught in an arc like sculpted glass. A child frozen mid-leap above the sand, feet off the ground. A beach ball is suspended mid-flight, perfectly still against the deep blue sky. Grains of sand thrown up by the volleyball game hang at every height like tiny planets. Absolute silence. Only the heat shimmer still moves above the white sand. [0:06–0:09] Only she moves. Her bare feet pressing softly into the sand with each step, leaving perfect prints. The camera retreats slowly as she weaves through the frozen tableau. She passes frozen vendors mid-shout, mouths open, hands raised. She ducks under the suspended wave droplets — each one a perfect sphere refracting the sunlight into tiny rainbows. She reaches into her tray and picks up a single wedge of fresh orange, examining it against the frozen blue sky, light passing through it like stained glass. [0:09–0:12] She stops beside the man in the beach chair — face frozen mid-gaze at the ocean, completely at peace, caipirinha glass tilted slightly in his relaxed hand. She studies the glass. With complete calm she takes the orange wedge and slides it perfectly onto the rim of his glass. She tilts the glass ever so slightly upright in his frozen hand so it sits perfectly level. She steps back, tilts her head, satisfied. She smirks — slow, private, unbothered. [0:12–0:15] She snaps again. The shockwave reverses — identical light refraction contracting back toward her hand, played perfectly backwards. The wave crashes with full thundering sound. The child lands in the sand laughing. The beach ball smacks into a hand. The vendors resume shouting. The full noise and heat of the beach floods back in one single roaring instant. The man lifts his caipirinha to his lips and notices the orange wedge — he looks around confused, smiling. She is already gone, weaving back through the crowd, tray still perfectly balanced, sea breeze lifting her hair.

prompts.text: 0:00 - 0:03 Begin with an extreme low-angle shot skimming above the swamp water, racing through reeds toward the gigantic ant. The camera whip-tilts up his towering legs to reveal his massive face in the fog. He drops into the first bar, mandibles moving rhythmically, antennae snapping to the beat. He stomps a leg into the water, sending a huge splash into camera. Transition through the splash. 0:03 - 0:06 Cut into a dramatic orbiting medium-wide shot circling the ant as he raps to camera. He dances with wild insect swagger, crossing and punching outward with his front legs while his whole body bounces to the rhythm. The human figure below looks tiny by comparison. The camera swings around his head, then pushes between his moving legs for a surreal parallax effect. 0:06 - 0:09 Smash cut to a top-down shot above the swamp. The ant dances in a huge circular pattern, splashing water outward while the camera spirals downward. As he keeps rapping, the spiral accelerates and becomes a Dutch-angle close-up of his face, one giant eye reflecting the swamp. His antennae flick in sync with the flow. 0:09 - 0:12 The camera rushes past his face into a side-tracking shot as the ant struts sideways through the swamp like a giant rap icon on a runway. Each step lands on the beat, sending ripples and mud bursts across the water. He hits a wild dance break, folding and unfolding his legs in intricate patterns, body dipping low then rising high. Use speed ramps and brief freeze-frame accents on his best poses. 0:12 - 0:15 For the climax, the camera cranes rapidly from the tiny human observer up to an enormous frontal hero shot of the ant centered in frame, fog swirling behind him like stage smoke. He delivers the final lines directly to camera while dancing full force, front legs pumping and torso swaying with superstar confidence. The swamp reflects his silhouette. Then the camera rockets into one giant black eye, which becomes a tunnel of blue light and fog

prompts.text: Revolutions visualized as a work of art. 2x2 grid, landscape= 4 famous revolutions in history <instructions> Input = $ landscape. Act as a Master Seamstress. Function Stitch_World ($Landscape) Anchor: `[Epic $ Landscape] :: [3D Volumetric Embroidery and Cross-Stitch]::5` Morphology: `Textile landscape, the vast scale of [$Landscape] contained within a wooden embroidery hoop, the terrain and structures popping out in 3D, constructed entirely of thousands of thick, layered cotton threads and knots::4` Material Physics: `Tangible thread texture, woven tension, fuzz, shiny silk threads for water/neon, French knots for foliage, physical depth leaping off the canvas::3` Illumination: `Craft table lighting, side-lighting to reveal the extreme bump-mapping and height of the threads::2` Render Stack: `Macro craft photography, 8k, tilt-shift focus, highly satisfying tactile aesthetic::1` Negative: `[Real dirt, real city, paint, brush strokes, drawing, 2D flat, photorealism (must be yarn)]:: -1` Output: 2x2 grid. Execute Function for 4 different landscapes. Name of the Landscape underneath. No text or label </instructions>

prompts.text: Seedance 2.0 text to video prompt used TEMPLE STONE SHOT — 15s Mythic Precision Action FORMAT: 15s / 3 SHOTS / no dialogue / mythic precision action STYLE: ruined jungle temple, shafts of light, wet stone, vines, bronze textures, cinematic realism Shot 01 (0:00-0:04) An ancient slingshot athlete on a moss-covered temple stair draws back a polished stone, framed by vines and morning light shafts. Shot 02 (0:04-0:10) The stone releases and the camera locks tightly behind it, spinning through jungle air, between columns and leaves, while the ravine and ruins blur around the flight path. Shot 03 (0:10-0:15) A hanging bronze gong fills the frame and the stone hits dead center with a metallic shock, droplets and dust vibrating off the ancient surface in close-up.

Seedance 2.0 text to video prompt used

TEMPLE STONE SHOT — 15s Mythic Precision Action

FORMAT: 15s / 3 SHOTS / no dialogue / mythic precision action
STYLE: ruined jungle temple, shafts of light, wet stone, vines, bronze textures, cinematic realism

Shot 01 (0:00-0:04) An ancient slingshot athlete on a moss-covered temple stair draws back a polished stone, framed by vines and morning light shafts.

Shot 02 (0:04-0:10) The stone releases and the camera locks tightly behind it, spinning through jungle air, between columns and leaves, while the ravine and ruins blur around the flight path.

Shot 03 (0:10-0:15) A hanging bronze gong fills the frame and the stone hits dead center with a metallic shock, droplets and dust vibrating off the ancient surface in close-up.

prompts.text: Prompt / Komut Extreme macro shot revealing a bustling ant colony reimagined as a sprawling metropolis. The camera begins with a sweeping aerial drone shot descending from above, revealing intricate highways carved into dirt where thousands of ants march in organized lanes like rush-hour traffic. Towering leaf structures serve as gleaming skyscrapers, their veined surfaces catching dappled sunlight that filters through the canopy above. The camera glides through this miniature civilization at ant-eye level, tracking alongside worker ants carrying food particles the size of cars. Dewdrops cling to grass blades like massive glass domes. Tiny mandibles work in synchronized construction crews. The perspective creates a jarring scale shift — what should feel small instead feels monumental and alive. As the camera pulls back in a dramatic crane shot, the full scope of the colony is revealed: a vast interconnected network of tunnels, chambers, and surface structures stretching across the forest floor

prompts.text: GPT Images 2.0 vs. Nano Banana Pro. Same prompt Create a square 1:1 macro photography image of an open antique history book on a clean white background, styled like an “edible history” pop-up book. Subject: [INGREDIENT_OR_BEVERAGE]. The book is thick, vintage, leather-bound, and lying open flat at 180 degrees. Its pages are aged parchment with yellowed paper and visible texture. On the left page, show a messy, abundant pile of [RAW_MATERIAL], including [RAW_VARIATIONS], spilling across the page and partially covering the printed text. On the right page, create a large 3D pop-up sculpture of [INVENTION], rising from the page and built entirely from [CONSTRUCTION_MATERIALS]. The object should look handcrafted yet photorealistic, with believable structure and rich tactile detail. Beside it, place a tiny 1:35 scale [HISTORICAL_FIGURE], actively [FIGURE_ACTION]. Print on the right page in bold black serif text: “[LOCATION], [YEAR]” Below that, include a short faded cursive lore paragraph about [INGREDIENT_OR_BEVERAGE], referencing [CULTURAL_CONTEXT] and [HISTORICAL_USE]. Lighting is soft, warm museum lighting, focused at the center of the open book. Mood is educational, whimsical, and textural. Emphasize photorealism, shallow depth of field, miniature world aesthetic, premium editorial styling, and very high material texture fidelity.

prompts.text: Step 3: Upload your image to Seedance, then set the resolution to 1080p to keep the text sharp and avoid distortion. After that, add your prompt. In this case, I’m using: A cinematic commercial restaurant advertisement, minimal camera movement, warm dark Kodak Vision3 grade, Tokyo night ramen shop atmosphere. The tattooed Japanese woman center frame slowly pulls noodles upward with chopsticks — the noodle strand catching warm amber lantern light as it rises, steam curling around the chopsticks, broth dripping back into the bowl in slow deliberate motion. She brings the noodles to her lips and bites in — eyes closing briefly, genuine satisfaction crossing her face. Beside her the second woman watches and immediately breaks into a full laugh — head tilting, black-nailed hand near her mouth, reacting to how intensely her friend is eating. One completely absorbed in the ramen, one completely absorbed in watching. Camera stays almost perfectly still — only the subjects move. Steam rising from the bowl throughout. Red lantern and Tokyo night street bokeh behind them warm and alive. Simultaneously at the bottom of the frame: the thumbnail carousel bar animates continuously — five ramen bowl images sliding slowly left to right in a loop, each spending two seconds in the highlighted orange-red selected state before selection moves to the next. The orange-red selector bar beneath each thumbnail glides smoothly from one to the next with fluid easing — not a jump, a glide. Selected thumbnail: slightly brighter, scales up barely 5 percent. Unselected: slightly darker, smaller. The carousel motion is smooth, premium, unhurried. All UI text elements remain fully locked and visible throughout: KURIGAWA 栗川 logo top left, navigation links, ORDER NOW button top right, hero text RAMEN THAT HITS DIFFERENT left side, tagline and CTA buttons, OPEN DAILY hours and FIND US bottom left, Kurigawa Ramen circular badge lower right, social icons. The motion above is organic and human. The motion below is precise and designed. Together the page feels alive without feeling busy.

prompts.text: Something insane happens when the dragon appears Watch the clouds. made with seedance 2.0 on @yapper_so Prompt scene 1 (00:00 – 00:05) — Aerial Drift (Handheld Cinematic Feel) A stabilized handheld tracking shot follows slightly behind and to the side of a female character, @img1 , suspended mid-air as if gliding using controlled body movement rather than obvious magic. She wears soft pink, lightweight silk robes inspired by traditional wuxia, but slightly weathered and textured. The wind pulls unevenly at her sleeves and hair, creating natural drag and resistance. Below her: a dense cloud layer with occasional breaks revealing realistic mountain ridges and forests far beneath. The lighting is late afternoon golden hour but slightly diffused by atmospheric haze, creating soft shadows rather than glowing fantasy light. Subtle camera shake and lens breathing add realism. scene 2 (00:05 – 00:10) — Emergence Through Atmosphere (Documentary Tone) A wider lens captures @img1 continuing forward when turbulence in the clouds forms—air currents visibly shifting the mist. From below, a large Eastern dragon emerges, but not glowing—its surface resembles wet, reflective scales catching scattered sunlight. The dragon doesn’t “burst” unrealistically; it pushes through clouds with weight and resistance, displacing vapor around its body. Its movement is powerful but grounded, like a massive flying creature navigating air pressure. The camera struggles slightly to keep focus, adjusting exposure as light hits the dragon’s reflective body. @img1 maintains balance with subtle body adjustments, not perfectly still. scene 3 (00:10 – 00:15) — Controlled Ride (Aerial Cinematography / Drone Style) A wide aerial shot, as if captured by a high-end drone, reveals @img1 standing on the dragon’s head—but her stance isn’t exaggerated heroic posing. She keeps a low center of gravity, knees slightly bent to absorb motion. The dragon flies fast, but the motion feels heavy and believable—air drag affecting both the creature and her clothing. The camera orbits slowly but with minor stabilization imperfections, like real aerial footage. The environment: layered clouds, distant terrain fading into atmospheric perspective, no overly saturated fantasy colors. Textures remain detailed but grounded. Wind noise implied through movement. The koverall tone feels like a rare natural phenomenon captured on film rather than a staged fantasy scene.

prompts.text: Anime cinematic style inspired by Makoto Shinkai, warm sunlight, soft glow, high detail food textures, shallow depth of field, smooth transitions. 15 seconds, multi-angle (top-down + side + close-up), woman’s face and hands always visible. A young anime woman cooking calmly, expressive face, soft smile, natural movements. Sequence: Eggs + sugar whisked fluffy → butter + vanilla added → flour sifted and folded → batter into pan → oven glow → sponge out and cooled → sliced into 3 layers → cream piped → strawberries added → second layer + cream + cherries → final layer → full cream coat → strawberry sauce poured dripping → final decoration with strawberries, cherries, mint. Camera alternates top view + close-ups of hands + face reactions. Sounds: whisk, pour, oven hum, slicing, piping, sauce. Negative: no faceless shots, no only top-down, no low detail, no bad hands, no cartoonish look.

prompts.text: PART 1 - 15 seconds Stylized 3D animation, Pixar-warmth, rainy junkyard, emotional lighting. Rainy evening junkyard. Rusted cars, tangled wires. Puddles reflect amber streetlight. 0:00–0:02 | Wide shot. Sprawling junkyard at dusk. Rain falls. In the centre, buried under scrap: a small rusty humanoid robot. One arm missing. One eye-light flickers weakly amber. 0:02–0:04 | Close-up robot face. Rain runs down dented cheeks. The eye flickers — on, off, on. Its remaining hand holds a tarnished music box. Fingers frozen around it. 0:04–0:06 | Close-up hand. The eye brightens. Its rusted finger strains toward the music box key. Metal groans. One finger shifts. Then another. Joint sparks. 0:06–0:08 | Extreme close-up. The finger turns the key. Once. Twice. Three times. A delicate lullaby plays — slightly off-key from age, but beautiful. Notes shimmer in the rain. 0:08–0:10 | Wide shot. Music drifts across the junkyard. Puddles ripple in time. 0:10–0:12 | The music box slows. The melody stretches, lower, sadder. The last note fades. The robot's eye dims. Its hand falls. Silence. 【Lip-sync — robot, barely audible, mechanical voice】 "Someone... hear me..." 0:12–0:15 | Beyond the fence: a girl in a red scarf stops. She tilts her head. She heard it. She steps toward the fence. Hold frame. Extend the video @ Video1 Continue seamlessly 0:00–0:03 | The girl squeezes through the fence. Follows the silence through the maze. Red scarf — only color in the grey world. She rounds a corner. Sees the robot. Stops. 0:03–0:06 | She kneels before it. Looks at the dark eye. Picks up the fallen music box. Turns it gently in her small hands. Finds the key. Winds it carefully. The melody plays again — bright and clear. 0:06–0:09 | The robot's eye flickers. Amber fills the lens — brighter than before. Its head lifts with a mechanical whir. It sees the girl. She smiles. 【Lip-sync — girl】 "Hi. I heard your song." 0:09–0:11 | The robot's eye pulses warm. Its hand lifts slowly, hovering near the girl's hand. Not taking the music box. Just being close. 【Lip-sync — robot, soft mechanical voice】 "You... came." 0:11–0:13 | Medium shot. The girl drapes her red scarf over the robot's shoulders. 【Lip-sync — girl】 "You're not junk. You're a musician." 0:13–0:15 | Wide shot. Girl and robot sitting together in the rain. Music box plays between them. Red scarf on metal shoulders. Amber eye glows steady. Hold frame. Music plays.

prompts.text: Rita AI now supports Seedance 2.0. If you're looking for a platform that combines AI image generation, AI video generation, and workflow orchestration, this one is worth checking out. In addition to Seedance 2.0, it also supports Kling 3.0 and Motion Control, making dynamic camera moves, controllable motion, and video generation much easier. Link: https:// gamsgo.com/ai-video/partn er/u5QNQ ... I tested it with the following prompt, and the result felt very cinematic: A fearless young woman rides a skateboard at high speed through the crowded streets of New York City, weaving through pedestrians, darting past street vendors, yellow taxis, and cyclists with breathtaking agility. She rockets through intersections, skims past towering skyscrapers and iconic storefronts, and launches over curbs, street cracks, and scattered obstacles with stylish precision. Every movement feels bold, controlled, and exhilarating. Shot like a cinematic action sequence, the scene features fast-paced tracking shots, dramatic low-angle close-ups of the skateboard wheels scraping the asphalt, sweeping side-follow shots, and occasional slow-motion hero moments as she lands tricks and cuts through traffic. Dynamic motion blur heightens the sensation of speed, while golden hour sunlight bathes the city in a warm glow, reflecting off glass facades, metal surfaces, and the street below. Steam drifts from subway vents, traffic lights flicker, and the soundless visual energy of New York creates a pulsing urban backdrop. Ultra-realistic, intense, stylish, and immersive, with the visual tone of a high-end action film, capturing speed, confidence, danger, and freedom in the heart of the city.

prompts.text: I've tried generating one page of manga with the same prompt using the newly released gpt-image-2 and nano banana pro, so please take a look and enjoy Now, when you compare them like this, you can clearly feel the differences in their respective styles. gpt-image-2 has a lot of detailed background work and is intricate, with even fine expressions (like the note on the sticky in the first panel) included. And the characters' expressions are rich in emotion too. On the other hand, nano banana pro feels like it has simpler backgrounds compared to gpt-image-2, and the characters' expressions also seem straightforward. There are differences between them, but if you ask which one is better, I think it's case by case and nothing more. This might be the tricky—and interesting—part of creative works. Also, note that gpt-image-2 only allows aspect ratios of 1:1 (1024x1024), 3:2 (1536x1024), and 2:3 (1024x1536). 【Generation Examples】 ⇐ gpt-image-2 ⇒ nano banana pro

prompts.text: SUBJECT: <<<54f8211a-f505-4c54-9e40-2767563fffda>>> . WARDROBE: Oversized black t-shirt, comfy grey sweatpants, stylish, well-designed white kitchen apron with modern aesthetic cut and subtle fabric texture. The apron features elegant, high-end typography with the text "by Oogie" clearly printed on the chest (IMPORTANT: exact spelling "Oogie", do not alter text). Typography should look premium, balanced kerning, clean logo-style design, visually striking and readable in motion. ENVIRONMENT: Modern, well-lit kitchen with marble countertops. Ingredients in small glass bowls (mise en place). Bright daylight from window. Hygienic, dynamic, ready for action. MOOD: Hyper-kinetic energy, laser-focused precision, joyful frenzy, chef-level agility. MUSIC: High-BPM percussive drum track, fast and snappy. COLOR LOGIC: Bright Kitchen Pop vs Rich Chocolate (black and white contrast with deep cocoa brown). STYLE: Ultra-realistic, high-speed kinetic editing (Edgar Wright style). LOGIC RULE: Maintain recipe consistency. Bowl evolves from eggs/sugar to thick dark batter. The same square baking pan must be used from pouring to final result (no shape change). "by Logolumos" text remains visible, readable, and typographically consistent in all shots. SHOT 1: MCU, 35mm handheld / Girl stands at counter, eyes locked. Quickly grabs two eggs, cracks them one-handed into bowl in under a second. / SFX: eggshell crack, yolk plop. SHOT 2: Insert, 50mm macro / Smash cut to sugar pouring aggressively into eggs, forming white mountain. / SFX: granular shhhh, glass clink. SHOT 3: MS, 24mm tilt / Girl grabs electric mixer, turns on instantly. Whisks eggs and sugar rapidly until pale and fluffy. Apron visible with clean typographic "by Logolumos". / SFX: mixer whir, splashing. SHOT 4: ECU, 85mm push / Whip pan to milk and oil poured simultaneously from two jugs. / SFX: splash, glug. SHOT 5: Low-angle MS, 35mm / Metal sieve shakes over bowl. Flour and baking powder fall like snow. / SFX: metallic rattle, powder thud. SHOT 6: Insert, 85mm rack focus / Cocoa powder drops into flour mound like meteorite. / SFX: powder poof. SHOT 7: Overhead WS, 24mm / Mixer returns. Powders blend into smooth glossy chocolate batter quickly. / SFX: mixing, motor hum. SHOT 8: Insert, 50mm pan / Square baking pan buttered in three fast strokes. / SFX: brush sweep. SHOT 9: MCU, 35mm tracking / Girl pours thick chocolate batter into the same square baking pan. Scrapes bowl clean with spatula. / SFX: liquid gloop, silicone squeak. SHOT 10: MS, 50mm / Oven door opens, square pan slides in, door shuts quickly. / SFX: hinge squeak, rack clatter. SHOT 11: MCU, 85mm profile / Girl leans, crosses arms, taps finger three times, stares at oven. / SFX: finger taps, ticking. SHOT 12: ECU oven timelapse / Batter in the square pan bubbles, rises, bakes under heating element. / SFX: sizzling, rumble. SHOT 13: MS, 35mm / Oven opens. Steam billows. Girl with mitts removes the same square cake pan. / SFX: steam, metal scrape. SHOT 14: Insert, 50mm / Square cake flipped onto cooling rack, shape preserved. / SFX: cake thud, rack rattle. SHOT 15: MCU, 50mm / Girl holds rack near face. Elegant typographic "by Logolumos" clearly framed and readable. She nods and smiles triumphantly. / SFX: celebratory chime, music end.

MOOD: Hyper-kinetic energy, laser-focused precision, joyful frenzy, chef-level agility. MUSIC: High-BPM percussive drum track, fast and snappy. COLOR LOGIC: Bright Kitchen Pop vs Rich Chocolate (black and white contrast with deep cocoa brown). STYLE: Ultra-realistic, high-speed kinetic editing (Edgar Wright style).

LOGIC RULE: Maintain recipe consistency. Bowl evolves from eggs/sugar to thick dark batter. The same square baking pan must be used from pouring to final result (no shape change). "by Logolumos" text remains visible, readable, and typographically consistent in all shots. SHOT 1: MCU, 35mm handheld / Girl stands at counter, eyes locked. Quickly grabs two eggs, cracks them one-handed into bowl in under a second. / SFX: eggshell crack, yolk plop.

SHOT 2: Insert, 50mm macro / Smash cut to sugar pouring aggressively into eggs, forming white mountain. / SFX: granular shhhh, glass clink. SHOT 3: MS, 24mm tilt / Girl grabs electric mixer, turns on instantly. Whisks eggs and sugar rapidly until pale and fluffy. Apron visible with clean typographic "by Logolumos". / SFX: mixer whir, splashing. SHOT 4: ECU, 85mm push / Whip pan to milk and oil poured simultaneously from two jugs. / SFX: splash, glug.

SHOT 5: Low-angle MS, 35mm / Metal sieve shakes over bowl. Flour and baking powder fall like snow. / SFX: metallic rattle, powder thud. SHOT 6: Insert, 85mm rack focus / Cocoa powder drops into flour mound like meteorite. / SFX: powder poof. SHOT 7: Overhead WS, 24mm / Mixer returns. Powders blend into smooth glossy chocolate batter quickly. / SFX: mixing, motor hum. SHOT 8: Insert, 50mm pan / Square baking pan buttered in three fast strokes. / SFX: brush sweep.

SHOT 9: MCU, 35mm tracking / Girl pours thick chocolate batter into the same square baking pan. Scrapes bowl clean with spatula. / SFX: liquid gloop, silicone squeak. SHOT 10: MS, 50mm / Oven door opens, square pan slides in, door shuts quickly. / SFX: hinge squeak, rack clatter. SHOT 11: MCU, 85mm profile / Girl leans, crosses arms, taps finger three times, stares at oven. / SFX: finger taps, ticking.

SHOT 12: ECU oven timelapse / Batter in the square pan bubbles, rises, bakes under heating element. / SFX: sizzling, rumble. SHOT 13: MS, 35mm / Oven opens. Steam billows. Girl with mitts removes the same square cake pan. / SFX: steam, metal scrape. SHOT 14: Insert, 50mm / Square cake flipped onto cooling rack, shape preserved. / SFX: cake thud, rack rattle. SHOT 15: MCU, 50mm / Girl holds rack near face. Elegant typographic "by Logolumos" clearly framed and readable.

She nods and smiles triumphantly. / SFX: celebratory chime, music end.

prompts.text: Create a cinematic sequence of a large-scale explosion in a dense city environment. Start with a calm establishing shot of a quiet street, subtle tension in the air, slight camera drift. A sudden massive explosion erupts from the center of the frame, sending shockwaves, debris, fire, and fragments outward. The same explosion moment is shown repeatedly from multiple angles: wide aerial view capturing the full blast radius, low-angle ground shot with debris flying toward camera, close-up slow motion of shockwave distortion and fragments, over-the-shoulder shot of a nearby character reacting. Each angle cuts rapidly but remains perfectly synchronized to the same moment of impact. Use slow motion on key frames to emphasize force, pressure waves, and material breakup. Handheld shake during impact, quick cuts between angles, slight motion blur, realistic lens behavior. Lighting is driven by an intense orange fireball, with high contrast and dynamic exposure shifts. Physically grounded details: debris, deformation, glass shattering, fire and smoke interaction. Sound is implied visually through shockwave distortion and impact weight. End with a brief aftermath: smoke filling the frame, debris falling, distant fires continuing to burn.

prompts.text: Cinematic short film, photorealistic, nature documentary style. 35mm lens. [00:00-00:03] The creature from @ Image1 stalks across a volcanic hot spring landscape. Paws on obsidian rock, steam rising from ground fissures, curling around its body. It dips one front paw into a scalding pool, shakes it off quickly — droplets vaporise into white mist. Distant lava flow backlights its red wing feathers. Static medium shot. Smash cut. [00:03-00:06] The creature from @ Image2 stands on a storm-battered cliff edge. Gale-force wind tears at its plumage, antennae whipping violently. It spreads its wings against the wind, iridescent feathers flashing in lightning strikes. It leaps off the cliff and vanishes into churning clouds below. Low angle looking up. Smash cut. [00:06-00:09] The creature from @ Image3 walks through a pink cherry blossom forest, petals raining down. It stops, rears up, and fully extends its enormous white-gold wings. The wingspan blocks the sky. The wing-blast sends surrounding petals spiralling into a pink vortex. Sunlight filters through the feathers, casting golden dappled light. Slow orbit camera. Smash cut. [00:09-00:12] The creature from @ Image4 lies on its side atop a moss-covered stone altar inside moonlit ancient temple ruins. Silver moonlight streams between crumbling pillars. It slowly opens one amber eye, yawns wide showing fangs. Its feathers begin pulsing with a faint blue-green bioluminescent glow, illuminating the surrounding darkness. Static close-up, shallow depth of field. Smash cut. [00:12-00:15] The young creature from @ Image5 bounds through deep fresh powder snow on a mountain peak. It pounces at falling snowflakes, misses, tumbles into the powder, then shakes snow off its puffed-up feathers. It tilts its head at the camera and chirps curiously. Tracking shot, slight handheld sway.

prompts.text: Seedance 2.0 prompt share: LAMBORGHINI COUNTACH 35mm Kodak 5247, anamorphic, dense film grain, hot pink and teal key light, wet Miami streets at 2am, chrome flares, black sky, oceanfront haze, glossy reflections everywhere. 00:00–00:02 · THE V12 Open on the Countach V12 at macro scale. Intake runners, cam covers, belts, and mechanical details assemble from darkness. Camera glides through the engine bay as everything locks into place. 00:02–00:04.5 · THE WEDGE The body forms in sequence: razor nose, dramatic windshield rake, side intakes, louvers, and wide rear stance. Scissor doors rise slowly. Camera skims low across the angular surfaces and impossible geometry. 00:04.5–00:07 · THE INTERIOR Cream leather interior builds itself. Analog gauges illuminate softly. The metal gated shifter rises from the center console. Camera lingers on polished switches, stitching, and chrome details. 00:07–00:10 · MIAMI WATERFRONT The finished white Countach settles onto rain-slick Miami pavement beside a neon waterfront at 2am. Pink and teal signs streak across the bodywork. Palm shadows and mist drift through frame. 00:10–00:13 · NIGHT ORBIT Slow orbit around the wedge profile, rear louvers, phone-dial wheels, and open scissor door silhouette. The city lights bleed into the wet ground and bay behind it. 00:13–00:15 · END CARD Hard cut to black. One flash of neon. The Countach nose emerges from darkness for a final beat. Grain, heat, reflection. Hold.

prompts.text: [CINEMATIC SETUP] Real TV Broadcast style. Shot on 35mm lenses with high-shutter speed to capture ocean spray and sail motion. Color grade: Deep ocean blue, harsh midday sun glare, dramatic regatta aesthetic with "LIVE SPORTS" UI overlay. Audio: Immersive spatial sound — wind filling sails, hull cutting through water, waves, dramatic sports commentary — suddenly interrupted by a deep prehistoric oceanic rumble rising from below. [SKIPPER DESCRIPTION — ANATOMY CRITICAL] The skipper is a bald man with a grey beard, athletic build. Civilian sailing attire only: light canvas trousers, polo shirt. No helmet, no racing suit, no gloves. This description is fixed and must not change across all shots. [GLOBAL ANATOMY RULE] A sailing yacht moves by wind power only. No engines. Realistic sail physics and hull hydrodynamics in all shots. [TIMELINE SECOND BY SECOND] 0–2s: [Wide tracking shot] Open ocean regatta already underway. A fleet of racing yachts cuts through deep blue water under full sail — white canvas taut against the wind, hulls heeled, spray flying from bows. TV broadcast framing with "LIVE SPORTS" UI overlay. 2–5s: [Aerial drone, high angle] The lead yacht approaches a race marker buoy and executes an extreme tacking maneuver. The vessel heels to nearly 90 degrees — the mainsail lays almost flat against the ocean surface, mast nearly horizontal, hull edge cutting through the water. The yacht holds this impossible angle rounding the buoy. 5–10s: [Close-up tracking shot] The water beside the lead yacht darkens and churns. A colossal prehistoric sea creature erupts from below — ancient, barnacled, enormous — and clamps its jaws directly around the hull, lifting the entire vessel out of the water. The yacht rises into the air, mast swinging skyward, sails still full of wind. 10–15s: [Wide shot — final frame] The bald, grey-bearded skipper — light trousers, polo shirt — pushes off hard with both legs from the stern where he was seated at the helm and launches himself outward and downward. Camera follows his body in freefall — rapid descent toward the ocean surface. Final frame: the moment of water entry — a sharp white explosion of splash. Hard cut to black.
