prompts.text: I wrote a system prompt a while back for complex video prompts. It wasn't great as Kling couldn't follow but Seedance 2.0 does. A katana-wielding manga vigilante clashes with a masked enforcer in a split-second rooftop duel, eyes locked as the first strike lands with a shockwave “impact frame” feel | Nighttime neon megacity rooftop with wet tar, puddle reflections, HVAC vents blasting steam, torn posters and loose paper whipping in wind, distant billboards and antenna arrays, subtle manga panel-gutter graphic wipes between cuts | Multi-shot sequence with dynamic cuts: Shot A (0.0–2.2s) Tight Close-Up; Handheld micro-jitter; 85mm Prime lens; whip-pan 25° into the draw | Shot B (2.2–5.2s) Wide hero vs villain silhouette; Crane-Up (~0.6m/s) then Track-Right (~0.8m/s); 24mm Anamorphic lens; parallax city depth | Shot C (5.2–7.0s) 100mm Macro on blade edge and eye reflection; Slow Dolly-In (~0.2m/s) for the finishing beat | Shot A: sword unsheathes with a sharp arc, paper debris slices past lens, match-cut on motion to Shot B | Shot B: mid-air crossing slash, exaggerated smear frames and speed-line trails, enemy staggers back 1.5m, camera shake on impact, steam turbulence curls around bodies | Shot C: blade stops 2cm from mask, eye blink and breath puff, a single rain droplet slides down metal as the city flickers behind | High-contrast anime lighting: cool moon Backlight (5600K) outlining hair and coats, magenta/cyan Practical neon Rim Light from billboards, warm red beacon accents, Volumetric steam haze catching highlights, light rain mist for texture | Manga-to-anime hybrid grade: punchy blacks, saturated neon primaries, crisp ink outlines, subtle screentone shading on midtones, controlled halation on signage, light film grain with mild chromatic aberration during whip-pans | 16:9 Aspect Ratio; 24fps (Cinematic) with sharp editorial smash-cuts; 4k resolution; 7 seconds duration; anime/manga stylization with clean linework and readable silhouettes

prompts.text: Prompt 0-3 sec: Aerial view of a dense cloud layer blanketing jagged mountain peaks. The clouds shift like slow ocean swells. A dark shape rises beneath the surface. 3-6 sec: The whale breaches. Water droplets are frozen in time, each droplet catching sunlight. The whale body is hyper realistic, skin textured with barnacles and scars. 6-9 sec: The whale reaches the apex of its arc. Its eye is visible, calm and ancient. From its tail, glowing stardust begins to trail, spiraling into the clouds below. 9-12 sec: The camera rotates around the whale as it descends. Stardust spreads outward, forming a shimmering nebula trail. Clouds part around the impact point. 12-15 sec: The whale disappears back into the clouds. A final burst of stardust rises like a reverse waterfall. The clouds settle. Silence. Fade to white. Sound: Deep low frequency call, slow motion water splash, crystalline shimmer, heartbeat, silence.

prompts.text: FORMAT: 15s / 140 BPM / 9 SHOTS / beat-synced cinematic trailer from the 3x3 storyboard grid STYLE: IMAX live action, dark amber palette, practical firelight and gold luminescence, photorealistic 8K. MOOD: Epic ancient combat, visceral tension, triumphant finale. MUSIC: Deep war drums, metallic percussion, rising orchestral brass. SHOT 1 (0:00-0:02): Wide establishing shot. Massive ancient colosseum at dusk, marble columns with gold circuit veins, torchlight flickering across the tiers, storm clouds above. Slow aerial push-in. SHOT 2 (0:02-0:03): Interior wide. Arena floor from the stands, thousands of spectators in torchlit shadow, amber firelight on wet marble. Camera glides forward. SHOT 3 (0:03-0:05): Close-up iron gate. Rusted ancient bars. Two glowing amber eyes emerge from darkness. Smoke curls through gaps. Camera pushes in slow. SHOT 4 (0:05-0:07): Medium shot. Gladiator in weathered bronze armor with gold circuit patterns enters the arena, marble shield raised, short sword drawn. Camera tracks alongside. SHOT 5 (0:07-0:09): Wide action. Massive mechanical lion with obsidian plating charges across the arena, fire erupting from its jaws, dust and sparks trailing. Camera sweeps low. SHOT 6 (0:09-0:10): Dynamic close-up. Shield blocks the lion attack, sparks explode where metal meets stone, gold circuits on armor flare bright. Camera shakes with impact. SHOT 7 (0:10-0:11): Low angle. Gladiator on one knee, battered, shield cracked, mechanical lion circling in dust and firelight behind him. Camera holds steady. SHOT 8 (0:11-0:13): The kill. Gladiator drives his sword upward through the lion jaw, blade glowing gold, mechanical parts shattering outward in slow motion. Camera tracks the upward thrust. SHOT 9 (0:13-0:15): Victory. Gladiator stands alone center arena, arm raised, gold circuit patterns pulse across the marble floor radiating outward. Camera pulls back wide.

prompts.tweet_text:
Step 2: Feed the grid to Seedance 2.0 I2V as the start frame.

Use the grid image as your start frame and describe each shot's motion, camera, and audio in your prompt. Seedance reads the grid, animates each panel in sequence, and generates a native soundtrack.

Prompt we used:

"FORMAT: 15s / 140 BPM / 9 SHOTS / beat-synced cinematic trailer from the 3x3 storyboard grid

STYLE: IMAX live action, dark amber palette, practical firelight and gold luminescence, photorealistic 8K.
MOOD: Epic ancient combat, visceral tension, triumphant finale.
MUSIC: Deep war drums, metallic percussion, rising orchestral brass.

SHOT 1 (0:00-0:02): Wide establishing shot. Massive ancient colosseum at dusk, marble columns with gold circuit veins, torchlight flickering across the tiers, storm clouds above. Slow aerial push-in.

SHOT 2 (0:02-0:03): Interior wide. Arena floor from the stands, thousands of spectators in torchlit shadow, amber firelight on wet marble. Camera glides forward.

SHOT 3 (0:03-0:05): Close-up iron gate. Rusted ancient bars. Two glowing amber eyes emerge from darkness. Smoke curls through gaps. Camera pushes in slow.

SHOT 4 (0:05-0:07): Medium shot. Gladiator in weathered bronze armor with gold circuit patterns enters the arena, marble shield raised, short sword drawn. Camera tracks alongside.

SHOT 5 (0:07-0:09): Wide action. Massive mechanical lion with obsidian plating charges across the arena, fire erupting from its jaws, dust and sparks trailing. Camera sweeps low.

SHOT 6 (0:09-0:10): Dynamic close-up. Shield blocks the lion attack, sparks explode where metal meets stone, gold circuits on armor flare bright. Camera shakes with impact.

SHOT 7 (0:10-0:11): Low angle. Gladiator on one knee, battered, shield cracked, mechanical lion circling in dust and firelight behind him. Camera holds steady.

SHOT 8 (0:11-0:13): The kill. Gladiator drives his sword upward through the lion jaw, blade glowing gold, mechanical parts shattering outward in slow motion. Camera tracks the upward thrust.

SHOT 9 (0:13-0:15): Victory. Gladiator stands alone center arena, arm raised, gold circuit patterns pulse across the marble floor radiating outward. Camera pulls back wide."

Note: Seedance 2.0 I2V sometimes generates the grid itself as the opening scene. If that happens, trim it with the Movie Editor in Venice Studio — or make the first two panels in your grid the same image if you need that shot as your opening frame.

prompts.text: Use @ Reference Image as the main character, keeping facial features, turban, and body proportions consistent throughout. He is a 25-year-old Punjabi Sikh man Cinematic time-freeze short film, 15 seconds, ultra-realistic, shot on Arri Alexa Mini, 35mm lens, Anamorphic flare, moody stadium interior lighting with floodlight beams cutting through, Kolkata Eden Gardens at night, volumetric haze from firecrackers and dust, dynamic hard shadows, shallow depth of field, teal and orange cinematic color grading. [0:00–0:03] A packed Eden Gardens stadium, time flowing normally. Steadicam frontal medium shot tracking him walking confidently through absolute chaos. On the giant blurred LED screens in the background, India has just hit the winning boundary — the World Cup is ours. 80,000 people are erupting in pure euphoria, tricolor flags waving, firecrackers bursting, confetti cannons firing. The crowd is jumping, hugging, screaming "India! India!" As he walks through the VIP aisle between the roaring stands, he raises his right hand and snaps his fingers. [0:03–0:06] At the snap, a subtle spherical shockwave bursts from his fingertips with visible air distortion and light refraction, expanding outward in slow motion. Everything freezes mid-explosion. Thick arcs of golden chai from a flying kulhad suspend in the air, with individual glistening droplets visible. Tricolor confetti and marigold petals float motionless. Firecracker smoke hangs in frozen swirling clouds. People are frozen mid-cheer and mid-air in leaping embraces, some with faces painted in saffron, white, and green. Stadium floodlights catch the suspended dust, smoke, and liquid. Absolute silence. [0:06–0:09] Only he moves. His leather kohlapuris echo slightly on the concrete steps. The camera tracks backward as he walks through the frozen celebration, observing calmly with a slight royal smirk. He casually ducks under an arc of frozen, splashing chai from a floating kulhad. He notices a cluster of floating marigold petals and confetti, reaches out with precision, and plucks a single marigold petal from the air. [0:09–0:11] He stops in front of a frozen teenage boy wearing a Virat Kohli jersey, his face locked in an ecstatic, tearful scream, arms raised for a high-five, tricolor flag frozen mid-wave. The main character tilts his head, gently adjusts the frozen boy's India cap, nods slightly with approval, and softly says: "perfect." [0:11–0:15] He turns, tosses the marigold petal into his mouth, and crunches it. He faces the camera directly, smirks with that signature GovindAI confidence, and snaps again. A stronger reverse shockwave restores motion instantly. The chai completes its splash, the "India! India!" roar thunderously returns, firecrackers resume bursting, and fans land their jumps. He walks away into the celebrating Kolkata crowd as the camera pushes through the wildly jumping, flag-waving Eden Gardens audience. Fade to black. Sound: deafening Eden Gardens roar "India! India!" / firecrackers / celebration → snap → deep shockwave bass drop → absolute silence → leather kohlapuri footsteps on concrete → sharp marigold petal crunch → "perfect" → snap → reverse shockwave whoosh → deafening Eden Gardens celebration returns with full chaos.

prompts.text: Cinematic dark fantasy. A young woman stands before a glowing ornate oval mirror in a Victorian vanity room. The old woman reflected inside is not her reflection — she presses her wrinkled hands to the glass and begins absorbing the young woman's youth. Golden luminous energy flows from the girl into the mirror. The old woman's face rapidly de-ages — wrinkles vanish, hair darkens, eyes brighten — as she smiles with cold satisfaction. The young woman's skin turns ashen, she staggers, then collapses to the floor in slow motion, perfume bottles scattering. Final frame: the now-young mirror woman's hand pressed against glass, smiling down at the fallen girl. Slow dolly in → orbit around mirror → crash zoom out on collapse → extreme close-up on glass hand. Shallow DOF, warm amber light, desaturating victim, 35mm cinematic grain.

prompts.text: A cinematic side-tracking shot of a young woman (same as reference image) riding a sleek modern motorbike through a vibrant city at dusk. She wears a fitted black leather jacket and matching leather pants, with subtle metallic accents. Her hair flows naturally in the wind as she rides at a steady, confident speed, not rushed, but purposeful. The camera moves smoothly alongside her in a lateral tracking shot, maintaining a medium profile angle that highlights both her expression and the bike’s motion. The background features blurred city lights, passing cars, neon reflections, and soft motion streaks, creating a strong sense of movement and depth. Lighting is cinematic, warm streetlights mixed with cool ambient tones, reflecting off the bike and wet pavement. Slight lens flares and bokeh enhance the atmosphere. The scene has shallow depth of field, with crisp focus on the rider and soft background blur. Her expression is calm, confident, slightly intense, like she’s on a mission. The environment feels alive but not chaotic. Ultra-realistic, cinematic color grading, smooth motion, high detail, film-like quality, 4K, anamorphic lens feel, subtle camera shake for realism.

prompts.text: Cinematic culinary documentary style, highly detailed, cozy warm-lit kitchen, rustic copper and ceramic cookware. Side, top-down, and macro camera angles alternating. Final reference: A steaming, majestic pot of authentic Chicken Biryani, featuring distinct long-grain basmati rice beautifully marbled with bright orange, saffron-yellow, and white hues, mixed with tender coated chicken, topped with crispy golden fried onions and fresh green mint. Aspect ratio 16:9. The chef is a beautiful woman in her 20s wearing a clean, elegant apron. Strict sequence: 0 to 3 seconds: Medium shot — The beautiful female chef gracefully tosses raw chicken pieces in a glass bowl with thick white yogurt and vibrant red spices. The camera pans slowly as a quick time-lapse seamlessly coats the meat. 3 to 6 seconds: Top-down camera — Sliced onions fry to a crispy golden brown in a wide, deep cooking pot. prompts.text: Always my cat 😆 Prompt 👇 SEEDANCE 15s Omni Reference, FALLEN ANGEL TUXEDO CAT / JAKARTA APOCALYPSE (TANDEM + BOUND RIDER) STYLE: hyper-realistic, IMAX cinematic, grounded physics, consistent characters, cat strictly quadruped (no humanoid) AUDIO: dark phonk ~100 BPM (instant start, hard drop at 0: 11) ASMR: wind howl, debris crackle, metal strain, dust hiss 0.00–0.02 Extreme wide → instant high-speed dive from sky. Camera drops fast toward ruined Jakarta. Patung Dirgantara (Pancoran) visible among multilayer flyovers, broken roads, dust storm sky. 0.02–0.04 Reveal SPORT BIKE speeding across fractured flyover near Pancoran. RIDER: tuxedo cat, black nose mark, front paws gripping handlebars, hind legs braced. PASSENGER: woman (reference), black leather jacket, gold dress, seated behind, low posture, holding rear seat. Hair and clothes whipping. 0.04–0.08 Ultra-low rear tracking, very fast. Aggressive turns: - deep lean - rear micro-slides - sparks scraping fairing Cat actively steering. Woman follows lean naturally. Background: flyover collapses, cars fall, concrete breaks. Pancoran statue flashes between structures. Dust shockwave chasing. 0.08–0.09 Quick close-up: cat eyes intense, whiskers vibrating, nose mark clear. Woman blurred behind. 0.09–0.11 Jump off broken edge → short slow motion. Wide: Pancoran silhouette + collapsing skyline. Audio dips (wind + distant collapse). 0.11–0.14 (DROP) Mid-air transformation (cat stays animal): dark energy veins, armor wraps along cat body (matte black + red cracks), large feathered wings burst open. Bike detaches and falls. Woman = BOUND RIDER: remains human, subtle dark aura, faint glowing eyes, energy tether linking to cat, hands shift gripping cat’s armored back, body aligns naturally (no glitch). Phonk beat SLAMS. 0.14–0.15 Wing snap → instant forward flight. Rear tracking, slight rise, dust shockwave. FINAL: Winged cat carrying passenger flies past Pancoran, Jakarta collapsing below. END

prompts.text: Fixed camera—no movement, full-length horizontal wide fixed angle, stable frame without shake. 3D doll-like miniature scene, macro photography, shallow depth of field, 8K ultra-high-definition image quality, delicate and moist texture, low-saturation neutral colors, overall soft diffused light with no harsh shadows, an urban yet warm and soothing atmosphere. No BGM throughout, only synchronized environmental sound playback. Completely continuous dynamic sequence: A portion of a miniature small forest catches fire, and 3D doll firefighters desperately engage in firefighting efforts. Then, a realistic adult-sized large hand enters the frame from above with a steady motion, slowly and evenly pouring water from a bucket onto the base of the flames. When the water hits, the flames extinguish in an instant, and a large amount of delicate white steam rises, spreading across the entire frame. Once the water pouring is complete, the hand slowly retraces the same path upward and fully exits the frame. Afterward, the firefighter dolls pause their movements once, looking up all at once in the direction the hand departed with puzzled expressions. Their faces quickly shift from surprise to joy, and they all raise their hands in unison, cheering loudly and making gestures as if expressing heartfelt gratitude. The emotional expressions are rich and vibrant, the overall image quality and texture remain consistently maintained, and the movements are smooth and uninterrupted.

【AI Video Generation Log】
Lately, I've been seeing a lot of those "saving the miniature country" type AI videos, and actually, they're surprisingly easy to make.
You can do it just by inputting text.
Generation Model:
Seedance 2 Fast (Video 1) — Points Consumed: 30
Seedance 2 (Video 2) — Points Consumed: 50

The basics are just splitting the prompt into two parts

① Fixed Prompt (Same Every Time)
Fixed camera, no movement, full scene horizontal wide-angle fixed shot, stable frame with no shake. 3D doll-style miniature scene, macro photography, shallow depth of field, 8K ultra-high-definition quality, delicate and moist texture, subdued neutral colors with low saturation, overall soft diffused lighting with no hard shadows, urban yet warm and soothing atmosphere. No BGM throughout, only synchronized ambient sound playback.
② Story Part (Freely Editable)
Just plug your own scene in here
(Example: Firefighter putting out a forest fire, giant hand pouring water, dolls expressing gratitude... etc.)

The prompt for this video is posted in the comments section.

prompts.text: hybrid live-action + 2D animation. prompts.text: Visual Composition: 16:9, 8k, hyper-realistic, masterpiece. A wide cinematic shot of a majestic medieval stone square. The perimeter is lined with massive limestone castle walls, crenelated battlements, and towering gothic spires that reach toward the heavens. The Titanic Dragon: An ancient, mountain-sized dragon dominates the frame, its scale so immense that its wingtips touch the castle towers on either side. Its obsidian scales shimmer with iridescent hues. The dragon’s head is lowered in a thunderous, frozen roar, eyes glowing like molten amber. It exerts a crushing physical presence, a literal titan of nature. The Knight & Divine Impact: In the square's center, a silver knight on a white charger is caught in a heroic low-angle profile. His lance is buried deep into the dragon's chest at the precise moment of impact. The knight's plate armor is a masterpiece of craftsmanship, reflecting the warm sunlight. Bullet Time & God Rays: Absolute freeze-frame. The camera performs a smooth, sweeping high-speed orbit (Bullet Time). The sky is a dramatic canvas of gold and teal, with brilliant volumetric God rays (Tyndall effect) streaming through the clouds and between the castle towers, illuminating the dust and the knight. The Rose Explosion: From the point of impact, a magnificent, radiating fountain of millions of velvet-red rose petals shatters outward, swirling in a perfect spiral. The petals are mixed with shimmering golden sparks and crystalline scale fragments, glowing in the sunlight like embers. Style: High-contrast cinematic lighting, vibrant but grounded colors, epic scale, fated confrontation, flawless textures of stone, metal, and dragon hide.

prompts.text: Ultra-realistic Indian classroom street fight. Single continuous shot, no cuts. Raw handheld mobile footage with natural micro-jitters, slight rolling shutter, no stabilization. Documentary realism. Audio: No music. Only raw ambient sound-footsteps, desk friction, cloth movement, punches, fan hum, breathing, distant classroom noise. Lighting: Mixed warm + cool cinematic tones. Practical classroom lighting. Moving ceiling fan shadows. Visible dust particles in light shafts. MAIN CHARACTER (STRICT IDENTITY LOCK): Indian male (17-18), cold emotionless face matching reference image exactly. Black straight side-swept hair, brown almond eyes, sharp jawline, natural Indian skin tone, slim face. OUTFIT LOCK (NO CHANGE): Black school blazer, white shirt, black tie, black pants. No hoodie/tayers. Slightly fitted blazer, loose tie. Must remain identical throughout OPPONENT RULES: All opponents have unique faces. No resemblance to protagonist. ACTION: 0-2s: Protagonist grabs Opponent A from behind one-hand head slam onto desk. Books/pencils burst outward. Desk drags with friction. A collapses limp. 2-5s: Grabs Opponent B punch to abdomen B folds immediate head slam into desk. Head pressed briefly to tiles. Camera stabilizes briefly. B falls face-down. Heavy breathing, visible sweat. 5-6s: Blazer shifts slightly, shirt + tie visible (tie displaced). C & D enter from back, split and flank. Only footsteps, fan hum. 6-8s: Chaotic fight. D attacks with rapid punches. Protagonist stumbles slightly. C grabs blazer, pulls back. Knee to abdomen. Body bends forward. Heavy breathing. Fan shadows moving. 8-10s: Headbutt to D D staggers. Protagonist grabs C collar efficiently. 10-12s (BOARD IMPACT): Protagonist drives C backward into green chalkboard. Back hits first, head snaps slightly. Chalk dust bursts outward, fully visible in warm light. Chalk tray rattles, pieces fall. Micro slow-motion (0.2-0.3s) at impact back to real-time. C loses tension, slides down leaving chalk smears, collapses. Dust drifts. 12-13s: D charges protagonist sidesteps rotational punch to cheekbone. Sweat arcs mid-air. D crashes into desks. Massive collapse, books scatter. D motionless, hand drops. Protagonist barely standing, heavy breathing. 13-14s: Medium-close. Chest rising. Slow turn to camera. Cold eye contact through glasses. Wipes blood from nose (visible smear). Removes glasses throws aside, spinning impact. 14-15s (FINAL): Ground-level wide shot. Slight edge blur, warm tone, golden dust. Protagonist without glasses removes blazer → throws onto opponent. White shirt + black tie only. Tie loose, slight movement. Walks to exit. Blazer settles. Silent classroom. Dust floating. Fade to black.

prompts.text: **Environment:** A frozen tundra under aurora-lit night skies. Pale green northern lights reflecting across a wide snowfield with icy winds sweeping snow particles across the ground. **Action:** 15.0s sequence. A giant silver arctic wolf charges across the snow while a rival black wolf emerges from the drifting snowstorm. The two wolves collide in a powerful clash, sliding across the icy surface. Velocity Ramp choreography: the moment their bodies collide freezes briefly as snow explodes around them before snapping back to full speed as they tumble across the frozen ground. **Camera:** Low tracking shot racing through blowing snow alongside the wolves, occasionally capturing the action reflected across icy surfaces. **Style & Constraints:** Photorealistic fur simulation, volumetric snow particles, aurora sky lighting, cinematic cold atmosphere, 35mm film grain, 8K. Made in @dreamina_ai #DreaminaCPP #DreaminaAI

prompts.text: Duration: 15 seconds. Cinematic style: Hollywood chase film inspired by Stuart Little, vibrant urban alley at dusk with golden hour lighting, dramatic shadows, motion blur, depth of field. [0-3s] Low-angle POV tracking shot from behind stylish white anthropomorphic mouse (red sweater, khaki pants, red sneakers, cheeky grin), sprinting forward playfully glancing back. [3-7s] Dynamic sweeping camera bank left-right at mouse height, mouse darts around crates squeezing through narrow gap; fluffy white cat bursts into frame hungrily leaping over obstacles in hot pursuit. [7-11s] Immersive over-the-shoulder chase cam accelerating with quick tilts and pans, cat swipes narrowly missing as mouse weaves through alley paths, fur ruffles in wind, paws pounding pavement. [11-15s] Epic wide shot pulling back for scale, tireless duo exits alley into street chaos, mouse ahead laughing victoriously, cat determined—fluid cinematic flow, high-energy physics, lens flares.

prompts.text: UGC & Social Media with seedance 2.0 - PART 2 Prompts given to see how it comes out Nothing specific- just general prompt what do you think? Sneaker hands‐on hook – an energetic man holds neon‐green sneakers close to the camera in a skatepark, rotates them, slides his foot in and stomps; shot at golden hour with a handheld iPhone. Kitchen discovery reaction – woman in sunlit kitchen opens a jar of chilli crisp, sniffs and tastes it; her eyes widen and she laughs while describing the flavor; handheld and natural. Mirror try‐on – young woman stands before a mirror trying on a cream linen shirt and jeans; she turns to show angles and tells viewers the size and brand; soft window light and no music. Coffee shop recommendation – a man at an outdoor café sips a flat white, speaks to his phone about life hacks and points to his notebook; blurred greenery and warm morning light make it cozy. Street interview – multi‐shot prompt where different people on a busy sidewalk shout quick testimonials about a platform; quick cuts, handheld iPhone footage and bright daylight create energy.

prompts.text: A realistic video of a woman signing "good morning" in American Sign Language (ASL). She is centered in frame, upper body visible (waist up), neutral background, soft natural lighting. She performs the correct ASL signs: 1) "GOOD" — right hand moves from chin outward, palm facing slightly upward. 2) "MORNING" — left arm horizontal representing horizon, right arm rises like the sun. Important: - Hands must be clearly visible at all times (no motion blur, no finger distortion). - Accurate finger positioning and natural movement speed. - Smooth transition between signs. - Natural facial expression (friendly, slight smile). - Eye gaze forward. Camera: - Static camera, medium shot. - 16:9 aspect ratio, high resolution. Style: - Photorealistic, not cartoon. - No subtitles, no text overlay.

prompts.tweet_text:
SEEDANCE 2.0 PROMPT 

[0-2s] A blonde/orange cat naps on the couch. The robot vacuum bumps into the couch leg. The cat looks down. Annoyed.
[2-4s] The cat drops a paw and pushes the vacuum away. It spins, recalculates, comes right back. Bumps the couch again.
[4-6s] The cat jumps down. Sits directly on top of it. The vacuum tries to move. Can't. Wheels spinning. Going nowhere.
[6-8s] The vacuum reverses hard. The cat slides off the back. Lands on its butt. Dignity gone.
[8-10s] The cat chases it. The vacuum dodges around a chair leg. Then another. The cat crashes into the chair.
[10-12s] The cat sits in the corner licking its paw pretending nothing happened. The vacuum bumps into it one more time. On purpose.

The cat stalks the vacuum across the room. Low. Predator mode. The vacuum is heading for the kitchen. 
In the kitchen, vacuum wants to get on the dock and cat knows it. The cat jumps down. Sits right in front of the dock. 
The vacuum tries left. The cat slides left. Tries right. The cat slides right. No way through.
a woman enters the kitchen and says "oh dear, it's running out of battery" and asks the cat to "get out of the way" so vacuum can enter dock. she places the vacuum and says "let him do his job"
Click. The vacuum docks. Light turns green. The cat looks at it with anger and throws a paw, the vacuum responds with a beep.

prompts.text: 👇 FPV drone perspective strict first-person point of view. The drone itself is never visible at any time: no body, no propellers, no shadows, no reflections, no silhouettes. Opening shot (immediate action no slow intro): The camera is already moving at high speed through tight, narrow backstreets of Hiroshima. Ultra-low altitude (just inches above ground), extremely dynamic FPV motion. The camera aggressively navigates: rapid left-right banking between wooden houses threading through very tight alleys with centimeter-level clearance sudden micro-adjustments and precise stabilization near-miss passes by walls, doors, and pedestrians No establishing shot, no pause instant immersion and velocity. Environment: fully traditional Japanese residential district wooden houses, sliding doors, paper screens, hanging laundry, bicycles, small storefronts. Fine details like dust particles and fabric movement are visible despite speed due to cinematic motion blur and focus shifts. Civilians in kimono and yukata move naturally through the փող streets. The camera weaves between them at speed, maintaining tight proximity. The camera bursts out of a narrow alley into a slightly wider փող, accelerates further, then performs a fast vertical climb along a wooden facade, revealing a broader skyline still calm. Sudden nuclear flash. Instant full-frame whiteout. Extreme overexposure. No warning. Exposure recovers. A massive shockwave forms a dense, fast-moving wall filled with debris and air distortion. Synchronized total destruction: The shockwave impacts with overwhelming force entire blocks collapse simultaneously: wooden structures implode and explode outward roofs are ripped off and disintegrate mid-air support beams snap instantly walls fragment into high-velocity debris windows shatter outward in expanding shock rings The destruction behaves as a continuous collapsing front sweeping across the city. The camera is violently hit mid-flight: heavy shake sudden roll and tilt loss of stability But FPV continuity remains no cuts. Air fills with debris, ash, splinters visibility rapidly decreases. Fires ignite instantly across structures, spreading rapidly. Civilians are instantly engulfed no lingering motion. The camera pushes forward through chaos: narrowly avoiding collapsing beams flying through dense airborne debris cutting through turbulent shockwave air A powerful thermal updraft pulls the camera upward. In the distance, a mushroom cloud rises rapidly, dominating the skyline. Lighting shifts: warm golden hour → harsh, desaturated, high-contrast tones glowing fires + deep shadows The camera ascends unsteadily, revealing: flattened buildings widespread fires thick smoke columns Ash density increases, visibility drops further. Ending: The camera drifts into a dark, smoke-filled sky. The massive mushroom cloud dominates the horizon as the scene fades into dense atmospheric haze. Style: Hyper-realistic, physically accurate nuclear blast simulation. Strict FPV POV (drone never visible). High-speed aggressive FPV navigation from first frame. Volumetric shockwave propagation with synchronized collapse. Dynamic exposure adaptation. Cinematic lens effects (chromatic aberration, bloom, distortion). Extreme motion blur during high-speed movement and impact. Ultra-detailed debris physics. HDR, 4K, shallow depth of field. Seamless continuous shot, no cuts. High-intensity pacing.

prompts.tweet_text:
Seedance 2.0 ile Hiroshima… kesintisiz FPV dehşeti.

6 Ağustos 1945 sabahı, şehir henüz uyanıyordu.
Sokaklar sakin, hayat olağandı.

Dar ara sokaklarda hızla ilerliyoruz…
insanların arasından, ahşap evlerin dibinden.

Bir an.
Göz kamaştıran bir ışık.

Her şey beyaza kesiyor.

Sonra…

Şok dalgası geliyor.
Ses değil bir duvar.

Evler aynı anda parçalanıyor.
Çatılar kopuyor, duvarlar savruluyor.
Şehir tek bir anda çöküyor.

Ateş her yeri sarıyor.
Hava küle, dumana dönüşüyor.

Kontrol yok. Kaçış yok.
Sadece ileri.

Yükseliyoruz… zorla.
Altımızda artık bir şehir yok.

Ufukta dev bir mantar bulutu yükseliyor.

Bu bir FPV uçuşu değil.
Bir anın, bir şehri yok edişi. 🔥

Prompt:
👇
FPV drone perspective strict first-person point of view. The drone itself is never visible at any time: no body, no propellers, no shadows, no reflections, no silhouettes.

Opening shot (immediate action no slow intro):
The camera is already moving at high speed through tight, narrow backstreets of Hiroshima. Ultra-low altitude (just inches above ground), extremely dynamic FPV motion.

The camera aggressively navigates:

rapid left-right banking between wooden houses
threading through very tight alleys with centimeter-level clearance
sudden micro-adjustments and precise stabilization
near-miss passes by walls, doors, and pedestrians

No establishing shot, no pause instant immersion and velocity.

Environment: fully traditional Japanese residential district wooden houses, sliding doors, paper screens, hanging laundry, bicycles, small storefronts. Fine details like dust particles and fabric movement are visible despite speed due to cinematic motion blur and focus shifts.

Civilians in kimono and yukata move naturally through the փող streets. The camera weaves between them at speed, maintaining tight proximity.

The camera bursts out of a narrow alley into a slightly wider փող, accelerates further, then performs a fast vertical climb along a wooden facade, revealing a broader skyline still calm.

Sudden nuclear flash.

Instant full-frame whiteout. Extreme overexposure. No warning.

Exposure recovers.

A massive shockwave forms a dense, fast-moving wall filled with debris and air distortion.

Synchronized total destruction:
The shockwave impacts with overwhelming force entire blocks collapse simultaneously:

wooden structures implode and explode outward
roofs are ripped off and disintegrate mid-air
support beams snap instantly
walls fragment into high-velocity debris
windows shatter outward in expanding shock rings

The destruction behaves as a continuous collapsing front sweeping across the city.

The camera is violently hit mid-flight:

heavy shake
sudden roll and tilt
loss of stability

But FPV continuity remains no cuts.

Air fills with debris, ash, splinters visibility rapidly decreases.

Fires ignite instantly across structures, spreading rapidly.

Civilians are instantly engulfed no lingering motion.

The camera pushes forward through chaos:

narrowly avoiding collapsing beams
flying through dense airborne debris
cutting through turbulent shockwave air

A powerful thermal updraft pulls the camera upward.

In the distance, a mushroom cloud rises rapidly, dominating the skyline.

Lighting shifts:

warm golden hour → harsh, desaturated, high-contrast tones
glowing fires + deep shadows

The camera ascends unsteadily, revealing:

flattened buildings
widespread fires
thick smoke columns

Ash density increases, visibility drops further.

Ending:
The camera drifts into a dark, smoke-filled sky. The massive mushroom cloud dominates the horizon as the scene fades into dense atmospheric haze.

Style:
Hyper-realistic, physically accurate nuclear blast simulation.
Strict FPV POV (drone never visible).
High-speed aggressive FPV navigation from first frame.
Volumetric shockwave propagation with synchronized collapse.
Dynamic exposure adaptation.
Cinematic lens effects (chromatic aberration, bloom, distortion).
Extreme motion blur during high-speed movement and impact.
Ultra-detailed debris physics.
HDR, 4K, shallow depth of field.
Seamless continuous shot, no cuts.
High-intensity pacing.

Cinematic 15-second historical landmark tour of the Alhambra Palace at sunrise composed of 15 rapid 1-second shots, each cut cleanly with smooth visual continuity, ultra-realistic Nasrid Palaces with intricate Moorish architecture, red-tinged fortress walls, muqarnas vaulting, arabesque tilework, and lush water gardens. Soft sunrise lighting with warm golden-pink hues reflecting on polished marble and ceramic surfaces, light morning mist enhancing depth, high-end documentary and heritage travel cinematography style, consistent across all shots.

Exact Shot List Sequence:
1. Aerial establishing shot of the entire Alhambra complex centered symmetrically on the hilltop with Generalife gardens and distant Sierra Nevada mountains at sunrise
2. Smooth forward glide through the Puerta de la Justicia gateway dramatically framing the Nasrid Palaces
3. Wide shot of the full palace complex with its towers, patios, and red fortress walls glowing in soft dawn light
4. Close-up of intricate muqarnas honeycomb vaulting and arabesque floral patterns with azulejo tile details
5. Slow tilt-up from the reflecting pool in the Court of the Myrtles capturing the perfect mirror reflection of the palace
6. Orbit shot around the Court of the Lions showcasing its famous fountain and symmetrical arcades
7. Close-up of Arabic calligraphy and geometric carvings engraved along an entrance arch
8. Side angle capturing the carved stucco walls changing tones with the rising sunlight
9. Tracking shot along the long water channel with bubbling fountains leading through the gardens
10. Ground-level shot emphasizing the towering height of a palace tower against the sky
11. Pan across the Generalife garden layout with lush greenery, pathways, and cascading water features
12. Golden sunlight rays illuminating the red and white façades with soft dramatic shadows
13. Elevated angle showing the city of Granada and the Albaicín quarter in the valley below
14. Transition as light intensifies, revealing fine marble and tile textures with subtle translucency
15. Final hero pull-back aerial shot revealing the full Alhambra Palace complex in perfect symmetry at sunrise

Visual & Motion Style: Fast cinematic cuts, smooth micro camera movements per shot (push, pan, slide, tilt, orbit), physically accurate sunrise lighting with soft atmospheric haze, ultra-realistic textures on stone, marble, tiles, and water with subtle reflections, detailed carvings and inlay work, soft shadows, no flicker, stable geometry, real-world motion blur, shallow depth of field where appropriate, HDR, ultra high definition, film-quality historical and heritage cinematography. Use 1-2 reference images of the Alhambra Palace for maximum visual consistency.

prompts.text: Grim Dark Seedance strikes again 👀 Note: Seedance follows prompts to the latter and creates a more cinematic vibe. Grok does a more 'liberal' interpretation, therefore things are added during run time. Quite fascinating to see how the same prompt produces different clips. Here ist the full prompt (10 second version, 16:9): A weathered Norse chieftain's iron-gauntleted fist grips the heavy ring of a castle door knocker, rain streaking down ancient oak grain. [0-3s]: Extreme macro in widescreen 16:9 composition, fist and weathered metal stretching horizontally across cinematic frame, UE5 nanite geometry rendering every pore and wood fiber in super crisp detail, 35mm heavy grain, high contrast lightning flash reflecting off polished armor across broad horizontal periphery. [3-7s]: Macro cut to eyes positioned in lower third of widescreen frame tilting upward through downpour, rain lashes scarred skin with ray-traced caustics, then rack focus across wide canvas to distant balcony in upper horizontal plane where an attractive queen with flowing brown hair and piercing blue eyes rests a jeweled hand on stone balustrade, her gaze locked downward—conflict between rough warrior and unreachable sovereignty framed by expansive castle architecture. [7-10s]: Extreme close-up composed for 16:9, gauntleted fist crossing chest in formal greeting with the blue-eyed queen visible in wide background balcony watching intently, eyes softening with respectful resolve as he bows his head toward her silhouette. Lumen global illumination on wet surfaces, subsurface scattering on rain-soaked skin, anamorphic lens flare and horizontal light streaks from torchlight, dramatic chiaroscuro shadows filling wide cinematic scope. avoid jitter, bent limbs, distorted faces, blurry motion, watermark, low-poly textures, oversaturation

prompts.text: Cinematic continuous single-take shot, IMAX film simulation, Panavision C-series 35mm lens, f/4, strong backlighting. heavy shadows, desaturated grey colors. The camera starts with a low-angle shot from behind a battle-worn warrior sitting motionless on a massive black warhorse on dark soil under a dull grey sky. He is wearing black warrior armor. The camera smoothly rises toward his right hand as he violently pulls the reins. The horse rears up, instantly triggering a dramatic bullet-time slow-motion effect. Black-red flames violently erupt from the horse, burning nearby alien insects to ash. The rider's face, mostly in shadow, undergoes a painful, raw transformation: his previously normal eyes ignite with a piercing white-gold flash, leaking thick black smoke. His right palm splits open, erupting with dark blood and twisting nerve-like fibers that solidify into a brutal halberd made of smoke and living tissue. The horse's body fractures with glowing red cracks, channeling lava-like energy up into the rider. Heavy, uneven black bio-mechanical armor pieces aggressively slam onto his body with bursts of red light and intense shockwaves, tearing away his worn clothes. A dark, organic-metal mask violently grows across his face, forming uneven, flickering compound eyes and flaming horns. As bullet time suddenly ends, the camera circles closely into fast-paced brutal combat. The rider aggressively thrusts and sweeps the halberd, impaling and shattering enemies with trails of black smoke and flames. The heavy warhorse spins and charges, crushing alien insects beneath its hooves. Suddenly, the violence ceases.

prompts.text: **Environment:** A vast stormy ocean at night. Thunderclouds swirl overhead while lightning flashes across towering waves. A naval fleet spreads across the water below. **Action:** 15.0s sequence from the POV of a colossal sea monster rising beneath the waves. The viewer moves through dark ocean water with bioluminescent currents swirling past. At the 2-second mark the monster breaches the surface. Warships appear above as massive tentacles crash across the decks. Ships fire weapons while waves explode around the creature. prompts.text: Three worlds, one rider, no limits, just momentum Created with seedance 2.0 on @yapper_so A cinematic multi-shot action sequence set across three extreme environments, featuring @img1 as the consistent main character with strict identity preservation and no facial drift. She is an energetic, confident woman performing high-speed extreme boarding with fluid, controlled movements. The sequence begins in a bright, sunlit park with lush greenery and a smooth concrete path, where she rides a skateboard at full speed and launches into a powerful ollie. At the peak of her jump, a massive glowing reality-crack tears open ahead, emitting sparks, light distortion, and glass-like fractures. She dives straight into it as the camera follows from behind, transitioning with a sharp whip-pan. Instantly, the environment shifts into a frozen snow world with vast white terrain and icy mountains. Mid-air, her skateboard seamlessly transforms into a snowboard with glowing particle energy, and she lands smoothly, carving down the slope at high speed with aggressive turns and jumps. Another glowing crack forms ahead, and she charges directly into it as the camera orbits dynamically and pushes in during impact. The final transition reveals a scorching desert with endless sand dunes under intense sunlight and visible heat haze. The snowboard morphs into a sandboard mid-motion, and she lands without losing speed, riding across dunes with explosive sand spray and aerial tricks. The camera pulls into a wide cinematic tracking shot with a dramatic crane movement, finishing with a subtle dolly zoom as she rides toward the glowing horizon. All transitions occur precisely at the moment of entering each portal, maintaining fast-paced cinematic cuts only, with ultra-realistic physics, detailed particle effects, smooth 60fps motion, and a high-energy, exhilarating tone throughout.

prompts.text: 0-3s: A showgirl in torn silk stockings and feathered headdress crouches behind the bar, clutching a satchel, eyes darting toward the back door. 3-7s: She makes a run for it across the sawdust floor, passing drunken cowboys who reach for her but miss by inches, her sequins catching the light like scattered diamonds. 7-12s: The bouncer in a brocade vest lunges from the shadows, she slides under his grasp on her knees, knocking over a whiskey tray that arcs through the air. 12-15s: She bursts through the back door into a rainy alley, breath visible in cold air, as the piano inside hits a dramatic final chord. Tracking shot following her movement, subtle handheld shake for urgency. Midnight blue and warm interior light contrast, rain-slicked cobblestones, gaslight halos, noir-Western hybrid aesthetic. 4K, determined expression stable, fluid motion, sequin detail preserved, atmospheric haze.

prompts.text: That's how I'm defeating my haters , they're running in their own jealousy 😂😂 Seedance 2.0 on @yapper_so Tutorial below Prompt Cinematic continuous single-take shot, IMAX film simulation, Panavision C-series 35mm lens, f/4, strong backlighting, heavy shadows, desaturated grey tones. Low-angle shot from behind a battle-worn Western female warrior sitting motionless on a massive black warhorse on dark soil under a dull grey sky. She wears damaged black armor, long blonde hair partially loose, strands moving in the wind. Camera slowly rises toward her right hand as she violently pulls the reins. The horse rears — instant bullet-time slow motion. Black-red flames erupt from the horse, incinerating surrounding alien insects into ash. Her face, mostly shadowed, begins a painful transformation — eyes ignite with piercing white-gold light, leaking thick black smoke. Her right palm splits open, dark blood spilling as twisting nerve-like fibers grow outward, forming a brutal halberd of smoke and living tissue. The horse’s body fractures with glowing red cracks, channeling lava-like energy into her. Heavy, jagged black bio-mechanical armor slams onto her body with bursts of red light and shockwaves, tearing away her worn clothes. A dark organic-metal mask violently grows over her face, forming uneven compound eyes and flaming horns. Bullet time snaps back to real speed. Camera circles tightly as she launches into brutal combat — aggressive halberd strikes, impaling and shattering enemies, trails of black smoke and fire. The warhorse spins and charges, crushing alien insects beneath its hooves. Suddenly — silence. Violence stops.

Bullet time snaps back to real speed.

Camera circles tightly as she launches into brutal combat — aggressive halberd strikes, impaling and shattering enemies, trails of black smoke and fire.

The warhorse spins and charges, crushing alien insects beneath its hooves.

Suddenly — silence. Violence stops.

prompts.text: 15-second one-take continuous tracking shot, cinematic handheld feel. Color grading, lighting tone, and overall ambience cold bluish-grey foggy atmosphere throughout the entire video. No background music, only diegetic sound effects: destruction debris, screams, car engine, metallic nano-tech transformation sounds, laser blast, and monster roar. 0–3s: Wide establishing shot of Bundaran HI roundabout in Jakarta. A giant monster referencing image3's creature design — green scaly skin, tentacle arms, yellow bulging eyes, massive gaping jaw — towers over the buildings, smashing skyscrapers with its tentacle arms. Debris and dust clouds fill the air. People and vehicles scatter in panic across the roundabout streets. Camera tracks forward through the chaos. 3–6s: Camera follows a beaten-up purple car speeding through the panicked crowd and screeching to a halt in the middle of the roundabout road. The car door swings open — image1's character (man in maroon t-shirt, glasses, backwards cap) steps out, looking up at the monster. A security guard (khaki uniform, brown pants, brown cap, utility belt) rushes toward him and shouts: "Kenapa baru muncul?!" The man smirks. 6–10s: image1's character places his right hand firmly on the purple car's hood. The car instantly disintegrates into swirling purple-black nano-tech particles, getting absorbed through his hand. The nano-particles rapidly spread from his arm across his entire body — his casual clothes dissolve as the nano-tech constructs piece by piece into the full mecha armor suit referencing image2's design: purple and dark blue armor plates, glowing blue wing units deploying from his back, glowing blue rabbit-ear antenna extending from the helmet, and a large weapon materializing in his right hand. Metallic clanking and high-tech assembly sound effects. 10–13s: Now fully armored, the character raises his heavy weapon, aims at the image3 monster towering above the buildings, and fires a massive blue laser beam. The beam hits the monster square in the chest — the monster roars in pain and is blasted backward, crashing through a building. Explosion debris and shockwave dust. 13–15s: The mecha suit helmet visor slides open, revealing image1's face — glasses still on, calm confident expression. He looks directly at the camera and says: "Mobil bututku sangat keren kan?" He turns and walks away from the camera toward the destruction, armor wings glowing. The security guard stands frozen in disbelief in the background. Style: Photorealistic VFX blockbuster quality, cinematic widescreen framing. Shallow depth of field during character close-ups. Cold desaturated blue-grey color palette. Dusty atmospheric haze. No score music — only raw ambient destruction sounds, dialogue, nano-tech whirring, laser blast, and monster roar.

prompts.text: Scene (Environment): An ordinary street-side ice cream shop. Subject (Characters): Image 1: From an initial indifferent/serious expression towards all customers, she dramatically transforms into an extremely cute and friendly smile towards the photographer. Action (Continuous Action): The video begins from the photographer's point of view (POV), showing two people in a queue with their backs visible in front. The penguin-shaped ice cream clerk (serious face) behind the counter makes two ordinary ice cream cones and hands them to the first two people. Clerk Image 1: She is relatively small and stands on the counter making ice cream. After receiving their ice cream, the first two people turn and leave the frame one after the other. The photographer (camera) moves forward to the counter, facing the penguin-shaped ice cream clerk. Clerk Image 1: Begins making the photographer's ice cream (an ordinary cone). Key Action: After finishing, she suddenly (but naturally) picks up a fresh, red strawberry and carefully places it on top of the ice cream, making it more special than before. She solemnly hands this tossed ice cream to the photographer (camera). The moment the photographer took the ice cream, she dramatically brought her face close to the lens. Her expression instantly vanished, transforming into a huge, rosy, squinting, adorable smile, accompanied by a wink. The camera zoomed in on her close-up face, the image slightly distorted by the fullness of her face. Camera Movement: Realistic handheld POV with slight walking shake and natural depth-of-field variation. Angle: Eye level, slightly lower (because she's the height of a chibi doll). Shot Type: Start: Medium shot (seeing the person in front and the counter). Close-up: Close-up (seeing the counter and the staff's full body). Close-up: Extreme close-up (the staff member's smiling face completely fills the frame). Key Point: When her face came close, the autofocus needed to respond quickly to keep her eyes sharp while introducing a slight wide-angle perspective distortion. Style: Warm, vibrant colors (the red of the strawberry contrasts with the white of the ice cream, and the gray and orange of the penguin costume). Texture: Realistic mobile vlog texture with slight graininess and an unprofessional feel. The 3D characters themselves retain their detailed vinyl doll texture, but are captured as real-world objects. #OpenArt #SeedanceShowdown #TeamOpenArtist

prompts.text: Seedance 2.0 video prompt THE SANDCASTLE Cinematic hyperlapse, 16:9, 15 seconds, photorealistic, beach golden-hour lighting, overhead and low-angle shots. [0:00–0:04] A man arrives at an empty beach at sunrise with a bucket, shovel, and inexplicable determination. Hyperlapse begins: he digs, packs, sculpts. The sun arcs overhead. What starts as a simple mound becomes a foundation. Then walls. Then towers. He's not building a sandcastle — he's building a sand FORTRESS. [0:04–0:08] The structure grows to absurd scale — six feet tall, twelve feet wide. Flying buttresses. A working drawbridge (made of popsicle sticks). A moat filled with actual seawater via a hand-dug canal. He sculpts individual sand bricks. He adds windows. He adds a flag (a napkin on a straw). Other beachgoers gather and watch in awe. He ignores them completely. [0:08–0:12] The final details. He carves a miniature throne room visible through the gate. He sculpts tiny sand soldiers on the battlements. He adds a sand dragon coiled around the tallest tower. He places seashells as decorative stonework. A crowd of 30 people is now watching, filming on their phones. prompts.text: Romantic drama. A handsome young gentleman and an elegant lady stand facing each other in the center of the room, tension thick in the air. The camera moves in with a slow, smooth medium shot as he looks straight into her eyes, breathing unsteadily and murmurs: “I wanted to tell you...”, he hesitates for a beat, fingers tightening around her hand, then suddenly snaps, half‐laughing at himself: “Oh, to hell with it,” and pulls her sharply into a passionate kiss. Cut to a close‐up: for a few seconds she responds to the kiss, hands clutching at his shoulders, eyes closed, overwhelmed — then her body slowly stiffens, she starts to pull away, breathing in short, broken breaths; she turns her head aside and, voice trembling but not loud, whispers: “Let me go.” He refuses to release her, one arm firm around her waist, the other holding her hand, pressing her closer, burying his face in her hair as he exhales against her ear, hoarse and desperate: “Don’t run from me.” Camera shifts into a tight close‐up on her face in profile: her eyes shining with unshed tears, a mix of pain, love and resolve. She gently but decisively pushes him away with both hands against his chest — one sharp, dignified gesture — breaks free and takes a half step back, then looks at him with a calm, steady gaze and says in a low, controlled voice, like a quiet verdict: “Too late.” There is no shout, only quiet heartbreak. She turns and walks away, her pace composed but quick, keeping her posture like a lady holding herself together. Final high‐angle wide shot: she moves across the glowing room toward the dark doorway, skirts softly flowing; for a brief side close‐up we see a single tear rolling slowly down her cheek, then we return to the wide shot as she disappears into shadow without looking back, while he remains alone in the center of the vast, golden room, shoulders slightly slumped, his figure small against the grand space, radiating a feeling of silent, devastating loss — no subtitles #OpenArt #SeedanceShowdown #TeamCPP
prompts.display_text: Romantic drama. A handsome young gentleman and an elegant lady stand facing each other in the center of the room, tension thick in the air. The camera moves in with a slow, smooth medium shot as he looks straight into her eyes, breathing unsteadily and murmurs: “I wanted to tell you...”, he hesitates for a beat, fingers tightening around her hand, then suddenly snaps, half‐laughing at himself: “Oh, to hell with it,” and pulls her sharply into a passionate kiss. Cut to a close‐up: for a few seconds she responds to the kiss, hands clutching at his shoulders, eyes closed, overwhelmed — then her body slowly stiffens, she starts to pull away, breathing in short, broken breaths; she turns her head aside and, voice trembling but not loud, whispers: “Let me go.” He refuses to release her, one arm firm around her waist, the other holding her hand, pressing her closer, burying his face in her hair as he exhales against her ear, hoarse and desperate: “Don’t run from me.” Camera shifts into a tight close‐up on her face in profile: her eyes shining with unshed tears, a mix of pain, love and resolve. She gently but decisively pushes him away with both hands against his chest — one sharp, dignified gesture — breaks free and takes a half step back, then looks at him with a calm, steady gaze and says in a low, controlled voice, like a quiet verdict: “Too late.” There is no shout, only quiet heartbreak. She turns and walks away, her pace composed but quick, keeping her posture like a lady holding herself together. Final high‐angle wide shot: she moves across the glowing room toward the dark doorway, skirts softly flowing; for a brief side close‐up we see a single tear rolling slowly down her cheek, then we return to the wide shot as she disappears into shadow without looking back, while he remains alone in the center of the vast, golden room, shoulders slightly slumped, his figure small against the grand space, radiating a feeling of silent, devastating loss — no subtitles
prompts.author: @Kiber_Alla

prompts.text: Prompt Studio: Out of Control, with Seedance 2.0 in @dreamina_ai , text to video Upscaled with @topazlabs Astra Starlight Precise 2.5 to 4k High-speed urban environment under extreme pressure. Hyper-realistic, grounded physics. The tone shifts from human tension to machine-level precision. Shot on 35mm anamorphic lens, f/2.8. Natural motion blur, realistic exposure, high dynamic range. Golden hour light cutting through dust, glass particles, and atmospheric haze. Subject: A skilled driver under intense stress. Fully human at the start, breathing, micro-errors, instability. Gradually transitions into passive role as control shifts to a system beyond them. Audio: starts organic (breath, friction, engine strain) → evolves into tight, mechanical, synchronized sound → ends in overwhelming environmental impact. 0–2s: Interior close-up. Hands gripping controls (steering wheel / throttle / harness). Micro-corrections, slight oversteer, imperfect rhythm. Breath audible. Stress visible. 2–4s: Rapid cuts: exterior tracking shot (speed established), side angle (environment rushing past), forward POV (danger ahead forming). Everything is still human-driven, slightly unstable. 4–6s: Wide shot, impossible situation ahead: blocked path, collapsing structure, incoming collision, or narrowing space. No clear solution. 6–8s: Back inside, the subject braces. Then controls shift subtly on their own. Movement becomes smoother... too smooth. Sound tightens. Breathing drops out of focus. 8–11s: Camera language changes: ultra-stable tracking shots, perfect alignment through space, impossible micro-adjustments at high speed. Multiple angles: top-down threading through obstacles, side pass with millimeter clearance, forward POV locking onto optimal path. The subject is no longer driving, just holding on. 11–13s: The system commits to a maneuver no human would attempt: threading through collapsing debris / crossing moving objects / cutting through a closing gap at full speed. Time feels compressed and precise. 13–15s: Massive physical consequence: debris explosion, chain reaction collisions, shockwave through environment. But the subject emerges through it cleanly. Final shot: interior close-up, subject still frozen, realizing they were not in control. Sound fades from mechanical precision back to raw breathing. Ultra-photorealistic 8K, cinematic HDR lighting, perfect motion continuity, physically accurate mass interaction, multi-angle coherence, no artifacts, grounded realism.

prompts.text: “Create a glamorous photoshoot in the style of Victoria's Secret. A young woman attached in the uploaded reference image ( Keep the face of the person 100% accurate from the reference image ) stands almost sideways, slightly bent forward, during the final preparation for the show. Makeup artists apply lipstick to her (only her hands are visible in the frame). She is wearing a corset decorated with beaded embroidery and crystals with a short fluffy skirt, as well as large feather wings. The image has a "backstage" effect. The background is a darkly lit room, probably under the podium. The main emphasis is on the girl's face and the details of her costume. Emphasize the expressiveness of the gaze and the luxurious look of the outfit. The photo is lit by a flash from the camera, which emphasizes the shine of the beads and crystals on the corset, as well as the girl's shiny skin. Victoria's Secret style: sensuality, luxury, glamour. Very detailed. Important: do not change the face.” Seedance2 Prompt: “【15-second Seedance 2.0】Victoria’s Secret Runway·Angel Entrance Character Lock: Young girl Idol Image 1 0-3s (Shot 1: Starting in the Dark) Scene: Deep composition, the teenage idol walks out from the depths of the pitch-black backstage, only her silhouette visible. She adjusts the straps of her massive feather wings, takes a deep breath, chest rising and falling. The crystals on her tight corset flash briefly under the emergency light. Camera: Steadicam following from behind, slight handheld shake, creating a documentary-style follow-shot feel. Lighting: Only a warm overhead work light illuminates the tips of her hair and the edges of the wings, her body hidden in darkness. 3-7s (Shot 2: Stepping Toward the Light) Scene: She begins to walk, accelerating from a slow pace to runway rhythm. The fluffy short skirt bounces with each step. The wings stir up fine dust, forming a stream of golden particles in the side backlight. Her face emerges from the shadows, eyes locked forward, the corners of her mouth rising into a confident Victoria’s Secret-style smile. Camera: Sideways tracking shot, keeping her in the golden ratio position of the frame as the background gradually brightens. Effects: Subtle physical trembling of the wing feathers, crisp hint of crystal beads colliding with each other. 7-12s (Shot 3: Flash Explosion) Scene: Dense camera flashes suddenly erupt ahead (simulating red carpet/photography area). She is instantly frozen by countless flashes. The crystal corset reflects starburst explosion effects, her skin showing glossy highlight texture. She lightly strokes the wing frame with one hand, the other hand swinging naturally, her gait seductive yet powerful. Camera: Slow-motion interspersed, capturing her continuous poses between flashes, occasionally pushing in slightly on her face. Lighting: High-contrast flash portrait style, each flash causing overexposed edges, creating a stop-motion animation-like rhythm. 12-15s (Shot 4: Stepping Into the Light) Scene: She steps into the pure white strong light at the stage entrance, her figure about to be swallowed by the light. She glances back at the camera (breaking the fourth wall). Glitter fragments hang on her eyelashes, feathers semi-transparent under the intense light. The background is the blurred cheering shadows of the audience seats. Camera: Rapid backward retreat, pulling from close-up to full shot. Her back view walking toward the light becomes smaller and smaller. Ending: The final shutter sound freezes on her glance-back moment, then the screen fades to white.”

prompts.text: Prompt for Seedance 2.0: A super macro close-up reveals the outsole of a high-performance running shoe pressed tightly against its dark surface. The camera slowly zooms in, sweeping across the rubber texture to reveal microscopic details—grip patterns, dust particles, and minute wear marks. Everything is still, yet it holds infinite possibilities. A faint, heartbeat-like low-pitched pulse begins. The shoe compresses slightly, and in that instant, the camera penetrates the sole (almost impossible in reality), reaching its internal structure. Inside, the layered cushioning system gradually expands in cross-section—foam units, air chambers, carbon plates, and support structures float in mid-air like a precision engineering feat. As the rhythm intensifies, each layer activates in turn: The foam compresses and rebounds with realistic elasticity; The air chambers pulse outward like shock absorbers; The carbon plates bend and rebound, storing energy. The camera follows this flow of energy, from heel to toe, moving forward as the force continues to transfer, revealing shimmering, dynamic lines that run throughout the entire structure. The movement accelerates, transforming into a powerful forward sprint, the camera bursting forth from the shoe's mesh upper. The shoe is now fully revealed, a runner stepping forward in it. The camera locks onto a lateral tracking lens, closely following the runner's forward sprint. Each landing triggers a visible energy pulse, flowing through the sole, enhancing performance and responsiveness. The upper stretches, the laces vibrate, and the shoe's lines are sleek and clean. The final moment: The runner takes a step, and in mid-air, the shoe perfectly separates from the foot, frozen in place. The camera slowly pans around, showcasing the shoe's silhouette, material transitions, and intricate design. The shoe lands softly, revealing the final product. The camera transitions from an 85mm macro lens to a 35mm tracking lens, the ultra-shallow depth of field gradually shifting to dynamic clarity, high-contrast lighting. Sound effects: deep impact sounds, elastic rebound sounds, rapid impact sounds, subtle material tension sounds, and the final landing sound.

[BROADCAST SETUP] Live TV sports broadcast signal, 1080i HD resolution, 50fps. Shot on professional ENG stadium cameras. Standard TV color balance with natural daylight. No color grading, no cinematic filters, no artificial post-processing. Real-world stadium acoustics and ambient light. Audio Style: Immersive spatial sound design. Loud stadium atmosphere, crowd roar, metallic clink of the hammer chain, stadium announcer muffled in the background, wind noise on the microphone. [TIMELINE SECOND BY SECOND] 0-4s: [Medium-wide broadcast shot] Swedish male athlete with long blonde hair and beard (viking-like) spinning rapidly in the hammer throw circle. Authentic Olympic uniform. Real-life physics and momentum. 4-7s: [Broadcast tracking shot] The athlete releases the giant hammer. The camera pans fast to follow the arc of the heavy metal ball flying through the air against the stadium sky. Realistic high-speed physics. 7-12s: [Wide stadium view] The hammer heads towards the lower stands at high speed. A grandmotherly woman in the front row reaches out and catches the giant hammer firmly with both hands. No slow motion, real-time broadcast speed. 12-15s: [Reaction shot] The surrounding crowd jumps up and applauds. The woman holds the hammer, looking at the camera. Authentic live TV cut to the crowd's genuine reaction. [QUALITY BOOSTERS] Photorealistic live footage, 1:1 sports broadcast physics, authentic Olympic stadium environment, sharp details on clothing and skin, natural motion blur from high-speed movement, stable facial features throughout the clip.

prompts.text: Another test with Seedance V2 Text to video with Omni extend on Dreamina. The people who love the details will find out all the problems, but remember, I did all of this from my phone without any extra tools. My observation: having image and audio references can solve the generic output. Seedance V2 lack emotional intelligence, agent's and human guide can solve this problem. handheld-stabilized romantic coverage, soft push-ins, natural close-ups, polished K-drama pacing" }, "scene_anchor": { "location": "night park date with food stalls, game booths, soft decorative bronze skin, expressive eyes, soft glamorous makeup, long styled hair, elegant trendy night-date outfit" } }, "visual_rules": { "relationship": "they are already a couple, relaxed, affectionate, prompts.text: INTENT: Create a high-converting, natural-feeling UGC ad for instant coffee. The character shares a relatable morning struggle and organically introduces the product as a simple, satisfying solution. Tone is warm, honest, conversational — not salesy. Focus on emotional payoff over features. FORMAT: Ultra-realistic cinematic UGC video, 15–18 seconds, 24fps, vertical 9:16 Natural daylight, Mumbai apartment setting, soft lifestyle aesthetic CHARACTER: A young Indian woman in her late 20s–early 30s, relaxed, at-home look, seated by a window. Comfortable, relatable, no heavy makeup, natural smile. SCENE FLOW (CONTINUOUS — NO HARD CUTS IN SCRIPT PHASE): DIALOGUE (timed natural pacing ~16s): (soft exhale, slight smile) “Okay... I used to think I needed one of those fancy coffee machines to feel awake in the morning.” (light chuckle, shakes head slightly) “But honestly, most days I just don’t have the time... and I’d either skip it, or end up with something really average.” (slight pause, looks at cup, tone shifts — more certain) “Then I tried this... and it just made things easier.” (natural hand gesture, casual tone) “It’s literally a spoon, hot water... and somehow it still tastes like proper coffee.” (smiles, relaxed payoff) “Now it’s the one thing I actually look forward to before starting my day.” PERFORMANCE NOTES: Dialogue must feel unscripted, slightly imperfect, natural pauses allowed No overacting, no “ad voice” Subtle micro-expressions: smile, small head nods, eye movement toward cup Keep rhythm conversational, not rushed AUDIO: Clean voice, close mic feel Soft ambient room tone (light city + distant birds) No background music overpowering voice Optional very light warm instrumental at <15% volume VISUAL RULES: Natural handheld feel or soft tripod (UGC authenticity) Shallow depth of field, subject in focus, background softly blurred Warm color grading, slightly golden morning tones No on-screen text No hard product push yet (product reveal comes in scene breakdown phase)

Try this prompt:

INTENT:
Create a high-converting, natural-feeling UGC ad for instant coffee. The character shares a relatable morning struggle and organically introduces the product as a simple, satisfying solution. Tone is warm, honest, conversational — not salesy. Focus on emotional payoff over features.

FORMAT:
Ultra-realistic cinematic UGC video, 15–18 seconds, 24fps, vertical 9:16
Natural daylight, Mumbai apartment setting, soft lifestyle aesthetic

CHARACTER:
A young Indian woman in her late 20s–early 30s, relaxed, at-home look, seated by a window. Comfortable, relatable, no heavy makeup, natural smile.

SCENE FLOW (CONTINUOUS — NO HARD CUTS IN SCRIPT PHASE):
DIALOGUE (timed natural pacing ~16s):

(soft exhale, slight smile)
“Okay… I used to think I needed one of those fancy coffee machines to feel awake in the morning.”

(light chuckle, shakes head slightly)
“But honestly, most days I just don’t have the time… and I’d either skip it, or end up with something really average.”

(slight pause, looks at cup, tone shifts — more certain)
“Then I tried this… and it just made things easier.”

(natural hand gesture, casual tone)
“It’s literally a spoon, hot water… and somehow it still tastes like proper coffee.”

(smiles, relaxed payoff)
“Now it’s the one thing I actually look forward to before starting my day.”

PERFORMANCE NOTES:
Dialogue must feel unscripted, slightly imperfect, natural pauses allowed
No overacting, no “ad voice”
Subtle micro-expressions: smile, small head nods, eye movement toward cup
Keep rhythm conversational, not rushed

AUDIO:
Clean voice, close mic feel
Soft ambient room tone (light city + distant birds)
No background music overpowering voice

Optional very light warm instrumental at <15% volume

VISUAL RULES:
Natural handheld feel or soft tripod (UGC authenticity)
Shallow depth of field, subject in focus, background softly blurred
Warm color grading, slightly golden morning tones

No on-screen text
No hard product push yet (product reveal comes in scene breakdown phase)

prompts.text: 0:00-0:02: Close-up of her face as she regains balance, then a quick wide shot. She looks up at a dark hatch. 0:02-0:05: Rapid jump-cuts: she crouches, then leaps with a powerful burst of energy through the ceiling opening. First-person view looking up, followed by a side view of her soaring through the gap. 0:05-0:07: She lands on a rainy skyscraper roof, the city neon reflecting in puddles. Cut to the vampire below, his face twisted in a grin, saying: "Where are you going, baby?" as he instantly begins to follow. 0:07-0:08 Extreme wide shot as she leaps across a narrow gap between buildings. 0:08-0:09 The pale vampire with fangs sprint-climbs a parallel wall with supernatural speed. 0:09-0:10 Cyborg woman: Parkour vault over an industrial HVAC unit, blue sparks arm scraping the surface. 0:10-0:11 Side-view tracking shot as the vampire performs a massive leap over a glowing neon billboard. 0:11-0:12 Low-angle reverse shot from her POV looking back: the vampire gains ground. 0:12-0:13 Dutch angle shot showing both running past the camera. 0:13-0:14 Handheld camera shot from the vampire's POV. 0:14-0:15 Final shot: she dive off a roof. Anatomical Integrity Rule: Strictly maintain all human-cyborg body proportions. Zero tolerance for limb stretching, facial melting, or anatomical mutations during extreme jumps and fast movements. Gritty cyberpunk, rainy night, cinematic motion blur, 8k. #OpenArt #SeedanceShowdown #TeamCPP

prompts.text: Using the uploaded reference image as the subject: (0–2.5s) A frantic, vibrating handheld tracking shot follows her as she sprints across a shattered bridge, wearing a pink hoodie. The footage speed-ramps from fast-forward into ultra slow motion. Behind her, a colossal leviathan—formed from bioluminescent water and jagged ice scales—surges forward. The camera violently jerks downward as she dodges flying rebar and chunks of concrete. (2.5–4s) The camera whip-pans 180 degrees, briefly overshooting her face before snapping into sharp focus. She skids, black sneakers carving trenches into wet asphalt. Speed ramps back to real-time chaos. She squares her stance—glowing crimson energy blasts erupt from her palms. Raindrops vaporize around her fists. (4–6s) The water leviathan unleashes a spiraling hydro-cannon. In extreme slow motion, the crimson laser collides with the roaring torrent. The camera flinches sideways. A sizzling shockwave erupts—scalding steam and boiling water splatter across the frame. The bridge fractures under the recoil. (6–8.5s) Speed ramps into a brutal back-and-forth barrage. The camera shakes in hurricane-force winds. The leviathan lashes out with a water tendril—she ducks, but a glancing blow spins her, visible agony on her face. The camera nearly loses track. She recovers, igniting hard-light energy wings. Her hoodie sleeves char black. (8.5–12s) The camera pushes through dense fog. She tucks her wings and launches straight into the leviathan’s chest. Time locks into slow motion at impact. A concentrated crimson hyper-laser channels through her right fist, driving into the creature’s glowing core. A concussive sonic boom warps the air—the leviathan detonates. (12–15s) The camera scrambles from the ground, tilting. The shockwave has flattened the monsoon rain. Millions of glowing bioluminescent droplets fall like embers. She lands on a floating slab of concrete—knees buckle, then lock upright. Her chest heaves. The scorched pink hoodie smolders.

prompts.text: How do Grok Imagine and Seedance 2 Fast handle Close-ups? Note: Grok Imagine goes for a more cinematic opening, whilst Seedance 2 captures emotions and vibe much better. Prompt (10 second version): A weathered Norse chieftain's scarred face fills the frame, eyes scanning beyond camera as his longship cuts through emerald waters toward sun-bleached shores. [0-3s]: Extreme close-up, UE5 nanite-detail on cracked skin and amber iris reflections, sweat beads in super crisp 35mm heavy grain texture. [3-7s]: Medium close-up tracking shot stepping onto golden Serkland dunes, metal greaves sinking into super-detailed individual sand grains, heat distortion waves, fingers brushing against blowing silk veils in high contrast harsh sunlight. [7-10s]: Intimate extreme close-up removing iron helmet, wind catching matted hair against backdrop of domed minarets, eyes squinting against foreign sun then widening with acceptance. Ray-traced caustics on skin, Lumen global illumination on sandstone, subsurface scattering, dramatic high contrast shadows, anamorphic lens characteristics. avoid jitter, bent limbs, distorted faces, blurry motion, watermark, low-poly textures, oversaturation

prompts.text: 16:9, 15-second ultra cinematic photoreal sequence, seamless 3-shot progression, no subtitles, no logos. Inside a vast abandoned opera house flooded with two inches of mirror-still water at blue hour, a lone ballerina in a black silk dress stands center stage. Shot 1: extreme macro from beneath the water as her pointe shoe touches down, sending silver droplets and concentric ripples across the surface; realistic refraction, delicate silk fibers, visible breath in the cold air. Shot 2: the camera rises through the water and performs a smooth 180-degree orbit around her as she spins; each footstep ignites bioluminescent constellations beneath the water, reflections perfectly synchronized, chandeliers above flicker awake one by one, dust floating in volumetric light. Shot 3: on the final accelerating spin, the chandeliers burst into hundreds of glowing crystal birds spiraling upward; the camera rockets backward through the broken roof to reveal the entire opera house floating alone in the center of a dark mirror-ocean at sunrise, clouds opening, golden rays piercing the mist, her tiny silhouette still spinning in the glowing stage at the center. Hyper-real water physics, natural skin texture, elegant cloth motion, subtle film grain, breathtaking scale, physically believable magic, premium cinematic lighting, emotionally overwhelming. Audio: begin with distant room tone, dripping water, and a faint inhale; precise splashes synced to each step; low orchestral swell building with the spin; crystal wing flutter overhead; final reverb dissolving into ocean silence.
