prompts.text: Ark Short Trailer video prompt Cinematic short film, visual effects composition. 15-second epic trailer, 10 shots. [0–1.5s] TITLE CARD: "BEFORE THE RAIN" — white text on black. Drone descent — golden hour, impossibly vast wooden ark on cracked dry plain. One weathered, bearded man drives a peg into the hull. His family works alone. No one else believes. [1.5–4s] THE GATHERING. Crane descent into tracking follow. Two lions lead a column of animals stretching to the horizon — elephants, giraffes, wolves beside deer, eagles overhead. Every species walking in impossible peace. Dust from a thousand hooves. White doves land on Noah's outstretched arm. VO: "They called him mad." [4–5.5s] Rapid macro inserts: elephant foot stepping on wooden ramp, foxes curling in a hay stall, Noah's bloody-knuckled hand slamming the door bolt shut. [5.5–8s] TITLE CARD: "THE SKY WEPT FOR FORTY DAYS." Time-lapse — sky turns from amber to bruised purple-black. Clouds spiral. Lightning strikes. Rain begins — not drops, sheets. Walls of water. Camera starts UNDERWATER — submerged trees, buildings. Cranes up, breaks surface. The ark FLOATS. The world is ocean. Waves the size of cathedrals. Lightning strobes. [8–10s] Interior ark, firelight. Noah against the hull. Animal sounds everywhere. Water rushes past hull slats. He prays. [10–13s] VO: "And on the hundred and fiftieth day..." ECU — white dove returns with olive branch. First break in clouds. Golden god ray pierces the deck like a spotlight from heaven. [13–15s] The ark on a mountaintop. Water receding. Ramp lowers. Animals POUR OUT — birds explode in murmuration, elephants lumber, deer sprint. Noah silhouetted against sunrise. Camera rises. A rainbow stretches horizon to horizon. TITLE: "THE ARK." Ultra-realistic.

prompts.text: @Image1 is the main character — maintain consistent facial features and body type throughout. Appears only once per frame, no duplicates. Cinematic time-freeze short film, 15 seconds, ultra-realistic, Arri Alexa Mini shooting texture, 50mm lens, natural daylight hard shadows, shallow depth of field. [0:00–0:03] Busy Alpine village street — wooden chalet shopfronts, cobblestone ground, dramatic mountain peaks visible at the end of the lane, clear blue sky. Steadicam front-facing medium shot tracking: the main character — a young man with dark hair, black-framed glasses, light stubble, silver chain necklace, wearing a loose printed short-sleeve shirt — walks confidently through the tourist crowd. Hikers with backpacks, shop signs, a postcard rack outside a souvenir store. A pigeon cuts across the sky above him. He raises both hands, interlaces his fingers, and snaps. [0:03–0:06] A powerful white spherical shockwave bursts outward from his hands, carrying visible air distortion and light refraction, spreading in all directions. Pedestrians freeze mid-stride. The pigeon locks mid-flight overhead. Most strikingly — a street juggler beside the postcard shop freezes with three apples suspended mid-arc in the air above him, hanging perfectly still against the blue sky. Postcards fly off the rack and hang frozen in the air. Absolute silence falls over the village. [0:06–0:09] Only his footsteps echo off the cobblestones. He strolls casually along the frozen street, glancing around with calm satisfaction. He passes the frozen pigeon overhead, pays it no mind. He slows as he approaches the postcard rack — reaches up and plucks one of the floating, suspended postcards out of mid-air, turns it over in his hand, looks at it briefly with a raised eyebrow. Sets it back. Keeps walking. [0:09–0:11] He stops directly in front of the frozen juggler — three apples hanging perfectly mid-arc above the man's outstretched hands. He tilts his head, studies the composition. A slow smile. He looks at the camera, gives a small nod, and whispers "perfect." [0:11–0:15] He turns back to face the street, interlaces his hands and snaps again — a second shockwave, stronger, bursts outward in reverse. Everything unfreezes instantly: the juggler catches his apples and continues seamlessly, postcards flutter back to the rack, the pigeon flaps away, hikers resume mid-conversation. City noise and mountain ambience rush back in. He calmly turns and walks toward the camera. Camera slowly rises and pulls back — his silhouette moves down the Alpine lane between the chalets. Fade to black. Sound design: Alpine village ambience → double snap → shockwave rumble radiating outward → absolute silence → lone footsteps on cobblestone → whispered "perfect" → second snap → reverse shockwave burst → village sounds and mountain wind naturally restored.

prompts.text: CAMERA: Full POV mount locked to the rider's eye line, as if the viewer IS the person on the coaster. No rider visible. No inset. The harness bars and the tops of hands gripping the lap bar may appear at the very bottom edge of frame for physicality and scale. SCENE: Lock the camera to a rigid first-person eye-line mount and never break the shot. Capture raw live ride footage with physical camera behavior and real-time force as one uninterrupted in-camera recording. Start in immediate action in a wide open fantasy sky zone as the coaster is already racing along an exposed cliffside rail toward a giant broken stone ring suspended between floating cliffs, then slam straight into a hard open-air drop. Rails, drops, loop, creatures, and scale read clearly from the rider's direct forward eye line. Wind blast, g-force compression, speed shake, vibration, and rattling hit the lens physically on every drop, bank, loop, corkscrew, and near miss so the viewer feels bodily inside the ride. Keep one continuous looped route as the coaster tears through the drop, hard bank, full vertical loop, and corkscrew, races past floating cliffs, broken arches, giant statues, storm light, dragon shadows, pterosaur-like creatures, and horned dinosaurs far below the rails, then hits a near miss as a huge dragon crosses directly over the track and throws firelight across the metal bars and the viewer's hands. Finish by climbing and curving back into the same open sky zone and same giant broken stone ring from the opening so the ending feels like the route is looping back to its own start point. MOOD: Breathless awe, danger, relentless speed. COLOR LOGIC: Naturalistic Film Print Emulation STYLE: Cinematic realism, immersive first-person action spectacle, epic fantasy pursuit

prompts.text: Use @ Reference Image as the main character, keeping facial features and body proportions consistent throughout. He is a 30-year-old man. Cinematic time-freeze short film, 15 seconds, ultra-realistic, shot on Arri Alexa Mini, 35mm lens, moody sports bar interior lighting with neon accents, volumetric haze, dynamic hard shadows, shallow depth of field. [0:00–0:03] A packed, dimly lit sports bar, time flowing normally. Steadicam frontal medium shot tracking him walking confidently through absolute chaos. On the blurred TVs in the background, the Yankees have just clinched the World Series. The crowd is erupting in pure euphoria. As he walks, he raises his right hand and snaps. [0:03–0:06] At the snap, a subtle spherical shockwave bursts from his fingertips with air distortion and light refraction, expanding outward. Everything freezes mid-explosion. Thick arcs of golden beer suspend in the air, with individual glistening droplets visible. Popcorn kernels float motionless. People are frozen mid-cheer and mid-air in leaping embraces. Volumetric neon light catches the suspended dust and liquid. Absolute silence. [0:06–0:09] Only he moves. His footsteps echo slightly. The camera moves backward as he walks through the frozen celebration, observing calmly. He casually ducks under an arc of frozen, splashing beer. He notices a cluster of floating popcorn, reaches out, and plucks a single kernel from the air. [0:09–0:11] He stops in front of a frozen man wearing a Yankees jersey, his face locked in an ecstatic, tearful scream, arms raised for a high-five. The main character tilts his head, gently adjusts the brim of the frozen man's Yankees cap, nods slightly, and softly says: “perfect.” [0:11–0:15] He turns, tosses the popcorn kernel into his mouth, and crunches it. He faces the camera, smirks, and snaps again. A stronger reverse shockwave restores motion. The beer completes its splash, the cheering roar instantly returns, and fans land their jumps. He walks away as the camera pushes through the wildly celebrating crowd. Fade to black. Sound: deafening bar roar/celebration → snap → deep shockwave/bass drop → absolute silence → footsteps → sharp popcorn crunch → “perfect” → snap → reverse shockwave → deafening celebration returns.

prompts.text: Prompt - 15s Cowboy 1v1 Gunfight Scene Setting: Dusty frontier town street, noon sun, empty road, wooden saloon behind them. Scene 1 (0 to 2s) Establishing Tension Camera: Wide cinematic shot, low angle from ground level. Dust blows across the street. Two cowboys stand facing each other about 20 feet apart. The sun sits directly overhead. A wooden sign creaks outside a saloon. Face / Body: Both men stand stiff. Eyes locked. Sound: Wind. Spur jingle. Distant horse. Scene 2 (2 to 4s) Eyes of Cowboy A Camera: Extreme close up of Cowboy A’s eyes. His eyes narrow slightly. A bead of sweat rolls down his temple. Face Reaction: Jaw tight. Breathing slow and controlled. Sound: Heartbeat slowly rising. Scene 3 (4 to 6s) Eyes of Cowboy B Camera: Tight close up of Cowboy B’s face from a slight side angle. Sunlight hits his eyes. He squints slightly. Face Reaction: A subtle smirk, confidence. His tongue wets his dry lips. Sound: Wind gust. Scene 4 (6 to 8s) Hands Near the Gun Camera: Extreme close up of holsters from waist level. Both hands hover inches above their revolvers. Fingers twitch. Dust moves around their boots. Sound: Leather creaking. Spur jingle. Scene 5 (8 to 10s) Micro Reactions Camera: Rapid cuts between faces. • Cowboy A blinking once • Cowboy B’s eyes widening slightly • Cowboy A’s thumb flexing The tension peaks. Scene 6 (10 to 12s) The Draw Camera: Medium side tracking shot. Both men draw in the same instant. Cowboy A fires first. Sound: A single explosive gunshot. Birds burst from a nearby rooftop. Scene 7 (12 to 15s) The Result Camera: Slow push in on Cowboy B. His expression shifts from confidence to shock. He looks down at his chest. Then collapses slowly into the dust. Cut to Cowboy A standing still, revolver smoking. Face Reaction: He exhales. Eyes still focused. Sound: Gunshot echo fading. Wind returns. generate the perfect image for each scene

prompts.text: Ultra-cinematic 15-second motorbike sequence at night through a wet urban city, reflective asphalt and neon-lit environment. 0–2s: Wide establishing shot — a sleek motorbike enters frame at high speed, headlights cutting through light fog, reflections stretching across the road. 2–4s: Low tracking shot beside the bike — wheels spinning rapidly, water spraying outward, engine vibration visible in subtle frame shake. 4–6s: Rear tracking shot — the rider leans forward aggressively, accelerating, taillight glowing against the dark street. 6–8s: Side angle — the bike leans deeply into a sharp corner, knee close to the ground, reflections sliding across wet pavement. 8–10s: Front tracking shot — bike moving toward camera, rider steady and focused, headlights flaring into lens. 10–12s: Dynamic tracking — the bike weaves smoothly between cars, tight spacing, near-contact moments with side mirrors. 12–13.5s: Close-up — wheel and suspension compressing slightly over uneven road, water splashing in slow detail. 13.5–15s: Final hero shot — long straight road, bike accelerating away from camera, taillight shrinking into the distance. Camera: smooth cinematic tracking, low angles, no handheld chaos, controlled motion. Environment: dense city street, wet reflective ground, light fog, moving traffic. Lighting: neon reflections, streetlights, strong highlights on bike surfaces. Style: ultra-cinematic realism, clean motion, high-speed elegance, grounded physics, no text, no overlays, stable proportions without stretch. Made in @runwayml

prompts.text: 15-Second Single Shot Video Prompt Style & Quality: Ultra-realistic cinematic video, 8K resolution, HDR lighting, shot on a 35mm lens. Smooth steady camera tracking, shallow depth of field, high detail, slightly futuristic tone with soft glow effects. Prompt (Single Continuous Frame) A wide industrial highway scene at sunset, filled with heavy pollution. Large factories in the background continuously releasing thick dark smoke into the air. The atmosphere is hazy, orange-gray, and dense. A sleek, futuristic car drives smoothly forward in a straight line through the frame. The camera tracks alongside the car in a slow, steady motion for the entire 15 seconds (no cuts). As the car moves, the smoke from the factories and surrounding air is visibly pulled toward the front of the car, as if the car is inhaling pollution. The airflow is cinematic and fluid, showing dark smoke streams being absorbed into the vehicle. At the same time, from the car’s exhaust, instead of smoke, vibrant green vines, blooming flowers, and small trees continuously grow and spread across the road behind it. The transformation happens in real-time the gray, lifeless ground turns into lush greenery as the car passes. The environment gradually shifts within the same frame: one side remains polluted, while the area behind the car becomes clean, colorful, and full of life. Final seconds: the car keeps moving forward, with a clear visual contrast polluted world ahead, green world behind all within the same uninterrupted cinematic shot.

Prompt:  A calm, modern hospital room. A patient is lying on a bed while a professional, kind doctor stands beside him, gently checking his pulse and speaking softly.
The camera slowly tracks from the side in a single continuous motion for the full 15 seconds.
As the doctor leans slightly closer to examine the patient, the patient looks at the doctor and becomes emotionally captivated. His facial expression gradually shifts from weak and tired to calm, slightly smiling, and lost in admiration.
To visually show his feelings (without unrealistic exaggeration), the background subtly transforms:
the hospital environment softly blurs, and a warm, dreamy glow appears around the doctor. Light particles and soft-focus bokeh gently emerge, symbolizing the patient drifting into his thoughts.
The patient is no longer focused on his illness instead, he is quietly staring at the doctor, completely absorbed in the moment. His breathing becomes calm, and his expression shows peace and affection.
The doctor remains professional and unaware, continuing the check-up naturally.
Final seconds:
The camera continues its smooth motion as the dreamy overlay slightly fades, leaving a subtle emotional contrast a patient who has momentarily forgotten his pain, lost in thought.
Important Direction (to avoid mistakes)
The patient remains lying on the bed (not standing or moving unrealistically)
The doctor behaves professionally (no exaggerated or inappropriate actions)
The emotional effect is shown through lighting, focus, and atmosphere not unrealistic physical actions
No reversed roles or unnatural expressions
Keep the tone soft, respectful, and cinematic (not comedic or exaggerated)
Mood / Feel
Soft, emotional, subtle admiration, calm, slightly dreamy but grounded in reality.

prompts.text: Scene 1 Action: Black ink-like filaments erupt from the floor, weaving around a woman's ankles as she stands paralyzed. Camera: Low-angle static medium shot, shifting into a slow vertigo effect (dolly zoom) as the threads rise. Lighting: High-contrast Chiaroscuro with cold teal rim lighting and deep, void-like shadows. Sound: Viscous squelching, wet rhythmic pulsing, and the sharp crackle of static electricity. Dialogue: 'It’s choosing me.' Scene 2 Action: The woman’s skin ripples as black fluid veins crawl up her neck; her eyes cloud over with dark, oily ink. Camera: Extreme close-up using a macro lens, slow pan following the movement of the subcutaneous filaments. Lighting: Harsh top-down flickering fluorescent light, creating a clinical, brutalist atmosphere. Sound: Low-frequency sub-bass hum, wet tearing textures, and rapid, shallow breathing. Scene 3 Action: She arches back unnaturally as tendrils explode from her spine, weaving into a sculptural, abstract crown. Camera: High-angle wide shot, slow tracking orbit around the subject to emphasize the spatial distortion. Lighting: Cold industrial backlighting, silhouettes sharpened by thick atmospheric mist and volumetric rays. Sound: Metallic grinding, the sound of heavy liquid dripping upward hitting the ceiling. Scene 4 Action: The transformation completes; the woman merges into a mass of writhing threads, staring directly into the lens. Camera: Handheld shaky cam, rapid zoom-in on her face followed by an abrupt tilt-down to the floor. Lighting: Strobe effect with high-fashion graphic precision, casting razor-edged shadows against the teal walls. Sound: Sharp, high-pitched digital distortion and the sudden, heavy thud of a body hitting the floor. Dialogue: 'Don't look.'

Lighting: Harsh top-down flickering fluorescent light, creating a clinical, brutalist atmosphere. Sound: Low-frequency sub-bass hum, wet tearing textures, and rapid, shallow breathing. 

Scene 3 Action: She arches back unnaturally as tendrils explode from her spine, weaving into a sculptural, abstract crown. Camera: High-angle wide shot, slow tracking orbit around the subject to emphasize the spatial distortion. Lighting: Cold industrial backlighting, silhouettes sharpened by thick atmospheric mist and volumetric rays. Sound: Metallic grinding, the sound of heavy liquid dripping upward hitting the ceiling. 

Scene 4 Action: The transformation completes; the woman merges into a mass of writhing threads, staring directly into the lens. Camera: Handheld shaky cam, rapid zoom-in on her face followed by an abrupt tilt-down to the floor. Lighting: Strobe effect with high-fashion graphic precision, casting razor-edged shadows against the teal walls. Sound: Sharp, high-pitched digital distortion and the sudden, heavy thud of a body hitting the floor. Dialogue: 'Don't look.'

prompts.text: Scene 1 Action: The creature from ref image steps through a shimmering, distorted dimensional portal into a dark, modern bedroom. Camera: Low-angle tracking shot following the creature's boots as it emerges from the rift. Lighting: High-contrast chiaroscuro with flickering cerulean light from the portal and deep cinematic shadows. Sound: Low-frequency atmospheric drone, electrical hum of the portal, and the metallic clink of heavy footsteps. Scene 2 Action: The creature approaches a sleeping man; as it raises a neon-gloved hand, all motion in the room suddenly freezes. Camera: Slow-motion push-in to a tight close-up on the creature’s reflective black mask, then panning to the man. Lighting: Dim moonlight from a window supplemented by a cold, clinical top-down rim light. Sound: Instant vacuum-like silence followed by a high-pitched, crystalline ringing representing the time freeze. Scene 3 Action: The creature touches the frozen man’s shoulder, and both begin to dematerialize into glowing particles. Camera: Extreme close-up of the neon glove against the man's skin, followed by a rapid 360-degree orbital rotation. Lighting: Ethereal glow from the creature's gloves, casting a sickly green hue over the subject. Sound: Granular synthesis effects, shimmering digital "glitch" sounds, and a deep, resonant sub-bass pulse. Scene 4 Action: The bedroom is suddenly empty; the portal collapses into a single point of light before vanishing entirely. Camera: Wide static shot of the empty room, slowly zooming out to emphasize the sudden vacuum and isolation. Lighting: Naturalistic low-light interior; the flickering portal light abruptly cuts to a cold, desaturated blue moonwash. Sound: A sharp, percussive "thud" as the portal closes, followed by the faint, rhythmic ticking of a bedside clock. Dialogue: 'He's gone.'

prompts.text: Scene 1 Action: The guinea pig detective pauses before the glowing blue portal at the end of the forest path, then steps inside. Camera: Low angle, close-up tracking shot following the guinea pig from behind as it enters the portal. Lighting: High contrast, chiaroscuro effect with warm street lamp contrast against the intense neon blue portal glow. Sound: Soft crickets, distant rustling leaves, transitioning into a low-frequency bass hum as it approaches the portal. Dialogue: 'Finally, the entrance.' Scene 2 Action: The guinea pig emerges into a dimly lit, smoky basement club, moving past rows of dancing guinea pigs. Camera: Handheld shaky cam, shallow depth of field, moving through the dense, crowded dance floor. Lighting: Strobe lighting, deep saturated purples and reds, volumetric fog swirling through laser beams. Sound: Muffled thumping bass, crowd chatter, clinking glass sounds, sound of heavy footsteps on concrete. Scene 3 Action: A guinea pig DJ expertly manipulates a console, while the crowd moves rhythmically to the heavy techno beat. Camera: Mid-shot, rack focus from the DJ's paws on the console to the blurred, energetic crowd behind. Lighting: Intense, rapid-fire rhythmic flashes, harsh neon pink and cyan highlights, backlighting from stage spots. Sound: Industrial techno beat, high-pitched electronic synths, rhythmic mechanical scratching, crowd cheering. prompts.text: Decided to save some credits on Seedance 2.0 by going with 7 seconds. Bad idea. 7 seconds is just not enough to show anything these days. 😅 Epic cinematic storm-fantasy sequence on a cliffside monastery above a violent sea at night. A colossal sea titan made of black water, broken ship hulls, and bioluminescent eyes rises beside the cliffs during a lightning storm. Phase 1: immense build-up. Bells swing in gale force wind, monks run across stone bridges carrying lanterns, waves detonate against the lower walls, and the titan’s outline slowly assembles from the ocean itself. The camera is unstable, fighting the wind, whipping between terrified faces and the impossible form rising in fragments. Phase 2: catastrophic event. The titan lifts one arm the size of a tower and brings it down onto the outer seawall. Stone explodes outward. A bridge collapses. Lantern fire scatters into the rain. The camera is thrown sideways, briefly losing the horizon as debris and spray consume the frame. Phase 3: sudden subtraction. All sound drops to a low muffled underwater tone. Rain still falls, but softly. The camera, once chaotic, now drifts in a slow stabilized move through the aftermath: broken prayer flags hanging still, scattered embers hissing out in puddles, stunned monks kneeling in silence, fragments of blue bioluminescence sliding back down the shattered stones toward the sea. Detail priority: cracked masonry, rain threading off eaves, lantern glass fragments, trembling hands, luminous seawater retreating through carved channels, distant thunder now far away. Ending: the titan is gone. On the broken edge of the monastery, a single giant wet handprint glows faintly on the stone before fading. Final wide shot at dawn: the ruined cliff temple overlooks a suddenly calm sea.

prompts.text: [CORE IDEA] A cinematic time-freeze sequence in Riyadh featuring a Saudi man in traditional attire walking through a frozen city. [STYLE & TONE] Ultra-realistic cinematic urban fantasy, grounded time-freeze concept, authentic Saudi culture, stylish and playful tone, subtle humor. Natural daylight, clean color grading, realistic Riyadh atmosphere. [CHARACTER] Main subject: Young Saudi male wearing a clean white thobe, red-and-white shemagh, black agal. Confident, relaxed, charismatic, slightly mischievous personality. [ENVIRONMENT] Modern Riyadh street, Saudi Arabia. Arabic shop signs, sidewalks, moving cars, realistic traffic. Crowd of Saudi pedestrians: Men in thobes with shemagh/ghutra Women in black abayas, some in modest casual outfits [CAMERA & TECH] Smooth cinematic tracking, subtle orbit shots, natural handheld stability. Lens mix: 35mm & 50mm. Depth of field: realistic, soft background separation. Motion: grounded and fluid (no exaggerated AI motion). [TIMELINE – 15 SECONDS] 0.0 – 2.5s Frontal tracking shot (50mm). The Saudi man walks confidently through a busy Riyadh street. Natural movement, people crossing, cars passing. He suddenly CLAPS once. → At the exact clap: TIME FREEZES Everything stops instantly mid-motion (people, cars, even clothing movement). 2.5 – 7s Lateral tracking (35mm). He keeps walking while everything around him is completely frozen. He looks around with a subtle smile, amused and curious. 7 – 11.5s Tracking + slight orbit (35mm). He interacts playfully with frozen people: Takes a sip from a frozen person’s drink Waves his hand in front of someone’s face Adjusts a person’s pose slightly All frozen elements remain perfectly still (no micro-movements). 11.5 – 15s Frontal tracking (50mm). He continues walking forward confidently through the frozen city. Still holding the drink briefly, then casually drops his hand. End with a cinematic forward motion as he walks past frozen pedestrians. [QUALITY & RENDERING] Photorealistic 8K, highly detailed Saudi environment, accurate clothing physics, clean freeze effect, zero background jitter. Consistent character identity, stable faces, no morphing. Natural lighting, realistic shadows, cinematic polish. [NEGATIVE PROMPT] No face distortion, no clothing glitches, no floating objects, no AI warping, no crowd movement after freeze, no duplicated people, no unrealistic animation.

This is NOT what I expected. 

Same cinematic prompt. Three models:
 Seedance 2.0

@grok

The prompt:

Live action cinematic action film. A breathtakingly beautiful female warrior in her late 20s, with long dark braided hair and battle-worn leather and steel armor, faces off against a massive armored villain on a rain-soaked rooftop at night. She moves with lightning speed — a flurry of precise sword strikes creating arcing trails of steel. Her eyes burn with fierce determination. Slow-motion close-up of their blades locking. Rain splatters dramatically off the metal. Shot in the style of a high-budget Hollywood action film — anamorphic lens flare, shallow depth of field, moody blue-orange color grade. Camera does a fast 360-degree orbit during the clash. 4K ultra-realistic.

This is the hardest test — real humans, real physics, rain, slow-mo, 360° orbit shot.

prompts.text: This is what happens when a mage stops holding back Seedance 2.0 is live on @SJinn_Agent prompt Cinematic 15-Second Fantasy Battle — Western Female Mage A devastated battlefield of broken stone and burning wreckage under a smoke-choked sky. Dark atmosphere with glowing embers drifting through the air. Shot in cinematic 2.35:1 widescreen with shallow depth of field and strong contrast between deep shadows and vivid orange-red fire magic. Only natural, in-world sound. 0–3s — Awakening the Spell Low-angle cinematic shot from near ground level. A Western female mage, late 20s, long blonde hair loosely tied with strands whipping across her face, stands atop fractured rubble. She wears a worn, ancient dark robe with torn edges. She lowers into a grounded combat stance, steady and deliberate. Her hands move rapidly in controlled, intricate patterns, tracing glowing sigils in the air. Small embers spark to life at her fingertips, pulsing faintly. Sound: low-frequency magical vibration building, fabric shifting, distant wind cutting through ruins. 3–6s — Energy Surge Slightly elevated medium shot. With a sudden forward motion, she drives both hands outward. Multiple rotating magic glyphs ignite around her arms, layered and spinning with increasing speed. Their fiery glow lights up her face, revealing a focused, unwavering expression. Highlights shimmer in her eyes as her hair catches the backlight of the flames. Sound: rising arcane resonance, energy crackling, a sharp breath released with control. 6–9s — The Threat Emerges Wide establishing shot. A massive serpent-like dragon rises in the distance, its body coiling through smoke and fire. Across the battlefield, numerous glowing spell circles appear simultaneously, forming a vast containment field in the air and across the ground. The creature lashes violently against the invisible barrier as the symbols intensify. Sound: deep, echoing roar layered with a heavy magical pulse, ground rumbling beneath the force. 9–12s — Breaking Point Rapid sequence of sharp cuts: – Close-up of her eyes reflecting burning light – Tight shot of her shouting “EXPLOSION!” – Angles of the creature struggling against tightening magical constructs – Rotating camera movement circling both mage and spell formation The brightness surges, shadows flicker erratically, and the energy reaches a critical peak. Sound: her voice echoes outward, followed by a sudden dip into near silence with a dense, rising distortion. 12–15s — Cataclysm Extreme wide shot with sweeping camera motion around the battlefield. The entire magical formation collapses inward and erupts into a towering column of fire and raw energy. The serpent is consumed instantly. A powerful shockwave bursts outward, scattering debris and dust in all directions. At the center, a dense red-violet core pulses before fading. Sound: thunderous explosion, debris crashing, roaring wind tearing through the ruins. Fade to black.

prompt

Cinematic 15-Second Fantasy Battle — Western Female Mage

A devastated battlefield of broken stone and burning wreckage under a smoke-choked sky. Dark atmosphere with glowing embers drifting through the air. Shot in cinematic 2.35:1 widescreen with shallow depth of field and strong contrast between deep shadows and vivid orange-red fire magic. Only natural, in-world sound.

0–3s — Awakening the Spell
Low-angle cinematic shot from near ground level. A Western female mage, late 20s, long blonde hair loosely tied with strands whipping across her face, stands atop fractured rubble. She wears a worn, ancient dark robe with torn edges.
She lowers into a grounded combat stance, steady and deliberate. Her hands move rapidly in controlled, intricate patterns, tracing glowing sigils in the air. Small embers spark to life at her fingertips, pulsing faintly.

Sound: low-frequency magical vibration building, fabric shifting, distant wind cutting through ruins.

3–6s — Energy Surge
Slightly elevated medium shot. With a sudden forward motion, she drives both hands outward.

Multiple rotating magic glyphs ignite around her arms, layered and spinning with increasing speed. Their fiery glow lights up her face, revealing a focused, unwavering expression. Highlights shimmer in her eyes as her hair catches the backlight of the flames.
Sound: rising arcane resonance, energy crackling, a sharp breath released with control.

6–9s — The Threat Emerges
Wide establishing shot. A massive serpent-like dragon rises in the distance, its body coiling through smoke and fire.

Across the battlefield, numerous glowing spell circles appear simultaneously, forming a vast containment field in the air and across the ground. The creature lashes violently against the invisible barrier as the symbols intensify.

Sound: deep, echoing roar layered with a heavy magical pulse, ground rumbling beneath the force.
9–12s — Breaking Point
Rapid sequence of sharp cuts:
– Close-up of her eyes reflecting burning light
– Tight shot of her shouting “EXPLOSION!”
– Angles of the creature struggling against tightening magical constructs
– Rotating camera movement circling both mage and spell formation

The brightness surges, shadows flicker erratically, and the energy reaches a critical peak.

Sound: her voice echoes outward, followed by a sudden dip into near silence with a dense, rising distortion.

12–15s — Cataclysm
Extreme wide shot with sweeping camera motion around the battlefield.
The entire magical formation collapses inward and erupts into a towering column of fire and raw energy. The serpent is consumed instantly. A powerful shockwave bursts outward, scattering debris and dust in all directions.
At the center, a dense red-violet core pulses before fading.
Sound: thunderous explosion, debris crashing, roaring wind tearing through the ruins.
Fade to black.

prompts.text: Komut / Prompt A lone figure sits atop the skeletal remains of a skyscraper in a post-apocalyptic cityscape, legs dangling over the edge. The ruined metropolis stretches endlessly below — crumbling concrete towers, shattered glass facades, and twisted metal beams silhouetted against the dying light. The final sunset blazes across the horizon with otherworldly colors: deep crimson bleeding into electric violet, streaked with molten gold and bruised indigo. Ash and dust particles drift through the air, catching the light like embers. Shot 1 — Extreme wide establishing shot from ground level, low angle looking up at the towering ruins. The figure appears impossibly small against the vast decaying skyline. Slow crane up reveals the scale of destruction. Shot 2 — Medium shot from behind the figure at rooftop level. Camera positioned slightly below, capturing his silhouette framed against the apocalyptic sunset. His shoulders are slumped, head tilted upward. Gentle wind stirs his tattered

prompts.text: Seedance2.0 It's up and running. The Charlotte inside the signboard materializes, and you can easily create vlog-style videos too. This can also be applied to short videos on TikTok and the like. [The prompt is below] Feel free to tweak it for your own uses. Create a short vlog-style video where the white-haired female character from the life-sized panel in the foreground comes to life as if stepping out from the signboard into the real world, referencing the uploaded photo of the event venue. At first, she stands motionless amid the venue scenery. In the next instant, a faint blue light and particles trace her outline, and she naturally steps forward from the panel's surface. She takes on a three-dimensional form as a living being, not the texture of paper or a signboard, with her hair and coat gently swaying. While lightly showing the card in her right hand, she speaks to the camera in a friendly manner. Her expression is calm and slightly cool, yet with the natural closeness of a vlog. Her gaze is mostly directed at the camera. After that, she walks lightly with the venue in the background, looking around, occasionally leaning in toward the camera. Like a vlog shot on a smartphone, the camera has a slight handheld feel, following at close range. Keep the venue's atmosphere, the flow of people, and the booth vibes intact, while making the character the star. Blend the anime-style character naturally into the live-action background. Keep the staging understated—no over-the-top flair, just a touch of that mysterious light effect for the initial "emergence" moment. Overall, it's cinematic and natural, leaning more stylish than cute. At the end, the character gives a slight smile, lightly holds up the card, and wraps up facing the camera. High quality, live-action background + cel-shaded anime-style character, natural depth, vlog vibe, handheld camera, event venue, faint blue particles, subtle glow, friendly narration. I think it's reproducible, so give it a shot with your own characters too.

prompts.text: I have shared the prompt for these images in the past. I just decided to animate one of them with SeeDance 2.0. Audio prompt Thunderous galloping hoofbeats on dirt and broken stone, fast bowstring snaps, arrows slicing through air, sharp impact hits on rock and armor, crumbling masonry, dense smoke blasts, shouted battle cries, defenders yelling from the wall, distant war horn, deep cinematic drums rising fast, brutal siege energy, intense layered battlefield ambience, ending on a heavy debris crash. prompts.text: I used Midjourney to generate the main visual as a reference SUBJECTS: Male dancer, Black, defined facial features, short curly hair, focused and intense gaze with a sense of pressure, broad shoulders and narrow waist; wearing an open black stage outfit. Female dancer, White, clear and delicate skin, elegant temperament, long neck, defined collarbones, smooth shoulder line; wearing a white stage outfit, elegant and stylish. ENVIRONMENT: Main stage of a dance competition, reflective floor, clean center stage with no clutter, precisely controlled overhead spotlights, sharp and clean light beams, overall environment minimal, restrained, and pure. MUSIC: Slow-building minimalist electronic music, supported by subtle percussive hits, minimal melody, restrained harmonic changes. The overall tone leans more toward intimacy and tension rather than energy. The pressure and intensity gradually build with the movement without excessive layering, ultimately resolving in a clean, decisive final sound cue. TIMELINE: SHOT 1: Medium shot, 35mm, circular push-in. Both dancers are already in rotation. The male lifts the female by the waist with one hand, generating upward force. The female uses the momentum to leap and complete a turn. Her toes lightly touch the ground, creating a reflection before lifting again, landing onto the shoulder position. SFX: Beat starts + subtle friction sound SHOT 2: Medium-wide shot, 28mm, low-angle push upward. The male lowers to build force and explosively throws the female. She performs a smooth reverse flip in the air, extends her body, then contracts and is precisely caught by the wrist, transitioning seamlessly into a glide. SFX: Low-frequency impact SHOT 3: Close-up, 50mm, lateral tracking. The female slides along the ground while being pulled upward, forming a rotational axis. SFX: Continuous rhythmic beats SHOT 4: Medium shot, 35mm, accelerating circular movement. The male lifts the female overhead. She rotates in the air, extends her body, then naturally contracts and descends. SFX: Intensifying beat SHOT 5: Medium-wide shot, 24mm, wide circular movement. Both dancers move toward each other and jump simultaneously. After landing, they glide outward and reconnect through their hands. SFX: Air slicing sound SHOT 6: Close-up, 70mm, steady push-in. The male completes a high lift. The female performs a vertical spin mid-air, briefly suspending while fully extended. SFX: Brief musical pause SHOT 7: Medium shot, 35mm, slight push-in. As the female descends, she is precisely caught with one hand. They transition into a final partnered pose. Lighting focuses tightly on both dancers. SFX: Audience erupts in applause

Seedance 2.0 {part-4}

Trying something new 

on 
@PixVerse_
 

Prompt:

A hyper-realistic, experimental cinematic sequence set within an endless, monochrome void. The only objects visible are millions of suspended, geometric glass sculptures of varying shapes—spheres, polyhedrons, shattered shards. The void isn't black; it’s an oppressive, flat greyscale that devours depth. Suddenly, the void itself cracks. It’s a fissure not in a wall, but in the texture of space, emitting a deafening sound like shattering ceramic.

Emerging violently from this cosmic fracture is a massive Origami Kraken, constructed entirely from sentient, folding geometric paper that is constantly shifting and reconfiguring its shape. The Kraken doesn't just swim; its movement causes the air to instantly crystalize into jagged, impossible architectures.

Perched upon the Kraken's head is a Gothic-Industrial Painter, covered in a suit of canvas and leather straps. Instead of paint, their "brush" is a high-powered plasma welder. As the Kraken moves, the Painter isn't just surviving; they are actively forging impossible geometries using molten light, welding new, glowing structures onto the Kraken’s body, causing portions of the origami creature to shift from paper to a complex, transparent glass and light mesh.

The Twist:
As the Kraken roars—a sound of folding metal—the monochrome void violently inverts. The shadows become blinding white, and the glass sculptures begin to reflect a universe of previously unseen, chaotic, non-Euclidean colors (colors that shouldn’t exist, like "dark neon" or "glowing shadow").

Suddenly, a localized reality distortion occurs: a swarm of Vantablack hummingbirds manifests. These creatures aren’t biological; they are actual, kinetic shadows that absorb all light, launching from the monochrome distortions to attack the painter and the Kraken. The camera perspective performs a disorienting 90-degree whip-pan shift, turning the horizontal movement into a vertical free-fall, following the painter as they leap from the Kraken's head, dodging the Vantablack hummingbirds, using their plasma welder to create temporary, glowing shields of light that disintegrate the shadow-creatures mid-flight. The painter is diving toward the fractal-shifted glass-light mesh of the Kraken’s body.

Lighting & Atmosphere:
The scene is a claustrophobic paradox. The initial lighting is a severe, high-contrast monochrome (grey, black, white), which is suddenly and violently interrupted by the impossible colors (colors that shift and glow in ways physics doesn't allow) from the Kraken's new structure and the inverted void. The main light source shifts from a flat grey to the intense, localized ultraviolet and neon-orange radiance of the plasma welder.

Audio Profile:
The sound begins with a deafening, low-frequency grinding of the void cracking. The Kraken’s movements are marked by the high-pitched, mechanical screeching of shifting origami paper. When the Vantablack hummingbirds launch, the audio shifts to a unique sound: a mix of silent compression and static hiss. A frantic, experimental glitch-orchestral score (strings distorted by digital noise) builds to the void inversion. The plasma welder ignites with a high-pitched, electric whine, cutting to absolute sonic stillness as the camera dips below the inverted void's horizon, leaving only the faint, melodic resonance of the Impossible Colors.

prompts.text: A hyper-real cinematic action sequence set in a dense, rain-soaked forest near a steep cliff with a thunderous waterfall. The ground is muddy, covered in wet leaves, moss, and exposed roots. Sound design includes distant gunfire, heavy breathing, splashing footsteps, and the constant roar of falling water. YOUR IMAGE as the woman or man! A handheld camera tracks a woman sprinting through the forest at full speed. Gunshots crack behind her—bullets strike trees and mud nearby. The shooters are never seen, only heard. She bursts out toward a cliff and suddenly skids on the wet ground, stopping inches from the edge. She steadies herself and looks down—vertigo-inducing view of a massive waterfall crashing below. Gunfire echoes closer. She quickly raises her wrist and taps a concealed device: three sharp beeps. Beside her sits an old, wide tree stump—unevenly cut years ago, its rim jagged, surface covered in moss, grass, and small mushrooms. The bark subtly separates along natural cracks, opening just enough. No mechanical feel—completely organic. She slips inside and climbs down into darkness. The stump closes seamlessly, restoring its overgrown, untouched appearance. Moments later, soldiers arrive at the ledge. They scan the cliff and waterfall. One says, slightly out of breath: “Sir... she’s not here. I think she jumped.” Another replies: “She wouldn’t survive that fall.” Mid-sentence, sound carries through— Cut inside: a dim underground chamber formed within thick roots and earth. She watches through a narrow slit, breathing heavily but safe. The roar of the waterfall swells. No hard cut. Feel free to ask any questions below - Made using Seedance 2.

Prompt:
A hyper-real cinematic action sequence set in a dense, rain-soaked forest near a steep cliff with a thunderous waterfall. The ground is muddy, covered in wet leaves, moss, and exposed roots. Sound design includes distant gunfire, heavy breathing, splashing footsteps, and the constant roar of falling water. YOUR IMAGE as the woman or man! 

A handheld camera tracks a woman sprinting through the forest at full speed. Gunshots crack behind her—bullets strike trees and mud nearby. The shooters are never seen, only heard. She bursts out toward a cliff and suddenly skids on the wet ground, stopping inches from the edge. She steadies herself and looks down—vertigo-inducing view of a massive waterfall crashing below.

Gunfire echoes closer.

She quickly raises her wrist and taps a concealed device: three sharp beeps. Beside her sits an old, wide tree stump—unevenly cut years ago, its rim jagged, surface covered in moss, grass, and small mushrooms. The bark subtly separates along natural cracks, opening just enough. No mechanical feel—completely organic.

She slips inside and climbs down into darkness. The stump closes seamlessly, restoring its overgrown, untouched appearance.

Moments later, soldiers arrive at the ledge. They scan the cliff and waterfall.

One says, slightly out of breath:
“Sir… she’s not here. I think she jumped.”
Another replies:
“She wouldn’t survive that fall.”
Mid-sentence, sound carries through—
Cut inside: a dim underground chamber formed within thick roots and earth. She watches through a narrow slit, breathing heavily but safe.
The roar of the waterfall swells. No hard cut.

Feel free to ask any questions below - Made using Seedance 2.

prompts.text: 15-second cinematic product advertisement for Nutella in a bright, sunlit modern kitchen. The jar dramatically bursts open in hyper-realistic slow motion, rich chocolate-hazelnut spread exploding outward in thick, glossy swirls with flying hazelnut pieces sparkling in the light. [5-10s] Cut to a dynamic overhead tracking shot as fresh ingredients assemble magically onto the table: golden-brown toast slices fly in and land perfectly, thick layers of Nutella spread smoothly across them, sliced bananas and ripe strawberries tumble into place, a glass of milk and steaming coffee cup settle beside them forming an appetizing breakfast board. Slow-motion splashes and gentle particle movement emphasize the creamy texture and freshness. [10-15s] Final smooth push-in to a close-up medium shot of the completed breakfast spread, with subtle steam rising from the coffee, glistening spread on toast, and natural light reflections. Camera slowly orbits the perfect arrangement, ending on an inviting hero view that highlights the irresistible chocolate swirls. Photorealistic food commercial style, high detail on textures like glossy chocolate, crunchy hazelnuts, soft bread crust, and juicy fruit. Warm golden hour lighting with god rays, vibrant yet natural colors, shallow depth of field for appetizing focus. Cinematic, smooth motion, no text or logos, ultra-detailed 4K quality, stable composition, rich details, sharp clarity, no distortion. Diegetic sounds only: satisfying pops, gentle clinks, and ambient kitchen ambience.

prompts.text: A fast-paced cinematic sequence in a glowing volcanic terrain. A warrior with natural skin tone lands amidst towering elemental figures. He extends his hand, summoning a returning glowing hammer. He channels lightning, moving swiftly and hurling the hammer to push back the figures. Dynamic handheld camera, rapid whip-pans, varied angles, cinematic blur, no music. Shot 1 (0.0-2.0s) - Fast tilt-down; warrior lands smoothly on volcanic rock; kinetic wave pushes the ash away. prompts.text: Seedance 2.0 Prompt ⏬ Create a photorealistic ultra-cinematic 15-second first-person POV action scene. We are riding on the back of a massive black dragon racing through a storm-torn canyon at night. Both hands remain visible in frame, gripping the dragon’s wet armored neck ridges like living reins. Wind lashes hard, rain cuts sideways, lightning reveals jagged cliffs and abyss drops below. The tone is epic, intense, and premium blockbuster fantasy realism. 0-3s: first-person POV low over the dragon’s neck, both hands gripping tightly as the dragon surges through the canyon at high speed, black scales slick with rain, breath vapor and embers trailing from its mouth, cliffs rushing by on both sides. 3-6s: ahead in the storm, a squad of armored aerial hunters appears and attacks, launching multiple flaming bolt-spears directly toward us. The projectiles race through the rain toward camera while the dragon banks violently between cliff walls. 6-9s: at the last possible instant, one hand releases the dragon and rises into frame with a sharp command gesture. Time stops instantly. All incoming bolt-spears freeze in mid-air just in front of the POV, along with rain droplets, sparks, flames, and drifting mist, suspended in a rippling invisible field. 9-12s: the raised hand slowly twists sideways. The frozen incoming projectiles rotate in the air one by one until all of them are now pointing back toward the attacking riders. The enemies remain moving in the distance, but the captured weapons are fully controlled and aimed at them. 12-15s: with a second precise hand gesture, time snaps forward only for the redirected projectiles, sending the entire suspended volley back at extreme speed into the attacking aerial hunters. The returning flaming bolt-spears slam into the enemy formation in the storm as the dragon drives forward through the chaos. End on a powerful forward-moving POV frame with one hand returning to grip the dragon.

prompts.text: Seedance 2.0 es una locura Esta persona no existe Prueba con este prompt👇 Generate a short cinematic video for product promotion. A man (Image1), sitting on a modern sofa in a podcast-style studio, presenting and explaining a Mac Mini (Image2). The studio has a dark black wall background with wooden textures and a subtle warm orange ambient fill light that creates depth and contrast. The key light comes from above at a 45-degree angle, softly illuminating his face and the product, giving a premium cinematic look. He speaks in a relaxed, conversational tone, using natural and engaging language, as if talking directly to his audience. While explaining, he interacts with the Mac Mini—holding it, placing it on a small table, rotating it, and pointing out key features like its compact size, ports, and minimalist design. His movements are smooth, intentional, and confident. Cutaways include close-up shots of the Mac Mini on the table, hands plugging cables, and subtle detail shots that highlight the aluminum finish and clean design. These are combined with medium shots of him on the sofa, creating a dynamic but calm rhythm. The camera remains stable with cinematic framing. Use shallow depth of field to separate the subject from the background. The lighting enhances the metallic texture of the Mac Mini. The video is in 4K high definition, with smooth, continuous motion, and a polished podcast/interview aesthetic.

prompts.text: FORMAT: 15s / 15 SHOTS / chaotic routine synced to beat SUBJECT: Dark-skinned young female character, purple eyes, twin afro buns with purple beads, expressive face (based on reference image) STYLE: High-end stylized 3D (Pixar-level), cinematic lighting, soft skin shading, expressive micro-emotions, polished materials, exaggerated but believable motion, comedic but grounded WARDROBE: Shots 1–9: Lavender striped pajamas Shots 10–11: Changing Shots 12–15: Dark fitted business suit, slightly oversized (adds personality), final shot still wet ENVIRONMENT: Small bedroom, bathroom, kitchen, rainy street, bus stop, office, dark bedroom MOOD: Chaotic, rushed, unlucky, subtle attitude, ends in quiet emotional defeat SHOTS SHOT 1 ECU, 85mm push-in Phone alarm reads 8:00. Purple glow reflects in her eyes before she even moves. SHOT 2 MCU, handheld 50mm She opens her eyes slowly... then suddenly panics. Whispers: “No no no...” and slaps the phone. SHOT 3 MCU, 50mm Bathroom. Still in pajamas. Splashes water—too hot. She freezes... then slowly blinks through the pain. SHOT 4 Fridge POV, 24mm She opens fridge: empty... except peanut butter. She stares. No reaction. SHOT 5 MS, 50mm Still staring. Then quietly: “...wow.” Grabs the peanut butter anyway. SHOT 6 Detail CU, 85mm Toast pops up—completely burnt. Smoke. SHOT 7 MCU, 50mm She aggressively spreads peanut butter. Takes a bite. Crunch is too loud. She pauses mid-chew. SHOT 8 MCU, handheld 50mm Bathroom. Brushing teeth fast— SHOT 9 Detail CU, 85mm Toothpaste shoots onto her face. She doesn’t react. Just... stares at herself. SHOT 10 Top-down, 35mm Trying to put on pants while balancing—her bun slightly tilts. SHOT 11 MS, handheld 35mm She loses balance—falls HARD. Beat. She stays on the floor for half a second. SHOT 12 WS, 24mm tracking Now in suit. Runs into heavy rain. Hair beads bouncing. Suit instantly soaked. SHOT 13 MS tracking, 50mm Bus drives off. She doesn’t chase. Just watches. She drops on the bed. Her eyes close— CUT TO PHONE SCREEN: 8:00 But this time... Her eyes are already open.

Seedance 2.0 Prompt ⏬

Create a photorealistic ultra-cinematic 15-second first-person POV supernatural defense scene. We are standing alone on a vast ancient salt flat filled with broken stone totems, torn ritual banners, shallow reflective water, drifting dust, and low storm clouds rolling across the horizon at blue-gray twilight. Both hands stay visible in frame. In the right palm, a small black crystalline seed with a dim molten core pulses with strange energy. The tone is tense, mystical, and grounded, like a prestige fantasy-sci-fi film. 0-3s: tight POV on both hands, the right palm holding the small black crystal seed close to camera, wind dragging dust and mist sideways across the salt plain. The POV lifts to reveal a line of armored desert hunters emerging through the haze at medium distance, advancing quickly with long spears and sling-launchers, their silhouettes growing clearer. 3-6s: the right hand closes and crushes the crystal seed. It fractures with a sharp mineral snap and releases a storm of glowing silver-black particles that swirl around both hands and forearms. The particles fuse into luminous geometric markings and heat-like energy veins across the skin, transforming both hands into powerful radiant relic-like hands in full view. 6-10s: the hunters launch a deadly volley of barbed projectiles and thrown spears straight toward the POV. At the last instant both transformed hands thrust forward and all incoming weapons stop abruptly in mid-air just in front of camera, suspended in a dense invisible force field, dust and water rippling outward in a circular shockwave. 10-13s: with one precise hand motion the suspended spears and projectiles rotate in the air and reverse direction toward the attackers, hanging for one charged breath. With a second sharp gesture they launch back at extreme speed across the salt flat. 13-15s: the returning volley tears through the advancing hunters, bodies collapsing into shallow water and dust, formation breaking apart in chaos. The transformed hands remain in frame, glowing with silver-black runic energy as wind sweeps across the battlefield. Photorealistic, immersive, powerful, premium blockbuster finish.

prompts.text: Prompt Studio: Sci-fi Ring with Seedance 2.0 in @runwayml , text to video Upscaled with @topazlabs Astra Starlight Precise 2.5 to 4k Gigantic orbital ring around an alien planet, structural failure propagating at high velocity, entire sections tearing apart while traffic is still moving across it. Wide shot: the ring mid-rotation, a fracture suddenly racing along its surface faster than expected. Hard tracking: camera locked to the crack as it splits structural layers, tearing through habitats and transit lines. Close pass: maintenance ships accelerating along the ring, barely outrunning the collapsing structure behind them. Near-failure: a ship misjudges speed, the surface drops away beneath it, forced to boost last-second to avoid being pulled into open space. Chain reaction: rotating segments begin desyncing, colliding edges grinding and breaking apart. Interior shot: corridor violently shifting, gravity flickering, people and debris slamming into walls as atmosphere vents. Exterior whip: a massive section snaps free, rotating unpredictably, narrowly missing a fleeing ship. Precision escape: pilot threads through a collapsing lattice of beams and cables, gaps closing in real time. Shockwave: structural failure releases energy, pushing debris outward, ships struggling to maintain trajectory. Final moment: a huge arc of the ring tears loose, drifting away, still populated with lights flickering across its surface. Relentless structural collapse, no pauses, constant repositioning, cascading failures, grounded physics, massive scale with intimate danger.

prompts.text: コメントでの応援ありがとうございます! バレエダンサー×ボクサーの対決、思った以上に好評で嬉しいです🔥 それでは、プロンプト公開します👇 Prompt Share 116 -バレエダンサー VS ボクサー-Seedance 2.0 Japanese anime style with the exhilarating feel of a competitive fighting game. Set in a boxing ring, 15 seconds, 30fps, no subtitles. High-contrast cinematic lighting, volumetric light, atmospheric particles and smoke, with a strong audience presence. The overall pacing is clean and sharp, with decisive and powerful camera movement, no dragging. High dynamic range with realistic physical feedback. [Entrance 0–5s] Low-angle fast tracking shot with a steady push-in. A tall blonde, blue-eyed ballet dancer descends dramatically from above in a “Black Swan” form—more flamboyant and oppressive in presence. As she spins and lands, her movement carries clear aggression; the impact is heavier, sharper, with precise yet tension-filled body control. Feathers scatter through the air like black blades. Lighting shifts to a cold, high-contrast tone, with sharp highlights outlining her silhouette, creating a dangerous atmosphere. The crowd erupts in cheers mixed with gasps. Cut— A towering boxer stands at the center of the ring (red shorts, red gloves, beast-style mouthguard), radiating pressure. Like a gorilla, he pounds his chest, laughing arrogantly with disdain and provocation. [Fight 5–15s] Extreme close-up of the boxing bell as it rings sharply. Hard cut back to the ring. The boxer throws a heavy punch—the Black Swan dodges with an extreme backbend, then immediately unleashes a counterattack: A rapid upward high kick, followed by consecutive spinning kicks and slicing leg techniques. Her movements are sharper, more aggressive, with accelerated pacing and continuous, relentless attacks. Her motion is both elegant and feral. The boxer is completely overwhelmed, forced into a defensive state, retreating step by step as his movements grow disordered. Final move—after a high-speed spin, the Black Swan delivers a powerful horizontal whip kick (with strong kinetic force and air-tearing impact), launching the boxer high into the air before crashing heavily to the ground. K.O. The crowd erupts in thunderous cheers. The Black Swan slowly settles her stance, standing at the center of the spotlight. She gracefully bows like a noble black swan. 本プロンプトでは対戦相手をボクサーに設定していますが、ムエタイ、テコンドー、キックボクシング、相撲などにも置き換え可能です。お好みに合わせて自由にカスタマイズしてお楽しみください😋

K.O.
The crowd erupts in thunderous cheers. The Black Swan slowly settles her stance, standing at the center of the spotlight. She gracefully bows like a noble black swan.

本プロンプトでは対戦相手をボクサーに設定していますが、ムエタイ、テコンドー、キックボクシング、相撲などにも置き換え可能です。お好みに合わせて自由にカスタマイズしてお楽しみください😋

MUSIC: Piano and strings progression, with accented beats emphasized during jumps and spins Timeline: SHOT 1: Medium-wide shot, 35mm, high-speed lateral tracking The skater is already in high-speed outside edge skating, continuously pressing edges to accelerate, leaning forward to build momentum, blades carving long arcs and kicking up fine ice particles, right leg drawing in preparing for a jump sequence without losing speed SFX: High-speed glide, ice friction SHOT 2: Medium shot, 50mm, forward push She explodes into a triple jump combination, taking off with a toe loop into rotation, landing and immediately connecting into a salchow for a second takeoff, then landing again and using the momentum to enter a loop for the third jump SFX: Three takeoff air cuts + blade landing cuts SHOT 3: Medium close-up, 70mm, semi-orbit tracking On landing she transitions instantly into high-speed footwork, rapidly alternating edges and directions with both feet, continuous body rotations maintaining forward momentum, leaving visible traces on the ice as speed increases SFX: Continuous high-frequency edge cuts SHOT 4: Medium shot, 50mm, push-in with orbit She switches edges and launches into a multi-rotation reverse jump, landing and immediately dropping her center of gravity into a low sit spin SFX: Air slicing → rising spin wind SHOT 5: Close-up, 85mm, accelerating orbit The sit spin rises into an upright spin, she quickly grabs her leg into a Biellmann position, extending her body while increasing rotational speed, skirt fully flaring out SFX: Intense spinning wind SHOT 6: Close-up, 100mm, reverse light orbit then sudden stop During high-speed rotation she tightens her core to force deceleration, blades scraping the ice and creating fine ice mist, the spin halts abruptly, her arms slowly open into a poised finishing pose, blue eyes looking straight into the camera SFX: Wind sharply cuts → light blade stop sound

prompts.text: Frames depict two samurai striking, blocking, rotating positions. CAMERA: Slow handheld orbit, dramatic pauses. CORE ACTION: Sword clash loop feels fluid and rhythmic. DETAILING: Fabric motion, metallic reflections, dust. SOUND: Blade clash Cloth movement Mechanical rhythm ENDING: Mid-strike freeze illusion. Sequence 2: INTENT: Create a poetic combat loop where two samurai clash endlessly within a zoetrope, blending disciplined sword choreography with hypnotic mechanical motion. PROMPT (CONTINUED): Ultra-realistic cinematic video, 15s, 24fps. A spinning zoetrope reveals sequential frames of two samurai locked in combat. Their movements are fluid, rhythmic, and perfectly looped—each action transitioning seamlessly into the next. CAMERA: Slow handheld orbit, subtle shake, controlled push-ins during peak clashes. Occasional micro-pauses to emphasize tension. CORE ACTION (DETAILED SAMURAI SEQUENCE): Opening stance (Chūdan-no-kamae) — both grounded, blades aligned. Diagonal downward cut (Kesa-giri) from Samurai A. Samurai B parries upward (Uke-nagashi), redirecting the blade. Immediate horizontal counter slash (Yoko-giri) from Samurai B. Samurai A steps back (Tai sabaki), narrowly evading. Rapid thrust (Tsuki) aimed at the torso. Blade deflection followed by close-range shoulder check. Spin pivot cut (Mawari-giri) creating circular motion. Locked blades — Tsuba-zeriai (guard clash) moment, intense eye-line tension. Break contact → simultaneous mirror strikes (Ai-uchi) crossing blades mid-air. LOOP TRANSITION: The final crossed blades frame perfectly aligns with the opening stance, creating a seamless infinite combat loop. DETAILING: Armor plates shift with impact, fabric tension visible during movement, sparks subtly flicker on blade contact, dust lifts from foot pivots. LIGHTING: Low-key cinematic beams cutting through a dim dojo. Light shafts catch blade edges during motion. Soft atmospheric haze. SOUND DESIGN: Sharp metallic blade clashes (varied intensity) Subtle armor creaks and fabric tension Foot slides on stone floor Zoetrope mechanical rhythm underneath Low ambient hum (no overpowering music) ENDING (LOOP LOCK): Mid-air blade cross freezes for a split second → seamlessly resets into opening stance, maintaining hypnotic continuity.

prompts.text: Create a 15-second ultra-premium cinematic commercial for futuristic sneakers branded ‘Stridex’, using the provided reference image. Maintain exact design fidelity (materials, structure, colors). Style: high-end sportswear campaign, cinematic, sharp, luxury-grade production, no motion blur, speed expressed through design only. 00:00 – 00:03 Extreme macro close-up of the sneaker surface (mesh, stitching, sculpted lines). Lighting: dramatic studio highlights, soft shadows on pure white seamless background. Camera: slow, controlled glide across textures. 00:03 – 00:06 Close-up tracking shot along the side profile, revealing aerodynamic curves and layered panels. Focus on sharp lines and directional design elements that imply speed through form. Camera: smooth lateral dolly, shallow depth of field. 00:06 – 00:09 Mid-shot rotation of the sneaker (angled 45°), showcasing sole engineering and silhouette. Highlight structured geometry and streamlined outsole. Lighting remains clean, premium, no visual effects. 00:09 – 00:12 Full product reveal. Sneaker centered on a white reflective surface. prompts.text: SHOT 1: ECU, 85mm push-in / 04:00 on a digital watch screen. A hand slams it. / SFX: alarm beep, palm slap. SHOT 2: WS, 35mm handheld jolt / Rhythmic cut into the man jolting upright, grabbing the suitcase by the handle like a hand-shake, and swinging it off the bed in one motion. / SFX: mattress spring, leather creak. SHOT 3: MCU, 50mm slide / Cut on action into a passport hitting a tray, followed by a pair of sunglasses. / SFX: plastic thud, metallic clink. SHOT 4: Insert shot, 85mm rack focus / Match cut into the suitcase zipper closing with a satisfying, high-speed "zip." / SFX: fast zipper slide. SHOT 5: Exterior Wide, 24mm low-angle / Object pass as the man and suitcase "sprint" into frame against the Great Pyramids. Sand kicks up. / SFX: desert wind, running footsteps in sand. SHOT 6: Insert shot, 50mm handheld / Rhythmic cut into a chilled coconut being cracked open, the suitcase "sitting" on a beach chair beside him. / SFX: coconut crack, liquid splash. SHOT 7: MCU, centered 50mm push-in / Match cut into a selfie-angle: The man leans his head against the suitcase like a best friend, the Eiffel Tower sparkling behind them. / SFX: camera shutter, city chatter. SHOT 8: Bird's-eye insert, 35mm overhead / Cut on action into the suitcase wheels spinning furiously across Andean stone. / SFX: wheel hum, stone rattle. SHOT 9: MS, 35mm pivot / Camera wipe into a chaotic market in Marrakech. The man maneuvers the suitcase through silk stalls; the suitcase "dodges" a vendor. / SFX: fabric rustle, distant flute, shouting. SHOT 10: Insert shot, 50mm overhead / Match cut into a stamp slamming down onto a passport page. / SFX: heavy ink thud. SHOT 11: WS, 24mm parallax / Whip pan transition into a speeding train window. The man’s reflection and the suitcase's reflection are side-by-side as mountains blur past. / SFX: train rhythm, wind whistle. SHOT 12: MS to CU, 35mm glide into 85mm push-in / Sound bridge into the airport lounge. He rests his feet on the suitcase; they both "exhale" as the sun sets through the terminal glass. / SFX: muffled PA system, deep sigh. SHOT 13: Insert to MCU, 50mm snap zoom / Smash cut to a front door lock turning. The man and suitcase "stumble" into the dark apartment, looking dusty but happy. / SFX: key turn, door creak. SHOT 14: OTS, 35mm handheld / Rhythmic cut into the man kicking off his boots and the suitcase falling onto its side with a heavy, tired "flop." / SFX: boot thud, leather heavy impact. SHOT 15: WS, 50mm pull-out / L-cut with a match from the floor to the bed. The man collapses onto the mattress; the suitcase "collapses" right next to him on the pillows. He flings an arm over the suitcase like a spouse. Lights fade. / SFX: mattress groan, collective exhale, silence. All credit to @aimikoda + @AIwithSarah_ for the alpha

Steady calm walk throughout — pace never changes, never runs, never slows. JUMP_MODE: creative dimension hopping SEQUENCE: START: white photography infinity studio, already mid-stride, looks directly into camera — casual snap → trigger 1: 1920s silent film set — B&W grain, frozen actors around him, film reel flicker → trigger 2: baroque theater stage — candlelit gold, velvet curtains, powdered wig extras scatter → trigger 3: 1960s Madison Avenue agency — cigarette haze, Helvetica posters, typewriters clacking → trigger 4: 1970s disco inferno — mirror ball overhead, polyester crowd parts, bass in the air → trigger 5: 1980s MTV studio — neon grid floor, fog machines, VHS glitch at frame edges → trigger 6: 1990s startup office — CRT glow, dial-up chaos, developers spin in chairs → trigger 7: 2010s YouTube studio — ring light forest, green screens, vlogger mid-take loses his mind → trigger 8: TikTok hyperreality — split screens multiply, emoji swarm, comments scroll the air → trigger 9: AI generation space — prompt text rains vertically, landscapes bloom and dissolve around him → trigger 10: holographic metaverse — glitching NPC crowds, architecture stutters, reality framerate drops → trigger 11: data singularity — code waterfall, neurons fire, his outline becomes wireframe → trigger 12: white void — silence, only footstep echo, wide smile, still walking forward FINAL: one last snap → seamless loop back to white studio, identical opening shot

prompts.text: Behind the scenes of a location shoot somewhere in the Caribbean using my avatar 📸☀️🌴🐚🐠 Using Seedance 2 on @freepik Try it! Prompt 👇 Low wide-angle camera, 24mm lens, starting position directly in front of the scene at chest height. A photographer stands left of frame camera raised to eye, a tall model in a flowing coral-terracotta gown stands centre frame on coastal rocks, a male assistant crouches low right of centre holding a large reflector, a clothing rack and octabox light stand stand far right. Deep turquoise sea behind them, blue sky, golden hour light from the right. All four subjects are completely frozen in time like statues — rigid, motionless, not a single micro-movement. The model's dress is caught mid-billow toward the sea. A wave is frozen mid-rise on the rocks behind the model, white water suspended in the air. Sea spray particles hang completely motionless in the golden light. Everything is absolutely still — frozen like a photograph. The camera performs a smooth steady counter-clockwise 360-degree orbit around the entire scene at constant low height and constant speed, wide enough to keep all people and equipment visible throughout the full rotation. All subjects remain completely rigid during the entire orbit — frozen like statues, no movement whatsoever, no breathing, no swaying. The orbit reveals the frozen wave from behind, the frozen dress from all angles, the suspended sea spray catching golden light. Exactly when the camera completes its full 360-degree orbit and returns to its original front-facing position — time releases instantly and explosively. The wave crashes powerfully on the rocks behind the model. The dress drops and swirls. The hair falls. The photographer fires the camera — a single instantaneous flash of light, gone immediately. Everything roars back to life simultaneously. Warm amber highlights, cool teal ocean shadows, subtle film grain. Cinematic, photorealistic, ultra sharp. No debris, no particles flying through air, no hallucinations. Sound: near-silence during orbit — low eerie hum. Release: explosive wave crash, sea wind returning, single camera flash pop. No music.

WARDROBE: Morning: soft lounge set (tee + relaxed pants) Office: tailored blazer, fitted top, formal trousers, clean shoes Evening: blazer slightly relaxed, effortless look ENVIRONMENT: Modern apartment → elevator → busy city commute → corporate office → cafeteria → evening city streets SHOT LIST (15 beats): Alarm rings, close-up on phone, hand reaches out Eyes open, soft daylight across face Sitting up, tying hair quickly Bathroom mirror — splashing water, droplets in motion Light makeup touch-up, focused expression Buttoning blouse / adjusting outfit details Putting on blazer — smooth motion Sliding on watch or bracelet Walking through apartment hallway, confident stride Elevator doors close — match cut Fast-paced walk through traffic, reflections and motion blur Entering office — glass doors open Working at desk, typing, quick glance at screen Lunch with colleagues — relaxed smiles, candid interaction Evening walk in city — warm lights, calm expression, subtle smile STYLE & CAMERA: Cinematic realism, soft skin tones, shallow depth of field Dynamic transitions: whip pans, match cuts, speed ramps Lighting progression: cool morning → neutral office → warm evening glow AUDIO: Ambient layers (alarm, footsteps, city, chatter) synced to beat

Prompt :

FORMAT: 15s / 120–140 BPM / 15 SHOTS / beat-synced / seamless match cuts
SUBJECT:
A confident woman in her mid-20s, sharp presence, natural makeup, neatly styled hair. Calm, focused energy.
WARDROBE:
Morning: soft lounge set (tee + relaxed pants)
Office: tailored blazer, fitted top, formal trousers, clean shoes
Evening: blazer slightly relaxed, effortless look
ENVIRONMENT:
Modern apartment → elevator → busy city commute → corporate office → cafeteria → evening city streets
SHOT LIST (15 beats):
Alarm rings, close-up on phone, hand reaches out
Eyes open, soft daylight across face
Sitting up, tying hair quickly
Bathroom mirror — splashing water, droplets in motion
Light makeup touch-up, focused expression
Buttoning blouse / adjusting outfit details
Putting on blazer — smooth motion
Sliding on watch or bracelet
Walking through apartment hallway, confident stride
Elevator doors close — match cut
Fast-paced walk through traffic, reflections and motion blur
Entering office — glass doors open
Working at desk, typing, quick glance at screen
Lunch with colleagues — relaxed smiles, candid interaction
Evening walk in city — warm lights, calm expression, subtle smile
STYLE & CAMERA:
Cinematic realism, soft skin tones, shallow depth of field
Dynamic transitions: whip pans, match cuts, speed ramps
Lighting progression: cool morning → neutral office → warm evening glow
AUDIO:
Ambient layers (alarm, footsteps, city, chatter) synced to beat

prompts.text: Created with seedance 2.0 on @yapper_so Prompt Ultra-realistic cinematic fine art portrait, 8K resolution, soft film grain, rich color grading with deep contrast and natural texture detail. A young woman is positioned in a dense field of wild flowers under fading evening light. The camera captures her from a slightly elevated angle, creating a balanced yet organic composition where nature surrounds her from all sides. She wears a flowing deep burgundy gown with layered fabric that drapes naturally into the grass, blending with the environment while still standing out through rich tone and texture. The material catches light subtly, revealing folds and delicate structure. Her pose feels instinctive and expressive — one arm resting near her head, the other extending gently outward, fingers relaxed as if interacting with the surrounding plants. Her face is turned softly toward the light, eyes half-closed, expression calm and distant, suggesting quiet introspection. Strands of hair fall loosely across her face, moving slightly with the breeze. Wild stems and leaves cross through the frame, partially obscuring parts of her body and adding depth. The environment feels raw, natural, and slightly untamed. Lighting is low and atmospheric, with soft directional light creating gentle highlights on skin and fabric while shadows deepen the mood. The color palette leans into earthy tones — deep reds, muted greens, and subtle purples — with a slightly cool balance in shadows and warm tones on the subject. Shallow depth of field isolates her form while keeping the surrounding textures softly visible. Style: cinematic fine art, dark romantic editorial, naturalistic composition, high-fashion mood.

prompts.text: Prompt Share: I created the first frame in Midjourney as a visual reference SUBJECTS Female enforcer: White long hair, with slightly fluorescent-colored tips; Wearing a loose jacket, fitted top, dark tight pants, and glowing speed shoes emitting a cyan light; Target male: Male, wearing ordinary clothing, a thief; ENVIRONMENT Night market setting, stalls arranged irregularly, string lights at uneven heights, crowd moving in inconsistent directions, wet reflective ground, distant city skyscrapers with neon lights Timeline SHOT 1 (0:00-0:02) Third-person wide shot, 35mm, slight handheld The female protagonist jumps from the edge of a rooftop and enters the frame, body leaning forward as she falls, the city compressed below; the camera follows slightly delayed, creating a sense of speed difference SHOT 2 (0:02-0:03) Medium follow shot During the fall, force is applied through the feet, the shoe soles light up instantly, the fall transitions into a forward dash, the body is pushed and leveled out, the camera passively catches up SHOT 3 (0:03-0:05) POV, 18mm Hands enter the frame, rapidly moving between skyscrapers, buildings stretch into irregular color blocks, space appears like brushstroke smears SHOT 4 (0:05-0:08) POV continues Descending above traffic flow, weaving through gaps between vehicles, headlights form flowing light trails, slight camera shake, focus lags slightly SHOT 5 (0:08-0:10) Third-person rear-side view The protagonist slides into the night market, shoe glow gradually fades, speed decreases but does not fully stop, merging into the flow of the crowd, the camera gets interrupted by passersby blocking the view SHOT 6 (0:10-0:12) Handheld medium shot, obstructed view The camera follows the protagonist moving, the crowd continuously creates occlusion; the target male appears through gaps in the crowd: approaching someone’s backpack, hand reaches out to test then pulls back, head lowered pretending nothing is happening while eyes glance upward to observe; takes two steps, stops again, quickly scans surroundings, behavior clearly suspicious SHOT 7 (0:12-0:13) Rapid push-in The protagonist instantly lowers her body and accelerates, bursting straight out of the crowd to lock onto the target, movement without warning SHOT 8 (0:13-0:14) Medium shot Aerial flying kick hits the male, knocking him to the ground, movement clean and decisive, no unnecessary pause SHOT 9 (0:14-0:15) Target POV looking upward A hand enters from above, naturally lowering a police badge into view; the camera auto-focus locks onto the metallic details of the badge, the night market background fully blurs into multicolored bokeh, frame holds still
