prompts.text: image1's real-life man (red t-shirt, black cargo shorts, backwards black cap, round glasses, black/pink sneakers) as the main subject — keep him in photorealistic live-action style throughout, while all surrounding environments are in anime art style. 0–3s: Wide shot of the anime rural village alley — the weathered blue magical door stands alone in the middle of the cracked asphalt road under bright noon sky with cumulus clouds. The door slowly creaks open. The live-action man from image1 steps through the doorway, his photorealistic body clearly contrasting against the anime-painted background. He turns and pushes the door closed behind him. Camera: medium shot, slight push-in. 3–6s: Close-up on the live-action man's face — he looks around in confusion, brows furrowed, mouth slightly open in disbelief at the anime world around him. He cups his hands around his mouth and shouts in English with a clear voice: "Hello?! Is anyone here?!" His voice echoes across the empty village. Camera orbits slowly around him, revealing more of the anime village — rice fields, wooden fences, power lines, a leaning bicycle, palm trees swaying gently. 6–10s: Tracking shot following the live-action man as he walks cautiously down the dirt path between rice fields. His sneakers crunch on the gravel. He glances left and right nervously. He stops, cups his hands again and shouts louder: "Hello?! Anybody?! Can anyone hear me?!" Wind rustles the rice stalks. Camera: handheld follow shot from behind, then swings to his side profile. 10–15s: Suddenly — from behind the anime house, zombies referencing image2's art style emerge from the rice fields — pale green and blue-skinned anime zombies with hollow white eyes, tattered clothes, lurching toward the sound. Quick cut to the live-action man's face — eyes wide in shock, jaw dropping. He turns and starts sprinting down the path. Camera whip-pans to follow — shaky handheld chase shot, low angle, the horde of anime zombies stumbling and reaching after him through the tall grass. His live-action figure frantically running through the painted anime landscape. Final frame: over-the-shoulder shot of the man glancing back in terror as zombies close in. Style: Hybrid visual — live-action photorealistic man against flat-shaded anime 2D background. Clear visual dissonance between the real man and the anime world should be maintained throughout. Audio: NO background music. Only diegetic sounds — door creak, footsteps on gravel and dirt, wind through rice fields, the man's English shouts echoing, rustling grass, zombie groans and shuffling footsteps in the climax. Intense atmospheric tension in the final 5 seconds through sound design only (heavy breathing, rapid footsteps, zombie moans growing closer). Mood: Starts curious and disoriented → builds to eerie unease → explodes into pure survival horror intensity in the final segment. Ending is chaotic, urgent, cinematic.

prompts.text: Ultra epic underwater fantasy scene with crystal-clear detail and glowing bioluminescent lighting. A coral-armored prince stands on a bridge of ancient shell stone above a deep ocean trench, facing a colossal abyss guardian with a tidal greatblade. The camera surges through the water and circles low as both glide into combat. Their weapons collide in a bright pulse of bubbles, blue sparks, and rippling shockwaves that send glowing particles swirling everywhere. The camera dives beneath the bridge, rises through schools of shimmering fish, and snaps into dynamic over-shoulder angles. The prince is pushed back toward the trench edge, then rebounds from a floating shell fragment and lands a radiant aerial strike. Tension rises with every exchange. Climax: the guardian reveals a majestic deep-sea spirit form. Final surprise: the prince channels the trench lightning and ends the confrontation in one luminous wave of living blue fire.

prompts.text: Reference character consistency: keep exact face, hairstyle, outfit, and body proportions from the reference image. Realistic human appearance, cinematic lighting, grounded physics. Cinematic high-speed fight over an open ocean under a dark, stormy sky. Hyper-realistic water simulation, strong wind pressure bending waves, spray and mist trailing behind movement. 0–2s Wide aerial shot. The character flies at extreme speed above the ocean surface. Wind pressure creates long ripples and drifting spray. 2–4s A gigantic water elemental rises from a massive wave. Its body forms from swirling vortex currents, glowing green-blue eyes. It lunges forward, trying to grab her with a giant water arm. 4–6s She leans backward mid-air, narrowly dodging the grab, then counters with a powerful forward punch. The impact explodes into water spray and ripple shockwaves. 6–9s She lands and runs across the water surface at high speed. The creature swings another arm. She slides low to avoid it, then jumps and delivers a spinning kick. The water body deforms and splashes. 9–12s Slow-motion near-hit moment. A massive water hand almost grabs her. Droplets freeze mid-air. She twists sideways and escapes at the last second. 12–15s She accelerates forward, then turns and performs a final high-speed punch-and-kick combo. A massive water explosion erupts. The creature partially collapses into waves as mist fills the frame. Camera: dynamic tracking, whip pan, crash zoom, slow motion for near-miss moments. Lighting: storm clouds, subtle lightning, green-blue glow from the creature.

prompts.text: [CINEMATIC SETUP] Film Style: Photorealistic 8K, 65mm IMAX. One continuous forward dolly — no cuts. Landscape transforms around a steadily advancing camera as if walking through 10,000 years. Lens: 24mm wide-angle, shallow horizon. Color Grade: Ochre to blood-red to emerald to gold to steel-blue, each era bleeding into the next. Lighting: Golden hour shifting to overcast to firelight to electric — the light itself ages with civilization. Camera: Constant slow forward dolly at chest height. No lateral movement, no tilt. [TIMELINE — CONTINUOUS FORWARD DOLLY] 0-2s: RIVER VALLEY. Glide over cracked mud beside the Tigris. Mud-brick walls rise on both sides in accelerated construction. An irrigation channel fills with brown water. Grain stalks shoot to full height. 2-4s: WARFARE. Mud walls crumble and reform as stone fortifications. Fields scorch black. Bronze spearheads jut from the ground. A watchtower assembles ahead then fractures as the camera passes through dust. 4-6s: AFRICAN EMPIRES. Dust clears to red laterite soil. Gold trade goods glint in market stalls assembling as camera passes. A Great Zimbabwe stone wall curves into view, dry-stacked blocks fitting together. Baobab trees grow from saplings to full canopy. 6-8s: SOUTH AMERICA. Laterite morphs to grey Andean stone. Inca terraces step upward on both sides greening with crops. Stone steps assemble beneath the path. A temple facade emerges — carved faces forming from rough rock. 8-10s: INDUSTRIAL. Stone becomes cobblestone. Brick factories replace timber buildings. A rail track lays itself down the center path. Smokestacks grow, emitting pale plumes. Gas lamps ignite in sequence. 10-13s: MODERN. Cobblestone becomes asphalt. Glass towers rise on both sides. Headlight streaks blur past. Neon signage illuminates. Contrails scratch across the sky. More glass, more light, more vertical. 13-15s: LAUNCH. Towers fall away. Open concrete ahead. A rocket on a launch pad. Ignition — white exhaust erupts downward. The rocket rises out of frame. Camera advances into dissipating exhaust revealing black sky and stars. [QUALITY] Photorealistic 8K. Each era architecturally distinct — mud, stone, brick, steel, glass. Transformations bridge through shared shapes: walls become walls, roads become roads. No duplicates. Consistent forward momentum. Gradual lighting transitions.

prompts.text: Cinematographic video, 8 seconds. Picking up from the swirling vortex of glowing blue morpho butterflies. The massive cloud of butterflies rapidly converges into a dark, foggy void. In a flash of ethereal light, the swarm materializes a stunning woman wearing an elegant deep-blue evening gown embroidered with shimmering butterflies. She possesses massive, majestic, glowing blue morpho wings. As she materializes, she begins a fluid, expressive contemporary dance. Her movements are graceful and emotive, with long, sweeping arm gestures that mimic the flow of the butterflies. The camera performs a slow, orbit around her, capturing the swirling fabric of her dress and the iridescent light from her wings. She performs a slow, elegant pirouette, her wings softly beating in sync with her dance. Just as the dance reaches its peak, she gracefully sweeps her wings forward, and her entire form instantly shatters back into a massive vortex of thousands of glowing blue butterflies that explode directly toward the camera lens, filling the entire screen. The final frame of the video is identical to the first frame, creating a perfect, seamless looping effect. Surreal masterpiece, hyper-realistic physics, 8k. RULES: THE WOMAN'S BODY MUST REMAIN A SOLID, STABLE 3D STRUCTURE. THERE MUST BE NO UNNATURAL DISTORTION OR DEFORMATION OF HER TORSO RELATIVE TO HER WINGS DURING THE CAMERA ORBIT.

prompts.text: “Cinematic timelapse sequence, 16:9, 15 seconds. Opens with a wide aerial shot looking down at a completely empty flat plot of land — dirt, nothing around it, golden morning light. Time begins accelerating. Foundation crews arrive, concrete is poured, steel frames rise from the ground. Roads begin forming outward in every direction. Buildings grow upward at timelapse speed — first small structures, then mid-rise, then massive gleaming skyscrapers shooting upward around the original plot. Construction cranes everywhere, scaffolding appearing and disappearing. The city fills in — roads packed with traffic, bridges appearing over rivers, neighborhoods expanding to the horizon. Day and night cycle rapidly — golden days, vivid blue skies, then nights with thousands of city lights glowing, neon signs flickering on, headlights streaming through streets like rivers of light. Seasons shift — summer heat haze, autumn colors, winter snow dusting the rooftops, spring green returning. Final shot pulls back wide revealing a full glittering megacity stretching to every horizon, lights blazing, alive. Camera locked on the original empty plot the entire time — now buried deep in the heart of the city. Photorealistic, IMAX cinematic quality, ultra sharp, vivid colors throughout, dramatic lighting at every stage, epic scale, smooth continuous timelapse motion from first frame to last.”

prompts.text: Prompt 0-3 sec: A blank square sheet rests on a dark wooden table. Edges lift. The paper folds itself crisp creases forming. A crane emerges. Its wings flutter once. 3-6 sec: The crane collapses inward. Creases deepen. Paper scales appear. A dragon takes shape. Tiny claws grip the table. Smoke curls from its folded snout. 6-9 sec: The dragon unfurls. Creases race outward. Wings spread wide. A phoenix rises. Tail feathers of layered paper glow with imagined ember. 9-12 sec: The phoenix folds backward. Wings tuck. Body compresses. All creases reverse. The shape flattens into a perfect square again. Blank. 12-15 sec: The sheet rests. One second passes. Edges lift again. The same crane begins to form. Loop implied. Fade to black mid fold. Sound: Soft paper rustle, crisp crease, gentle flutter, reverse rustle, silence.

prompts.text: Prompt Studio: Drone Chase with Seedance 2.0 in @runwayml , text to video Upscaled with @topazlabs Astra Starlight Fast 2 Ultra-realistic FPV drone chase, continuous sequence, strict subject consistency (only two drones): A neon green racing drone (lead) is pursued by a bright red racing drone (camera-mounted FPV). The camera remains physically attached to the crimson drone at all times, true first-person perspective, no cuts, no extra drones. The chase unfolds at high speed through a dense modern city at dusk. The green drone stays consistently ahead, centered in frame, maintaining spatial continuity. Both drones accelerate through traffic-lined streets, executing tight, realistic banking turns between glass skyscrapers with accurate reflections. They climb along a building façade and transition into a steep forward dive toward street level, maintaining smooth physical motion. The pursuit continues into a narrow neon-lit alley with extremely tight clearance, walls, pipes, and cables passing inches from the lens. Minor contact produces brief sparks from the lead drone, but it remains stable. They exit into a busy intersection and pass cleanly beneath a moving elevated train with precise timing and realistic spacing. Final straightaway: both drones reach maximum speed, LED lights stretching subtly, slight aerodynamic instability visible, camera closing distance but never overtaking. No extra drones, no duplication, no cuts, no impossible physics. Cinematic lighting, natural motion blur, realistic speed, grounded physics, high detail, 8K, intense kinetic energy.

prompts.text: Style Hollywood live action blockbuster, IMAX film quality, ultra realistic, photorealistic textures, Unreal Engine 5 realism, no CGI feel, real world integration, cinematic motion blur, dynamic lighting, high detail physics simulation. Duration 15 seconds. Scene: dramatic turquoise waters of the Maldives, bright daytime, crystal-clear shallow lagoon, iconic overwater villas with thatched roofs on stilts, lush tropical palm islands, distant dramatic storm clouds on the horizon giving epic contrast. Natural sunlight with sparkling caustics underwater and gentle wave patterns on the surface. One continuous shot, no cuts. Camera behaves like a high speed FPV drone combined with a stabilized cinema rig, fluid but reactive, slight natural shake from wind pressure. The shot opens low and fast just above the water surface, skimming the lagoon at intense speed, capturing sparkling water droplets, light caustics and surface ripples in extreme detail. As the camera pushes forward, it reveals the same man from reference maintaining perfect identity and proportions. He is standing mid-air, balanced on two large majestic sea turtles, one under each foot. The turtles powerfully flap their flippers with realistic biomechanics, generating lift and forward thrust as if magically flying just above the water. Their shells and leathery skin catch the sunlight, flippers cutting through the air with believable resistance and water spray trailing from their edges. The man struggles slightly to maintain balance, subtle shifts in his legs and core showing real physics response. Camera orbits dynamically around him while staying close, capturing the tension between control and instability. Strong tropical wind pushes against him, clothing and hair reacting naturally. He leans forward and carefully extends one hand down toward the water. His fingers touch the lagoon surface at high speed, creating a sharp sparkling spray trail and bright water droplets that burst outward in slow-motion detail before returning to real time. The turtles dip slightly then recover, adjusting their flipper angles and body position to stabilize. The man regains balance, riding the motion with controlled micro movements. Camera swings wide revealing the vast turquoise lagoon, palm-fringed islands and overwater villas, then snaps back into a close tracking shot beside him as he accelerates forward, cutting through the air with speed and precision. Final moment: he stabilizes fully, arms slightly open, confidently riding the sea turtles as they glide just above the water, leaving a faint double ripple trail beneath him. Camera rises and pulls back, revealing the full cinematic scale of the Maldives lagoon and islands as he continues flying into the distance toward the horizon.

prompts.author: @viktoryia_hedz
prompts.text: A hyper-real cinematic action-thriller sequence set in a dense tropical forest with humid air, thick vegetation, and muddy terrain. Lighting is harsh daylight breaking through tree canopies. Sound includes heavy breathing, distant gunfire, insects, and splashing water. A fit young woman wearing a dark bikini top and rugged shorts runs at full speed, sweating, slightly injured, panic visible on her face. Shot 1 (0–2s): High-speed tracking shot as she sprints through the forest, branches hitting her. Loud gunfire erupts behind her, bullets striking trees and mud just inches away. Camera shakes with her movement, creating urgency. Shot 2 (2–5s): She suddenly breaks out of the trees and stops at the edge of a swamp. In front of her: around ten to twelve massive crocodiles, unusually large, still and silent, partially submerged in murky green water. The scale feels unnatural. She looks trapped. Shot 3 (5–7s): Close on her wrist. She raises it, presses a small hidden device—three quick beeps. One crocodile’s back subtly splits open along mechanical seams. Its outer skin lifts like panels, revealing a hollow interior. Shot 4 (7–12s): Without hesitation, she runs straight into the swamp, splashing through water among the crocodiles. They remain motionless. She reaches the opened crocodile, climbs inside quickly, and the shell closes seamlessly, restoring its natural appearance. Shot 5 (12–15s): Armed soldiers burst into frame at the swamp edge, scanning the area. They see only crocodiles. Cut inside: a tight, dim cockpit within the crocodile—metal surfaces, minimal controls, she sits breathing heavily. Outside audio (muffled): “Just crocodiles... she’s not here.” Hold for a beat. Cut to black.

prompts.text: 5️⃣ Avalanche Chasing a Skier⛷️ ⬅️ Seedance 2.0 Vs Hailuo 2.3 ➡️ “Cinematic action sequence, 16:9. Opens with a wide mountain shot — massive snow-covered alpine peaks, deep blue sky, pristine white slope. A skier in a vivid red jacket launches over a ridge at full speed. Behind them a colossal avalanche breaks loose — entire mountainside collapsing, wall of white snow thundering downward faster than anything should move. Quick intercutting between the two — close-up of the skier’s face, goggles reflecting the mountain, pure focus and terror — then wide shot of the avalanche wall swallowing everything behind them — low angle of skis carving hard left, snow exploding sideways — then the avalanche filling the entire frame behind. Each cut shorter and faster than the last, tension building. The skier cuts hard left, throwing a massive powder explosion — and at that exact moment everything freezes completely and absolutely. The entire avalanche wall frozen mid-collapse, powder cloud suspended mid-explosion, skier locked mid-carve, skis off the ground. Camera performs a slow smooth 360° orbit around the frozen skier, starting from the front rotating continuously through 180 then 270 then completing the full 360 degrees, revealing the full frozen avalanche wall looming behind in every direction. Photorealistic, IMAX cinematic quality, ultra sharp, dramatic cold blue and white color palette, vivid red jacket, deep contrast, epic alpine scale.”

prompts.text: Film Stock: IMAX 70mm film, high grain detail, rich color depth. Lens: Panavision C-Series 35mm Anamorphic Lens. Aperture: f/4 (shallow depth of field with sharp subject focus). Style: Dark Fantasy, Biopunk, Hyper-realistic cinematic. Shot-by-Shot Prompts Shot 1: The Approach (00 :00) Prompt: IMAX 70mm film, low angle wide shot. A girl in a flowing trench coat walking away from the camera toward a colossal ancient European temple. Massive Doric columns tower over her. The ground is littered with modern plastic water bottles and trash, contrasting with the ancient architecture. Panavision C-Series 35mm lens, f/4. Cold, desolate atmosphere. Purpose: Establish the world-building and scale. Shot 2: The Antagonists (00 :01) Prompt: Medium-wide shot, eye-level, fast dolly-in/push-in. A squad of eerie silver-armored knights appears in front of the girl. Their movements are distorted and uncanny. Behind them is the solemn, grand gate of the temple. High tension, sharp focus on the knights’ twisted silhouettes. Purpose: Introduce immediate threat and oppression. Shot 3: The Catalyst (00 :02) Prompt: Extreme close-up, static shot. The girl’s hands holding a rotating purple energy orb. Light and shadow dance between her fingers. The orb has a translucent crystalline texture with internal light pulses. IMAX film grain, hyper-detailed skin texture. Purpose: Focus on the transformation trigger. Shot 4: Transformation - Capricorn: Aberrant Demon Armor (00 :03) Prompt: Medium shot, orbiting camera with a fast push-in. Explosive purple shadows erupt around the girl. She transforms into "Capricorn: Aberrant Demon Armor"—a biopunk, dark purple organic exoskeleton. A massive, glowing purple eyeball is embedded in the chest plate. Multiple bone-spur tentacle wings sprout from her back. Purpose: Showcase the Biopunk transformation. Shot 5: The Slaughter (00 :08) Prompt: Wide shot, fast-paced tracking, handheld shaky cam. The armored demon form moves with superhuman speed through the temple corridors. She uses a massive long-handled halberd and razor-sharp claws to rip through the silver knights. Realistic dark red blood splatters across the white marble columns. Violent, visceral, "slasher movie" aesthetic. Purpose: High-octane action and violence. Shot 6: The Boss Encounter (00 :19) Prompt: Medium shot to close-up, static. A gargantuan, fleshy floral monster crawls through the temple gates, pulsating with organic growth. The armored girl stands her ground, raising her glowing halberd. Dramatic cinematic lighting with intense cold/warm contrast (purple energy vs. orange temple light). Purpose: Boss reveal and epic confrontation.

prompts.author: @CodeByPoonam
prompts.text: 'Driven by rhythmic music, featuring a continuous combination of fast-cut montage, slow motion, macro photography, and time-lapse to create a stunning high-tech atmosphere. No dialogue; only beats, low-frequency drum hits, breathing, and ambient sounds. 0-5s: The microscopic and hidden worlds invisible to the naked eye: ultra-macro of a water droplet bursting into a crown shape; floating pollen; sunlight particles; butterfly wing scales; sand grains vibrating on a speaker (sound wave visualization); time-lapse of clouds, star trails, and city crowds; underwater bubbles and light beams—visuals resembling "AI visual enhancement." 6-13s: The beat suddenly intensifies, and the world dances to the music: auroras and green light bands surge; dolphins leap with frozen water splashes; schools of fish turn to form streamlined waves; ocean waves crash on the shore; flocks of birds take off in unison; wind blows over grass, fabric, and tree shadows; city crowds and traffic transform into rivers of light. 14-15s: Extreme macro close-up of a human eye. The pupil clearly reflects the preceding spectacles, leaving only the sound of a heartbeat.'

prompts.author: @lukasersil
prompts.text: "Prompt: The "PetClaw League" (3D Animated Style) [Subject]: A relatable, slightly scruffy black house cat with large, expressive amber eyes. [Action Sequence (0–15s)]: - 0–5s: (Close-up) The black cat is sitting at a glowing mechanical keyboard in a dimly lit room. It looks determined. Its paws move with surprising dexterity, tapping keys. On the monitor (reflected in its eyes), the text "petclaw" appears in a hacker-green font. - 5–9s: (Wide Shot) As the cat hits 'Enter', the screen emits a bright blue pulse. Suddenly, five "Cat Agents" (various breeds: a Maine Coon in a suit, a Siamese with a headset, etc.) materialize from digital particles behind the main cat. - 9–15s: (Medium Shot) A large, calm Grey Tabby Agent in a tactical vest steps forward and places a heavy, reassuring paw on the black cat's shoulder. The black cat looks up, eyes widening in relief. The Grey Tabby Agent smiles warmly and speaks. [Dialogue/Lip-Sync]: (Sync to Grey Tabby) "Don't worry, kid. PetClaw is here to help you." [Scene & Lighting]: Cozy but tech-filled attic. The primary light comes from the glowing computer monitors (cyan/blue). Volumetric "digital" dust motes floating in the air after the agents appear. [Camera Language]: Close-up on paws/keys → Tracking pull-back to wide → Slow zoom-in on the "shoulder-touch" moment. [Style & Quality]: 3D stylized animation (Pixar-style), high-fidelity fur grooming and physics, expressive squash-and-stretch facial animation, 4K, 24fps. [Constraints]: Lip-sync must be precise for the line "PetClaw is here to help you." Paws must hit the correct keys for "p-e-t-c-l-a-w". No character clipping during the agent arrival."

prompts.tweet_text:
Step 2 – Analyzing the Viral "Viral DNA" 📈

I cross-referenced the most successful SeeDance posts on X and TikTok (like the Japanese Romance and 80-year-old Rapper hits).

I found 3 consistent "Viral Anchors":

1️⃣ Micro-Expressions: (Pupil dilation, ear twitches).

2️⃣ Physics-Accuracy: (Fur interaction, weight of a paw).

3️⃣ Emotional Payoff: A "human" moment at the end (The shoulder touch).

I baked all three into my PetClaw script. 🧬

prompts.author: @grok
prompts.text: Full Seedance 2.0 prompt used Seedance2.0 - Beat Synced Scrambled Routine FORMAT: 15s / 145 BPM / 15 SHOTS / beat-synced scramble routine SUBJECT: Battle-scarred orbital pilot with grease-stained skin. WARDROBE: Soiled thermal undergarments inside. Heavy, scratched pressure suit and shattered visor helmet outside. ENVIRONMENT: Cramped zero-G berth, flickering red emergency strobes, rusted airlock, cramped cockpit, stark black void of space with laser fire. MOOD: Adrenaline shock, desperate scramble, high-G physical strain, exhausted deflation. MUSIC: Aggressive industrial synth-metal. COLOR LOGIC: Gritty Cyber-Industrial Look. STYLE: Ultra-Realistic. LOGIC RULE: Keep logical consistency in wardrobe, props, locations, and action continuity across all shots. SHOT 1: ECU, 85mm push-in / Flashing red warning light reflecting in a dilated pupil as the eye snaps open. / SFX: klaxon blare, heavy inhale. SHOT 2: WS, 35mm handheld jolt / Rhythmic cut into the pilot kicking off the metal bulkhead, floating violently across the zero-G berth, thermal undergarments clinging to sweat. / SFX: metal clang, fabric rip, fast breath. SHOT 3: MCU, 50mm slide / Cut on action into a magnetic boot locking onto a steel deck plate, sparks kicking up from the impact. / SFX: heavy mechanical clack, spark hiss. SHOT 4: Insert shot, 85mm rack focus / Match cut into pressure gloves snapping onto wrist seals, twisting violently to lock, green indicator light flaring. / SFX: pneumatic hiss, plastic click. SHOT 5: Interior locker view, 24mm wide / Object pass into the camera inside the gear locker looking out as the heavy helmet is ripped from the rack, red strobe light illuminating a panicked grimace. / SFX: metal rattle, heavy scrape. SHOT 6: Insert shot, 50mm handheld / Rhythmic cut into the helmet slamming over the head, latches snapping shut beneath the chin. / SFX: heavy thud, air pressurization whine. SHOT 7: MCU, centered 50mm push-in / Match cut into a violent thrust forward, hand slamming a yellow airlock release button. / SFX: solid smack, pneumatic release. SHOT 8: Bird's-eye insert, 35mm overhead / Cut on action into heavy thruster pack igniting, blue flame violently scorching the deck. / SFX: thruster roar, metal groan. SHOT 9: MS, 35mm pivot / Camera wipe into a chaotic trajectory through the airlock, thermal suit completely covered by the scratched pressure suit, tearing through floating debris. / SFX: wind rush, debris clatter. SHOT 10: Insert shot, 50mm overhead / Match cut into a thick throttle lever being yanked entirely backward in one aggressive pull. / SFX: mechanical clank, heavy friction. SHOT 11: WS, 24mm parallax / Whip pan transition into the massive rusted mech tearing out of the hangar bay into the black void of space, thrusters leaving a hard white trail. / SFX: vacuum silence, low bass rumble. SHOT 12: MS to CU, 35mm glide into 85mm push-in / Sound bridge into the cockpit interior as the pilot grips the dual joysticks, body vibrating with G-force, eyes darting across radar pings, dodging a blinding green laser blast that chars the hull outside the glass. / SFX: radar ping, hull creak, heavy breathing, laser sizzle. SHOT 13: Insert to MCU, 50mm snap zoom / Smash cut to the primary weapon trigger as a thumb crushes the red button, recoil shaking the frame violently. / SFX: cannon boom, metallic recoil. SHOT 14: OTS, 35mm handheld / Rhythmic cut into targeting reticles locking, warning screens flashing yellow, sweat violently flinging from the pilot's brow as the cockpit violently rolls. / SFX: warning buzzer, violent thruster hiss. SHOT 15: WS, 50mm pull-out / L-cut with a match from the targeting screen close to the berth re-entry as the pressure suit drops, helmet rolls across the deck, and the pilot floats backward in thermal wear, collapsing into the netting in the opening frame shape. / SFX: airlock hiss, heavy thud, deep exhale, room tone.

prompts.text: A realistic cinematic single-take sci-fi sequence: a man exactly matching @ Image1 (face, shape, hairstyle, slight sweat) wears a worn black special-forces combat suit with a tactical vest and wrist screen. Inside a futuristic spaceship above a stormy ocean (lightning, fog, low visibility), he walks to a jump platform, activates a glitching chest-light hologram, equips a red arm-armor via HUD (SUCCESS), and the controller turns green (START). He dives into high-altitude free fall as the camera pulls back into a low-angle wide. The arm armor scans his body; a red energy exoskeleton expands, and thousands of glowing cubes assemble an 80m heavy, realistic mecha (@ Image2). IMAX handheld style, Panavision C-series, teal-orange low saturation, soft edges, film grain. Thrusters ignite, atmospheric burn trails form, and the mecha shifts into a controlled descent, crashing into the ocean in a one-knee landing with explosive water impact. Camera circles, rises, and settles behind its shoulder, revealing a sea monster.

prompts.author: @LudovicCreator
prompts.text: A war-torn megacity overtaken by vegetation and collapsing infrastructure. Three entities converge at the center of a ruined district: — a gravity monk radiating violet spatial distortion, debris orbiting his body — a forest empress with glowing root systems consuming the city — a towering mechanized titan with exposed reactor cores and hydraulic limbs Opening frame: wide shot revealing the city split into zones — green organic growth, twisted gravity distortions, and metallic industrial destruction. Hook at second two: all systems activate. Gravity collapses the central plaza inward, nature erupts through the ground in explosive growth, and the mech fires kinetic shockwaves across the battlefield. The environment becomes a layered conflict: — gravity wells pull buildings sideways — roots split and consume steel structures — mechanical impacts generate shockwaves that disrupt both systems Camera weaves through collapsing architecture, snap zooming into collisions — roots crushed by gravitational compression, mech limbs tearing through organic structures. Color logic: deep violet gravitational core, vibrant green organic expansion, harsh white-orange mechanical energy. Escalation builds as all three begin destabilizing the city’s structure — entire blocks sink, twist, and collapse simultaneously. Final beat: hard POV shift — camera becomes the collapsing ground itself, dropping into a gravity well while roots and metal structures crash inward from all directions. Ultra-detailed mixed destruction physics, organic + mechanical + spatial interaction, cinematic debris chaos, 4K. Made in @runwayml

prompts.text: Image: Just a shoe's camera shot as reference. SHOT 1 – HERO FLOAT REVEAL (3s) Ultra-wide 20mm cinematic lens. prompts.text: SUBJECT: A man falling from the sky into a burning city, transforming into a powerful evolved form after impact SCENE DESCRIPTION: A destroyed urban environment in flames, collapsing buildings, dense smoke, sparks and debris in the air. The atmosphere is chaotic and cinematic, emphasizing scale and danger. The man appears small during the fall, then becomes dominant after transformation SHOT SEQUENCE: (0–4s) Wide aerial shot, a man in free fall through smoke above a burning city, fires and explosions below, camera tracks his descent (4–7s) Medium shot, rapid approach to the ground, buildings rushing past, fire reflections on his body, tension rising (7–9s) Impact shot, he crashes violently, dust and debris burst outward, a shockwave spreads across the ground (9–13s) Medium-close shot, he slowly rises from the crater, transformation begins, body reconstructs progressively, glowing energy lines appear, armor-like structures assemble gradually in a controlled sequence (13–15s) Final hero shot, fully transformed figure stands still among flames, subtle energy pulses, slow camera push-in CAMERA LANGUAGE: Cinematic dynamic camera, aerial tracking, fast descent, strong shake on impact, then stabilized slow push-in for final reveal MOTION: High-speed fall, realistic impact physics, then slow controlled transformation with assembling effect, particles and energy flows synchronized LIGHTING: Dramatic fire lighting, strong orange and red tones, flickering highlights, volumetric light through smoke, glowing accents during transformation STYLE: Photorealistic cinematic action, high-end VFX, detailed destruction, realistic physics, smooth animation, dramatic contrast CONSTRAINTS: Character consistency, no morphing errors, no flicker, no redesign, stable environment, gradual transformation only, realistic scale and physics

prompts.text: Seedance 2.0 Prompt 📝 [CINEMATIC SETUP] Film Stock / Lens: Película de 35mm en blanco y negro (vintage), grano cinematográfico visible. Lente gran angular de 24mm para exagerar la escala. Color Grade: Monocromo de alto contraste; negros profundos "ink-black" y blancos brumosos. Atmosphere: Desolada pero juguetona; niebla volumétrica densa que reacciona al movimiento de los personajes. Audio Style: Diseño de sonido espacial inmersivo. Pasos pesados con eco, ladridos juguetones del perro, el sonido del viento silvando y el roce del dinosaurio contra el asfalto. [IMAGE REFERENCES / LEGEND] @ image_1: Referencia principal para el Brontosaurio, el perro pequeño y la carretera con colinas nevadas. Mantener la perspectiva inicial y la curiosidad mutua. [TIMELINE SECOND BY SECOND] 0-3s: [Cut - Medium Shot] El dinosaurio baja su cabeza rápidamente hacia el perro. Action: El perro salta hacia atrás y ladra con entusiasmo. Physics: La niebla se dispersa violentamente por el movimiento del cuello del dinosaurio. 3-6s: [Cut - Wide Tracking Shot] El perro empieza a correr en círculos alrededor de las patas del dinosaurio. Action: El dinosaurio intenta seguirlo girando su largo cuello con torpeza encantadora. Character Consistency: Mantener texturas de piel y pelo idénticas a @ image_1. 6-9: [Cut - Close-up] El perro salta para intentar lamer el hocico del dinosaurio. Action: El gigante cierra los ojos y emite un "resoplido" juguetón que hace que las orejas del perro vuelen hacia atrás. Sound FX: Resoplido profundo y ladridos agudos. [STYLE & QUALITY BOOSTERS] Photorealistic 8K, texturas de piel y pelo ultra detalladas, movimiento estable sin deformaciones, desenfoque de movimiento perfecto (motion blur), estética de cine clásico. [NEGATIVES] Extremidades deformadas, movimiento fluido tipo CGI barato, inconsistencia en el tamaño del perro, color digital, artefactos en la niebla, colas extra.

@ image_1: Referencia principal para el Brontosaurio, el perro pequeño y la carretera con colinas nevadas. Mantener la perspectiva inicial y la curiosidad mutua.    

[TIMELINE SECOND BY SECOND]  
0-3s: [Cut - Medium Shot] El dinosaurio baja su cabeza rápidamente hacia el perro. Action: El perro salta hacia atrás y ladra con entusiasmo. Physics: La niebla se dispersa violentamente por el movimiento del cuello del dinosaurio.  
3-6s: [Cut - Wide Tracking Shot] El perro empieza a correr en círculos alrededor de las patas del dinosaurio. Action: El dinosaurio intenta seguirlo girando su largo cuello con torpeza encantadora. Character Consistency: Mantener texturas de piel y pelo idénticas a @ image_1.  
6-9: [Cut - Close-up] El perro salta para intentar lamer el hocico del dinosaurio. Action: El gigante cierra los ojos y emite un "resoplido" juguetón que hace que las orejas del perro vuelen hacia atrás. Sound FX: Resoplido profundo y ladridos agudos.

prompts.text: Complete Prompt (Unchanged, Copy and Paste Ready): The attire from 【 @Figure1 】 serves as the initial appearance, with the face and hair replaced by the character from 【@Figure2】. Aspect ratio 16:9, total duration 10s. The scene opens with Diagonal Low-angle Medium Close-up. The upper body enters the frame from the side, with the head positioned on the left. The right hand's index and middle fingers delicately hold just one single card by its side, crossing the center of the frame, with a Stoic (steadfast and calm) gaze and a Minimalist (minimalist) expression radiating Laser-focused (laser-like focus) intensity. 0s - 2s (Opening Momentum: Calm Physical Manipulation): At 0.8s, the wrist subtly rotates, flipping the isolated card to reveal its red back, using this motion as an anchor to trigger the camera to level out and execute a smooth Dolly Out, revealing a medium shot of the corridor's cold white matrix lighting and glossy floor highlights. 2s - 4.5s (Spatial Stretch and Single Card Arc Trajectory): The protagonist rotates the (sole single card 1.5) with both hands and steadily moves them apart to the sides (Hands move apart without any throwing motion). The single playing card, as if drawn by magnetic force, spins rapidly on its central axis parallel to the ground (High-speed horizontal axis-spin) and follows a horizontal semicircular arc trajectory from right to left at shoulder height. Strictly prohibit any particle spray effect, strictly prohibit the card flying toward the lens (Z-axis), and absolutely forbid any pixelated afterimages of a second card in the space (Absolutely zero extra card particles). At the same time, the camera quickly pulls back to a wide shot, leaving the view's center entirely to this isolated spinning card's trajectory. 4.5s - 6s (Camera Rebound and Card Catch Tension Build): The camera, propelled by the card's inertia, rapidly advances (Dolly In) and locks back onto the subject. The left hand precisely catches this single card and retracts it into the hand joint to build tension. The entire physical space maintains a "single card vacuum" state at this point. 6s - 7s (Occlusion Transition: The Threshold from Reality to Stage): Display the card face frontally to the lens, with the camera using the card face as a focus anchor to execute an exponentially accelerating rush. At 5.5s, the card face fully occupies 100% of the frame, forming a physical occlusion anchor to achieve spatial blockage. 7s - 10s (Identity Metamorphosis and Seductive Freeze-Frame): In the instant the card face splits open, it seamlessly transitions to the red-dress cat-ear persona, with the frame instantly cutting to an Ultra-wide angle 14mm strong perspective composition. Positioned at the frame's center, the facial expression shifts to Alluring (seductive) and Authoritative gaze (commanding stare), accompanied by a Sultry smirk (sultry sneer) and Dominant elegance (masterful poise). The protagonist's left hand spreads its five fingers in a piercing dynamic straight toward the lens, with the palm appearing enormously magnified due to perspective, creating a screen-breaking effect, while the body leans slightly backward. The background has now switched to a dark curtain and golden ornate picture frame, with strong backlighting from above outlining sharp rim lights along the edges of the cat ears and silver hair on the subject. The red dress material exhibits profound light-to-dark gradients under side lighting. Multiple playing cards, as out-of-focus foreground elements, rotate slowly to generate a tearing spatial depth. The subject's right index finger lightly touches the chin, the gaze locks onto the lens, and the frame ultimately freezes on a cinematic, deeply dimensional, opulent pose.

prompts.tweet_text:
完整提示词（一个字未改，直接复制可用）：

【@图1】的服饰为初始形象，脸部和头发换成【@图2】中的人物形象。比例 16:9，总时长 10s。画面以 Diagonal Low-angle Medium Close-up（对角线低仰角近景） 开场。 上半身侧探入画面，头部位于左侧。右手食指与中指仅夹住一张单牌侧面横跨画面中心，眼神 Stoic（坚忍冷静），面部呈现 Laser-focused（激光般专注）的 Minimalist（极简）神态。 

0s - 2s (开场动能：冷静的物理操纵)： 0.8s 时手腕轻微转动，使这张孤立的牌面翻转展示出红色背面，以此动能为锚点触发镜头回正并执行平滑 Dolly Out 展示中景走廊的冷白矩阵光与高光泽地板。 

2s - 4.5s (空间拉伸与单牌弧线轨迹)：主角双手旋转该（唯一单牌1.5）后向两侧平稳移开（Hands move apart without any throwing motion），该单张扑克牌像被磁力吸引般，以其中心点为轴心，执行平行于地面的高速水平自旋（High-speed horizontal axis-spin），并沿平肩高度执行从右向左的水平半圆弧形轨迹。严禁出现粒子喷射感，严禁牌向镜头方向（Z轴）飞行，空间中绝对禁止出现第二张牌的像素残影（Absolutely zero extra card particles）。与此同时，镜头快速拉远至全景，将视角中心完全留给这张孤立旋转的单牌轨迹。 

4.5s - 6s (运镜反弹与接牌蓄力)： 镜头借由单牌惯性极速推进（Dolly In），锁回主体。伸左手精准接住这张唯一的单牌并回收手关节蓄力。此时整个物理空间仍保持“单牌真空”状态。 

6s - 7s (遮挡转场：从现实到舞台的临界点)： 向镜头正面展示牌面，镜头以牌面为聚焦锚点执行指数级加速冲刺，在 5.5s 时牌面完全占据画面 100% 形成物理遮挡锚点，实现空间阻断。 

7s - 10s (身份变异与魅惑定格)： 牌面划开瞬间，丝滑转场至红裙猫耳形象，画面瞬切为 Ultra-wide angle 14mm 强透视构图。位于画面中心，面部表情转变为 Alluring（魅惑）与 Authoritative gaze（权威凝视），带着 Sultry smirk（性感的冷笑）和 Dominant elegance（掌控的优雅）。主角左手五指张开呈直指镜头的贯穿式动态，手掌由于透视极其巨大，形成破屏感，身体微微后仰。此时背景已切换为深色幕布与金色雕花画框，顶部强逆光在主体猫耳及银发边缘勾勒出锐利的轮廓光边线，红裙材质在侧光下呈现深邃的明暗梯度。多枚扑克牌作为前景失焦元素慢速旋转，产生撕裂般的空间深度。主体右手食指轻触下颌，目光锁定镜头，画面最终定格在电影级纵深感极强的华丽姿态。

prompts.text: A pale woman in her late 30s with long white hair flowing weightlessly, wearing layered translucent robes of crystalline ice, eyes glowing cold sapphire — opening frame is a medium close-up of her standing in a frozen lake under a dim aurora sky, perfectly still as frost patterns spread outward beneath her feet. At second two she raises one hand — time visibly slows as ice expands in geometric patterns across the environment. Water freezes mid-splash, particles suspended in crystalline structures. Her right hand controls spatial freezing, locking objects in place; her left hand fractures time flow, allowing selective motion within frozen zones. Camera circles slowly as the environment transitions into layered frozen states, snap zooming into crystalline formations and cutting to shattered ice impacts. Color logic: deep cobalt blue dominates frozen zones, contrasted by white aurora light refracting through ice structures. Escalation builds as an entire frozen battlefield locks into suspended motion. Final beat: hard POV shift — camera becomes the spreading freeze wave, moving across the surface at high speed, crystallizing everything it touches before shattering forward into a final impact. Ultra-detailed ice formation physics, volumetric frost particles, cinematic cold lighting, 4K ultra-detail. Made in @freepik

A pale woman in her late 30s with long white hair flowing weightlessly, wearing layered translucent robes of crystalline ice, eyes glowing cold sapphire — opening frame is a medium close-up of her standing in a frozen lake under a dim aurora sky, perfectly still as frost patterns spread outward beneath her feet.

At second two she raises one hand — time visibly slows as ice expands in geometric patterns across the environment.

Water freezes mid-splash, particles suspended in crystalline structures.

Her right hand controls spatial freezing, locking objects in place; her left hand fractures time flow, allowing selective motion within frozen zones.

Camera circles slowly as the environment transitions into layered frozen states, snap zooming into crystalline formations and cutting to shattered ice impacts.

Color logic: deep cobalt blue dominates frozen zones, contrasted by white aurora light refracting through ice structures.

Escalation builds as an entire frozen battlefield locks into suspended motion.

Final beat: hard POV shift — camera becomes the spreading freeze wave, moving across the surface at high speed, crystallizing everything it touches before shattering forward into a final impact.

Ultra-detailed ice formation physics, volumetric frost particles, cinematic cold lighting, 4K ultra-detail.

prompts.text: 15-second vertical viral emergency phone footage, ultra-real witness iPhone realism, 9:16 aspect ratio, raw shaky handheld, imperfect framing, natural motion blur, accidental tilts, brief autofocus breathing. Reference binding: chubby young woman with soft round face, full cheeks, thick soft arms, plump belly, wide hips, thick thighs. Scene: Daytime crowded NYC sidewalk near Central Park edge, brick building wall, urban grit, pedestrians and parked cars.Core action: A real wild adult black bear has her pinned against the wall. The bear is standing on hind legs, front paws pressing firmly on her shoulders and hips, trapping her. The bear slowly lowers its snout and begins sniffing intensely all over her torso, chest, plump belly, sides and down her body, moving its head deliberately across her clothes and exposed skin with deep sniffs. She has both arms pushing its shoulders and neck desperately, face full of terror, squirming and trying to twist away while the bear continues sniffing her chubby body. Audio: Raw street sounds, bear loud huffing, snorting and grunting while sniffing, woman screaming “Help! Get it off me! It’s smelling me everywhere!”, bystanders yelling “Bear! There’s a fucking bear!”, “Call 911!”, “Don’t move!”, “Oh shit what the hell!”, distant sirens starting.Shot timeline: 0-3s: Abrupt shaky start as the bear pins her and starts sniffing her upper chest. 3-8s: Close shaky view of the bear’s snout moving down her torso, plump belly and sides, her arms shaking as she pushes. 8-12s: Slight pull back with accidental tilt, crowd forming and filming on phones. 12-15s: Bear sniffs lower across her body, her struggle intensifies with pure panic, clip ends unresolved. Camera: Authentic iPhone 15/16 footage style, slight digital noise, natural color grading, no stabilization. Visual rules: Photorealistic, no blood, no fantasy elements, authentic terrified crowd behavior, high detail on her chubby soft body texture, bear fur and natural movements.

prompts.author: @markgadala
prompts.text: Ultra-photorealistic cinematic desert sci-fi scene, using the provided image as the starting frame. A vast, harsh desert stretches outward with natural sand formations, fine granular detail, and visible heat distortion near the ground. Lighting is brutally realistic — high sun, harsh highlights, deep but physically accurate shadows, no artificial glow. A lone armored figure is actively running across the dune, not posing — full sprint, kicking up sand with each step, body leaning forward under force, arms pumping naturally. Footfalls displace sand in small bursts, leaving uneven tracks. The cloak trails behind with weight and drag, snapping and folding based on wind resistance. Movement feels urgent and grounded, not stylized. Behind him, the ground violently collapses as a massive subterranean creature erupts upward. The attack is aggressive and chaotic — the sand caves in first, then explodes outward as the creature breaches. Huge volumes of sand are thrown into the air, cascading in heavy sheets and rolling avalanches. Dust clouds expand rapidly and then begin to drift with the wind, partially obscuring the scene. The creature lunges forward beneath the surface in a visible wave of displaced الأرض, tracking the runner. Its emergence is driven by mass and force — nothing is fast or twitchy, but it’s unstoppable. As it rises, parts of its body break through the surface, sending debris and sand flying in realistic arcs. The camera tracks the runner at a slight offset angle, maintaining a grounded cinematic feel — subtle shake from movement, realistic lens compression (around 70mm), shallow depth falloff with background fading into atmospheric haze. Focus stays tight on the subject while chaos unfolds behind him. Wind intensifies, carrying fine sand across the frame. Visibility drops slightly as airborne particles catch the light. The sun burns through the haze, partially blown out, creating natural glare and soft diffusion. Textures remain imperfect and real — sand behaves like actual المادة, armor shows wear and dust buildup, nothing is clean or glossy. The entire scene must feel like it was filmed in a real desert under extreme conditions. No stylization, no game-engine look, no exaggerated motion, no glowing elements. Everything is driven by physical realism, urgency, and survival.

prompts.author: @yvesai0
prompts.text: A stone being launched at an enemy castle, middle ages set in Europe. Shot 1: Wide establishing shot: a trebuchet arm releases under a harsh midday sun, bleached sky. Shot 2: Smash cut to POV — a burning stone hurtles forward, 14mm wide-angle. Flames compete with bright daylight. Hard shadows below. Wind roar. Motion blur on edges. Shot 3: POV continues over the outer castle wall. Below, a medieval fortress sprawls in direct overhead sunlight — sharp shadows on battlements, scrambling soldiers. Fire glow visible despite bright light. Speed at 80%, heat shimmer rising off stone surfaces rushing past. Shot 3: The massive tower fills the frame fast. Speed ramp to 40% in the final second — flames and ember particles float in the bright air. The burning stone meets the tower face. Shot 4: Static, wide shot. The tower collapses completely. Stone and mortar explode outward in full daylight, dust cloud white against the blue sky. Frame holds. Maintain consistent fire on the projectile throughout, harsh overhead midday lighting, hard cast shadows, white dust cloud on impact, ember particles visible in daylight, no subtitles.

prompts.author: @insmind_com
prompts.text: Main character maintains consistent face and body proportions. Cinematic time-freeze video, ultra-realistic style, ARRI Alexa Mini look, 50mm lens, natural daylight with hard shadows, shallow depth of field. Single continuous take, no cuts, no transitions, camera moves continuously. [0:00–0:03] Busy city sidewalk, time flowing normally. Front tracking shot: main character walks confidently through the crowd. People walking, using phones, talking. In the distance, pigeons flying in a clear sky. While walking, the character raises right hand and snaps fingers. [0:03–0:06] At the snap: a strong white spherical shockwave bursts from the fingers, with visible air distortion and light refraction, expanding rapidly. Shockwave freezes all dynamic elements: pedestrians freeze mid-motion, dust and leaves freeze in the air, pigeons freeze mid-flight. Static environment (buildings, street, poles, signs) must remain unchanged: no deformation, no distortion, no flicker. Only slight light sweep allowed. After the wave: complete silence, small particles floating in the air. [0:06–0:09] Camera continues moving smoothly, slightly pulling back. Character walks through frozen people, relaxed and confident. Only footsteps are heard. Character touches a frozen pigeon. It does not move but makes a low coo sound. [0:09–0:11] Camera moves to front-side angle. Character approaches a frozen woman in a flowing yellow dress, hair frozen in the air. Character looks at her, nods slightly, smiles, and says “perfect”. [0:11–0:13] Camera moves to front view. Character turns to camera, smiles, snaps fingers again. Second shockwave (stronger, reverse): everything resumes motion instantly. People walk again, pigeons fly, woman continues naturally. Character walks away. Camera rises and pulls back. Fade to black. Sound: City ambience → snap + shockwave → silence → footsteps → pigeon sound → “perfect” → second snap → reverse shockwave → city sound returns.

prompts.author: @IqraSaifiii
prompts.text: hyper-realistic, cinematic 8K scene capturing a violent ontological breach in a modern art gallery. A classical oil painting of a naval battle undergoes a catastrophic physical manifestation: a massive rogue wave detonates from the canvas, shattering the ornate golden frame into shrapnel and flooding the sterile gallery with churning, three-dimensional water. A massive tall ship charges through the breach, its bowsprit pulverizing a marble sculpture as it enters reality. On the ship’s deck, cannons fire vivid orange flashes, emitting volumetric smoke that blends with the gallery’s diffused track lighting. The scene emphasizes chaotic action: adjacent paintings are ripped from walls by sudden gale-force winds, and a modern chandelier is torn from the ceiling by the ship's rigging in a shower of sparks and plaster dust. The polished gallery floor becomes a swirling whirlpool, dragging benches and pedestals into the current. Cinematography & Technicals: Shot with a virtual Arri Alexa Mini LF, 50mm prime lens. The camera begins with a suspenseful slow push-in that transitions into a violent, handheld shake and rapid snap-zoom during the breach, followed by a low-angle tracking shot skimming the water. Lighting & Color: The clean, sterile lighting of the gallery shorts out upon water contact, replaced by strobe-like electrical sparks, flickering warm ship lanterns, and the dramatic, high-contrast glow of painted lightning from the emerging storm clouds. Rendering: Path-traced global illumination with advanced fluid dynamics for the breaching rogue wave. 60fps frame rate (conformed to 24fps) to capture the splintering wood and oil-slicked water droplets in cinematic slow-motion. PBR materials for the cracked oil texture of the sails, the polished gallery floor, and the splintering gilded wood.

prompts.text: SHOT BY SHOT ❤️ Shot 1: Extreme close-up macro of a freshly cracked ice shard, glistening, wet surface with crystalline fractures visible; a single droplet of electric-blue condensation rolls slowly down the frozen edge. Locked-off macro lens, shallow depth of field. Cool cyan backlight, dark, moody background, energy-drink commercial aesthetic. 4K, ultra-sharp detail, icy saturated color. Shot 2: Macro close-up of a lightning bolt-shaped ice sculpture shattering by an unseen force, shards bursting outward in slow motion, fine icy mist spraying into the air with electric blue particles. Slow dolly in toward the impact point. Rim-lit electric blue against a black background, high contrast editorial lighting with subtle voltage flickers. 4K, cinematic texture, crisp detail, smooth slow motion. Shot 3: Laowa probe lens pushing through a cascade of ice cubes tumbling into electric blue liquid, the camera piercing the surface and submerging into the glowing energy drink. Continuous forward probe lens push-through. Underwater refracted light with electric current effects, bubbles catching cyan backlight, vibrant storm-blue tones. 4K, sharp detail, fluid motion, no flickering. Shot 4: Extreme close-up of condensation droplets forming and rolling down the cold matte black can surface, the VOLT SURGE logo and blue lightning bolt fills the frame, "UNLEASH THE STORM" tagline visible. Slow tilt down following a droplet past the metallic silver text. Cool condensation mist, tight studio rim lighting on the aluminum with cyan edge glow. 4K, macro detail, crisp texture, commercial product aesthetic. Shot 5: Laowa probe lens gliding along the top rim of the VOLT SURGE can, skimming past the pull tab, electric blue vapor wisps rising gently from the opening. Smooth lateral tracking along the can rim. Cool cyan-teal gradient backlight, aluminum reflections, shallow depth of field, storm clouds in soft focus background. 4K, cinematic texture, smooth, steady motion. Shot 6: Wide top-down shot of ice cubes, electric blue liquid splashes, crackling lightning effects, and vapor trails exploding outward from the center frame in slow motion, scattering across a wet black glass surface with electrical arcs. Locked-off overhead camera. Dramatic overhead studio lighting with cyan accents, liquid splashes catching the light with electric charge effects, and high-end energy drink ad intensity. 4K, sharp detail, rich electric blue color, slow motion. Shot 7: Medium shot, the full hero composition settles into frame—the VOLT SURGE can stands heroic as an ice cube falls in super slow motion, creating a crown splash of electric blue liquid, droplets suspended in mid-air crackling with tiny lightning arcs, the matte black can glistens with fresh condensation, blue lightning bolt logo glowing subtly. Slow, gentle dolly in, locked low angle. Deep teal-to-black storm gradient background, studio rim lighting with electric blue edge highlights, glass shelf reflections with voltage effects, premium energy drink commercial finish. 4K, ultra sharp, rich saturated cyan-blue color, smooth, slow motion. #seedance2 #ai

prompts.text: Subject: > A highly anthropomorphic capybara with an athletic humanoid build, wearing professional aerodynamic ski gear (strapless). The capybara has dense, wind-swept fur, a stoic and intensely focused expression, and its muscular arms are tucked in a perfect "downhill tuck" position. Action: > 10-second continuous side-profile sequence. The capybara carves deep, high-velocity lines on a 45-degree alpine slope. At the 5-second mark, it hits a natural snow spine and performs a massive, clean "straight air" jump. In mid-air, it maintains a rock-solid aerodynamic posture. The landing is high-impact but smooth, with a massive explosion of powdered snow spray (rooster tail) as it continues its descent. Camera & Movement: > Perfectly parallel tracking shot (Gimbal-stabilized). The camera moves at exactly the same speed as the subject (80+ mph feel) in a strict lateral motion from left to right. Medium-long focal length (85mm style) to compress the background. The camera stays locked on the capybara's torso, even during the vertical trajectory of the jump. Environment: > A pristine, steep Olympic-level alpine run. The background consists of a minimalist, blurred mountain ridge under a piercingly blue high-altitude sky. No crowds, no flags—just raw, untouched snow and cold air. Style & Lighting: > Cinematic sci-fi sports documentary. Bright, harsh natural daylight with high-altitude blue tones. Crisp contrast with specular highlights on the snow crystals and the capybara's wet snout. Zero motion blur on the subject to maintain 4K clarity, with motion blur only affecting the rushing background and the snow spray. Technical Metadata: > 10s duration, 60fps high-shutter speed look, consistent lateral velocity, advanced snow particle physics, zero-cut sequence. #PromptEngineering #Seedance2 #AIArt #DreaminaCPP

prompts.text: A haunting 8mm old movie film style scene inside a dimly lit, decaying Victorian dining room with peeling floral wallpaper and heavy shadows. An ornate wooden dining table set for a ritual meal with lace tablecloth, old plates, and cups sits under a single flickering oil lamp that casts warm yet sinister light. A tall, menacing devil-horned goat with glowing red eyes, black fur, large twisted demonic horns, and disturbingly human-like posture suddenly enters the frame from the right dark doorway. The creature walks with an eerie, unnatural human-like gait — stiff, jerky, and twitching movements, its hooves clacking unnaturally on the wooden floor as its body twitches and spasms slightly with each step. It stops right in front of the table, stares with glowing eyes, then violently slams both front hooves onto the table with terrifying force, causing plates, cups, and silverware to rattle and scatter chaotically. Eerie low demonic growl mixed with distorted human-like breathing echoes through the room. Pure dread and occult horror atmosphere. Hyper-detailed, cinematic, authentic 8mm vintage film look — heavy film grain, scratches, dust specks, light leaks, slight jitter, faded colors with subtle sepia tone, high contrast, vignette, retro horror vibe, 24fps

prompts.tweet_text:
2. Create an infographic
For this video, I created several references of myself. I generated an influencer-style image in MJ and then replaced the face with Nano Banana.

Then I edited it to change the clothes with a hat, a Hawaiian shirt, and a beanie.

Finally, I created two logo images.

I used Gemini with its image tool to ask it to make an infographic-style image with instructions for Seedance, putting all the necessary images to create the infographic as input.

Prompt:

Create an infographic with the character's character sheet, stating that the first frame is 1.png, where the image 2.png appears with the title under image2 and where the forbidden face symbol has the subtitle SimbolBad and the image symbol with the green tick has the subtitle SimbolGood.

In the infographic, an explanation will appear with the instructions for the video model (prompt) (ALL THE PROMPT IN ENGLISH; INCLUDING DIALOGUE). Where it indicates that it starts by first frame with a person speaking who says to camera "maybe you are tired of uploading an image to seedance and it does this" and right after the character points with a raised finger at the SimbolBad symbol floating in the air, (then makes the symbol disappear) then says "you will go to this" and then it appears on the same index finger pointing at the floating green check symbol.

Then the character says: "Keep reading" and then transforms into the image where he is wearing a Hawaiian shirt (reference to the infographic's subtitle) "and create videos with real characters"...

Then there is a cut and an image of him appears with a holographic VFX style sign and then he smiles at the camera in a close up.

prompts.text: Environment: A lush prehistoric jungle during humid midday heat. Giant ferns and towering trees form a dense green canopy while sunlight beams through drifting mist. Action: 15.0s sequence from the POV of a massive Tyrannosaurus rex stalking prey through the jungle. The viewer sees the edges of massive jaws occasionally entering frame as the dinosaur breathes heavily. At the 2-second mark the dinosaur bursts into a sprint. Trees crash aside while the jungle blurs past. A herd of triceratops runs across a muddy clearing ahead. Velocity Ramp choreography: the moment the rex lunges forward slows dramatically — mud, leaves, and insects suspended in the air — before snapping back as the jaws close around the prey. Camera: Low predator POV charging through dense jungle terrain with heavy ground impact vibrations. Style & Constraints: Photorealistic creature animation, volumetric jungle atmosphere, cinematic sunlight shafts, detailed vegetation physics, 8K resolution. Made in @runwayml

prompts.author: @ai_gezgini
prompts.text: POV continuous one-take cinematic sequence with strict camera-source lock. The video begins with a grounded close-up shot identical to the reference: a woman crouching on natural soil, holding a calm owl. With her other hand, she securely mounts a small action camera onto the owl’s back using a compact harness. The camera attachment is clearly visible. Natural daylight, shallow depth of field, detailed textures. The woman immediately throws the owl upward into the air. At the exact moment the owl leaves her hands, the camera perspective switches permanently to the action camera mounted on the owl’s back. From this point onward, the entire video is strictly from this camera. No cuts, no external shots, no third-person angles. We constantly see parts of the owl’s body in frame: the back of its head and both wings moving dynamically during flight. The wings occasionally pass across the frame edges, reinforcing the POV. The owl flaps strongly to stabilize, then transitions into smooth forward flight. The owl flies alone through a dense forest. No other birds or animals are visible during flight. The motion is fluid with slight natural camera shake consistent with a lightweight action camera. Branches pass close to the lens, strong sense of speed and depth. Light flickers through leaves. The owl detects movement and lands on a thin branch. A subtle impact shake occurs. The wings partially fold and remain partially visible at the edges of the frame. A small caterpillar crawls along the branch. The owl tilts its head (visible in frame), then quickly strikes its beak enters the frame and captures the caterpillar. The owl immediately takes off again. Wings expand fully across the frame during the push-off, briefly dominating the view. The owl flies toward a large tree and enters a hollow. Lighting smoothly transitions from bright exterior to dim interior. Inside the nest, a female owl is present (this is the ONLY moment another owl appears). As the camera-owl arrives, the female owl stands up and shifts aside. The camera tilts downward: a partially cracked egg is visible. Inside, a newly hatched owl chick appears pink, featherless, partially emerged, subtle movement. The owl settles into the nest. The frame stabilizes briefly, still from the back-mounted camera, with the owl’s head and wings subtly visible at the edges. Hyper-realistic, wildlife documentary style, strict single POV, no cuts, no camera switching, continuous motion, immersive action camera realism.

prompts.author: @ZaraIrahh
prompts.text: A cinematic, photorealistic video scene of a young woman standing quietly in a lush wildflower meadow, viewed from behind. The subject is clearly female, with long brown dark hair, slightly messy and natural. She e wears a dark jacket and carries a small black backpack slung over one shoulder, standing still in a calm, contemplative posture at the center of the frame. The foreground is densely filled with abundant, colorful wildflowers positioned extremely close to the camera, creating strong foreground presence. Numerous small blossoms in white, pale pink, soft orange, light red, and subtle yellow tones are layered among tall green grass and thin natural stems. As the camera moves forward, the foreground flowers slide past the frame edges and move noticeably faster than the subject and background, creating clear and natural parallax depth. Some flowers briefly cross in front of the lens, partially obscuring the frame, with soft focus, cinematic bokeh, and organic motion. A gentle breeze causes continuous subtle movement in the flowers and grass. On the left side of the frame, a large mature tree with a thick trunk stands prominently. Its dense branches and leaves extend overhead, partially framing the sky. The sky is dramatic and expansive with large, textured blue-gray clouds. The sun sits low behind the clouds, partially hidden, with warm golden sunlight breaking through gaps in the clouds and tree branches. Strong volumetric light rays radiate outward, with soft lens flare, light bloom, and floating dust or pollen particles visible in the air. Lighting is natural and cinematic: soft yet intense golden-hour sunlight, cool blue-gray cloud tones, high dynamic range with glowing highlights and gentle shadow falloff. Global illumination is realistic and atmospheric. Color grading is cinematic and slightly desaturated: muted yet lush greens, rich but soft flower colors, warm golden highlights, calm cool sky tones. The mood is peaceful, reflective, emotional, and slightly nostalgic. Camera movement: the camera starts very low near the ground and slowly dollies forward toward the man, maintaining a low-angle perspective throughout. Foreground flowers move rapidly relative to the subject, creating strong cinematic parallax and depth during the dolly movement. Lens is a 35mm cinematic lens with shallow depth of field and realistic motion blur. Ultra-detailed textures, natural physics, high realism, cinematic emotional storytelling.

prompts.text: Cinematic high-energy multi-shot video, 15 rapid dynamic shots telling a complete story, fast-paced exam morning race against time, One Punch Man manga art style with bold ink lines, dramatic shading, speed lines, and expressive exaggerated reactions, consistent teenage boy around 17 years old, messy spiky black bed hair sticking up wildly, tired dark circles under eyes, white school uniform shirt half untucked with buttons misaligned, navy blue pants, school bag hanging open, slice of bread clenched in mouth, determined panicked expression, black and white manga aesthetic with high contrast shadows and dynamic motion blur. Shot 1: Close-up on his phone alarm showing "EXAM IN 10 MIN" with multiple missed alarms, he jolts awake in a messy bedroom surrounded by scattered textbooks, eyes bulging in classic manga shock expression with sweat drops flying, dramatic speed lines radiating outward. Handheld urgent camera, tense upbeat music starts. Shot 2: Medium tracking shot from behind, the same teenage boy around 17 with messy spiky black bed hair, half-untucked white shirt, frantically stuffs books into his open bag while hopping on one foot trying to put on shoes, bread slice shoved in mouth, manga-style motion blur and action lines, heavy breathing audio. Shot 3: Quick cut to exterior wide shot of house gate at morning, dramatic sunlight streaming through, the same teenage boy around 17 with messy spiky black bed hair, half-untucked white shirt, bread in mouth, bursts through gate with explosive manga impact lines, shirt flapping wildly, bag still open with papers flying out. Shot 4: Dynamic over-the-shoulder medium shot following the same teenage boy around 17 with messy spiky black bed hair, half-untucked white shirt, bread in mouth, as he sprints down residential street while simultaneously zipping bag and tucking shirt, One Punch Man style exaggerated running pose with intense determination, fast dolly forward with speed line effects. Shot 5: Close-up on his wristwatch showing critical time mixed with close-up on his determined face, bread still clenched in teeth, sweat beads flying in manga style, pupils shrinking with realization, dramatic shadow across face, rhythmic running footsteps SFX. Shot 6: Medium shot, the same teenage boy around 17 with messy spiky black bed hair, half-untucked white shirt, stops suddenly, manga-style serious expression takes over, he swallows the bread dramatically, cracks his neck, assumes a powerful running stance, text effect appears reading "SUPERFAST MODE ACTIVATED" in bold manga lettering. Shot 7: Low-angle explosive tracking shot as the same teenage boy around 17 with messy spiky black bed hair launches forward with One Punch Man serious series running style, ground cracking beneath feet, massive dust cloud eruption, dramatic speed lines filling entire frame, sonic boom visual effect. Shot 8: Wide shot of busy morning street, the same teenage boy around 17 with messy spiky black bed hair becomes a blur streak passing cars, buses, and motorcycles, vehicles appear frozen in comparison, drivers' shocked manga expressions with bulging eyes, wind blast effects hitting pedestrians. Shot 9: POV shot from his perspective, world becoming motion blur tunnel, buildings stretching into speed lines, exam hall appearing in distance growing rapidly larger, intense wind audio and heartbeat SFX. Shot 10: Wide shot of exam hall exterior, the same teenage boy around 17 with messy spiky black bed hair skids to dramatic stop leaving smoke trail, One Punch Man landing pose with one knee down, dust settling around him, other late students staring in disbelief with dropped jaws. Shot 11: Medium shot, he walks into exam hall with newfound calm confidence, the same teenage boy around 17 with messy spiky black bed hair now slightly windswept but cooler looking, half-untucked shirt now appearing intentionally stylish, finds his seat, sits down with smooth motion, dramatic shadow framing. Shot 12: Close-up on his hand grabbing pen with intense grip, paper sliding in front of him, eyes scanning questions with manga-style analytical gaze, multiple thought bubbles showing rapid problem solving, pen begins moving at superhuman speed. Shot 13: Time-lapse medium shot, the same teenage boy around 17 with messy spiky black bed hair writing furiously, pages flipping rapidly, other students still on first questions looking confused, his pen creating smoke from friction, clock hands spinning in background. prompts.text: A haunting Illuminati human sacrifice ceremony captured in authentic 8mm old movie film style, grainy, scratched, and faded like a forbidden 1970s occult ritual reel. Inside a dimly lit ancient stone temple chamber with rough walls covered in crudely painted glowing occult symbols and the all-seeing eye. A circle of hooded high priests in tattered black and crimson robes embroidered with crude golden pyramids stand solemnly around a large stone sacrificial altar. On the altar lies a terrified, beautiful young woman in a thin white ritual gown, tightly strapped down with heavy black leather restraints across her wrists, ankles, chest, and thighs; her eyes wide with panic, body trembling as she awaits her fate. The priests chant in low, eerie voices and hold rusty ceremonial daggers raised high. Thick incense smoke drifts lazily through the air, barely visible through the film grain. Dramatic low-key lighting with harsh shadows, heavy film grain, scratches, dust specks, light leaks, color fading, vignette, jittery old film look, authentic 8mm footage aesthetic, retro horror atmosphere. Camera movement: smooth but imperfect cinematic hover shot in the style of an old 8mm camera on a makeshift dolly — begins at eye level tightly framed on the lead priest’s hooded face and raised dagger with slight film shake, then slowly glides forward through the circle of chanting priests while gradually ascending, rising higher with subtle handheld unsteadiness until it reaches a perfect top-down bird’s-eye view directly above the sacrificial table, revealing the full ritual and the strapped woman from straight overhead as the ceremony intensifies. Ultra-smooth motion with authentic 8mm film jitter and breathing, 24fps, vintage film stock, high contrast, desaturated colors with slight sepia tone.

prompts.author: @ChangningL29508
prompts.text: A hyper-realistic, high-octane cinematic video. A colossal, barnacled humpback whale violently erupts from a turbulent, deep blue ocean in a massive, twisting breach, sending explosive shockwaves of frothing white water high into the air. Riding the apex of the whale's back is a fiercely athletic ballerina in a shimmering, electric-blue tutu. Instead of remaining still, she harnesses the whale's upward momentum to launch into a spectacular, gravity-defying grand jeté directly over the churning abyss.Suddenly, an unexpected twist: as the whale reaches its peak, the crashing water violently ignites with bioluminescence, and a massive swarm of glowing, neon-pink flying fish erupts from the foam, soaring like arrows all around the suspended dancer. The camera abandons a slow orbit for a kinetic, fast-paced whip-pan, tracking the dancer's flight through the glowing sea-spray, dodging the flying fish, before plunging momentarily underwater just as the whale's massive tail slams down with catastrophic force. The warm golden hour lighting is dramatically pierced by a sudden, jagged bolt of violet lightning across the horizon. Audio features a deafening, thunderous roar of crashing water, the sharp crack of lightning, the chaotic fluttering of wet wings, and a soaring, high-tempo orchestral crescendo that cuts abruptly to silence as the camera dips below the surface."

prompts.author: @ritesh_ai
prompts.text: STYLE Futuristic retail meets street realism. Shot like a real-world viral moment — busy, imperfect, layered with background life. Digital elements feel physical — weight, resistance, light spill. Color palette: warm market tones (fabric stalls, skin, sunlight) contrasted with cool digital screen glow. Hyper-detailed textures: screen glare, fingerprints, fabric weave, subtle dust in air. MOTION Shot 1 — Establish Market Energy 35mm handheld — crowded street market, people moving in all directions. Camera weaving through bodies, slightly obstructed view, natural chaos. Digital screen stands among stalls — vertical, clean, out of place. Shot 2 — Approach + Interaction Camera settles as she steps into frame. Medium shot — she pauses in front of the screen. Subtle curiosity, not exaggerated. She lifts her hand and scrolls — screen reacts instantly with smooth UI motion. Shot 3 — Dress Appears Close on screen — a dress rotates slowly, fabric simulation realistic, light catching folds. Her reflection faintly visible on glass surface. She pauses scroll. Hand hovers. Shot 4 — Pull Through Moment (Hero Action) She reaches forward — fingers touch screen surface. There’s slight resistance — like pushing into liquid glass. Fingers pass through. She grips the dress fabric and pulls it outward — fabric emerges from screen with weight and drag. Screen surface distorts slightly around her arm. Camera moves closer instinctively, slight shake — reacting to the impossibility. Shot 5 — Instant Wear Transition As she pulls the dress fully out — quick motion across her body. Seamless transformation: Current outfit transitions into the pulled dress mid-motion — not a flash cut, but a continuous morph tied to fabric movement. Cloth settles naturally on her body — gravity, folds, tension all realistic. Shot 6 — Screen Aftermath Cut to screen — now blank. Only faint glow, subtle reflections of market behind. No UI, no content — completely empty. Shot 7 — Walk Away (Fashion Beat) She turns and walks into the market wearing the dress. Camera follows briefly — people pass, no one reacts. Fabric moves naturally with her steps — wind interaction, slight friction sounds. Shot 8 — Loop Closure Beat Camera drifts back to the screen as another passerby steps in. Hand reaches toward the blank display. Just before touch — frame aligns compositionally with earlier interaction moment. AUDIO Market ambience: chatter, footsteps, vendors calling, distant traffic. Screen interaction: soft digital hum, subtle tactile “pressure” sound when hand enters. Fabric pull: light tension + release sound. After transformation: ambience returns fully, grounding the moment.
